text: Last year international laws and fundamental principles of international relations were openly ignored on the international arena and sovereignties of various countries violated owing to the outrageous infringement and intervention by the hegemonic forces. Anyhow, a nuclear war, feared so much by the world people, has not broken out on the Korean peninsula, the hottest spot in the world. This was because nukes of tyranny were contained by nukes of justice. The army and people of the DPRK got more confident that the road of holding the new line of simultaneously pushing forward the economic construction and the building of nuclear force advanced by the Party and bolstering up the nuclear deterrence in every way is the most correct one to be followed by them to the end. Their will to defend peace on the Korean Peninsula and the region grew stronger. The DPRK emerged a world-level nuclear power and rocket power possessed of A-bomb, H-bomb and ICBM. The U.S. got hell-bent in nuclear war drills but dared not to provoke the DPRK possessed of powerful war deterrent. The two law-governed traditions in which victory belongs to the DPRK but defeat to the U.S. continued last year, a proof that the DPRK's line of simultaneously developing the two fronts is the most just one and the way of rapidly bolstering the nuclear force chosen by the latter was entirely right. Ri Hyon Do
title: DPRK's Strategic Decision Is Just

text: Jan. 7 witnessed meetings of workers, trade union members, agricultural workers and members of the Union of Agricultural Workers of Korea to vow the implementation of the tasks set forth in the New Year Address of respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un in the plaza in front of the Monument to Party Founding and at the Chongsan Co-op Farm in Kangso District, Nampho City. Reports were made and vowing speeches also delivered at the meetings. The reporters and speakers said that the New Year Address serves as a guideline which all the more inspired the people with the confidence in final victory in the accomplishment of the revolutionary cause of Juche and with optimism and which illuminates the way ahead. They also noted that it serves as a militant banner of encouraging all the service personnel and people to speed up the grand Mallima advance. They called for upholding this year's slogan "Let us launch a revolutionary general offensive to achieve fresh victory on all fronts of building a powerful socialist country!" to frustrate the challenges of the hostile forces making last-ditch efforts and raise the overall power of the Republic to a new stage of development. They also appealed to the people to make more vigorous efforts to bring earlier the final victory of Juche revolution under the great plans in the New Year Address. The outline for the socialist emulation for the creation of Mallima speed 2018 was made public at the meetings. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Workers Meet to Pledge New Year Tasks Fulfillment

text: Mass rallies took place in North and South Phyongan and Hwanghae provinces, Jagang Province and Nampho City of the DPRK on Jan. 6 and 7 to pledge the implementation of the tasks set forth in the New Year Address of respected Supreme LeaderKim Jong Un. Attending them were officials of local party and power organs, working people's organizations, industrial establishments, farms, universities and other units and working citizens and youths and students. Reports and pledge-making speeches were made at the rallies. The reporters and speakers said the New Year Address serves as a militant banner giving the firm faith in victory in the revolutionary cause of Juche and optimism to the army and people and greatly encouraging them to the building of a powerful socialist country. They appealed to all the officials and Party members and other working people to launch a revolutionary general offensive dynamically to achieve fresh victory on all fronts of building of a powerful socialist country by taking the historic victory in the building of the DPRK's nuclear forces as a springboard for fresh progress. They called for making vigorous efforts to bring earlier the final victory in the Juche revolution under the bright blueprint unfolded by the Supreme Leader in the New Year Address, rallied closer around the Workers' Party of Korea. At the end of the rallies there were demonstrations. The demonstrators marched through the plazas and streets, chanting revolutionary and militant slogans. Rodong News Team
title: People of Various Localities Vow to Fulfill This Year Tasks

text: Events took place in various countries to celebrate the 6th anniversary of respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's assumption of the supreme commandership of the Korean People's Army (KPA). There were a seminar in Uganda, round-table talks in Ethiopia and book exhibitions and film shows in Nigeria between Dec. 22 and 29 last year. Personages of the Ugandan National Executive Committee of the Pan-African Movement and the Ugandan National Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea said that the KPA has further developed into an invincible army since Kim Jong Un's assumption of its supreme commandership. And they stressed that the achievements made by the Korean people in the struggle to defend the sovereignty of the country would have been unthinkable without the outstanding guidance of President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il and Kim Jong Un carrying forward their revolutionary cause. Speakers at the round-table talks in Ethiopia said that Kim Jong Un is a great man to be followed by heads of state of all other countries and the strongest leader in the world, adding that they envy the Korean army and people their good fortune of having him as the Supreme Commander. Figures of Nigeria noted that HE Kim Jong Un has trained the KPA to be an invincible army and bolstered up the military capability of the country, stressing that the Korean people led by him will surely emerge victorious in the standoff with the U.S. imperialists. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Jong Un's Feats Praised by Foreign Figures

text: There were DPRK book, photo and handicraft exhibitions in Guinea, Turkey, Sweden and Mexico to mark the 26th anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il's assumption of the supreme commandership of the Korean People's Army (KPA), the 6th anniversary of respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's assumption of the KPA supreme commandership and the 100th birth anniversary of the anti-Japanese war heroine Kim Jong Suk. On display at the venues were photos showing the feats of President Kim Il Sung, leader Kim Jong Il and respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. Also there were works of the peerlessly great men, books and photos introducing the reality of Juche Korea and handicrafts showing the creative skills of the Korean people. The general secretary of the Democratic Rally of Africa-Democratic Party of Guinea said that the DPRK, which developed under the guidance of President Kim Il Sung and HE Kim Jong Il, is making signal achievements in all sectors under the leadership of HE Kim Jong Un. Personages of Sweden said that the exhibition underway despite the situation more acute than ever before due to the U.S. and other hostile forces' nuclear threats and moves to isolate and stifle the DPRK, was of great significance in having correct understanding of the DPRK. They underlined the need to hold such exhibitions more frequently in the future, too, so as to further develop the bilateral cultural and friendly ties. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Book, Photo and Handicraft Exhibitions Held Abroad

text: The Brazilian Center for the Study of the Juche Idea posted the full text of President Kim Il Sung's work "Let Us Overthrow Imperialism" on its website on January 5. The work, published on October 17, Juche 15 (1926), clarifies the idea that it is necessary to fight to the last against the Japanese imperialists to free the popular masses from colonial slavery. It also sets forth tasks to overthrow the Japanese imperialists and achieve the independence of Korea so as to make sure that the Korean people lead a free and happy life and creditably carry out the sacred cause of overthrowing all imperialism on the earth to make the oppressed working people of the whole world lead a free and happy life. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Il Sung's Work Introduced in Brazil

text: The art squad of the Central Committee of the Kimilsungist-Kimjongilist Youth League gave a performance at the Central Youth Hall on Jan. 17, the 72nd anniversary of the founding of the Youth League. Among the audience were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the C.C., Workers' Party of Korea, Pak Chol Min, first secretary of the C.C., Youth League, and officials of the youth league, youths and students. Colorful numbers were put on the stage at the performance that began with light music and chorus "March of Korean Youth". The performers praised President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il for building a youth power without an equal in the world. They depicted the fact that the victorious history of the Korean youth movement invariably continues thanks to respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. Also put on the stage were numbers reflecting the zeal of the Korean youths who are determined to devotedly defend the Party Central Committee and perform heroic feats on all fronts of defending socialism and building an economic power. Rodong News Team
title: Art Squad of Korean Youth Gives Performance

text: A Swiss preparatory committee for celebrating the 76th birth anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il was formed in Basel on Jan. 14. Martin Lotscher, chairman of the Switzerland-Korea Committee and chief of the Swiss Group for the Study of the Juche Idea, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The preparatory committee set a celebration period from Jan. 21 to Feb. 17 and decided to organize colorful political and cultural events in the period. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Jong Il's Birth Anniversary to Be Marked in Switzerland

text: An appeal to all Koreans at home and abroad was adopted at the joint conference of the government, political parties and organizations of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea held on Jan. 24. They called upon all Koreans with the strong will to make this auspicious year an eventful year noteworthy in the history of the nation by pooling the efforts of our nation as follows: 1. Let us turn out as one in the nationwide drive to improve the north-south relations and make a breakthrough for independent reunification, true to the noble patriotic intention of the peerlessly great man! It is the steadfast will of all Koreans who have turned out for implementing the noble intention of the peerlessly great man to bring great changes to the north-south relations as early as possible and make a new history of independent reunification. Let us rapidly improve the north-south relations and pave a wide avenue to rosy future of the nation which will be reunified, strong and prosperous! Let us make the whole land of Korea seethe with hot wind for independent reunification and courageously advance the north-south relations along the way indicated by the June 15 joint declaration and the October 4 declaration! Let us decisively smash all sophisms and attempts to slander the nuclear treasured sword of the nation and justice and brand it as a hurdle in the way for the improvement of the north-south relations! 2. Let us wage an energetic drive to defuse the acute military tension between the north and the south and create a peaceful climate on the Korean Peninsula! Let all Koreans at home and abroad turn out to decisively oppose and reject all hostile acts and war moves aggravating the situation and wrecking peace! Let all Koreans become shields and strong castle walls in the struggle to defend security of the nation and peace on this land! Let all Koreans rise up in the peace-keeping struggle against war to baffle the reckless nuclear war moves of the U.S. which brings disaster to this land, setting dangerous flames! 3. Let us promote contact, travel, cooperation and exchange between the north and the south on a wide scale and actively create a climate for national reconciliation and reunification! Let us promote contact, travel, cooperation and exchange between the north and the south on a wide scale to remove mutual misunderstanding and distrust and make all the fellow countrymen fulfill their responsibility and role as the driving force of national reunification! Let the people of all strata in the north and the south bring down the barrier of national division and share kindred feelings by freely traveling by air and sea and overland and actively promote the trend of reconciliation and unity! Let's reenergize inter-political party, inter-strata and inter-sector contacts and dialogues and activate cooperation and exchange at home and abroad to stir up the climate of reunification! Let all compatriots wage a more vigorous struggle to get rid of anachronistic legal and institutional mechanisms harassing the fresh tide of national reconciliation and unity and prevent hostile actions! We will courageously smash all challenges going against the nation's desire for reunification, hold with splendor joint events of the nation involving political parties and organizations and personages at home and abroad on the anniversaries of north-south declarations, the 73rd anniversary of national liberation and other occasions this year and thus demonstrate the nati
title: DPRK Joint Conference Calls for Making This Year Noteworthy in History of Nation

text: A Bangladeshi preparatory committee for celebrating leader Kim Jong Il's birth anniversary (the Day of the Shining Star) was formed on Jan. 16. MD. Harun-Ar-Rashid, chairman of the Bangladesh-Korea Friendship and Solidarity Committee, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The committee decided to hold colorful political and cultural events such as seminar praising Kim Jong Il's feats for the Korean revolution and the human cause of independence. Rodong News Team
title: Day of Shining Star to Be Marked in Bangladesh

text: Tillerson and other riffraff of the U.S. Department of State are now claiming that they "welcome" the inter-Korean dialogue but it is necessary to put persistent pressure upon the DPRK and the U.S. will pursue a policy of "maximum pressure". Japanese Prime Minister Abe, during his recent junkets to European countries, begged for sanctions and pressure on the DPRK. Shortly ago, delegates of the countries that participated in the Korean War and Japan were closeted over intensified pressure against the DPRK in Canada, under the U.S. scenario. It is not particular that the U.S. and its followers talk about sanctions and pressure against the DPRK from the beginning of the year. It was a miscalculation of the U.S. that the DPRK would surrender like some countries that destroyed their hard-gained war deterrence, yielding to its persistent sanctions, pressure, military threat and blackmail. However, the army and people of the DPRK have made eye-opening successes on all fronts of building a powerful socialist country by giving vent to their soaring hatred against enemies and enthusiasm for retaliating against them despite the harshest sanctions. The reality clearly proves that no sanctions, blockade and military pressure of the U.S. can ever check the dynamic advance of Juche Korea based on the spirit of self-reliance and self-development. The U.S. hostile policy and sanctions against the DPRK are, in a nutshell, bound to go bankrupt. It is ridiculous that the U.S. and its followers talk about "additional and unilateral sanctions" as they have no economic dealings and contact with the DPRK. Ri Hyon Do
title: Policy of Pressure against DPRK Is Doomed to Failure

text: "America first" is the chauvinist doctrine which is driving the U.S. into isolation and ruin as it persists in inequality and racial discrimination in the international relations and the war-first doctrine wrecking global peace, prompted by its hegemonic nature. It is also extreme state egoism driving the U.S. into isolation politically and economically. The burglarious logic for aggression "America first" justifying the act of depriving other countries and nations of sovereignty and rights to existence and development serves as strong catalyst accelerating ruin of the empire of evils in every part of the world. "America first" calling for sacrificing the world for its own abundant life drives even the allies and henchmen of the U.S. into a dilemma and creates a chaos in the overall West economy. "America first" is being buffeted by criticism of the international community as it is a doctrine to turn the world into a theatre of rampage by the jungle law through highhanded and arbitrary practices. It is natural in the light of the law of causality that the empire of evils wielding "America first" stick for aggression and plunder in the world is hit by the international community. "America first", Yankee-style hegemonic doctrine saying that everything should exist for the U.S., accelerates isolation and ruin of the empire of evils in all aspects of politics, economy, military affairs and diplomacy. Ri Hyo Jin
title: "America First" Drives U.S. into Isolation and Ruin

text: A spokesperson for the Korean National Peace Committee issued a statement on Jan. 28 with the approach of 60 years since the U.S. officially published the introduction of nuclear weapons into south Korea. The U.S. officially announced the above-said introduction on January 29, 1958 and undisguisedly opened to public nukes including atomic guns and Honest John nuclear missiles. Thenceforth the Korean Peninsula, once a nuclear free zone, has turned into a nuclear powder magazine and a source of nuclear war of the U.S. and the Korean nation has been at constant peril of nuclear war due to its nuclear stick. Even at this time when the climate of national concord, unity and detente is growing strong on the Korean Peninsula thanks to our proactive measures and sincere efforts, the U.S. is bringing nuclear carrier task forces, nuclear strategic bombers and other huge nuclear war means to south Korea and its vicinity, imposing constant nuclear war threat and blackmail on our nation. What should not be overlooked is the fact that the U.S. is planning to designate the DPRK as "potential state of nuclear threat" and stipulate even the scenario for preemptive nuclear strike in the "2018 nuclear posture review report" to be published around early February. The past sixty years are a history of heinous aggression and crimes in which the U.S. reduced south Korea into the world's biggest nuclear weapons arsenal and most dangerous seat of nuclear war and has constantly threatened the destiny of the Korean nation with nukes. The U.S. would be well advised to behave itself, aware that the days have gone for good when it could pose its unilateral threat to the DPRK with a nuclear stick. The south Korean authorities should stop the shipment of U.S. nuclear strategic assets and aggressor forces which will spawn bloodshed on this sacred territory, cease the nuclear war exercises with the U.S. and respond to our sincere efforts for detente. All compatriots in the north and the south and abroad should reject the anti-DPRK moves of the U.S. to bring clouds of a nuclear war to hang over Korea, and conduct more vigorous anti-U.S., anti-war struggle to drive the U.S. nuclear hardware and aggression forces out of south Korea. Rodong News Team
title: KNPC Spokesman Calls for Foiling U.S. Nuclear War Moves

text: A Romanian preparatory committee for celebrating the birth anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il (Day of the Shining Star) was formed on Jan. 20. Constantin Rotaru, chairman of the Socialist Party of Romania, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The committee set a celebration period from Jan. 20 to Feb. 18 and decided to hold colorful political and cultural events in praise of the revolutionary career and feats of Kim Jong Il and the wise guidance of respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un in the period. Rodong News Team
title: Day of Shining Star to Be Marked in Romania

text: Officials of the organizations of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon) on Jan. 30 made public statements in support of an appeal of the joint conference of the DPRK government, political parties and organizations to all the Korean nationals at home and abroad. Ri Tong Je, chairman of the Association of Koreans in Japan for Peaceful Reunification, stressed that he would spare no effort to stick to and carry forward the spirit of the joint conference of representatives of political parties and public organizations in north and south Korea and ensure that a joint national event to be attended by all political parties, organizations and personages at home and abroad would be successfully held on such occasions as the anniversaries of north-south declarations and the 73rd anniversary of national liberation this year marking the 70th anniversary of the said joint conference. Kim Yong Ju, chairman of the Central Standing Committee of the Korean Youth League in Japan, said that the Korean youth and students in Japan would always stand in the van of the struggle to decisively smash the nuclear war exercises and all other obstructive moves of the U.S. and anti-reunification forces and bring about a fresh era of peace and reunification on the Korean Peninsula under the unfurled banner of By Our Nation Itself by further strengthening solidarity and unity with the fellow countrymen in the north and the south and abroad. Ryang Ok Chul, vice-chairperson of the Central Standing Committee of the Korean Democratic Women's Union in Japan, said that the union officials and all other Korean women would fulfill their mission and duty they assumed before the country and the nation, with the strong will to go all out to glorify this year as a year of great change and great event to be noteworthy in the history of national reunification. Rodong News Team
title: Chongryon Officials Back Appeal of DPRK

text: The U.S. has recently tried hard to drive the situation on the Korean Peninsula into confrontation again by marring the atmosphere for detente and improvement of the inter-Korean relations created thanks to the patriotic and proactive efforts of the DPRK. It shows that the U.S., upset by the hard-won climate of national reconciliation and unity and the improvement of the inter-Korean ties on the peninsula, is making desperate efforts to prevent the trend at any cost. The U.S. claims to "back" the inter-Korean dialogue, but it is nothing but an artifice to cover up its sinister intention to persistently coil up the tension on the peninsula. Such criminal act is a dangerous scheme to start a war for aggression on the DPRK. Watching the Trump group seek to hinder the inter-Korean dialogue and openly aggravate the situation, the Korean nation and the international community clearly see once again through the black-hearted intention of the U.S., harasser of dialogue and peace and nuclear war maniac. The reality proves that so long as the U.S. persists in its sinister scheme and anti-reunification interference, it is impossible to expect smooth development of the inter-Korean ties and achieve the peace and stability of the peninsula. Un Jong Chol
title: Rash Acts of Marring Atmosphere of Improved Inter-Korean Ties

text: A spokesman of the Committee for Aiding Overseas Compatriots of the DPRK in a statement Tuesday denounced the Japanese reactionaries for getting frantic in their suppression of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon). The joint investigation headquarters, made up of policemen from the Metropolitan Police Office and Saitama Prefecture of Japan, on Feb. 1 hurled more than 100 armed policemen to search the Tokyo Metropolitan Headquarters of Chongryon and the house of a Chongryon official and the Future Foundation set up for rendering support for the Korean school. Earlier on Jan. 31, the Japan police authorities walked off the former chairman of the Katsushika branch of Chongryon on charges of "violation of the law on secondhand dealers". Charging that the banknote of the former Chongryon branch chairman had a record of remitting money to Chongryon organization, they ransacked the Tokyo Metropolitan Headquarters of Chongryon and the house of a Chongryon official who had nothing to do with the remittance. Lurking behind the recent acts hostile toward the DPRK and Chongryon which the Japanese reactionaries committed in broad daylight is a crafty and sordid political attempt peculiar to the island country, the spokesman said, and went on: Clear is the aim sought by Japan through its rare act of swindling which it orchestrated with much effort. That is to charge Chongryon, a dignified overseas citizens' organization of the DPRK, as an "illegal organization" and "lawless body", heighten atmosphere against the DPRK and Chongryon throughout Japan, escalate the tension on the Korean peninsula with it as an occasion and thus pave the way for realizing Japan's dirty militarist ambition. The Japanese authorities' frantic anti-Chongryon and anti-Korean moves will only disclose the despicable and shameless nature of Japan as the tundra of human rights and a political dwarf. If the Japanese authorities do not stop at once such vicious and childish suppression of Chongryon and Koreans in Japan, they will be made to hold full responsibility for the catastrophic consequences to be entailed by such acts. Rodong News Team
title: Japanese Reactionaries' Suppression of Chongryon Blasted

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly, who is heading a high-level delegation of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, on Feb. 9 attended the pre-opening ceremony reception held before the 23rd Winter Olympics and met with Moon Jae In, president of south Korea. Kim Yong Nam exchanged warm greetings with Moon Jae In and had a photo session with him. Kim Yong Nam also exchanged greetings with heads of state and government of different countries who came to attend the opening ceremony of the Olympics at the said reception. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Yong Nam Meets Moon Jae In

text: A preparatory committee for celebrating the birth anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il (the Day of the Shining Star) was formed by the Lenin Young Communist League of the Russian Federation on Feb. 2. V. P. Isakov, first secretary of the league, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The committee set the celebration period from Feb. 2 to 17 and decided to organize colorful political and cultural events such as a seminar and film show in praise of the revolutionary career and feats of Kim Jong Il in this period. Rodong News Team
title: Day of Shining Star to Be Marked in Russia

text: Fireworks were displayed in the sky above Pyongyang on Feb. 16 evening in celebration of the birth anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il. Kim Il Sung Square, Mansu Hill and Okryu Bridge centering on the bank of the Taedong River where the Tower of the Juche Idea stands and other places of the capital city were crowded with citizens from all walks of life and school youth and children eager to see the fireworks. At 19:00, the display of celebration fireworks began amid the playing of song "We Present You Bouquet". The loyal mind of all the army and people to glorify the greatest auspicious day of the nation, the revolutionary holiday when the heaven-sent great man was born, represented a beautiful scene in the February sky. Rodong News Team
title: Fireworks Displayed in Pyongyang

text: A delegation of the DPRK-Russia Fishery Joint Committee headed by Vice-Minister of Fisheries Kim Chang Do left Pyongyang on Feb. 16 to attend the 30th meeting of the DPRK-Russia Joint Committee on cooperation in the fishery due in Russia. Rodong News Team
title: Delegation of DPRK-Russia Fishery Joint Committee Leaves for Russia

text: Ambassador Alexandr Matsegora and Military Attache Alexei Bartusov of the Russian embassy in Pyongyang gave a reception at the Taedonggang Diplomatic Club on Feb. 22 to mark the Day of Defenders of the Motherland. Present there on invitation were Army Col. General Kim Hyong Ryong, vice-minister of the People's Armed Forces, generals and officers of the Korean People's Army, officials concerned, and representatives and military attaches of foreign embassies in Pyon gyang. Staff members of the Russian embassy were on hand. Rodong News Team
title: Russian Ambassador and Military Attache Host Reception

text: March 1 marks the 25th anniversary of the publication of leader Kim Jong Il's work "Abuses of Socialism Are Intolerable". The work, published on Mar. 1, Juche 82 (1993), deals with the falsity and reactionary nature of the sophistry of the renegades of revolution slandering socialism as "totalitarian", "barracks-like" and "administrative and commanding". It gives clear exposition of such theoretical and practical matters arising in socialist construction as the issues of making the people have an unshakable faith in socialism and regard it as their morale to defend it, displaying the superiority of socialism to the full, and adhering to the principle of collectivism. Notably it clarifies the idea that all the people should have an unshakable faith in socialism. The years after the publication of the work have been a proud course during which the indomitable revolutionary spirit of the Korean army and people regarding socialism as their lifeblood has been fully displayed. In those days the imperialists went all the more frantic in their moves to isolate and suffocate and disintegrate Korean-style socialism. The danger of war has never been removed on this land. As our people had firm faith, they could brave ordeals of history, invariably holding high the red flag of revolution at a crossroads: whether to choose independence or submission, and whether to defend socialism or opt for capitalism. Thanks to the army and people with the iron will to firmly defend their country, Korean-style socialism remains unfazed under any trial. Ri Hyo Jin
title: Korean-style Socialism Remains Unfazed

text: The Abe group goes frantic with the racket against the DPRK, spouting vituperation that they agreed with the U.S. president on the maximum pressure against the DPRK and dialogue without condition should not be held with the DPRK. This is a ludicrous act of dwarf politicians of Japan which is tantamount to one state of the U.S. Japan is an island nation parasitic on the U.S. It is Japan's bad habit to give impertinent admonition to others though it is in a poor position to beg for something with the backing of the U.S. It was more glaringly revealed at the opening ceremony of the 23rd Winter Olympics and so Japan became a butt of ridicule. The work on the Korean Peninsula is the issue to be solved by our nation responsible for it. Japan has no justification to meddle in it. Nevertheless, the Abe group persists in childish and humiliating mendicant diplomacy in an attempt to realize its black-hearted intention. The jargon that dialogue without condition should not be held with the DPRK makes even a cat laugh. Those who committed thrice-cursed crimes against the Korean nation are not qualified to talk about dialogue. The only condition for Japan to deal with the DPRK is to make reparation for its hideous crimes committed against the Korean people. Abe and his stooges should think of consequences to be entailed by their refusal to do so and their reckless act to realize the wild ambition for reinvasion at any cost. Son So Yon
title: Ridiculous Anti-DPRK Racket of Abe Group

text: The 33rd Science and Technology Festival of Pyongyang University of Architecture took place on Feb. 26-28. The festival was held in the form of presentation, exhibition and exchange of new technology, divided into panels of architecture, city management, land and environment protection, construction engineering, construction management, architectural materials, construction machinery and IT. Presented to it were more than 130 scientific and technological proposals, and successes and experience were exchanged during the festival. Rodong News Team
title: Sci-Tech Festival of Pyongyang University of Architecture Held

text: The South Headquarters of the Pan-National Alliance for Korea's Reunification, the Association for Supporting Prisoners of Conscience of the Family Movement for Realizing Democracy, the Society of April Revolution and other organizations of south Korea held a news conference in Seoul on Feb. 27 to pledge to vigorously fight against the U.S. preventing the peace process on the Korean Peninsula, according to the south Korean online paper Tongil News. The speakers said that they would continue the struggle together with all the anti-U.S. forces until the north-targeted nuclear war drills including the U.S.-south Korea joint military exercises are terminated forever, a DPRK-U.S. peace accord is concluded and the U.S. troops are withdrawn from south Korea. Rodong News Team
title: S. Korean Bodies Vow to Fight against U.S.

text: The delegation of the Far Eastern Branch of the Russian Academy of Sciences led by Academician Valentine Sergiyenko, chief of the Branch who is vice-president of the Academy of Sciences, left Pyongyang for home on Mar. 2. Rodong News Team
title: Russian Delegation Leaves

text: The "Liberal Korea Party" (LKP) group including Hong Jun Phyo and Kim Mu Song staged disgusting confrontational farce while talking about "sinking of 'Cheonan' warship" and "bombing" as regards the south Korean visit by the DPRK's high-ranking delegation. The wild act of the south Korean conservative group is an intolerable provocation to the DPRK's efforts and measures for national concord and the improvement of the north-south relations, and a hysterical fit to get rid of the crisis of destruction. It is utterly shocking for the conservatives including those of the LKP to kick up the racket even by faulting the DPRK high-ranking delegation's south Korea visit. It is the elementary etiquette of human being to respond to good faith in kind. But the south Korean conservative maniacs slandered the guests who came to congratulate their feast, going rude and ill-mannered. They only nurture dirty political ambition, being indifferent to the destiny of the nation and peace and reunification of the country. The south Korean conservative hooligans kicked up the racket of confrontation against the south Korea visit of the DPRK's high-ranking delegation by taking issue with the hackneyed case of "Cheonan" warship sinking, only to disclose their disgusting nature dead-set against the reunification of the country, and to provoke laughter of the world people. It is shame on the nation that a handful of confrontational maniacs and dirty human rejects are still agitating the world. Un Jong Chol
title: Hysterical Acts of Confrontational Maniacs

text: A delegation of special envoy of the south Korean president left Pyongyang on Mar. 6. Earlier, Kim Yong Chol, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, met and had a talk with members of the delegation at their lodgings and saw them off. Rodong News Team
title: Delegation of Special Envoy of S. Korean President Leaves

text: To thoroughly establish the revolutionary party traits presents itself as an important issue in steadily enhancing the militancy and the leadership role of the Workers' Party of Korea and further strengthening the political and ideological might of the Korean revolution. In order to carry to completion the socialist cause down through generations, it is essential to strengthen in every way the party leadership over the revolution and construction. To this end it is necessary to continue to push forward the work of establishing the revolutionary traits within the party. Thoroughly establishing the revolutionary party traits provides a sure guarantee for developing our party into an invincible party strong in the sense of organization and discipline. Not all parties making revolution are able to realize the high level of organization and discipline. They are achieved and consolidated only through the process for establishing the revolutionary party traits. It is also an important requirement for consolidating the kindred relations between the party and the popular masses to thoroughly establish the revolutionary party traits. An important characteristic that can be found only in the party which has firmly established the party traits of devotedly serving the people is the kindred ties between the party and the popular masses. The Workers' Party of Korea is a revolutionary party of Juche which has consistently maintained the principle of devoted service for the people as its mode of existence and unique party traits under the guidance of President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il. Pak Chol
title: Let Us Make Revolutionary Climate Prevail throughout Party

text: Seminars, lectures, round-table talks, book and photo exhibitions and film shows were held in Ethiopia, Angola, Finland and Mongolia to mark the birth anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il, the Day of the Shining Star. Displayed at their venues were photos showing the revolutionary careers and feats of President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il and the revolutionary activities of respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. There were also works of the peerlessly great men and books and photos introducing the signal achievements made by the Korean army and people in building a powerful socialist country. "My Country Has Emerged Victorious by Dint of Single-minded Unity" and other Korean films were shown. The chairman of the Ethiopian Association for the Study of the Juche Idea said that Kim Jong Il developed the Workers' Party of Korea into the general staff of revolution ensuring the idea and guidance of the leader and into the genuine motherly party. The chairman of the Finnish Communists' League stressed that Kim Jong Il is the peerlessly elder statesman as he enriched and developed the Juche idea into the guiding idea in the era of independence to clearly show the road ahead of mankind and convinced again the world people of the validity of the socialist cause by protecting the country's sovereignty and dignity with his Songun politics when the imperialist allied forces' anti-DPRK moves went to the extremes. A congratulatory message to Kim Jong Un was adopted at the event in Finland. Rodong News Team
title: Day of Shining Star Observed Abroad

text: There was a press conference at the Russian embassy in Pyongyang on Mar. 6 on the occasion of the anniversary of Russia's victory in Stalingrad battle. Present there were journalists of the DPRK and embassy officials. Prior to the conference, the participants saw the photos introducing the Stalingrad battle and modern armed equipment of Russia. Alexandr Matsegora, Russian ambassador to the DPRK, made an address at the conference. He referred to the victory of the battle which opened up a turning phase of the Patriotic War of Russia and gave a heavy blow to the fascist German invaders. He then answered questions raised by journalists. The participants saw a feature film of the Russian Federation. Rodong News Team
title: Press Conference at Russian Embassy Marks Anniversary of Stalingrad Battle

text: The 12th Winter Paralympics opened in Phyongchang of south Korea on Mar. 9. Players and agents of different countries and regions including the DPRK entered the venue of the opening ceremony. Congratulatory speeches were made there. The opening was declared and the flag of the Winter Paralympics hoisted. There took place a ceremony of lighting the cauldron of the Winter Paralympics. The 12th Winter Paralympics will close on March 18. Rodong News Team
title: 12th Winter Paralympics Opens

text: A video showing the massacre committed by the Imperial Japanese Army against sexual slaves in 1944 was recently disclosed. The 19-second footage was taken in Yunnan Province of China. Together with the video, 14 documents and 2 photos were disclosed which proved that the Imperial Japanese Army shot to death 30 Korean women. This has brought to light once again the barbarity and cruelty of the Japanese imperialists. Japan's right-wing conservative forces including the Abe group are making a far-fetched assertion that there has never been such a thing as the sexual slavery for the Imperial Japanese Army and insulted the victims of the sexual slavery as "prostitutes" and tried to shift the blame on to the victims, claiming that "they provided sex out of their own accords for money". But the recent video clearly proves that there actually existed the sexual slavery system for the Imperial Japanese Army. The aim sought by Japan in persisting in its moves to cover up the crime related to the sexual slavery is not just to evade shame as a war criminal state. Those who deny crimes are bound to repeat them any time in the future. The aim sought by the Abe group is to deny the history of crimes, bring back the past history of aggression and crimes and thus realize the ambition for putting Asia under its control which Japan failed to do in the past. Japan is trying to imbue the new generations with the militarist idea and nurture the spirit of avenge among the Japanese. It is making desperate efforts to cover up the hideous crimes against humanity and paint Japan as a "normal state". But Japan is gravely mistaken. With neither sleight of hand nor a few penny of money can Japan get rid of the ill-fame as a war criminal state. Son So Yon
title: Japan Can Never Get Rid of Ill-Fame as War Criminal State

text: To mark the birth anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il, newspapers of different countries featured articles: "Comrade Kim Jong Il's Great Feats for Korean Revolution", "People's Leader Kim Jong Il", etc. Those papers carried a portrait of smiling Kim Jong Il and his photos. The Lao paper Vientiane Mai said that the reality of the DPRK pushing ahead with the building of a powerful socialist country despite ordeals of every description is inseparable from the feats of Kim Jong Il. The Iranian paper The Iran News said that he devoted himself to the people, regarding them as the most precious being in the world and a teacher, adding that his benevolent image as the genuine leader of the people would be always remembered by the Korean people and the world progressives. The Myanmar paper The New Age referred to the feats of the peerlessly great man who developed comprehensively and in depth the Juche idea through his rare ideological and theoretical activities to clearly show the road ahead of the progressive people, praising him as the great sage of mankind. The Zambian paper Brandline News, the DR Congo paper La Prosperite and the Belarusian paper Buperyod, too, carried articles praising his ideo-theoretical feats and Songun leadership feats. The Angolan paper O Pais told about his feats for national reunification; the Congolese paper La Patriot about the noble traits of Kim Jong Il who took care of all people with warm human love; and the Nigerian paper Nigerian Observer about how the immortal flower Kimjongilia came into being. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Jong Il Lauded by Foreign Papers

text: A national meeting of activists of rural youth workteams and sub-workteams took place at the People's Palace of Culture on Mar. 12. Present at the meeting were Ko In Ho, vice-premier and minister of Agriculture, Ri Il Hwan, department director of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, officials concerned, officials of the youth league and activists in the movement of rural youth workteams and sub-workteams. Pak Chol Min, first secretary of the C.C., Kimilsungist-Kimjongilist Youth League, in his report said that the movement of rural youth workteams and sub-workteams has developed into a powerful mass movement in the struggle to build an economic power and improve the people's living standard under the unfurled banner of the theses on the socialist rural question by the initiative and wise guidance of President Kim Il Sung, leader Kim Jong Il and respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. Members of the rural youth workteams and subworkteams have fully demonstrated the heroic spirit and invincible might in agricultural production as youth vanguard, the reporter noted. Referring to the fact that more than 1 400 youth workteams and subworkteams have become model, twice or thrice model youth workteams and subworkteams in the flames of the movement, the reporter stressed the need for all members of rural youth workteams and subworkteams to fully display the spirit of youth vanguard in a drive for implementing the theses on the socialist rural question. Speakers at the meeting noted that the members of rural youth workteams and subworkteams across the country have grown into the core of the socialist countryside and into enthusiastic young revolutionaries through the struggle for implementing the Party's plan for socialist rural construction. They analyzed and reviewed such faults of some rural youth workteams and subworkteams as failing to launch their movement in a revolutionary way in keeping with the Party's intention and the demand of the developing revolution and lessons from them. Rodong News Team
title: National Meeting of Activists of Rural Youth Workteams and Sub-workteams Held

text: The Society for the Promotion of the Relations between Austria and DPRK posted on its internet homepage respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's work "The Great Comrade Kim Il Sung Is the Eternal Leader of Our Party and Our People" on February 27 on the occasion of the Day of the Sun, the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung. The work, published on April 20, Juche 101 (2012), deals with the revolutionary exploits performed by President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il in their lifetime. It also indicates the tasks for resolutely defending and glorifying the idea and exploits of the great leaders. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Jong Un's Work Introduced in Austria

text: A Beninese national preparatory committee for celebrating the 106th birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung was formed in Cotonou on March 6. Hessou Kohovi, chairman of the Benin-Korea Amicable Association "Long Live Kim Jong Il, Supreme Leader" and chairman of the Benin National Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The committee decided to hold colorful political and cultural events on the occasion of the President's birth anniversary. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Il Sung's Birth Anniversary to Be Marked in Benin

text: A Swiss preparatory committee for celebrating the 106th birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung was formed in Basel on March 10. Martin Lotscher, chairman of the Switzerland-Korea Committee, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The preparatory committee set a celebration period from March 15 to April 16 and decided to organize colorful political and cultural events in this period. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Il Sung's Birth Anniversary to Be Marked in Switzerland

text: Much upset by the fact that the situation on the Korean Peninsula is being defused thanks to the proactive and sincere efforts of the DPRK, the conservatives of south Korea, including the "Liberal Korea Party," are trying hard to prevent such trend. It is the last-ditch attempt of the group of the worst traitors doomed to meet their miserable end as they have been marginalized by the trend of history towards national reconciliation and unity and peace and reunification. The reckless confrontational moves of the LKP are a revelation of its sinister scheme to mar the atmosphere of national reconciliation and reunification through alliance with the north prevailing among south Koreans from all walks of life with "security" offensive and rally the conservatives ahead of the upcoming elections to the local self-governing bodies. The tight-cornered group of traitors is crying out for "security" while creating the climate of hatred against the fellow countrymen in the south Korean society in a bid to rally the dispersed conservatives and provide a foothold for coming back to power through the above-said elections. Those conservatives are a group of traitors without an iota of blood and spirit of the nation and a group of rabid dogs keen only on the confrontation with fellow countrymen in the north as they leave no stone unturned to achieve their base political ambition. No matter how desperately those dregs of the times are working, history will dynamically advance and those running counter to the public mindset are bound to meet a stern judgment. Un Jong Chol
title: Foolish Moves of Swimming against Trend of Times

text: Recently Prime Minister of Japan Abe said the present situation on the Korean Peninsula serves as evidence of effect of sanctions upon the DPRK, stressing the need to be cautious of the circumstances of the peninsula. Meanwhile, the foreign minister, chief Cabinet secretary, defense minister and other heavyweights of Japan vied with each other to say that "maximum pressure" upon the DPRK should be maintained as ever and that Japan supports the U.S. statement that all the options related to the Korean issue including military action are on the table, underscoring the need to take cautious approach toward the DPRK's intention. This is a revelation of the inveterate habit of Japan to fish in troubled waters by aggravating the situation on the Korean Peninsula and it is nothing but the last-ditch effort to reverse the good trend of the times. The Japanese reactionaries' intention is to instill the Japanese people with the necessity for turning Japan into a military giant and create international circumstances favorable for Japan to legally embark on the road of overseas aggression. The trend of the times will not change no matter how desperately the Japanese reactionaries may try. If they persistently come out as shock brigade in ratcheting up pressure on the DPRK, reeling off reckless remarks, they would face a catastrophic fate. The Abe group should behave themselves, mindful that their illiberal moves would result in pricking their own eyes. If Japan continues to do as now, it will be an outcast. Ri Hyon Do
title: Last-Ditch Efforts to Reverse Trend of Times

text: A protocol of the 8th meeting of the DPRK-Russia inter-governmental committee for cooperation in trade, economy, science and technology was signed at the People's Palace of Culture on Mar. 21. Present at the signing ceremony were Kim Yong Jae, minister of External Economic Relations who is chairman of the DPRK side to the committee, and officials concerned and the members of the Russian government economic delegation led by Alexandr Galushka, minister of Development of Far East who is chairman of the Russian side to the committee, and Alexandr Matsegora, Russian ambassador to the DPRK. Kim Yong Jae and Alexandr Galushka signed the protocol. Rodong News Team
title: Protocol Inked between DPRK, Russia

text: DPRK player Kim Su Jong grabbed a gold medal in the women's floor exercises of the 11th FIG Artistic Gymnastics Individual Apparatus World Cup held in Qatar from March 21 to 24. Meanwhile, DPRK player Pyon Rye Yong placed the second in the women's vault. The tournament brought together more than 150 excellent players from 29 countries and regions including the DPRK, Germany, Ukraine and UK. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Wins Gold Medal in Gymnastics World Cup

text: Respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un, together with his wife Ri Sol Ju, enjoyed a performance "Spring Comes" given by the art troupe of the south side on a visit to Pyongyang at the East Pyongyang Grand Theatre on April 1. He was greeted by the leading members of the south side art troupe including To Jong Hwan, minister of Culture, Sports and Tourism, and Yun Sang, music supervisor, at the theatre hall. He exchanged warm greetings with them and warmly welcomed their Pyongyang visit. He said that as he may have no time because of his complicated political program early in April, he came to enjoy the performance of the south side art troupe he invited to visit here, though it was given late. And he expressed thanks to them for coming here with good performance prepared by them with sincerity in a short span of time. When Kim Jong Un and Ri Sol Ju appeared at the stalls together with To Jong Hwan and other figures of the south side, all the audience enthusiastically cheered them with loud applause. South side's stars sang their favorite songs energetically on the stage where the performance's title "Spring Comes" was seen. The performers were greatly excited to see the stage being provided with reconciliation with the north and the south being as one again, while exchanging greetings with the audience and telling about their Pyongyang visit with warm compatriotism. The performance ended with the song "Our Wish Is Reunification." The performance was acclaimed by the audience as it made them keenly feel once again that the people in the north and the south are the fellow countrymen with their ardent desire and mind desirous of national concord pooling. At the end of the performance, audience presented bouquets to the south side artistes. Kim Jong Un and Ri Sol Ju congratulated the performers on their successful performance, warmly waving to them. After the performance ended, he met and shook hands with the leading actors and actresses of the south side art troupe one by one and expressed his deep thanks to them for pleasing our people through their fine performance. He said that he was deeply moved to see our people sincerely acclaiming the performance, deepening the understanding of the popular art of the south side. Saying that the Pyongyang performance by the south side art troupe has brought spring of peace to the entire nation in the north and the south along with the performance title "Spring Comes", he added that when such good atmosphere is preserved carefully and continuously, only the beautiful spring when new buds sprout and flowers blossom and the rich autumn when the crops are abundant will always be in the way of our fellow countrymen. Expressing expectation that the Pyongyang visit by the south side art troupe would mark a significant occasion of demonstrating the appearance of the one nation, he had a souvenir picture taken with the members of the art troupe. Among the audience were Kim Yong Nam, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the WPK, Kim Yo Jong, first vice department director of the Central Committee of the WPK, Ri Son Gwon, chairman of the Committee for the Peaceful Reunification of the Country, Pak Chun Nam, minister of Culture, and citizens in Pyongyang. Political News Team
title: Kim Jong Un Enjoys Performance of South Side Art Troupe

text: A preparatory committee for celebrating the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung was formed with due ceremony at the Russian Institute for the Study of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism on March 25. Vadim Kudimin, director of the Russian institute, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The chairman said that the life of the President who set forth the scientific ideology and theory and led the Korean revolution to victory was a career for the country and the people and his exploits are brilliantly recorded in history. He went on: The President's ideology and theory serve as a precious guideline for the world progressives who advance along the road of independence. Inheriting the revolutionary traditions provided by the President arises as an especially important issue for the Korean people at present. The struggle of the Korean people for opposing invaders and bringing about happy life is based on the revolutionary spirit of self-reliance. We should disseminate the spirit to not only Russia but the world. We would celebrate the birth anniversary of the President and positively conduct the study and dissemination of the Juche idea whose scientific accuracy and truth have been proved in practice. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Il Sung's Birth Anniversary to Be Marked in Russia

text: An art troupe of the south side led by Minister of Culture, Sports and Tourism To Jong Hwan arrived here on Mar. 31. Arriving here together with it was the south side's Taekwon-Do demonstration group. Rodong News Team
title: Art Troupe of South Side Arrives in Pyongyang

text: Kim Yong Nam, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK on Apr. 4 sent a congratulatory message to Abdel Fattah al-Sisi upon his reelection as president of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Expressing belief that the traditional friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries would invariably grow stronger, the message wished the president bigger success in his responsible work for the country's stability and development. Rodong News Team
title: Congratulations to Egyptian President

text: A Congolese preparatory committee for celebrating the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung, the Day of the Sun, was formed in Brazzaville on Mar. 30. Vital Balla, chairman of the Congolese Association for Friendship among Peoples, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The committee set a celebration period from April 1 to 30 and decided to give wide publicity to the revolutionary career and feats of the President and the personality of the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un as the great man through media and hold colorful political and cultural events such as meeting, lecture and film show in the period. Rodong News Team
title: Day of Sun to Be Marked in Congo

text: The Mangyongdae Prize National Martial Art Championship opened in Pyongyang to mark the Day of the Sun. At least 500 men and women players from 20 odd organizations including Taekwon-Do teams throughout the country will compete in various events including Taekwon-Do and Paduk during the championship. Its opening ceremony took place at the Taekwon-Do Hall on Apr. 6. Present there were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and chairman of the National Sports Guidance Committee, Kim Yong Ho, secretary general of the Cabinet, Kim Chun Sik, secretary general of the National Sports Guidance Committee, officials concerned, sports persons and Pyongyangites. Kim Kyong Ho, chairman of the Korean Taekwon-Do Committee, made an opening address. At the end of the ceremony there was a march-past by the players and a demonstration by players of the Taekwon-Do Team of the Korean Taekwon-Do Committee. Rodong News Team
title: Mangyongdae Prize Martial Art Championship Opens

text: Thushara Fernando, representative of the World Health Organization in Pyongyang, on Apr. 9 hosted a reception on the World Health Day. Present there on invitation were Kim Hyong Hun, vice-minister of Public Health, officials concerned, and foreign diplomatic envoys and representatives of international bodies in Pyongyang. Attending it were members of the WHO mission. Rodong News Team
title: WHO Representative Hosts Reception

text: Japan's Foreign Minister Kono at a recent lecture talked rubbish that "one should not respond in haste to the DPRK's charm offensive", "there is no need to hurry" and "the DPRK may take advantage of it". The Japanese newspaper Asahi Shimbun reported that "Japan fears it might be isolated in the hot wind of diplomacy in Northeast Asia". Meanwhile, a member of the House of Representatives of Japan expressed displeasure over the incompetence of the government, saying Japanese people are concerned that Japan is left alone in Northeast Asia. Kono's remarks are no more than grumbling by the lonely island nation which was sidelined under the developing regional situation. Japan is worrying about the fact that it is being isolated in Northeast Asia by the rapidly changing situation focusing on the DPRK. Now those countries related to the issue of the Korean Peninsula make diplomatic efforts to join in the good development of the situation in the region. However, only Japan is reeling off the reckless confrontation remarks which will get nowhere, going against the trend of the times. That's why Japan is to be censured by the public at home and abroad as a senseless one with poor thinking ability. Japan is being more ignored like foam in the kaleidoscopic regional situation. Japan would be well advised to control its tongue. Ri Hyo Jin
title: Japan Should Control Its Tongue

text: Wang Haifu, general manager of the China's Yanbian Yiqiao Commercial Co. Ltd., and his party, Wang Wenri, CEO of the Dandong Shenpu Technology Co. Ltd., and his party, Choe Ryong Ho, vice-president for joint operation of Pyongyang University of Science and Technology, and his party arrived in Pyongyang on Apr. 11 to take part in the 20th Kimilsungia Festival. Rodong News Team
title: Chinese Guests, Koreans in China Arrive

text: Talks were held in Pyongyang on Apr. 14 between Ri Su Yong, member of the Political Bureau and vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), and Song Tao, head of the International Liaison Department of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC). At the talks both sides exchanged deep views on further developing the relations between the WPK and the CPC on the basis of the agreement made at the historic meeting of the top leaders of the two countries. The talks proceeded in a friendly atmosphere. Present at the talks from the DPRK side were Ryu Myong Son, vice department director of the C.C., WPK, and officials of the International Department of the C.C., WPK, and from the Chinese side were officials of the International Liaison Department of the C.C., CPC, and Li Jinjun, Chinese ambassador to the DPRK. Rodong News Team
title: Talks between Officials of WPK and CPC Held

text: The Chinese art troupe led by Song Tao, head of the International Liaison Department of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China, visited Kim Won Gyun University of Music on Apr. 17. The guests were accompanied by Ri Chang Gun, vice department director of the C.C., Workers' Party of Korea, and Li Jinjun, Chinese ambassador to the DPRK. Members of the Chinese art troupe were greeted by the teaching staff and students of the university with bouquets and a big clap. Being briefed on the history of the university, the guests went round the room dedicated to the history of the university, classrooms, halls, concert hall and others. Song Tao made an entry in the visitor's book that "Let's take over the valuable treasures of art and give free scope to the nation's culture." The Chinese art troupe toured the Mangyongdae Schoolchildren's Palace and watched a performance given by art group members of the palace on Apr. 16. Rodong News Team
title: Chinese Art Troupe Visits Kim Won Gyun University of Music

text: Kim Yong Nam, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, on Apr. 18 sent a message of greeting to Emmerson Mnangagwa, president of the Republic of Zimbabwe, on the 38th anniversary of its independence. Believing that the friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries with a long history and tradition will continue to strengthen, the message sincerely wished the president of Zimbabwe happiness in good health and the president and government of Zimbabwe bigger successes in their work for the development and prosperity of the country. Rodong News Team
title: Greetings to Zimbabwean President

text: A home-visiting group of Koreans in Japan led by Hong Ryung Nam left Pyongyang on Apr. 23. Rodong News Team
title: Home-visiting Group of Koreans in Japan Leaves

text: The Federation of Students and Pupils of DR Congo sent a floral basket to the statues of President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill in Pyongyang on the occasion of the 86th anniversary of the Korean People's Revolutionary Army. The floral basket was placed at the statues on Apr. 24. Rodong News Team
title: Floral Basket to Statues of Great Leaders from DR Congo

text: The second match between the April 25 Team of the DPRK and the Benfica Macao Team of Macao of China belonging to Group I (East Asia) of the 2018 AFC Cup was held in Macao of China on April 25. The April 25 Team beat its rival 2:0 at the away match, taking the first place in the group with four wins in four matches. An Il Bom scored at around 24 minutes and 31 minutes. The April 25 Team overwhelmed the Benfica Macao Team 8:0 at the home match. The team will compete with the Hwaebul Team of the DPRK on May 2 and the Hang Yuen Team of China's Taipei on May 16 in Pyongyang. Meanwhile, the Hwaebul Team beat the Hang Yuen Team 2:0 in the second match held in Taipei of China on April 25. Rodong News Team
title: Results of 2018 AFC Cup (East Asia)

text: A delegation of the Korean Youth League in Japan led by Jong Hui Chol, vice-chairman of its Central Standing Committee, arrived in Pyongyang on Apr. 27. Rodong News Team
title: Delegation of Korean Youth League in Japan Arrives

text: President Kim Il Sung performed exploits to accomplish the global cause of independence under the uplifted banner of anti-imperialist struggle in the 20th century. The President provided eternal ideological and theoretical guidelines in the history of struggle for the human cause of independence and led the cause of global independence through revolutionary practices. By founding the Juche idea, he indicated the way for independently carving out the destiny of human being for the first time in history and ushered in a new era of the greatest change, the era of independence. By consistently embodying the Juche idea throughout the course of the revolutionary struggle, he created the worldwide model of struggle for national liberation in colonies and built a socialist fortress, independent in politics, self-supporting in the economy and self-reliant in national defence on this land. Under his outstanding leadership, a great turn was made in the struggle of progressive humankind to build a peaceful and prosperous, new world free from aggression and war. His history of external activities is the one shining with his endless devotion to the cause of global independence and noble internationalist obligation. After setting it as the avowed idea of foreign policy of the DPRK to promote independence, peace and friendship, he expanded and developed the relations of good-neighborliness, friendship and cooperation with various countries of the world which respect the sovereignty of the DPRK and which are friendly toward it. He also strengthened bonds and solidarity with the world progressive peoples aspiring after independence and justice. As there was the President, the 20th century could leave its clear footprints as the era of independence occupying the highest and the most brilliant position in the development of human history. Ri Hyo Jin
title: Imperishable Feats for Independence against Imperialism

text: The U.S. ruling quarters are using the American-style democracy as the means for their world domination strategy, advertising it is the democracy with universality to be applied in every country. The American-style democracy is the most reactionary and unpopular ruling system mercilessly trampling down the desire and demand of the popular masses for freedom and democracy and a tool of aggression and interference. The U.S. rulers, who have no face to talk about human rights, freedom and democracy, are eagerly talking about them in a bid to realize their ambition for hegemony by advertising the American-style democracy as "model" of the international community. The U.S. describes its stooges as "champion for democracy". Those against the West including the U.S. are branded as dictator and terrorist organization and become a target of the West's attack. This is the true picture of the cock-and-bull "defence of democracy" by the U.S. The U.S. works hard to encourage anti-government forces to harass the governments in those countries incurring its displeasure, claiming that they are oppressing "freedom". It does not hesitate to resort to armed intervention against those countries not yielding to its demand or incurring its displeasure. The reality clearly proves that the American-style democracy is unsuitable to other countries and each country should not follow other's model but choose its own political mode suitable to its specific environment and actual situation and advance along the road of independence. The world progressives should face up to the reactionary nature and danger of "democracy" trumpeted by the U.S. with vigilance. Ri Hyon Do
title: World Progressives Should See through Absurdity of American-Style Democracy

text: A spring amateur riders competition took place at the Mirim Riding Club on April 22 and 29 under the sponsorship of the Korean Equestrian Association. Members of the association and amateur riders participated in the competition, which is divided into showjumping contest, low-horse amusement game, and amateur horse race. During the competition there was a lottery on the riders of the club. Rodong News Team
title: Spring Amateur Riders Competition

text: Kim Yong Nam, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, met and had a talk with the delegation of ecumenical organizations comprising representatives of the World Council of Churches and the World Communion of Reformed Churches led by Olav Fykse Tveit that paid a courtesy call on him at the Mansudae Assembly Hall on Friday. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Yong Nam Meets Delegation of Ecumenical Organizations

text: The 10th meeting of the DPRK-Syria Joint Economic Committee took place in Pyongyang from May 2 to 4. Attending the meeting were Kim Yong Jae, minister of External Economic Relations, and officials concerned, and members of the Syrian government economic delegation led by Mamoun Hamdan, minister of Finance. The meeting reviewed the implementation of the protocol signed at the 9th meeting of the DPRK-Syria Joint Economic Committee and discussed ways for expanding economic, scientific and technological cooperation. Concluded at the meeting were letters of understanding on cooperation in several fields and execution plans. A protocol of the 10th meeting of the DPRK-Syria Joint Economic Committee was signed there. Rodong News Team
title: 10th Meeting of DPRK-Syria Joint Economic Committee Held

text: Japanese Prime Minister Abe made sophism, during his recent foreign trip, that the DPRK should definitely and comprehensively abandon nuclear program and it is necessary to stop missile launches which put Japan in strike range. And Chief Cabinet Secretary Suga reeled off remarks that the DPRK's denuclearization should be done in a complete, verifiable and irreversible way. This is nothing but desperate efforts to escape from its situation getting deplorable day by day. Japan is denied access to the venue for discussing the issue of peace, the destiny of the Korean peninsula and the region, and it is left out alone by everyone as it is regarded as a trouble-maker creating only complexities. There is a way for it to evade the fate of being left out alone in the region. It is to give up its hostile policy towards the DPRK. Japanese politicians would be well advised once again to unconditionally remove chronic and bad habit of getting hostile to the DPRK if they have a bit of reason. If Japan continues to persist in its hostile policy towards the DPRK, it would face only isolation and political bankruptcy in the region. Ri Hak Nam
title: Last-Ditch Efforts of Those Driven to Wretched Plight

text: A delegation of the Indian Foreign Ministry headed by Vijay Kumar Singh, minister of the State for External Affairs, arrived in Pyongyang on Tuesday. The DPRK Foreign Ministry hosted a reception for the delegation on the same day. Rodong News Team
title: Indian Foreign Ministry Delegation Arrives

text: Foreign guests to take part in the 21st Pyongyang Spring International Trade Fair on Sunday visited Mangyongdae, the birthplace of President Kim Il Sung. They laid bouquets at the President's old home in Mangyongdae. Being briefed on the revolutionary history of the President and the careers of his family members in Mangyongdae, they went round the historical relics. Rodong News Team
title: Foreigners Visit Mangyongdae

text: The Russian website Patrioti Moskva carried an article titled "Panmunjom Declaration --shortcut to north-south reunification" on May 13. Noting that the inter-Korean summit took place at Panmunjom under the global spotlight on April 27, the article said: Notably, the historic Panmunjom Declaration for Korea's reunification was made public at Panmunjom, a symbol of standoff and hostility. This would have been unthinkable without the broad magnanimity and bold decision of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. With the will to make a new history of inter-Korean relations, he provided the north-south summit meeting and talks at Panmunjom, a symbol of the national division, and signed the declaration. Indeed, the Panmunjom Declaration is a programme for independent reunification in the era of Kim Jong Un and, it is the great declaration which declared before the world that a new history of national concord, a fresh era of co-prosperity will be opened up in the Korean peninsula. Rodong News Team
title: Panmunjom Declaration Hailed by Russian Website

text: Premier Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK, inspected the construction site of the Mongkumpho Fishery Station and went round Jangyon and Sinchon counties of South Hwanghae Province to learn about farming. At a field consultative meeting, measures were taken to complete the construction of the fishery station at an early date and help west sea fishery stations make bigger fish hauls. The premier acquainted himself with farming in Jangyon and Sinchon counties, where he underlined the need to attain this year's grain production goal without fail by finishing the rice-transplanting timely and qualitatively. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Premier Visits Various Places

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, Friday sent a message of greeting to Moussa Faki Mahamat, chairman of the Commission of African Union, on the occasion of the Day of Africa. The message said that the Korean people sincerely wish the African people great fruition in their efforts to realize politico-economic integration of the continent, consolidate peace and stability and achieve the independent development and prosperity. The DPRK government and people extend support and solidarity to the African Union and the people in the struggle for enhancing the continent's prestige and voice in the international arena, it added. The message expressed belief that the traditional relations of friendship and cooperation between the DPRK and the African Union and its member nations would grow stronger in the future. Rodong News Team
title: Greetings to African Union

text: The friendship visiting group of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) led by Pak Thae Song, member of the Political Bureau and vice-chairman of the WPK Central Committee, returned home on Thursday after visiting the People's Republic of China. During the visit, the group went round various places of Beijing and localities under the deep care and comradely hospitality of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China. Rodong News Team
title: WPK Friendship Visiting Group Back Home from China

text: The positive measures taken by the DPRK for the dismantlement of the nuclear test ground have evoked a tremendous response from the world. The DPRK's active and bold measures are, in a nutshell, part of the efforts for implementing the decision of the Third Plenary Meeting of the Seventh Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. The DPRK permitted on-site coverage by the international press corps, to say nothing of domestic media, to show the transparency of the dismantlement of the nuclear test ground, and took technical measures for it. The world, stunned by the DPRK's declaration on dismantling the nuclear test ground, calling it a bold decision, is now admiring its practice in which the transparency was fully shown. The DPRK is advancing along the path taken by itself according to its timetable no matter what others may say and wherever wind may blow from in order to implement the decision of the Third Plenary Meeting of the Seventh Central Committee of the WPK. The whole course of dismantling the northern nuclear test ground eloquently proves the DPRK government's unshakable peace-loving stand to join the aspiration and efforts of the international community for a total stop to nuclear tests. The DPRK's steadfast will to join hands with the world peace-loving people in building a nuclear-free, peaceful world, a new independent world where the dream and ideal of humankind have come true, will remain unchanged in the future, too. Ri Hyo Jin
title: DPRK Will Continue to Adance according to Its Own Timetable

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, on Monday sent a message of greeting to Mulatu Teshome, president of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, on the occasion of its national day. The message wished the president good health and bigger success in his work for the country's progress and prosperity, expressing the belief that the good ties between the two friendly countries would grow stronger. Rodong News Team
title: Greetings to Ethiopian President

text: CBS of south Korea reported on Thursday that false media reports negatively influencing the efforts for ensuring peace and security of the Korean peninsula are rampant in south Korea. Noting misinformation about the north is widely spread by the conservative camp to negatively affect peace and security of the Korean peninsula, CBS said there should be strict sanction and punishment against the spread of such lies. Rodong News Team
title: False Media Reports Are Rampant: CBS of S. Korea

text: A technical workshop took place at the Grand People's Study House on Thursday to mark World No Tobacco Day. Attending it were health workers, officials of relevant units, the WHO representative and members of missions of other international bodies to Pyongyang. Speeches were made at the workshop. Speakers in titles such as "Impact of tobacco on socio-economic life" and "smoking and hear blood vessel system" referred to the side effect of tobacco on human health and overall social life. Smoking kills millions of people in the world every year, they said, referring to the negative consequences of cigarette, a major risk factor of non-infectious disease, and the importance of the no tobacco campaign of various forms and ways.
