The participants watched a multimedia program "A-class 'favorite article' threatening human life". Rodong News Team
title: Technical Workshop on World No Tobacco Day

text: A concert was given by Korean children in Warsaw on May 22 to mark the 70th anniversary of the establishment of the DPRK-Poland diplomatic relations. Among the audience were figures of various Polish units including the Foreign Ministry, the Ministry of Land and Maritime Transport and the Federation of Businessmen, and diplomatic envoys of China, Russia, Cuba, Indonesia, the Philippines and Malaysia to Poland, and the chairman of the Organization of Railways Cooperation. Prior to the event, a Korean stamp show took place in Torun City of Poland to observe the anniversary. Rodong News Team
title: Concert Marks Anniversary of DPRK-Poland Diplomatic Ties

text: The delegates to the celebrations of the 72nd founding anniversary of the Korean Children's Union (KCU) visited Mangyongdae, the birthplace of President Kim Il Sung. At the old home of the President, they grasped the revolutionary careers of his family members, looking round historical mementoes preserved there, and then went round study and wrestling sites, etc. where the President climbed Mangyong Hill in his childhood and cultivated his mind and strong will of hating the Japanese imperialists and loving the country. They went to the Revolutionary Martyrs Cemetery on Mt Taesong, where they renewed their will to become dependable pillars of powerful and prosperous Korea by inheriting the fighting spirit of the revolutionary forerunners. They also made a visit to the Youth Movement Museum, where they placed bunches of flowers at the statues of President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il among youth and children and paid tribute to them. They looked round historical data and mementoes on display. The delegates toured the venue of the "national exhibition of children's science fictions and models - 2018" and the Central Class Education House and had a good time at the Rungna People's Pleasure Park, the Rungna Dolphinarium, the Central Zoo and other centers for cultural and emotional life. Rodong News Team
title: Schoolchildren Visit Mangyongdae

text: There took place a meeting, book and photo exhibition and film show in the State of Queretaro of Mexico and a seminar in Mexico City on May 31 and June 1 to mark the 54th anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il's start of work at the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. Korean film "Grand Celebration of the 70th Founding Anniversary of Workers' Party of Korea in Presence of Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un" was shown at the film show. The secretary of the Queretaro State Committee of the People's Socialist Party of Mexico praised Kim Jong Il for turning the WPK into an ever-victorious and steel-strong party and the DPRK into an invincible politico-ideological power. The chairperson of the Mexican Committee for the Study of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism and other speakers praised Kim Jong Il for turning the WPK into a powerful guiding force to accomplish the revolutionary cause of Juche, firmly protecting the country's sovereignty and dignity under the unfurled banner of Songun and performing immortal feats for national reunification. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Jong Il's Exploits Praised by Mexican Figures

text: 31 years have passed since the June Popular Resistance in which the south Korean people waged a massive struggle for putting an end to a military fascist dictatorial rule and realising democracy of the society. The June Popular Resistance was an eruption of the pent-up resentment and grudge of the south Korean people against the ruthless military dictatorial rule. And it was a just all-people resistance which demonstrated a firm will of the south Korean people to terminate the military fascist dictatorial rule and bring about an independent and democratic new politics and new life. Although decades have passed since the resistance in south Korea, the conservatives, descendants of Chun Doo Hwan and Roh Tae Woo military fascist cliques, still go against the aspiration of the people for a democratic new politics and new life. Still worse, the group of the "Liberal Korea Party" is viciously slandering the efforts of the DPRK for improving the inter-Korean relations and the historic Panmunjom Declaration, making desperate efforts to block national reconciliation, unity and the stream of peace on the Korean Peninsula and bring a mad wind for confrontation. It goes without saying that the reckless moves of the conservative group including the "Liberal Korea Party" are aimed at reviving the fascist dark era and inter-Korean confrontation era to escape their miserable fate and seize power again. If the treacherous group gain power in south Korea, the aspirations and desire of the people for independence, democracy and reunification can never come true. It is quite natural that the south Korean people have waged the dynamical struggle for liquidation of the evils, bitterly condemning the conservative group for having stifled democracy and engaged itself in the fascist rule. Ra Sol Ha
title: Just Struggle for Putting End to Military Dictatorial Rule

text: The National Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea of DR Congo on June 1 posted on its website the full text of the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's work "The Cause of the Great Party of Comrades Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il Is Ever-Victorious" on the occasion of the 54th anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il's start of work at the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. The work, published on October 4, Juche 104 (2015), clarifies that the seven decades-long history of the Workers' Party of Korea is the one of victory which demonstrated the validity and invincibility of the cause of the party of President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il. It also stresses that the cause of the party of Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il is invincible. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Jong Un's Work Introduced in DR Congo

text: The imperialists and their reptile media vociferate about the "advantage" of capitalism, claiming that socialism is an "inhumane society". The imperialists and bourgeois defenders are talking about "freedom" and "equality," but they can't justify the unpopular capitalist society with any deceptive propaganda. Genuine freedom and rights of the popular masses are unthinkable in capitalist society. Capitalism is not a "free" society advocated by the imperialists, but an unequal and dictatorial one. Reality vividly proves that capitalism is an unpopular society where the freedom and rights of the popular masses are ruthlessly violated. It is the capitalist society where the rich get richer and the poor poorer. Socialism is a society where the independence of the popular masses can be defended and realized. Socialism is the ideal society of humankind whose advantage and truth have been proved in severe ordeals of history. It has the eternal viability for its scientific accuracy and truth. Through their real living the Korean people came to have the faith that only socialism can provide them with genuine freedom, equality and a happy and worthwhile life and to advance to socialism is the only way of realizing the ideal of the popular masses for independence. Today there is no ideal society which can take the place of socialism in the world. The desire of humankind can come true only in socialist society. Ri Hyon Do
title: Desire of Mankind Can Come True Only in Socialist Society

text: "Liberal Korea Party" and other south Korean conservatives are a group of traitors without an equal in the world as they are going reckless in the confrontation with the fellow countrymen in the north, persistently opposing the reconciliation and unity of the nation. Through the elections to the local self-governing bodies, the south Korean conservative group fully revealed their despicable true colors that they can not live even a moment without the confrontational hysteria, hurling mud at the fellow countrymen in the north. Those, quite indifferent to the improvement of the relations with the north and the peace on the Korean Peninsula, ran amuck like rabid dogs, calculating that the prospect of the elections would be gloomier due to the DPRK-U.S. summit. The "Liberal Korea Party" coterie invited bitter ire from the people as they made reckless efforts to scuttle the phase of DPRK-U.S. dialogue at any cost and prolong their remaining days. The "Parunmirae Party" coterie also left no stone unturned to achieve its political ambition by putting a brake on the process for improving the ties with the north and by stirring up the confrontation at the elections to the local self-governing bodies. The reality clearly proves that the "Liberal Korea Party" and other conservative political parties of south Korea are like insects as they are only harmful to the inter-Korean ties and the Korean nation. Every sin brings its punishment with it. The garbage of the times is bound to go to the dumping ground of history. Sim Chol Yong
title: Anti-Reunification Traitorous Parties Should Be Totally Buried

text: A delegation of the DPRK Olympic Committee led by Chairman Kim Il Guk, who is minister of Physical Culture and Sports, returned home on Tuesday after attending an event marking the Day of Olympiad held in Switzerland. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Olympic Committee Delegation Returns Home

text: According to the south Korean MBC on Wednesday, personages who had been in prison after being involved in a case of rebuilding the Revolutionary Party for Reunification were given a judgment of acquittal. The case was fabricated by traitor Park Chung-Hee to prolong his "yusin" dictatorial regime. In September 1979 a lot of people were sentenced to life imprisonment after being branded as those involved in the "case to rebuild the party on the directives of the north". The Seoul High Court issued a judgment of acquittal for five persons, contending that the confessions an investigation body forced on them after having illegally detained them can not be considered as testimonies. Rodong News Team
title: Victims of RPR Rebuilding Case Found Innocent in S. Korea

text: Political parties and organizations of Bangladesh made public a joint statement on June 21 to hail the first successful DPRK-U.S. summit. They were the Workers' Party, National Socialist Party, Jatiya Party, Communist Party, Communist Party (Marxist-Leninist), People's League, Socialist Party, Bangladesh-Korea Friendship and Solidarity Committee, Institute of the Juche Idea, Group for the Study of the Songun Policy and the Media Persons' Group for the Study of the Juche Idea. The joint statement said: The recent summit meeting and talks are a historic event of weighty significance in bringing about a radical turn in the DPRK-U.S. ties as required by the developing era. We pay high tribute to HE Kim Jong Un, Supreme Leader of the Korean people, who made a great and courageous decision for peace and security of the Korean Peninsula and the world. We also extend invariable support and solidarity to the Workers' Party of Korea and the DPRK government striving for peace and security of the peninsula. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK-U.S. Summit Hailed in Bangladesh

text: Events took place in various countries to mark the 54th anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il's start of work at the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. They included seminar, Kimjongilia exhibition, book and photo exhibition, lecture and film shows in Mongolia, Nepal, Hungary and South Africa from June 16 to 21. The participants in the film shows watched Korean films such as "Kimjongilia". The chairman of the Kimjongilia Association of Mongolia said that he was pleased to hold the Kimjongilia exhibition on the occasion of the 54th anniversary of Kim Jong Il's start of work at the Party Central Committee. He went on: HE Kim Jong Un is developing the WPK into the party of Comrades Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il. The Korean people, single-mindedly united around him, are registering big successes in socialist construction. The director of the International Department of the Nepal Worker-Peasant Party noted that Kim Jong Il regarded it as the primary task of the party work to develop the WPK into the party of the leader. He said that Kim Jong Il also built up the Korean People's Army into the army of the leader and party and bolstered up the military muscle of the country with his energetic Songun revolutionary leadership and thus creditably defended Korean socialism. The chairman of the Hungarian Workers' Party praised Kim Jong Il as the peerlessly elder statesman and eternal head of the WPK. His work "Socialism Is a Science" is an immortal book that proved the scientific accuracy and truth of socialism and inevitability of its victory, and it clearly shows the correct road for socialist construction, the chairman said. Rodong News Team
title: Anniversary of Kim Jong Il's Start of Work at C.C., WPK Observed

text: Korean book, photo and fine art exhibitions took place in Vratsa City of Bulgaria and Derinia City of Cyprus to mark the 54th anniversary of leader Kim Jong Il's start of work at the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. The venues of the exhibitions were visited by personages of various circles and masses in relevant countries. The curator of the DPRK Cultural and Information Center in Vratsa City said: The Korean people have made miraculous progress in socialist construction under the wise guidance of the great leaders. In recent years, in particular, the DPRK has registered big successes in bolstering up its military muscle and pushing ahead with the economic construction and improving the people's standard of living. I am convinced that the exhibition will help the Bulgarian people know better about the Korean people's struggle for the country's prosperity and make a positive contribution to the mutual understanding between the two peoples and development of their friendly relations. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Exhibitions Held in Bulgaria and Cyprus

text: The 33rd regular general meeting of the Korean Federation of Workers in Commerce in Japan took place in Tokyo on June 23. Attending it were Nam Sung U, vice-chairman of the Central Standing Committee of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon), Ri Song Chol, director of the Economic Department of Chongryon, and officials of the federation and other deputies. The meeting reviewed the federation's work of last two years and discussed and decided on the orientation of its work and main tasks to be carried out for the coming two years for the implementation of the decision of the 24th Chongryon Congress in hearty response to the tasks advanced in the congratulatory message of the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. The congratulatory message sent by him to the 24th Chongryon Congress was read out at the meeting. Pak Chung U, chairman of the federation, delivered an opening address and then Ri Jong Man, managing director of its Standing Council, made a report. The reporter said that the last two years were a historic period during which the DPRK rose to the position of a strategic state recognized by the world and days during which the federation braved the unprecedented ordeals together with Chongryon. He stressed the importance to develop the federation into a powerful body that takes deep roots among Korean workers in commerce by decisively enhancing its capability of assistance to compatriot businessmen and intensifying information work in the future, too, and thus building up the federation into a powerful one deeply rooted among the workers in commerce and paying greater efforts to national education. Introduced at the meeting was a congratulatory message from the DPRK Ministry of External Economic Relations. There was an awarding ceremony for the participants in the prize-winning movement of the federation. Deputy Pak Chung U was reelected chairman of the federation and Deputy O Min Hak elected managing director of its Standing Council. Nam Sung U made a speech. He called for achieving the comprehensive redevelopment of the movement of Koreans in Japan in a fresh way for the happiness of compatriots and the future of the rising generation. Rodong News Team
title: Korean Federation of Workers in Commerce in Japan Meets

text: Still continuous are disputes among countries, political forces and tribal and religious sects in different parts of the world. To put an end to the disputes is an important matter in ensuring peace and security. Disputes threatening world peace and security occur as the imperialists and some other forces still seek domination and hegemony. To be loose in vigilance over the cunning moves of the imperialists leads to serious consequences. For conflict-torn countries to achieve peace as early as possible is important to find out agreed points to meet mutual interests through dialogue. If one side imposes its requirements upon the other side for the egoistic purpose, it is impossible to find out a key to the solutions forever. One should not inveigle outside forces into the settlement of disputes. The parties concerned should be responsible for the disputes and settle them through negotiations on the principle of unity free from outsiders' interference. Every country should refrain from supporting or opposing one side in disputes of other countries. One-sided support will result in further aggravating disputes and confrontation. All the countries should positively help the parties concerned peacefully settle disputes in mutual interests out of fair stand. It is harmful to accept the prescription of the imperialists in settling disputes. Their prescription is aimed to paint themselves as "peace champion" and fish in troubled waters. Ri Hak Nam
title: Settling Disputes Is Key to Ensuring Global Peace

text: The National Socialist Party of Romania released a statement in support of the DPRK-U.S. summit in Singapore and the joint statement. The statement welcomed the joint statement adopted between Chairman Kim Jong Un and President Trump, saying that the first historic DPRK-U.S. summit and talks were the most important political event in the 21st century, which made a great stride to achieving peace on the Korean peninsula. The statement also noted that the august name of Kim Jong Un executing an independent foreign policy will be recorded in the world history. Rodong News Team
title: Romanian Political Party Backs Singapore DPRK-U.S. Summit and Joint Statement

text: A Guinean committee for remembering President Kim Il Sung was formed in Conakry on June 30. Riyad Chaloub, chairman of the Guinean National Committee for the Study of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism, was elected chairman of the remembrance committee. The committee decided to hold political and cultural events including a lecture and a reading session on the occasion of the 24th anniversary of demise of Kim Il Sung. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Il Sung to Be Remembered in Guinea

text: A delegation of the United States of America led by State Secretary Mike Pompeo arrived in Pyongyang Friday. The delegation is to take part in the first DPRK-U.S. high-level talks for implementing the joint statement adopted and made public at the DPRK-U.S. summit meeting and talks. Rodong News Team
title: U.S. Delegation for DPRK-U.S. High-level Talks Here

text: Kim Yong Nam, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, met and had a talk with Mark Andrew Lowcock, under-secretary general for the UN Humanitarian Affairs, and his party who paid a courtesy call on him at the Mansudae Assembly Hall on Wednesday. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Yong Nam Meets Under-Secretary General for UN Humanitarian Affairs

text: The world people's admiration and desire for the genuine socialism of Juche Korea are increasing day by day in their minds when seeing the country shining as socialism centered on the popular masses. This proves once again that Korean-style socialism is incomparably superior to capitalism and emerges victorious. In the past, advocates of capitalist advantages described capitalist society as the one in which "equality for all" and "welfare for all" could be realized. But they have now admitted the failure of capitalist countries' policy of "equality for all" and "welfare for all". Socialist society reflects the ideal and aspiration of mankind. The foundation of Korean-style socialism is the popular masses. It is the Workers' Party of Korea's viewpoint and philosophy of the people to push ahead with the revolution in reliance on the inexhaustible strength of the popular masses and devotedly serve them, viewing them as those responsible for the revolution. The scientific accuracy and truth of Korean-style socialism and its victory have been clearly proved in the vortex of history. Although our army and people have been hard pressed for everything, they have undauntedly and steadily advanced Korean-style socialism in the spirit of self-reliance and fortitude. Today the DPRK emerges a powerful country which no hostile country can dare to provoke, demonstrating its dignity all over the world. Korean-style socialism is a science, so is its victory. As long as there are the great Party, the great ideology and the great people, Korean-style socialism is invincible. Kang Chol
title: Korean-style Socialism Is Science

text: Foreign media carried special write-ups and articles between June 24 and 29 to mark the 2nd anniversary of the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's election as chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. They carried his photos. The Russian website DPRK Today posted the following article titled "Bright smile of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un": The image of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un who brightly smiles, always finding himself among the people, has been often carried in Russian media. Lots of people in the world are fascinated by the images of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un warmly encouraging servicepersons and civilians, patting children on the cheeks and having photo sessions with ordinary people. It is Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un who gives top priority to the convenience of the people. The Korean people will always register victories as they are guided by him. Russia's online magazine Lemchich introduced data telling about the loving care of Kim Jong Un for the younger generation and the newspaper Komsomolskaya Pravda praised him for steering the situation of the Korean Peninsula. The Egyptian newspaper Al Akhbar Almassay carried an article titled "Political philosophy of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un" and the Brazilian Center for the Study of Songun Politics posted on its website an article titled "Election of Leader Kim Jong Un as chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK". Rodong News Team
title: Kim Jong Un's Exploits Praised by Foreign Media

text: MBC of south Korea on Tuesday disclosed the fact that a detachment of the "Army Metropolitan Garrison Command" obtained information on civic and public organizations to report it to the Defense Security Command (DSC). It was reported that the detachment stationed at the Seoul Metropolitan Police Agency got information from the police agency to convey it to the DSC during the Park Geun Hye regime. Rodong News Team
title: Case of Military Surveillance on Civilians Disclosed in S. Korea

text: According to the south Korean MBC on July 13, it was disclosed that the Army Metropolitan Garrison Command illegally monitored the candlelight demonstrators urging the impeachment of traitor Park Geun Hye. The fact was verified and disclosed by journalists of MBC through a document "Chongwadae's scenario for coping with the demonstration" worked out by the command. Contained in the document was the fact that if candlelight demonstrators attempt to enter the proximity to Chongwadae, the military would suppress them. Rodong News Team
title: Fact about Military's Illegal Watch on Civilians Disclosed in S. Korea

text: The Tarzalt Publishing House in El-Djezair, Algeria brought out in booklet President Kim Il Sung's work "Let Us Achieve the Great Unity of Our Nation" on the occasion of the 24th anniversary of his demise. The work, published on August 1, Juche 80 (1991), says that the Korean nation is the driving force for reunification of the country, indicating the tasks and ways for achieving the great unity of the entire nation. A book-releasing ceremony took place on July 8. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Il Sung's Work Introduced in Algeria

text: Premier Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK, inspected various units in North Phyongan Province. Going round the Sinuiju Cosmetics Factory, the Sinuiju Textile Mill, the Sinuiju Chemical Fibre Mill and various places in Sindo County, he underscored the need for those units to regard it as their primary task and lifeline to glorify the leadership exploits of the Party and concentrate efforts on doing so. Discussed at field consultative meetings were the issues of perfecting the modernization of production processes with recourse to advanced science and technology, turning factories into manpower-saving, technology-intensive ones and thoroughly establishing cultured ways of production and life, and the practical issues arising in increasing the reed production and further consolidating the material and technical foundation of Sindo County. Inspecting the Rakwon Machine Complex, the December 5 Youth Mine, the Sinuiju Dockyard, the Sinuiju Footwear Factory, the Sinuiju Spinning Machine Plant and other units, he urged them to conduct the guidance over production and management in a scientific and rational way, and mentioned measures for successfully attaining the goals of the five-year strategy for national economic development. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Premier Inspects Various Units in North Phyongan Province

text: A delegation of Korean youth and students in Japan led by Choe In A, department director of the Central Standing Committee of the Korean Youth League in Japan, on Friday met Hong Myong Gi, an indomitable pro-reunification patriotic fighter who was an unconverted long-term prisoner. Hong Myong Gi said that he could remain true to the revolutionary principle despite the untold sufferings in jail for decades as he kept in mind as his firm faith the truth that soldier's worthwhile life is guaranteed when following the Party and the leader. Under the warm loving care of the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un who has the same noble revolutionary obligation and comradeship as those of the great leaders, the former unconverted long-term prisoners are enjoying an honorable life, he added. Choe In A said that they were greatly encouraged by the fighting spirit of the pro-reunification patriotic fighters who undauntedly fought to keep the oath they made before the leader and the country, adding that the new generations of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan would invariably keep to the road of Juche and patriotism with the unshakable faith that they are sure to win as they are guided by Kim Jong Un. There was an art performance at the meeting. Rodong News Team
title: Young Koreans in Japan Meet Former Unconverted Long-term Prisoner

text: A delegation of Korean youth and students in Japan led by Choe In A, department director of the Central Standing Committee of the Korean Youth League in Japan, visited Mangyongdae, the birthplace of President Kim Il Sung. They went round the Mangyongdae Revolutionary Museum where historical data and relics associated with the revolutionary activities of the President and his family members are on display. At the old home of the President in Mangyongdae they looked back upon his revolutionary career. The delegation also visited the Korean Revolution Museum, the Youth Movement Museum, etc. Rodong News Team
title: Delegation of Korean Youth and Students in Japan Visits Mangyongdae

text: A Slovenian preparatory committee for celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK was formed in Maribor City on July 15. Igor Jurisic, chairman of the Slovenia-Korea Friendship Association, was elected as chairman of the preparatory committee. The committee set the celebration period from July 20 to September 30 and decided to organize colorful political and cultural events praising exploits performed by President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il for the foundation of the DPRK and its development. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK's Founding Anniversary to Be Marked in Slovenia

text: Ri U Hyon, a lawmaker from the “Liberal Korea Party” of south Korea, was sentenced to seven years in prison at the first court hearing on July 19 for taking bribes of more than 1 billion won, according to the south Korean News 1. The accused reportedly didn’t miss the chance of grabbing money by prodding his assistant, and forced him to make a false testimony when he was detained recently. Rodong News Team
title: Lawmaker from LKP of S. Korea to Serve Prison Term

text: The National Taekwon-Do All-Star Tournament for Jonsung Cup closed with due ceremony at the Taekwon-Do Hall on Friday. The ceremony was attended by Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and chairman of the National Sports Guidance Committee, Kim Chun Sik, secretary general of the National Sports Guidance Committee, officials concerned, sports persons and working people. The Korean Taekwon-Do Committee Team (men) and the Pyongyang City Taekwon-Do Team (women) took the first place in the Taekwon-Do open-weight sparring event. The South Phyongan Provincial Taekwon-Do Team (men) and the Pyongyang City Taekwon-Do Team (women) came first in the team sparring. The first place in the body-weight individual sparring was taken by men players from the Jagang Provincial Taekwon-Do Team, the Korean Taekwon-Do Committee Team and Central Sports School and women players from the Pyongyang City Taekwon-Do Team, the Korean Taekwon-Do Committee Team and the Jagang Provincial Taekwon-Do Team. In the Paduk games, men and women players from the team of the Korean Taekwon-Do Committee placed first in individual events and players of the Pyongyang City Taekwon-Do Team in the mixed doubles. The Pyongyang City Taekwon-Do Team won in the men's doubles and the South Hamgyong Provincial Taekwon-Do Team in the women's doubles and the Pyongyang City Taekown-Do Team in the team event. Rodong News Team
title: National Taekwon-Do All-Star Tournament Closes

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People’s Assembly of the DPRK, Monday sent a message of greeting to Mohamed VI, king of Morocco, on the occasion of its national day. Kim in the message expressed the belief that the friendly relations between the two countries would be strengthened, wishing the king bigger success in his responsible work for the country’s development and prosperity. Rodong News Team
title: Greeting to King of Morocco

text: The National Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea of DR Congo posted on its website the full text of the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's work "War Veterans Are Our Precious Revolutionary Forerunners Who Created the Indomitable Spirit of Defending the Country" on July 25 to mark the 65th anniversary of the victory in the Fatherland Liberation War. The website carried his photo. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Jong Un's Work Posted on Website of DR Congo

text: DPRK Foreign Minister Ri Yong Ho, who attended the ministerial meeting of the ASEAN Regional Forum, respectively met and had talks with the foreign minister of China, Vietnam, Indonesia, Laos, Thailand, Philippines and New Zealand, the Cambodian minister of Foreign Affairs and International Cooperation and the high representative of the European Union for Foreign Affairs and Security Policy on August 3 and 4. Opinions on the issues of expanding and developing the bilateral relations and boosting cooperation were exchanged at the talk. The DPRK foreign minister also met the minister of International Cooperation of Myanmar and the minister of the State for External Affairs of India. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Foreign Minister Meets Foreign Ministers of Various Countries

text: Now Japan loudly touts a rapid development in economy, culture, science and technology but the world sees Japan which is little different from that of yesterday when militarism was rampant. The wild ambition of the past Japanese militarists comes true with the desperate efforts of militarists of the modern version. Militarism is not a specter but actually exists in Japan. It is institutionalized in political, economic, military, cultural and all other fabrics of social life, and the idea poisons a lot of Japanese people. The retrogressive revision of the constitution is what remains to be done finally for the building of a militaristic state. The revision of the constitution will help Japan’s militarism rush into reinvasion. The “civilian”-veiled Abe group and other reactionary conservatives of Japan seek to revive “Empire of Japan” which boasted of its mightiness after occupying the Asian continent. Japanese militarism has grown to be forces of aggression threatening peace and security in the Asia-Pacific region. The world should keep the highest vigilance against the danger of Japanese militarism that will bring a catastrophic disaster to the region. Jang Chol
title: Danger of Japan’s Militarism

text: A Lebanese preparatory committee for marking the 70th birthday of the DPRK was formed on July 31. Zaher al Khatib, chairman of the Lebanese Committee for Supporting Korea's Reunification who is secretary general of the Lebanon Federation of Workers, was elected as chairman of the preparatory committee. The preparatory committee set a celebration period from Aug. 1 to Sept. 12 and decided to organize colorful political and cultural events praising the feats of President Kim Il Sung, leader Kim Jong Il and the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un for the foundation and development of the DPRK in the period. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Birthday to Be Marked in Lebanon

text: Books were published in Cyprus to highly praise the peerlessly great persons and show the real appearance of the socialist system of the DPRK to mark its 70th founding anniversary. Anders Kristensen, chairman of the Denmark-DPRK Friendship Association, wrote the book "My understanding of the DPRK". On its first page were a photo of President Kim Il Sung and leader Kim Jong Il standing together and a photo of the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. The author of the book composed of three chapters praised the President's rare ideological and theoretical wisdom, extraordinary leadership ability, noble human love, virtue and internationalist obligation and the feats of Kim Jong Il, who hewed out the cause of immortalizing the leader and successfully accomplished it with his pure loyalty and moral obligation, performed the exploits for the world history by leading the struggle for defending socialism to a victory with the treasured sword of Songun. And the author lauded Kim Jong Un for successfully turning the DPRK into a socialist paradise where the people enjoy happiness, stressing that Korea would be reunified and shine as a prosperous power under his guidance. Carried in the book "Korea seen with eyes of a Western artiste" written by Adamos Katsantonis, chairman of the Cyprus-DPRK Cultural Friendship Association, are photos of Kim Il Sung, Kim Jong Il and Kim Jong Un and photos of Kim Il Sung who had taken with the author and the participants in the April Spring Friendship Art Festival. The author is a musician who visited the DPRK more than ten times to take part in the art festival. He wrote the book with the facts he experienced in the DPRK. The book denied the distorted propaganda of the West and praised the genuine socialist system where a happy life of the people blooms under the care of the peerlessly great men. Rodong News Team
title: New Books Published in Cyprus

text: The DPRK government delegation led by Foreign Minister Ri Yong Ho paid an official visit to the Islamic Republic of Iran on Aug. 7-9. Head of the delegation Ri Yong Ho met and had a talk with Iranian President Hassan Rouhani on Wednesday. During the visit he paid a courtesy call on Ali Rarijani, speaker of the Iranian Majlis, and had talks with Foreign Minister Mohammad Javad Zarif. At the courtesy call and talks both sides expressed the will to further develop the friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries in various fields this year marking the 45th anniversary of the establishment of diplomatic ties. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Government Delegation Pays Official Visit to Iran

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, Wednesday sent a congratulatory message to Denis Sassou Nguesso, president of the Republic of Congo, on the occasion of the 58th anniversary of its independence. Kim in the message extended congratulations to the president, government and people of Congo, expressing belief that the excellent friendly and cooperative relations between the DPRK and Congo would grow stronger in the future. He sincerely wished the government and people of Congo big successes in the work for the development and prosperity of the country under the wise leadership of their president. Rodong News Team
title: Congratulations to President of Congo

text: A south Korean body called the Citizens' Group for Defending the Korean Schools and Children reportedly held a press conference in Seoul on August 10 to publish an international declaration condemning the Japanese authorities' suppression of Koreans in Japan. The Japanese government is still pursuing a policy of discrimination against the Koreans in Japan, far from making an apology and atonement for its colonial rule over Korea in the past, the speakers charged. They expressed resentment at the base act of the Japanese authorities excluding only Korean schools from the application of the tuition-free program for senior high schools. Noting more than 1 110 peace-loving people in the world and Koreans in the U.S., Germany and Australia signed the international declaration protesting against the discriminative policy of the Japanese authorities, they said they would carry on their struggle until the Japanese authorities include the Korean schools in the list of the application of the tuition-free program. The international declaration protesting the Abe regime's suppression of Koreans and schools in Japan was published there. The declaration said that the Japanese government killed a little boy at the end of its massive suppression of the national education of Koreans in Japan in 1948, and though 70 years have passed since the killing, it still pursues the suppression. Exposing the criminal act of the Japanese custom authorities who confiscated the souvenirs of Korean school students in Japan who came back after visiting the homeland, the declaration expressed resentment at the human rights abuse. As the Korean schools are institutions for national education built by the Koreans who were taken to Japan during Japan's colonial rule over Korea, it deserves the protection by the Japanese government, it noted. Noting that solidarity struggle will be waged for the rights of compatriots, the declaration urged the Japanese authorities to make an apology for the past colonial rule over Korea, lift the hostile policy and the policy of sanctions against the north, halt the suppression of the Koreans in Japan and apply the tuition-free program to the Korean schools in Japan. Rodong News Team
title: Japanese Authorities Hit for Suppression of Koreans in Japan

text: A delegation of the Communist Party of Norway headed by International Secretary Svend Haakon Jacobsen visited Mangyongdae, the birthplace of President Kim Il Sung. The guests looked round the historical relics, being briefed on the story about the birthplace. The delegation also toured the Monument to Party Founding, the Mangyongdae Schoolchildren's Palace, the Mirim Riding Club, etc. Rodong News Team
title: Norwegian Party Delegation Visits Mangyongdae

text: According to the south Korean MBC, the 1348th Wednesday meeting and world solidarity action were held outside the Japanese embassy in Seoul on Aug. 15 in demand of the settlement of the issue of the sexual slavery for the Imperial Japanese Army. Attending there were more than 8 000 persons including students, citizens, sexual victims of various countries and the "south Korean Youth League in Japan" . A statement was issued there. The statement said that the solution to the issue of the sexual slavery for the imperial Japanese army is a way for eradicating wartime sexual violence worldwide and ensuring peace. On the same day, solidarity meetings took place in 43 places of ten countries to disclose and denounce the sexual slavery committed by Japan in the past. Rodong News Team
title: Solution to Issue of Sexual Slavery Demanded in S. Korea

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and supreme commander of the Korean People's Army, inspected the Myohyangsan Medical Appliances Factory. Looking round the room for education in the revolutionary history, sci-tech learning space and various workshops of the factory, the respected Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un learned in detail about the production of medical appliances. Recalling that the Party had already given policies several times to remodel and modernize the units associated with leadership exploits of the great leaders including the Myohyangsan Medical Appliances Factory and turn them into model ones after the Seventh Congress of the Party by taking issue with the serious situation that the public health sector almost failed to do the work for consolidating its material and technical foundation in recent years, he said he cannot but be very concerned about and disappointed by the bad situation of the factory. He noted that he could not understand whether the factory was under remodeling and modernization or not and what had been remodeled and modernized as he could not see any sign of remodeling though it has been two years since the Party gave a warning to it. Other sectors have made remarkable leaps forward in recent years, but the public health sector has never done so but become more and more passive, he said, noting that there is nothing to be proud of in the public health sector, except the modern hospitals, the Medical Oxygen Factory and the Dental Hygiene Products Factory recently built under direct control of the Party. There is no unit keeping its environment well in the public health sector, to say nothing of equipment modernization, he charged. The Party has stressed the need to intensify its guidance over the public health work and called for the Cabinet and the people's power organs at all levels to fully discharge their responsibility and role in the work for consolidating the material and technical foundation of the public health sector as the public health policy in our country is premised on the state investment and supply of materials, but officials are very idle and irresponsible in doing so, he pointed out. The room for education in the revolutionary history is not so good in contrast with those of other units, and from the poor arrangement of the sci-tech learning space one can easily know with what ideological viewpoint the Party organizations in the public health sector accepted the Party policy on raising the hot wind of sci-tech study, and the hot wind for sci-tech learning can never be raised here, he said, criticizing the organizations for executing the Party policy in a very perfunctory manner. He earnestly called for successfully turning the Myohyangsan Medical Appliances Factory, which President Kim Il Sung founded and paid deep attention to till the last moments of his life, into the model one playing the leading role in the industry of medical appliances to realize his wishes and glorify his leadership exploits down through generations. It is necessary to stand in the van by destroying and transforming the outdated ones, not losing the heart, he said, adding that they should not repair some old buildings only but arrange the production environment, as required by the international standards, and modernize the production processes on the basis of the latest science and technology and turn the fact
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Inspects Myohyangsan Medical Appliances Factory

text: A national sci-tech presentation of the metal industry field took place at the Kim Chaek Iron and Steel Complex on Monday and Tuesday under the sponsorship of the Central Committee of the General Federation of Science and Technology of Korea. Participating in the presentation were scientists, technicians, teachers, three-revolution team members, workers and officials of different units including the Kim Chaek Iron and Steel Complex, Hwanghae Iron and Steel Complex, Chollima Steel Complex, Steel Designing Institute under the Ministry of Metallurgical Industry, Ferrous Metal Research Institute of the State Academy of Sciences and Kim Chaek University of Technology. Published there were more than 140 papers dealing with the successes and experience gained in the course of settling the scientific and technological matters for further rounding off the Juche-based system of producing iron, raising the productivity and quality and expanding the variety of rolled steel. During the presentation there were a lecture on the production process at the oxygen heat blast furnace and a visit to the Kim Chaek Iron and Steel Complex. Rodong News Team
title: National Sci-Tech Presentation of Metal Industry Field Held

text: Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and premier of the Cabinet, inspected Kulloja Cooperative Farm in Sinchon County, Chimchon Cooperative Farm in Hwangju County, Unha Cooperative Farm in Onchon County and other farms and units of agricultural science research in South and North Hwanghae Provinces and Nampho City. Going round farms, construction sites and experimental plots, Pak learned about damage by natural disaster and crop growth, underscoring the need to actively introduce scientific farming method, raise the quality level of the construction projects and step up the research into the rice strains of salt resistance for tideland-turned rice field and its introduction. The consultative meetings held on the spots reviewed the successes and faults in carrying out the goals of the five-year strategy for national economic development, discussed immediate and long-term plans and measures for implementing the Party's policies for the agricultural field. Rodong News Team
title: Pak Pong Ju Inspects Agricultural Field

text: A national sci-tech presentation of the fishery sector was held at the Institute of Fishery of the Ministry of Fisheries on Wednesday and Thursday. It was sponsored by the Central Committee of the General Federation of Science and Technology of Korea. Present there were officials, teachers, researchers and postgraduates of various units. The presentation heard over 150 papers helpful to further developing science and technology of the fishery sector. It was divided into various panels such as fishing and marine resources and fishery information and machinery. Drawing the attention of the participants were data on the successes proving effective for developing the systems of scientific detection of fishing grounds and assistance, upgrading fishing vessels and equipment and boosting offshore culture and fish farming. There were lectures on protection and increase of marine resources and the trend of the development of offshore fish farming and culture during the presentation. Rodong News Team
title: National Sci-tech Presentation of Fishery Sector

text: Wonsan University of Agriculture marked its 70th founding anniversary. It is the first-born university of agriculture which was founded and developed under the care of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and a distinguished one which contributed to the development of the country's agriculture and training of agricultural sci-tech talents. President Kim Il Sung chose a suitable place as the site of the university and made sure that it was founded as the first university of agriculture for the people on September 1, Juche 37 (1948), and inspected it several times, wisely leading it to train many sci-tech talents who would shoulder the socialist rural construction. Chairman Kim Jong Il paid deep attention to the work of the university, led it to improve education and scientific research, as required by the developing reality, personally visited it and highly praised the exploits of its teaching staff. He repeatedly sent modern apparatuses for experiment and practice. For the past 70 years since its foundation, the university has developed into a prestigious university and a center for agricultural scientific research which systematically trains agricultural sci-tech talents, true to the line and policy of the Workers' Party of Korea. A meeting took place on Friday to mark the anniversary. It was attended by Pak Thae Song, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the WPK, officials concerned, teaching staff and students of the university. Rodong News Team
title: 70th Founding Anniversary of Wonsan University of Agriculture Marked

text: Today socialist Korea, the country of Juche, pushes ahead with the revolution and construction in an independent and dignified manner and fully displays its prestige as a country prospering by its own efforts and in its own way, a fortress of independence with high international authority and influence. At the time when the global socialist movement was in a state of chaos, we defended socialism without a slight vacillation and the DPRK became a country with high dignity and international authority as today. It’s because we have constantly pursued politics of independence. We have firmly established a political backbone and never read other’s face and allow the others to meddle in our affairs. We fixed all policies to meet the specific features of our country and the interests and demands of our people and then we implemented them by ourselves as the master. When the modern revisionists tried to hammer their policies to us, we flatly refused it. No pressure will work on our people. We have the great leader, great party and great people. That’s why we had no reason to look up to others or beg for help and, besides, to accept others’ order and pressure. The practical experience of our revolution and the review of the 70-year history of our Republic verify that independence is the life and future of a country and a nation and upholding high the banner of independence is a guarantee of the victory of the human cause of independence. Ra Myong Song
title: Independence Is Life of Country

text: A national oratorical contest for celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK took place at the Hamhung Grand Theatre on Tuesday. Officials and working people successful at provincial and central contests took the floor. The performers spoke highly of the undying exploits of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and the personality of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un as the peerlessly great man who is opening up a new history of prosperity of Juche Korea. Rodong News Team
title: National Oratorical Contest Held

text: A national photo exhibition "Seven Decades of Victory and Glory" opened at the People's Palace of Culture on Monday with due ceremony to mark the 70th birthday of the DPRK. Seen in the venue of the event are photos of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un atop Mt Paektu. Also seen there are photos of Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il dealing with their nation-building feats and photos showing the personality of Kim Jong Un as a great man. Seen there are photos showing revolutionary feats of the President who honorably defended the freedom and independence of the country and the gains of revolution and built the DPRK into a socialist country, independent in politics, self-supporting in the economy and self-reliant in national defence. Displayed there are photos on the patriotic devotion of Kim Jong Il who developed the country into a political and ideological power of single-minded unity and an invincible military power and provided a firm springboard for making a leap forward for building an economic power and a highly civilized country. There are also photos showing the greatness of Kim Jong Un who energetically leads the struggle to put into practice the patriotic desire of the great leaders to build a powerful country under the unfurled banner of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism. Exhibited there are photos showing the DPRK which has covered the road of victory and glory under the leadership of the Workers' Party of Korea. Present at the ceremony were Pak Kwang Ho, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, and officials concerned and others. Rodong News Team
title: National Photo Exhibition Opens

text: A delegation of the Party of Socialists in the Republic of Moldova led by Vladimir Golovatiuc, vice-chairman of its National Council, a delegation of the Communist Party of the People of Spain led by General Secretary Carmelo Suarez, Abdulla Juma Abdulla Saadalla, vice general secretary of the Revolutionary Party of Tanzania, and a delegation of the Foreign Affairs Committee of the British Labor Party led by member Glyn Ford arrived in Pyongyang on Thursday to take part in the celebrations of the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK. Rodong News Team
title: Foreign Party Delegations and Delegate Arrive

text: Wreaths were laid at statues and cemeteries of martyrs, the Memorial Towers for the Fallen Soldiers of the Korean People's Army and the Cemeteries of Fallen Fighters of the KPA across the country on Sunday, the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK. Present at the wreath-laying events were officials of local party and power organs and working people's organizations, officers and men of the KPA and the Korean People's Internal Security Forces, working people, school youth and children. Wreaths in the names of the local party and power organs, working people's organizations, units of the KPA and the KPISF, factories, enterprises and farms, and bouquets and flowers were placed at the statues and cemeteries of martyrs and the memorial towers and the cemeteries of fallen fighters of the KPA. The participants paid a silent tribute to the memory of the martyrs who had defended the country's freedom and independence, national sovereignty and gains of the revolution and sacrificed themselves for the patriotic cause of building a powerful socialist country. Rodong News Team
title: Wreaths Laid at Cemeteries of Martyrs

text: Ri Su Yong, member of the Political Bureau and vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, met and had a talk with the delegation of the Lao People's Revolutionary Party led by Xaysomphone Phomvihane, member of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Lao People's Revolutionary Party and chairman of the Central Committee of the National Construction Front of Laos, who paid a courtesy call on him Sunday. Rodong News Team
title: Ri Su Yong Meets Lao Party Delegation

text: Torchlight procession of young vanguard for celebrating the 70th anniversary of the DPRK "Youth, forward, demonstrating valiant mettle of heroic Korea!" was held in Kim Il Sung Square of Pyongyang on Monday evening. The platform was taken by Kim Yong Nam, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the C.C., Workers' Party of Korea and president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the WPK Central Committee, vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and premier of the Cabinet of the DPRK, and other senior party, government and army officials, chairmen of the provincial committees of the WPK and the first secretary of the Central Committee of the Youth League. Also taking it were Salvador Antonio Valdes Mesa, first vice-president of the Council of State and first vice-president of the Council of Ministers of Cuba, Helal Al-Helal, deputy regional secretary of the Baath Arab Socialist Party, and heads of party, state and government delegations from different countries on a visit to the DPRK to attend the celebrations of the 70th birthday of the DPRK. Seen on the platform were heads of the congratulatory group of Koreans in Japan, the congratulatory group of the General Association of Koreans in China and the delegation of the International United Confederation of Koreans. Present there were delegates to the celebrations of the 70th anniversary of the DPRK, officials of party, armed forces and power organs, ministries and national institutions, officers and men of the Korean People's Army and the Korean People's Internal Security Forces and persons of merit. Present there on invitation were members of overseas Koreans congratulatory groups and delegations, individual overseas compatriots and the chief of the Pyongyang mission of the Anti-Imperialist National Democratic Front, and members of foreign delegations, representatives of foreign embassies and international organizations and members of the military attaches corps here and other foreign guests. When the start of the torchlight procession was declared, letters reading "September 9" and "Celebrations 70" in celebration of the anniversary of the DPRK were displayed on the ground amid the playing of song "The Glorious Country". Open limousines carrying the portraits of smiling President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il passed the square, escorted by the young vanguard with torches in their hands. Youth and students portrayed large-size letters reading "Kim Il Sung's Nation" and "Kim Jong Il's Korea" and the sun with torchlight. They depicted the emblem of the WPK, the national flag and letters reading "Kim Jong Un's era", "Supreme Leader" and "Banner of Victory" with torchlight. The procession advanced, forming letters reading "Heroic Korea" and "Single-minded Unity" with well-organized formation changes and other letters demonstrating the dignity of socialist Korea and representing figures portraying the torchlight holder of the Tower of the Juche Idea and the Monument to Party Founding. The best wishes of all the people and the youth for Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un were reflected in the large letters reading "Glory to Marshal!" made with torchlight, and fireworks of celebration went off to significantly decorate the end of the torchlight procession. Rodong News Team
title: Torchlight Procession of Young Vanguard Marks 70th Anniversary of DPRK

text: Foreigners and foreign delegations left here on Wednesday after taking part in the international event for celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK. They included the chairman of the African Regional Committee for Friendship and Solidarity with the Korean People and the co-chairman of the Arab Regional Committee for Friendship and Solidarity with the Korean People who are co-chairpersons of the Organizing Committee of the International Festival in Praise of the Great Persons of Mt Paektu, the first vice-chairman of the Latin American and Caribbean Regional Committee to Support the Reunification of Korea, a delegation of the International League of People's Struggle, Turkish friendly delegation, France-Korea writers friendship delegation, Japanese delegation of the Forum for Peace, Human Rights and Environment, and a delegation of the Centre for Peace and Conflict Studies. On the same day, a friendship delegation of Tonghua City, Jilin Province of China, delegation of the Finland-Korea Society and a delegate of the Switzerland-Korea Committee left here. Rodong News Team
title: Foreign Guests Leave

text: Foreign guests left Pyongyang on Saturday after taking part in the international events for celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK. They included the co-chairman of the Asia-Pacific Regional Committee for Supporting Peaceful Reunification of Korea and the chairman of the Denmark-DPRK Friendship Association who are co-chairmen of the Organizing Committee of the International Festival in Praise of the Great Persons of Mt Paektu, a delegation of the Australia-DPRK Association for Friendship and Culture, a delegation of the Sweden-Korea Friendship Association, a delegation of the Luxembourg-Korea Friendship Association and a professor of Leiden University of the Netherlands and his party. Rodong News Team
title: Foreigners Leave

text: Conservative politicians of the U.S. have cooked up and spread a series of cock-and-bull stories, saying that no one knows when and how the DPRK would carry out its promise, it is conducting a work for concealing its nuclear assets and the situation might make a U-turn. Untrustworthy is not the DPRK but just the conservative politicians of the U.S. seeking to disrupt the DPRK-U.S. dialogue at any cost by spreading a “story about doubtful north Korea.” The conservative politicians have done nothing for the building of trust between the DPRK and the U.S. But they are now crying out for resuming the south Korea-U.S. joint military drills, the halt of which had already been made public on the part of the U.S. Ridiculous is the fact that the conservative politicians are forcing more and more brigandish demands on the DPRK though they fail to do what they should do. As they don’t know well what’s going on now and are misjudging everything, the conservative politicians of America are going so foolish as to unhesitatingly attempt to get rid of the DPRK’s nukes just like disposing of the properties of a defeated nation. Taking this opportunity, we again warn the conservative politicians against their self-righteous way of thinking. They had better study more about the DPRK. They are well advised to remember the disgrace suffered by their predecessors who handed written apologies and surrender to the DPRK without caring about the decency of their American empire. Dialogue without mutual respect and trust is not dialogue at all. “Do not betray dialogue partners’ trust!”—this is what we have to say to the U.S., never vice versa. We are dealing with the U.S. with goodwill and patience. It is our mettle to do to the end what it is determined to do and once it begins to do. “Only north Korea is seen in the course of building trust between it and the U.S.” This is just what the international community says and the conservative politicians of the U.S. need to listen to it carefully. They should clearly understand that their base speech and conduct is turning the U.S. into an untrustworthy state and an isolated and closed country. No matter how frequently such human dregs nudged out of a strong trend of the times let out a string of paradox and put the brakes on the development, the peoples of the DPRK and the U.S. will do what they want to do as the engine for the improvement of the bilateral relations will never weaken. The more desperately the conservative politicians of the U.S. check the development of the DPRK-U.S. relations by spreading a “story of doubtful north Korea”, the more clearly it will betray their true colors as disgusting ones working hard to realize their wild political ambition only. Jo Nam Jin
title: American Politicians Should Not Spread False Story about DPRK

text: A delegation of officials of organizations under the General Association of Koreans in China, a delegation of elderly officials of the general association, a delegation of Korean war veterans in China, a delegation of Korean artistes in China and a home-visiting group of Koreans in Japan left Pyongyang on Saturday after attending the celebrations of the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK. Departing earlier were a delegation of officials of the Union of Democratic Korean Women in Japan, a delegation of the International United Confederation of Koreans, a delegation of the Council of Koreans in New Zealand, a delegation of Koreans in Nakhodka of Russia, a delegation of Koreans in Ussuriysk of Russia and a delegation of Korean businessmen in the Commonwealth of Independent States. Rodong News Team
title: Overseas Compatriots Leave

text: Kimilsungia exhibitions took place in Indonesia and Guinea and Kimjongilia exhibition in Mongolia during the period between Sept. 1 and 9 on the occasion of the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK. On display at the venues of the exhibitions were portraits of smiling President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and photos showing revolutionary activities of the great leaders and Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. Also displayed there were works of the peerlessly great men and books and pictures introducing the DPRK. The chairman of the Guinean national preparatory committee for celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK and the chairman of the Guinean Society for the Study of the Juche Literary Idea referred to the exploits performed by the great leaders in founding and developing the DPRK. They said that the DPRK is demonstrating its might as the invincible power under the guidance of Kim Jong Un. The chairman of the National Democratic Party of Mongolia said that the DPRK could make a leap forward while rejecting all sorts of challenges for a long period under the wise leadership of HE Kim Il Sung and HE Kim Jong Il and therefore, the whole world is highly praising them as the outstanding great men. The chairman of the Mongolian preparatory committee for celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK noted that the DPRK which covered the path of steady development under the leadership of President Kim Il Sung and HE Kim Jong Il is making a dynamic advance toward greater victory following HE Kim Jong Un, hoping the DPRK will further prosper along with the blooming Kimjongilia. Rodong News Team
title: Exhibitions of Kimilsungia and Kimjongilia Held in Various Countries

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un received a letter from a congratulatory group and a delegation of the General Association of Koreans in China for celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK on September 15. The letter said that they were invited to the celebrations for the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK, which were held with splendor in the presence of Kim Jong Un, and came to bear in mind the unshakable faith of the people in the homeland, who are determined to accomplish the revolutionary cause of Juche under the banner of the great Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism, and the images of those who are single-mindedly united around him. The Supreme Leader, with the same compatriotic love and warm heart as President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il had, took measures to ensure that they participated in the events receiving the best hospitality, and showed parental love for them not to feel any inconvenience, the letter said. They have received constant care of the benevolent father for decades thanks to the Supreme Leader who is identical to the President and the Chairman in ideology, leadership and virtue, the letter noted. They vowed in the letter that no matter how frequently the world changes, they will more firmly consolidate the General Association of Koreans in China into a dignified organization of overseas citizens of Juche Korea, which is faithful to the leadership of Kim Jong Un only and into a compatriots' organization strong in the Juche character and national character. Rodong News Team
title: Letter to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from Koreans in China

text: Kim Yong Nam, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, met and had a talk in a compatriotic atmosphere with a congratulatory group of Koreans in Japan for celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK led by Pu Yong Uk, chairman of the Osaka Prefectural Headquarters of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan, at the Mansudae Assembly Hall on Wednesday. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Yong Nam Meets Congratulatory Group of Koreans in Japan

text: Premier Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK, made a field survey of the venue of the 45th National Farm Machine Exhibition and the construction site for establishing the C1 chemical industry and the Samsong Cooperative Farm in Junghwa County. Looking round the venue of the exhibition, the premier acquainted himself in detail with the operation of the farm machines presented and called for increasing the rate of mechanization of agricultural labor and meticulously organizing the operation of the agricultural sci-tech learning space. Visiting the construction site where projects for establishing C1 chemical industry are underway, he urged the relevant units to dynamically conduct the campaign for increased production for supplying equipment and materials necessary for the projects in time. A consultative meeting held on the spot stressed the importance of the projects and called on officials to responsibly conduct organizing and control and guidance over the projects. At the Samsong Co-op Farm, he discussed measures arising in gaining a good harvest. Rodong News Team
title: Premier Inspects Various Units

text: Gyula Thurmer, chairman of the Hungarian Workers' Party, and his party visited Mangyongdae, birthplace of President Kim Il Sung. At the time-honored place of the Sun where Kim Il Sung was born and spent his childhood, the visitors looked round historic relics, being briefed on the immortal story associated with the historic home. They also toured the Tower of the Juche Idea, the Victorious Fatherland Liberation War Museum, the Okryu Children's Hospital, etc. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman of Hungarian Workers' Party and His Party Visit Mangyongdae

text: Ri Su Yong, member of the Political Bureau and vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, on Thursday had a talk with Gyula Thurmer, chairman of the Hungarian Workers' Party, and his party. Rodong News Team
title: Vice-Chairman of C.C., WPK Meets Hungarian Workers' Party Chairman

text: DPRK Foreign Minister Ri Yong Ho, who is attending the 73rd session of the UN General Assembly as head of the DPRK delegation, met and had a talk with UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres at the UN Headquarters on Sept. 28. Antonio Guterres highly appreciated the inter-Korean summits, DPRK-U.S. summit and other dialogues held so far this year, and hoped that all the issues would be tackled well through the efforts of all parties. Ri Yong Ho said that Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un brought about a new phase of dramatic détente of the situation in the Korean peninsula with his superb political ability and through energetic external activities. And he stressed that the UN has responsibility and duty to support and encourage the development of situation helpful to the international peace and security in keeping with its mission. Rodong News Team
title: FM of DPRK Meets UN Secretary-General

text: Foreign Minister Ri Yong Ho, head of the delegation of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, delivered a speech at the plenary meeting of the 73rd session of the United Nations General Assembly on Saturday. He said that Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK, conducted energetic summit-level diplomatic activities with a firm determination to turn the Korean peninsula into a cradle of peace without any nuclear weapons and nuclear threats; and made important breakthrough in improving the North-South relations and the DPRK-U.S. relations and in revitalizing the friendly and cooperative relations with neighboring countries and hence made a turning point for dramatic easing of tension in the Korean peninsula. He went on: The vital factor in consolidating the peace and security in the Korean peninsula is to thoroughly implement the DPRK-U.S. Joint Statement adopted in June at the historic DPRK-U.S. summit in Singapore. The primary task for effectively implementing the DPRK-U.S. Joint Statement should be bringing down the wall of mistrust between the two countries which has existed for several decades; and to do so the DPRK and the U.S. should direct their first efforts to building trust. It is our position that the denuclearization of the Korean peninsula should also be realized under the principle of building peace regime and simultaneous action, step by step, starting with what we can do first and giving priority to building of trust. However, we do not see any corresponding response from the U.S. The reason behind the current deadlock is because the U.S. clings to authoritarian methods which are lethal to trust-building method. The recent dramatic improvement of the North-South relations and the atmosphere of cooperation evidently show the decisive role of trust building. The political oppositions in the U.S. make it their daily business to slander the DPRK claiming that our Republic cannot be trusted with the sole purpose of attacking their political opponent and they are enforcing the administration to make unreasonable unilateral demand to our side aimed at impeding the smooth progress of the dialogue and negotiations. Creating mistrust towards the dialogue partner while only clinging to authoritarian methods is not helpful in building trust; on the contrary it only increases mistrust. One part of the spirit of the DPRK-U.S. summit in Singapore is getting rid of the stereo-typed way of thinking and finding a completely new way of solving the issues. At this critical juncture, the U.S. should make a foresighted judgment that faithful fulfillment of its commitment in Singapore is, in the end, for the best national interests of the U.S. and should seek new method for solving the DPRK-U.S. relations. Only then there will be positive prospects for the DPRK-U.S. Joint Statement. If the DPRK-U.S. Joint Statement falls victim to the domestic politics of the U.S., the greatest victim of the subsequent unpredictable consequences would be the U.S. itself. Solving the DPRK-U.S. relations and issues in the Korean peninsula should be the key topic in achieving theme of this session: "Making the United Nations relevant to all people: Global leadership and shared responsibilities for peaceful, equitable and sustainable societies". The implementation of the DPRK-U.S. Joint Statement is a common responsibility of the DPRK and the U.S.; at the same time the UN also has its role in implementing the statement. The UN Security
title: Ri Yong Ho Calls for thoroughly Implementing DPRK-U.S. Joint Statement

text: A delegation of the DPRK Ministry of Electric Power headed by Minister Kim Man Su left here on Monday to attend the 2nd "Russian week of electric power" event due in Russia. Rodong News Team
title: Delegation of Ministry of Electric Power Industry Leaves for Russia

text: The Inter-Provincial Mass Sports Contest - 2018 opened with due ceremony at the Pyongyang Indoor Stadium on Monday. Present there were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and chairman of the National Sports Guidance Committee, Vice-Premier Ri Ryong Nam, Minister of Physical Culture and Sports Kim Il Guk, officials concerned, active officials in the mass sports work, participants of the contest and cheering squads and Pyongyangites. There will be professional sports games, mass sports games and sports amusement games among working people of various circles, housewives, school youth and children and sportspersons selected in Pyongyang and each province (municipality) during the sports contest. Rodong News Team
title: Inter-Provincial Mass Sports Contest - 2018 Opens

text: Recently, the Japanese government posted an inquiry report terming Tok Island a “part of the Japanese territory” on the website of the Cabinet Secretariat. This is just a manifestation of the sinister design of the Japanese ruling quarters hell-bent on the moves to seize the island. In January last a ceremony for opening an exhibition house for territorial sovereignty was given in the middle of Tokyo Metropolis to advertise Japan’s “dominium over Tok Island”. Paragraphs containing such claim were stipulated in such documents as a diplomatic blue book and a defense white paper. Not content with it, the Japanese regime posted such absurd and impudent words on its Cabinet Secretariat’s website. Tok Island is just a part of the inalienable territory of the Korean nation. Nevertheless, the Japanese reactionaries are insisting that the island is “a part of their territory”, touting “illegal occupation.” Their racket to seize others’ territory against historical truth and international principle has reached the height of wild greed and impudence. They are loudly talking about “dominium over Tok Island”, only to come under criticism by the international community. Lurking behind it is an ill-minded intention to justify their criminal moves for reinvasion, on which various countries are keeping their sharp eyes, by giving impression that there exists an “issue of territorial dispute” between the DPRK and Japan. The Japanese reactionaries’ distortion of history is just a prelude to their territorial expansion and overseas invasion. However, “dominium over Tok Island” touted by them is just a wild dream that can never come true. Japan’s desperate moves to grab the island will only harden the will of Korean nation to surely force the sworn enemy to pay dearly for the past crimes, out of towering hatred towards Japan. Ri Hyo Jin
title: Japan’s Moves to Seize Tok Island

text: There was a joint game of men basketball players of the sports delegation of China on a goodwill visit to the DPRK and men basketball players of the DPRK at the Ryugyong Jong Ju Yong Indoor Stadium on Thursday. Watching the game were Choe Ryong Hae, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and vice-chairman of the WPK Central Committee, Ri Su Yong, An Jong Su, Ri Yong Ho, Ro Tu Chol, Choe Hwi and other party and government officials and officials concerned. Also among the spectators were the sports delegation of the People's Republic of China led by Gou Zhongwen, minister of the General Administration of Sports, Li Jinjun, Chinese ambassador to the DPRK, and his embassy officials and Chinese guests. The players of the two countries entered the playground.
