In their speeches, Minister of Physical Culture and Sports Kim Il Guk and Minister of the General Administration of Sports Gou Zhongwen expressed the expectation that the significant game would contribute to exchanging good techniques and experience between the sportspersons of the two countries and to demonstrating the bonds of DPRK-China friendship. Men basketball players of the two countries held a joint game, divided into Friendship Team and Solidarity Team. The game ended draw. Choe Ryong Hae and other party and government officials, leading members of the sports delegation of China and the Chinese ambassador met those players who performed well and congratulated them. The sportspersons of the two countries had a photo taken together in a joy of their exchanging diverse basketball technique and experience. Rodong News Team
title: Joint Game of Men Basketball Players of DPRK, PRC Held

text: Let Us Wage Dynamic Struggle for Successfully Concluding This Year’s Campaign By attaining the goals for this year without fail in the spirit of the self-reliance and fortitude, all the officials, Party members and working people should fully display the indomitable spirit of Juche Korea which has nothing impossible and further accelerate the advance of the Korean revolution. This year has witnessed dramatic events strikingly demonstrating the dignity and might of Juche Korea under the leadership of the Workers’ Party of Korea and a new upswing was effected in overall economic construction to give full display to the tremendous might of the country. To successfully conclude this year’s campaign is a serious political struggle to fully display the tremendous national power of Juche Korea in the face of the difficulties of every description. It is also a crucial struggle to make a breakthrough without fail in attaining the goals of the five-year strategy for national economic development. Bearing in mind that the key to the leaping progress is the spirit of self-reliance and science and technology today when the tasks are gigantic and the country is faced with many difficulties and ordeals, all the people should perform miracles by their own efforts and technology. All people should wage a dynamic struggle for successfully concluding this year’s campaign and thus fully display the spirit and mettle of Juche Korea dashing towards the high eminence of a powerful socialist country.
title: Editorial

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un received a gift from the delegation of the Socialist Journalist Forum of Nepal for the Study of the Juche Idea. The gift was conveyed to an official concerned on Wednesday by Chairman of the Forum Deependra Rokaya, who is heading its delegation on a visit to the DPRK. Rodong News Team
title: Gift to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from Nepalese Delegation

text: The national exhibition of IT successes-2018 closed with due ceremony at the Three-Revolution Exhibition House in Pyongyang on Friday. A lot of successes gained in the drive for breaking through the cutting edge to put the national economy on a modern and IT basis were introduced at the exhibition. Present at the closing ceremony were Ro Tu Chol, vice-premier and concurrently chairman of the State Planning Commission, officials of commissions, ministries and national institutions, officials concerned and officials of those units which contributed to the exhibition and working people. The IT Institute of the Latest Science Institute of Kim Il Sung University, the Intelligent Information Institute of the State Academy of Sciences and other units were selected at the exhibition as ten IT model units and ten top IT enterprises and the school subject contest management system, the naval commanding system and others appreciated as ten top IT products. Rodong News Team
title: National Exhibition of IT Successes-2018 Closes

text: There sprang up the Rason Old People's Home. The home, a two-storey Korean-style building, is equipped with all necessary facilities for old people's health and living such as fitness room, beauty room, bathrooms, clinic and entertainment hall. Its inaugural ceremony was held on Thursday with attendance of Sin Yong Chol, chairman of the Rason City Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, Jo Jong Ho, chairman of the Rason City People's Committee, officials concerned, employees, inmates, builders and citizens. After the ceremony the participants saw round the home. Rodong News Team
title: Rason Old People's Home Built

text: Minjok Thongsin, an internet newspaper of Koreans in the U.S., on October 20 posted an article denouncing the U.S. unreasonable interference. The article, contributed by Kim Jung San, a U.S.-resident Korean, rejected the U.S. recent assertion that south Korea can do nothing without its approval over the issue of lifting the "May 24 step". This is evidently an infringement upon the sovereignty of south Korea and an interference in internal affairs, the article said, demanding an apology from the U.S. Rodong News Team
title: U.S. Interference Rejected

text: Gabriela Cuevas Barron, president of the Inter-Parliamentary Union (IPU), said that she would strive for the improvement of inter-Korean relations. In a recent statement, she welcomed the affirmative events witnessed on the Korean peninsula in the wake of the historic inter-Korean summits and the Singapore DPRK-U.S. summit, and appreciated that the north and the south of Korea are promoting the reconciliation and understanding of each other. The IPU has directed a lot of efforts to the contacts between the north and the south and such effort will continue in the future, too, she said. Rodong News Team
title: IPU President Promises Effort for Improved Inter-Korean Relations

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, on Friday sent a congratulatory message to Sahlework Zewde upon her election as president of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia. Expressing the belief that the good relations of friendship and cooperation between the two countries would continue to develop on good terms, the message sincerely wished the Ethiopian president big success in her responsible work for the country's peace, stability and development. Rodong News Team
title: Congratulations to Ethiopian President

text: A delegation of the European Parliament Delegation for Relations with Korean Peninsula led by Chairman Nirj Deva arrived here on Monday. Rodong News Team
title: EP Delegation Here

text: Talks were held between Kang Yun Sok, president of the Central Court of the DPRK, and Vyacheslav Lebedev, president of the Supreme Court of the Russian Federation, at the Mansudae Assembly Hall on Tuesday. Present at the talks from the DPRK side were officials concerned and from the Russian side were members of the delegation of the Supreme Court of Russia and the Russian ambassador to the DPRK. The talks discussed the issues of further developing the exchange and cooperation between judicial organs of the two countries. Rodong News Team
title: Talks between Court Presidents of DPRK and Russia

text: Talks were held between the DPRK-EU Friendship Parliamentary Group and a delegation of the European Parliament Delegation for Relations with Korean Peninsula at the Mansudae Assembly Hall on Tuesday. Present there from the DPRK side were Chairman Ri Jong Hyok and members of the group and from the opposite side were members of the delegation led by Chairman Nirj Deva. At the talks both sides exchanged views on the issue of further developing the relations between the two parliaments and a series of issues of mutual concern. Rodong News Team
title: Parliamentary Talks between DPRK and EU

text: A joint performance of the artistes of the DPRK and China was given at the Mansudae Art Theatre on Monday. Among the audience were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK); Ri Ryong Nam, vice-premier of the Cabinet; An Tong Chun, chairman of the C.C., the General Federation of the Unions of Art and Literature of Korea; Pak Chun Sik, vice-minister of Culture, officials, creators, artistes and teachers and students in the field of culture and arts. Present there on invitation were leading members of the Chinese delegation of artistes including its head Luo Shugang, and Chinese Ambassador to the DPRK Li Jinjun and his embassy officials. Put on the stage were favorite songs of the peoples of the two countries such as female solo "Ardent Desire", male solo "The Fluttering Red Flag", mixed duet "New World", female duet "Song of Changjiang" and choruses "Blue Sky over My Country" and "I Love My Chinese Nation". The songs of the famous artistes of the two countries were acclaimed by the audience. The audience congratulated the performers on their successful performance, presenting bouquets to them. Rodong News Team
title: Joint Performance Given by Artistes of DPRK and China

text: The delegation of young officials of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan led by Pak Ok Sam, vice-chairman of the Central Standing Committee of the Korean Youth League in Japan, on Thursday visited the Kumsusan Palace of the Sun. The members of the delegation paid tribute to the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il in the palace. At the halls of immortality where the great leaders lie in state the visitors bowed to them. They made rounds of the halls where the orders the great leaders received are on display and the halls that house cars, electric car, boat and train coaches used by them during their field guidance and foreign tours till the last moments of their lives. Rodong News Team
title: Delegation of Young Chongryon Officials Visits Kumsusan Palace of Sun

text: The African regional seminar on the Juche idea for "democracy, independence and development" took place in Conakry, Guinea on November 3. Displayed at its venue were works of President Kim Il Sung, Chairman Kim Jong Il and Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un and books introducing the proud reality of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. Present there were the secretary general of the African Regional Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea, the chairman of the Nigerian National Committee for the Study of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism and the chairman of the Guinean National Committee for the Study of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism who are directors of the African regional committee, the acting general secretary of the Democratic Rally of Africa-Democratic Party of Guinea and other figures of various circles of different countries and the region. A congratulatory speech was made at the seminar. Andre Lohekele Kalonda, secretary general of the African Regional Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea, made a report to be followed by speeches. Speakers said that the immortal Juche idea founded by Kim Il Sung serves as the undying guideline as it brightly clarifies the road of the popular masses' struggle for realizing independence and building a new society. They noted that the DPRK has further demonstrated its might as an invincible power which no one dares to provoke thanks to the wise guidance of Kim Jong Un advancing invariably upholding the banner of Juche and the single-minded unity of all the people closely united around him. Saying that they deeply realized once again the validity and vitality of the Juche idea through the celebrations of the 70th founding anniversary of the DPRK, they called upon all the participants to dynamically wage the struggle for realizing independence in the African region along the road guided by the Juche idea in the future, too. A letter to Kim Jong Un was adopted at the seminar. Rodong News Team
title: African Regional Seminar on Juche Idea

text: The south Korean Kyunghyang Daily News in an article on Nov. 7 denounced the "Liberal Korea Party" (LKP) for desperately preventing the inter-Korean cooperation. The paper said that LKP is crying out for "adjustment and cut" of the budget bill for 2019 submitted by the "government", branding it as a drain on resources for the north. The paper charged that the LKP is using the south-north relations for its political tactics. Rodong News Team
title: LKP Blasted for Preventing Inter-Korean Cooperation

text: Western countries cooked up and spread a human rights document of falsehoods and fabrications in a bid to internationalize and politicize the non-existent “human rights question” in the DPRK. A serious human rights question exists in the western countries. The U.S., which styles itself the “model” of capitalism, is swarming with unemployed and homeless people. Murder, robbery and other high-profile crimes are rampant there. Colored and minority races there have their rights wantonly violated in education, legal protection, election, etc. There is not much difference in Japan, which likes to brag itself as a “law-governed state” and “advanced state”, and in European countries which slander other countries, behaving as if they were the “model” in respecting human rights. Child maltreatment is rife and sexual abuses against children are on the steady increase in Japan. Women, children, persons of advanced age and those with disabilities who should be under the care of social protection are just forsaken by the society. This is the pitiful human rights situation in Japan. The same is the human rights situation in European countries. The U.S., Japan and Western countries had better cure their human rights illness, instead of criticizing others groundlessly. Ri Hak Nam
title: Serious Human Rights Situation in Western Countries

text: The DPRK fully demonstrates its might as a dignified independent country and homeland of Juche. The complicated events in the international arena at present show how just it is that the Worker’s Party of Korea and the state adhere to the principle of independence. The DPRK has maintained the revolutionary principle, the principle of independence, in the activities of the Party and the state under the wise leadership of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il. Our Republic has set forth and carried out all lines and policies in its own way and according to its faith as desired by the people with the transparent anti-imperialist and class stand and socialist principle in the face of the pressure, interference, threat and plot of the imperialists and big-power chauvinists. Under the guidance of the great leaders the DPRK has made a long drive in confrontation with the imperialists under the banner of independence. It is the fixed faith and will of the Korean people to defend the dignity and sovereignty of the country which they have regarded as their life and soul and maintained in the stern storms of revolution. Our Republic will remain long as a dignified independent country as it has Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un at the van of the Korean revolution. Ra Myong Song
title: DPRK Will Shine as Dignified Independent Country

text: A Japanese Buddhist delegation led by Raitei Arima, director general of the Kyoto Buddhist Society of Japan, left here for home on Thursday. The delegation held a Buddhist ceremony praying for peace and reunification of the Korean peninsula at the Ryongthong Temple in Kaesong City. Rodong News Team
title: Japanese Buddhist Delegation Leaves

text: The National Nano Sci-Tech Exhibition-2018 was held at the Nano Engineering Branch of the State Academy of Sciences from November 19 to 23 under the sponsorship of the Central Committee of the General Federation of Science and Technology of Korea. Present there were teachers, researchers, graduate students and field officials of tens of units including Kim Il Sung University, Kim Chaek University of Technology, the State Academy of Sciences, the Academy of Agricultural Science and the Academy of Medical Science. The exhibition was held divided into panels of nano measurement and theory, nano agriculture and medical science. Displayed there were a lot of research successes contributable to the development of nano technology and read out were more than eighty papers. During the exhibition, exchanged was experience in the course of researching nano technology through a presentation and brisk technical exchange and a lecture on matters arising in building industry based on nano technology took place. Rodong News Team
title: Nano Sci-Tech Exhibition Held

text: An Indian committee for remembering Chairman Kim Jong Il was formed in New Delhi on November 19. Atul Kumar Anjan, secretary of the National Council of the Communist Party of India and chairman of the All India Indo-Korean Friendship Association, was elected chairman of the remembrance committee. The committee set a remembrance period from November 19 to December 17 and decided to organize political and cultural events including a remembrance meeting, seminar, lecture and photo exhibition praising the revolutionary career and exploits of Kim Jong Il. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il to Be Remembered in India

text: A Russian website and newspaper carried special write-ups to commemorate the 7th anniversary of demise of Chairman Kim Jong Il. An article titled "Figure of a great man" was posted on the website Grifon Prestizh, with a portrait of smiling Kim Jong Il on November 19. Saying that the world progressives recollect the valuable career of the great man Kim Jong Il with the approach of the anniversary of his demise, the article went on: Leader Kim Jong Il was a man who worked hard without rest. His work time was from dawn to dawn next day and his activity sphere was everywhere the people live. When he passed away, the world knew better about the sacred life of the great man who devoted his all to the people, seeing the Korean people bitterly grieved feeling guilty as they were unable to provide him with a rest. He was the man who devoted his all to the prosperity of the country and happiness of its people with his view of life and philosophy to devote himself to the future like pure and clean snow. The November 21st issue of the newspaper Nakhodkinski Rabochi carried an article tilted "Song in Praise of Great Man", together with his photos. It said that many foreign personages who were attracted by his rare wisdom, distinguished political ability and noble personality wrote books and created poems and songs for praising the great man with all their enthusiasm. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il Highly Praised by Russian Media

text: A delegation of the Socialist Women's Union of Korea (SWUK) led by Chae Chun Hui, vice-chairwoman of its Central Committee, came back home on Saturday after attending meetings of the Women's International Democratic Federation held in Cuba and El Salvador. Rodong News Team
title: SWUK Delegation Returns

text: A preparatory committee for Pusan Joint Action for Scrapping "Security Law" held a rally in Pusan on Nov. 28, according to the south Korean newspaper Nodong and Segye. Speakers at the rally said the SL should have already been rolled back but it has been persistently sustained and used as a tool to crack down the people as of now for 70 years since it was cooked up. They called upon everyone to turn out in a campaign for repelling the SL, claiming that the SL should be scrapped without fail just to bring peace to the Korean peninsula. Rodong News Team
title: Abrogation of Security Law Urged

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un sent a wreath to the bier of Kim Chol Man, a member of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and a deputy to the Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, on Tuesday, expressing deep condolences over his death. Rodong News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Sends Wreath to Bier of Kim Chol Man

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK, met and had a talk with Raul Castro Ruz, first secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of Cuba, in a friendly atmosphere at the office building of the Communist Party of Cuba on Dec. 4 when he made a stopover in Cuba on his return trip after taking part in the presidential inaugural ceremony in the United Mexican States. Kim Yong Nam referred to the DPRK visit by Miguel Mario Diaz-Canel Bermudez, president of the Council of State and president of the Council of Ministers of the Republic of Cuba, expressing belief that the bilateral friendly relations would ceaselessly develop. Raul Castro Ruz wished Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un great success in his noble work of leading the struggle of the Korean people who turned out in the implementation of a new strategic line. Present there were Pak Thae Song, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, and Ma Chol Su, DPRK ambassador to Cuba, and Bruno Rodriguez Parrilla, foreign minister of the Republic of Cuba. Rodong News Team
title: Kim Yong Nam Meets Raul Castro Ruz

text: Foreign Minister of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea Ri Yong Ho on a visit to the People's Republic of China as head of the DPRK government delegation met with Xi Jinping, president of the PRC, at the Great Hall of the People on Dec.7. Xi Jinping said: Under the guidance of Comrade Kim Jong Un the Korean people are striving to implement a new strategic line set forth at the Third Plenary Meeting of the 7th Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. He noted that China is attaching high importance to the China-DPRK relations, adding that it is the fixed policy of the Chinese party and government to develop the China-DPRK friendly relations. Ri Yong Ho said that the understanding shared by the top leaders of the two countries in their historic meetings serves as precious guidelines indicating the orientation in developing the DPRK-China friendly relations, as required by a new era. He wished the Chinese people bigger success in the struggle for achieving prosperity of the Chinese nation under the guidance of the Communist Party of China. Rodong News Team
title: Head of DPRK Government Delegation Meets Chinese President

text: The full text of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's Work "The Cause of the Great Party of Comrades Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il Is Ever-Victorious" was posted on the Russian website "DPRK Today" ahead of the 7th anniversary of the demise of Chairman Kim Jong Il. The work, published on Oct. 4, Juche 104 (2015), clarifies the idea that the 70-year-long history of the Workers' Party of Korea is a history of victory in which the validity and invincibility of the cause of the Party of Comrades Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il have been displayed and that the cause of the Party is invincible. Rodong News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's Work Introduced in Russia

text: Remembrance meetings took place in Myanmar, Iceland and Senegal on December 4 and 5 to commemorate the 7th anniversary of the demise of Chairman Kim Jong Il. Present there were figures of different social standings and masses in relevant countries. The secretary of the Yangon Regional Committee of the Union Solidarity and Development Party of Myanmar said: HE Kim Jong Il performed immortal exploits in fortifying the DPRK as an invincible socialist bulwark, achieving the reunification of the country and ensuring peace and security on the Korean peninsula. Thanks to his wise leadership the DPRK could display its dignity as a politico-ideological power and military power. The great exploits of HE Kim Jong Il have been further glorified by HE Kim Jong Un. The chairperson of the Iceland-DPRK Friendly and Cultural Society said that Kim Jong Il's demise left the pain of great loss in the hearts of the Korean people and the world progressives, adding that he was a great revolutionary who devoted all his life to the prosperity of socialist Korea. He, who performed immortal feats for the reunification of Korea and the global independence, is always alive as a peerless patriot and benevolent father in the minds of mankind, the chairperson said. Speakers including a spokesperson for the Workers' Party for the Independence of Senegal who is a member of its Political Bureau highly praised Kim Jong Il for making the journey of revolutionary leadership on behalf of the country and people day and night all his life. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il Remembered in Different Countries

text: Newspapers of DR Congo and Cambodia carried special write-ups on the occasion of the 7th anniversary of the demise of Chairman Kim Jong Il. Newspaper of DR Congo L'Avenir on December 3 in an article titled "Eternal leader of the Korean people", accompanied with the portrait of smiling Kim Jong Il, said: Leader Kim Jong Il is always alive as the eternal leader in the hearts of the Korean people. He had developed in depth the Juche idea founded by President Kim Il Sung, led the Korean people to firmly advance along the road of independence and the road of socialism, strengthened the DPRK into a politico-ideological power and military power and provided a firm foundation for building a power. The Cambodian newspaper Nokor Thom Daily on December 6 in an article titled "On the occasion of the 7th anniversary of the demise of the great H.E. Generalissimo Kim Jong Il" said: Leader Kim Jong Il had lived his life with a pure and clean conscience. He was always on the road for field guidance in an ordinary jumper, having short and uncomfortable sleep, to see to it that modern factories, new houses and leisure complexes had been built in different parts of the country for the improvement of people's living standard. Leader Kim Jong Il took warm care of people. The noble life of the peerlessly great man will always remain in the hearts of the Korean people and the world progressive mankind. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il's Exploits Praised by Foreign Newspapers

text: The U.S. has discussed the DPRK's "human rights issue" at the UN Security Council early in December every year since 2014 by abusing its position, but its attempt went amiss this year. The U.S. proposal for consulting the "human rights issue" of the DPRK was refused by several member states of the UNSC. Many media in Asian, African and Western countries broadly report that the U.S., given to high-handed and arbitrary practices at the UNSC, was put to shame under the eyes of the world. Rodong News Team
title: U.S. Attempt to Discuss DPRK's "Human Rights Issue" at UNSC Goes Amiss

text: A remembrance meeting of the General Association of Koreans in China was held on December 17 in commemoration of the 7th anniversary of the demise of Chairman Kim Jong Il. Present there were Choe Su Bong, first vice chairperson of the General Association of Koreans in China, officials of the association and the Federation of Korean Economic Workers in China, and other Koreans in China. Before the meeting, the participants laid a floral basket before the portraits of smiling President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and paid tribute to them. Choe Su Bong in a speech said that Kim Jong Il, possessed of perfect personality and qualification of a great man, was an outstanding thinker and theoretician and a peerlessly elder statesman who led the revolution and construction to victory and a tender-hearted father who encouraged Koreans in China with warm love and trust to invariably follow the road of patriotism with the soul of the Korean nation. Choe stated that all DPRK citizens and other Koreans in China will remain loyal to the guidance of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un who is making tangible contributions to the reunification of the country and global peace and stability, true to the behests of Kim Jong Il. A letter of pledge to Kim Jong Un was adopted at the meeting. At the end of the meeting, the participants watched a documentary film dealing with the revolutionary leadership exploits of Kim Jong Il. Similar meetings were held by the Federation of Korean Economic Workers in China, the Association of Young Korean Nationals in China and the Yanbian Regional Branch and the Zhongnan Regional Branch of the General Association of Koreans in China. Rodong News Team
title: Remembrance Meeting of Koreans Held in China

text: Meetings to remember Chairman Kim Jong Il took place in India, Pakistan, Belarus and Bulgaria from Dec. 12 to 14 to commemorate the seventh anniversary of his demise. Attending the meetings were figures of all social standings and citizens in those countries. Atul Kumar Anjan, chairman of the All India Indo-Korean Friendship Association, and other speakers said that the whole life of Kim Jong Il was the one of a great revolutionary, a popular leader who dedicated his all to the people and to further glorifying the people-centered socialist Korea. Zabed Ansari, secretary general of the Karachi Branch of the Pakistan-Korea Friendship Association, said that Kim Jong Il had made dynamic efforts for the happiness of people and the building of socialism, the national reunification and the human cause of independence, adding that the yearning of the Korean people and the world progressives for Kim Jong Il grows stronger with the lapse of time. L. Shukolinikov, chairman of the Permanent Standing Committee of the Belarus National Association of Friends of Korean People Named after Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il who is chairman of the Belarusian committee for remembering Comrade Kim Jong Il, said that Kim Jong Il developed in depth the Juche idea, the Songun idea founded by President Kim Il Sung and the DPRK turned itself into an impregnable socialist fortress, thanks to Kim Jong Il. The participants in the remembrance meeting held in Bulgaria said it is thanks to the wise leadership of Kim Jong Il that socialism was defended in the DPRK and it could demonstrate its dignity as the people's country envied by the world people. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il Remembered in Different Countries

text: Chairman Kim Jong Il's work "On Correctly Analyzing and Reviewing the History of Revolutionary Ideology of the Preceding Working Class" and Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's work "Let Us Step Up the Building of a Thriving Country by Applying Kim Jong Il's Patriotism" were posted on websites by the Group of Dialectical Materialists of Italy and the Italian Committee for the Study of Songun Idea for Independence and Sovereignty on Dec. 15 to commemorate the seventh anniversary of the demise of Kim Jong Il. Rodong News Team
title: Peerlessly Great Men's Works Posted on Websites by Italian Bodies

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and supreme commander of the Korean People's Army, met the participants in the 4th National Meeting of Activists in Agricultural Field and had a photo session with them. When Kim Jong Un arrived at the venue of the photo session, all the participants enthusiastically welcomed him. He highly praised the agricultural workers, rural junior officials and scientists and technicians for displaying patriotism with pure conscience to bring about rich harvest on the fields of the socialist country, cherishing the behests of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il who worked heart and soul to solve the food problem of the people, walking on farm roads all their lives. He warmly encouraged those who received the title of Labor Hero, the highest honor of the DPRK citizen, for their vanguard role in the drive for implementing the Party's farming-first policy, saying that he would meet them again after reaping richer harvest next year. He had a photo session with the participants, expressing expectation and belief that the participants in the meeting would stage a stronger campaign for the increased grain production throughout the country by ceaselessly increasing the number of high-yield farms, work-teams and sub-workteams and the ranks of high-yield farmers, bearing deep in mind the intention of the Party Central Committee which set the agricultural front as the major thrust in the building of an economic giant. Present there were leading officials of the Party and the government Choe Ryong Hae, Pak Pong Ju, Ro Tu Chol, Pak Thae Dok, Kim Nung O, Ko In Ho, Ri Chol Man and Kwak Pom Gi and the chairpersons of the provincial party committees. Political News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Has Photo Session with Activists in Agricultural Field

text: The Justice Preserving Solidarity for Settling the Issue of Sexual Slavery of the Imperial Japanese Army and the "Council for the Solution of the Issue of the Volunteers Corps" in south Korea held a rally in Seoul on December 26 to criticize the Japanese regime for denying sexual slavery crime, according to Newsis of south Korea. The Japanese regime is doing nothing although the dissolution of the "foundation for reconciliation and recovery" was published and the international community is getting vocal in demand of the settlement of the issue of sexual slavery, speakers there charged. They urged Japan to admit its past war crimes and fulfill its legal responsibility by making an official apology and reparation. Chanting a slogan demanding the Japanese regime's apology, the participants pledged to surely force it to make an apology and reparation for sexual slavery crime. Rodong News Team
title: South Koreans Denounce Japanese Regime for Denying Sexual Slavery Crime

text: A music and dance performance was given by the Korean People's Army Song and Dance Ensemble at the Ponghwa Art Theatre on Sunday, the 7th anniversary of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's assumption of the supreme commandership of the KPA. Among the audience were Choe Ryong Hae, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and vice-chairman of the C.C., WPK, and other leading officials of the Party and the government, officials of the C.C., WPK, ministries and national institutions, officials of institutions, factories and enterprises and persons of merits in Pyongyang. Senior officials of the armed forces organ and service personnel of the Korean People's Army and the Korean People's Internal Security Forces also watched the performance. Overseas Koreans staying in the homeland, foreign diplomatic envoys and representatives of the missions of international bodies, military attaches and their spouses here were invited to see the performance. The performance began with prelude "Ode to General Kim Jong Un", a revolutionary hymn. Put on the stage were such colorful numbers as chorus "We Wish the Supreme Commander Good Health", female duet "Stars in Nocturnal Sky", female soprano trio "My Song", male trio and tap dancing "The Naval Port in the Evening" and kayagum ensemble "Sea of Apples at the Foot of Chol Pass." The performers made artistic representation of the boundless glory and pride of all the people and the service personnel who are blessed by the generals and supreme commanders through generations as the Korean people have the Supreme Leader at the top post of the revolutionary armed forces in high esteem. Rodong News Team
title: Music and Dance Performance Given by KPA Song and Dance Ensemble

text: The New Yugoslav Communist Party and the League of the Yugoslavian Communist Youth on Jan. 3 made public a joint statement in support of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's New Year Address. The statement said: The respected Marshal Kim Jong Un set forth the slogan "Let us open a new road of advance for socialist construction under the uplifted banner of self-reliance!" in his New Year Address. This is the slogan that enables the DPRK to defeat the ceaseless sanctions and pressure by hostile forces and bring about a revolutionary upsurge on all fronts of socialist construction. We are convinced that the Korean people will achieve good successes in their efforts for implementing the tasks put forward by the respected Marshal Kim Jong Un in his New Year Address. The Workers' Party of Korea will continue to advance in the future, too. Rodong News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's New Year Address Supported in Serbia

text: The Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly (SPA) of the DPRK decided to call an election of deputies to the 14th SPA on March 10, Juche 108 (2019), according to Article 90 of the Socialist Constitution of the DPRK. The decision was made public on Tuesday. Rodong News Team
title: Election of Deputies to SPA to Be Called in DPRK

text: A lawmaker from the Party for Democracy and Peace of south Korea denounced the "Liberal Korea Party" (LKP) for having tried to check the probe into the truth behind the May 18 Kwangju Massacre on January 11, according to the south Korean Newsis. He said that the LKP denies the special law which was passed at the "National Assembly" for the probe into the truth behind the May 18 movement for democracy and disturbs the probe into the truth behind it. Worse still, the LKP tries to nominate one of those who joined in the army mobilized for the suppression of the Kwangju uprising as a member of the committee for the probe into the truth, he disclosed. Rodong News Team
title: LKP Hit for Disturbing Probe into Truth behind May 18 Massacre

text: A sheetlet was issued in the DPRK to commemorate the 60th anniversary of the Worker-Peasant Red Guards, Juche-oriented militia forces. Seen on the upper part of the sheetlet, in which rifle, hammer and sickle in hands are depicted, are letters reading “60th anniversary of Worker-Peasant Red Guards” and “Juche 48 (1959) – Juche 108 (2019)”. On its central part are two individual stamps carrying emblem of the Worker-Peasant Red Guards and letters “60th anniversary of Worker-Peasant Red Guards”. The stamps show man and woman members of the Worker-Peasant Red Guards with guns on their shoulders and a member of the Worker-Peasant Red Guards with rifle in one hand and hammer in the other respectively. The sheetlet portrays the brave spirit of the Worker-Peasant Red Guards prepared as the strong militant ranks to resolutely shatter any aggression move and defend the socialist system and lives and properties of the people. The Worker-Peasant Red Guards was founded on January 14, Juche 48 (1959) on the initiative of President Kim Il Sung and under his guidance. Rodong News Team
title: New Stamps Issued in DPRK

text: The Swiss Organizing Committee for the International Festival in Praise of the Great Persons of Mt Paektu, the Switzerland-Korea Committee and the Swiss Group for the Study of the Juche Idea released a joint statement on January 12 in congratulation of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's successful visit to China. The statement said: Chairman Kim Jong Un's recent visit to China has a special meaning as this year marks the 70th anniversary of the establishment of diplomatic relations between the DPRK and China. As Chairman Kim Jong Un emphasized, his recent visit clearly demonstrated once again the immutability and invincibility of the DPRK-China friendship before the world. Chairman Kim Jong Un's visit to China made at the beginning of the new year serves as a historic occasion greatly conducive to boosting the DPRK-China friendship and ensuring peace and stability on the Korean peninsula. We warmly congratulate Chairman Kim Jong Un on his successful visit to China. Rodong News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's Successful Visit to China Hailed by Swiss Organizations

text: In hearty response to the militant tasks set in the New Year Address of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un, the officials and working people of North Phyongan Province strongly supported the Kujang Area Coal-mining Complex. They secured prop timbers, bearings for coal wagons and lots of other materials and presented them to the Kujang Area Coal-mining Complex on January 11 so as to lift the morale of its labor and management. Believing that they are also responsible for coal production, the officials and working people of Sinuiju City and Sonchon County tapped latent reserves to the full to sincerely secure aid materials. They visited pits of coal mines in charge and provided the aid materials to mines to actively encourage them to produce coal. Suit was followed by Tongrim, Pakchon and Changsong Counties and the other counties of the province. This powerfully propelled the labor and management of the complex into coal production. Yun Un Sim
title: Strong Support for Coal Mines

text: A delegation of the International Gymnastic Federation led by President Morinari Watanabe visited Sports Village in Chongchun Street on Friday. The guests looked round various gymnasiums built as comprehensive sports and cultural centers to successfully ensure matches of various events and training, and conversed with players of the DPRK. Rodong News Team
title: Int'l Gymnastic Federation Delegation Visits Sports Village in Chongchun Street

text: The National Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea of Democratic Congo posted on its website the full text of a congratulatory speech made by Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un at the military parade celebrating the 70th founding anniversary of the Korean People's Army on Jan. 20 ahead of the Day of Army Building. The website carried his photo. Rodong News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's Speech Introduced in DR Congo

text: Let Us Step Up Construction of Highly Civilized Socialist Country Building a highly civilized socialist country is an important work for bringing up all the people to be those responsible for the socialist construction who are possessed of rich knowledge and high cultural attainments and for creating conditions and environment for them to lead an affluent and highly civilized life. Today when the DPRK has ranked itself with dignity among political and military powers, it presents itself as an urgent task for them to build a highly civilized country along with robust economic construction. A shortcut to building a powerful socialist country is to usher in an overall heyday in all the fields of the cultural construction, including education, public health, literature and art and sports. The DPRK is demonstrating its dignity as the only state in the world which has successfully fulfilled the fundamental and crucial tasks of building a prosperous and independent state. A powerful spur given to building a highly civilized socialist country will precisely lead to the advancement and development of the DPRK onto a higher stage and the hurrahs for socialism. Only when all the fields of building a highly civilized country are put on the level desired by the Party ranging from the mental and moral traits and costumes to culinary culture, will it be possible for the people living in the great motherland to cherish stronger pride and self-esteem and to further manifest the advantages and might of Korean-style socialism. We have valuable traditions and powerful potentials for spurring the building of a highly civilized socialist country at a fast pace. All people should dynamically step up the construction of a highly civilized socialist country so as to turn our country into a socialist paradise envied by the world.
title: Editorial

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un received a gift from the chairman of the China Dongfangyi Tuozhan Association. The gift was conveyed to an official concerned on Tuesday by Chairman Dongfang Yi, who is leading a delegation of the China Dongfangyi Tuozhan Association on a visit to the DPRK. Rodong News Team
title: Gift to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from Chairman of China Dongfangyi Tuozhan Association

text: An Ethiopian preparatory committee for marking the birth anniversary of Chairman Kim Jong Il was formed in Addis Ababa on Jan. 25. Nigatu Dagnachew, chairman of the Ethiopian National Committee for the Study of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism and chairman of the Ethiopia-Korea Friendship and Solidarity Committee, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The preparatory committee set a celebration period between Jan. 27 and Feb. 20 and decided to hold colorful political and cultural events in praise of feats performed by Kim Jong Il in carrying out the Korean revolution and accomplishing the cause of global independence. Rodong News Team
title: Day of Shining Star to Be Marked in Ethiopia

text: School youth and children from across the country began the study tour of Chairman Kim Jong Il's birthplace in the secret camp in Mt Paektu on the occasion of his 77th birth anniversary. A kick-off ceremony took place before the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il in Hyesan City, Ryanggang Province, on Friday. Present at the ceremony were Ri Sang Won, chairman of the Ryanggang Provincial Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, officials concerned, youth league officials and study tour group members. The participants laid floral baskets and bouquets at the statues of the great leaders. A reporter and speakers called on the study tour participants to deeply grasp the revolutionary history and feats of the peerlessly great persons associated with the revolutionary battle sites and revolutionary sites in the area of Mt Paektu and defend and add brilliance to the revolutionary traditions of Juche. They stressed that all study tour participants should fully demonstrate the appearance of reserves, advancing group and wing of the WPK true to the will of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. At the end of the ceremony the study tour participants marched for Pochonbo. Rodong News Team
title: School Youth and Children Start Study Tour of Chairman Kim Jong Il's Birthplace

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, on February 1 sent a congratulatory message to Al-Sultan Abdullah Riayatuddin Al-Mustafa Billah Shah lbni Sultan Haji Ahmad Shah Al-Mustain Billah upon his accession to the king of Malaysia. Expressing belief that the friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries with a long history and traditions would grow stronger, the message sincerely wished the king success in his work for the country's development and prosperity. Rodong News Team
title: Congratulations to Malaysian King

text: British and Swiss organizations released joint statements on January 24 in support of the appeal adopted at the joint conference of the government, political parties and organizations of the DPRK. The British Association for the Study of Songun Policy, the British Group for the Study of the Juche Idea, the Korean Friendship Association UK and the British Solidarity Committee for Peace and Reunification of the Korean Peninsula said the appeal adopted at the joint conference of the government, political parties and organizations of the DPRK stressed that the New Year Address made by Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un is the bright path and signpost of victory for making greater advance in developing the inter-Korean relations and achieving peace and prosperity and accomplishing the cause of national reunification this year by the concerted efforts of the Korean nation. And it underscored the need to thoroughly implement the historic inter-Korean declarations, eradicating military hostility between the north and the south, comprehensively expand and develop cooperation and exchange and provide a proposal for peaceful reunification. They added that they support the efforts of the DPRK for making the Korean Peninsula a permanent and durable peace zone. The Swiss Organizing Committee for the International Festival in Praise of the Great Persons of Mt Paektu, the Switzerland-Korea Committee and the Swiss Group for the Study of the Juche Idea also fully supported the above-said appeal, adding that more radical turn would be made in carrying out the cause of national reunification this year. Rodong News Team
title: Foreign Organizations Support Appeal of DPRK

text: Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and premier of the Cabinet, made a field survey of the Hwanghae Iron and Steel Complex and the Chollima Steel Complex. Making rounds of various places of the complexes, he gave a pep talk to the workers who are bringing about a new revolutionary upswing in production. The field consultative meetings discussed measures for all the officials and workers to decisively increase production true to the traditions of struggle in which they have faithfully upheld the WPK with steel and for relevant units to sufficiently supply raw and other materials for putting the production on a normal basis. Pak also went to the Taean Heavy Machine Complex to call for putting spurs to the production of the custom-built equipment to be sent to various fields of national economy. Rodong News Team
title: Pak Pong Ju Inspects Hwanghae Iron and Steel Complex, Chollima Steel Complex

text: Officials and members of the Socialist Women's Union of Korea had a meeting at the Hall of Women on Monday ahead of the 71st anniversary of the founding of the Korean People's Army. Present there were Jang Chun Sil, chairwoman of the C.C., SWUK, and officials and members of the women's union. Speakers noted that President Kim Il Sung led the building of the regular armed forces after the country's liberation and developed the Korean People's Revolutionary Army into the regular revolutionary armed forces in a short period. They praised Chairman Kim Jong Il as the illustrious commander of Mt. Paektu, who further consolidated the KPA as the Party's revolutionary armed forces, remaining faithful to Kim Il Sung's army-building idea and exploits. They pointed out that the KPA is displaying its grandeur as militant ranks with politico-ideological features and perfect military and technical preparations as befits matchless army, creator of the people's happiness and shock brigade in building a powerful socialist nation under the guidance of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. They called upon the officials and members of the women's union to add eternal luster to the peerlessly great men's army-building exploits and work in a way worthy of a woman revolutionary in the grand march for economic construction. Rodong News Team
title: Women's Union Members Meet

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and supreme commander of the Korean People's Army, enjoyed a performance given by the State Merited Chorus at an annex to the headquarters of the Party Central Committee together with all the commanders of the large combined units and combined units of the KPA on Feb. 8, the 71st founding anniversary of the KPA. Among the audience were KPA Vice Marshal Ri Myong Su, first vice commander of the KPA Supreme Command, KPA Army General Kim Su Gil, director of the KPA General Political Bureau, KPA Army General Ri Yong Gil, chief of the KPA General Staff, and KPA Army General No Kwang Chol, minister of the People's Armed Forces of the DPRK, and other commanding officers of the General Political Bureau and General Staff of the KPA and the People's Armed Forces together with the commanders of the army corps, divisions and brigades of the KPA. Appreciating the performance also were Choe Ryong Hae, Ri Su Yong, Kim Phyong Hae, Thae Jong Su, O Su Yong and Kim Yong Chol, vice-chairmen of the Central Committee of the WPK, other leading officials of the C.C., WPK and the State Affairs Commission. Supreme Leader of the Party, state and army Kim Jong Un and his wife Ri Sol Ju appeared in the auditorium. He warmly congratulated all the KPA service personnel who mark the Day of Army Founding, 71st founding anniversary of the KPA while encouraging them. Put on the stage that started with orchestral music "The Glorious Country" were colorful numbers including male chorus "We Wish Supreme Commander Good Health", male solo and chorus "Cantata to Marshal Kim Il Sung" and unaccompanied chorus "The Country I Am Defending". The performers sang high praises of the dignity and might of our country dynamically advancing along the road of victory of socialism under the wise guidance of the WPK and made an impressive artistic presentation of the firm faith and will of the army and people to firmly trust and follow the Party and the leader only and safeguard them politically and ideologically and at the cost of their lives while invariably and persistently succeeding to the lineage of arms of Mt Paektu, the lifeline of the Korean revolution. As Kim Jong Un requested the encore, female trio and male chorus "Our National Flag" was re-performed, being conducted by People's Artiste Jang Ryong Sik, vice department director of the WPK Central Committee, making the audience be gripped by the feelings of great excitement and leading the performance to its climax. Kim Jong Un expressed great satisfaction over the wonderful performance of high ideological value and artistry. He voiced the expectation and conviction that the artistes of the State Merited Chorus would as ever conduct more positive performing activities of revolutionary nature and thus creditably fulfill their honorable mission and duty as frontline soldiers in the field of literature and art. Political News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Enjoys Performance with Commanders of All Large Combined Units, Combined Units of KPA

text: Marwan Sudah, chairman of the Arab Committee for Solidarity with Korean People and Supporting the Reunification of Korea, made public a statement on Jan. 22 ahead of Chairman Kim Jong Il's birth anniversary. He said that the world progressives would mark the 77th birth anniversary of Kim Jong Il before long. He said that Kim Jong Il, who carried forward President Kim Il Sung's idea and cause, dynamically advanced the revolutionary cause of Juche. He pointed out that Kim Jong Il consolidated the single-minded unity of the Korean society based on the Juche idea in every way and strengthened the capability for self-defence, thus laying a firm foundation for the country's prosperity. He said: Leader Kim Jong Il also turned the DPRK into the people's paradise. He set a world's example in the struggle against the imperialists' high-handed and arbitrary practices. He was a dear friend who extended support and solidarity to the peoples of the countries in their struggle for justice, truth, independence and sovereignty, and positively helped the cause of Arab people, in particular. His exploits will be immortal along with the century. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il's Exploits Are Everlasting: Jordanian Figure

text: A delegation of the Vietnamese Foreign Ministry led by Pham Binh Minh, deputy prime minister and foreign minister of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam, visited Mangyongdae, the birthplace of President Kim Il Sung, on Wednesday. The delegation laid a floral basket before the old home in Mangyongdae. Being briefed on the fact that Kim Il Sung devoted all his life to the popular masses' cause of independence and the cause of socialism, members of the delegation looked round the historic mementoes at the old home. Rodong News Team
title: Vietnamese Delegation Visits Mangyongdae

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un on Thursday received floral baskets from foreign bodies and personages on the occasion of the Day of the Shining Star, the birth anniversary of Chairman Kim Jong Il. They are the Organizing Committee of the International Festival in Praise of the Great Persons of Mt Paektu, Yuwen Middle School in Jilin, China, Beijing Chao Ya International Cultural and Exchange Center in China, the Asia-Pacific Regional Committee for Supporting Peaceful Reunification of Korea, the Japan-Korea Society for Scientific and Educational Interchange, the Japan Committee for the Independent and Peaceful Reunification of Korea, the Japanese Women's Society for Solidarity with the Korean Women, the Tokushima Prefectural People's Forum for Japan-Korea Friendship, the family of Chinese anti-Japanese revolutionary martyr Zhang Wei-hua, the family of Sin Kanemaru, former deputy prime minister of Japan, Kosima Weber Liu, executive director of the Environmental Education Media Project, Kiichi Tsunota, representative of the Gunma Prefectural Council for Japan-Korea Friendship and Solidarity, and Shunichi Narita, media person of Japan. Rodong News Team
title: Floral Baskets to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un

text: The Chinese Minzufuxingnet carried an editorial titled "Let us know well and study the great feats of Comrade Kim Jong Il" on Feb. 16. The editorial said that Kim Jong Il is an outstanding statesman, encourager and indomitable defender of socialist revolution, and distinguished thinker and theoretician of the present world. Noting that it is important to know well and study his great feats, the editorial added: In the closing years of the 20th century, the imperialists collapsed the Soviet Union with their strategy "peaceful transition" and some countries pulled down the flag of socialism. As a result, the world socialist movement suffered a great loss and broad strata of working people were plunged again into a despairing abyss of being exploited and oppressed. To cope with the changed situation, Comrade Kim Jong Il defended socialism in the spirit of a revolutionary and provided precious experience. He encouraged the Korean people to demonstrate the might of the self-supporting national economy and protect the sovereignty and dignity of the country and nation while overcoming all difficulties in the revolutionary spirit of self-reliance despite the sanctions and blockade by the imperialists, so as to develop the DPRK to be admired by the world and instill the conviction into the hearts of the oppressed people. He developed in depth the Juche philosophy. His feats are great and his exploits were performed for not only the DPRK but also the world socialist movement. He rejected dogma in socialist revolution and construction. This is what all revolutionaries should study and follow. The world people should bear in mind his great feats. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il Lauded in China

text: Chairman Kim Jong Il's work "Let Us Make Our Country Richer and More Powerful, True to the Intention of the Great Leader" was brought out in booklet by the Arton Publishing House of Russia with due ceremony on Feb. 11. The work, published on December 31, Juche 83 (1994), indicates the tasks and ways to make the DPRK richer and more powerful. Rodong News Team
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il's Work Off Press in Russia

text: February 25 is the 5th anniversary of the publication of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un’s work “Let Us Hasten the Final Victory through a Revolutionary Ideological Offensive”. The historic speech made by Kim Jong Un at the 8th conference of Ideological Workers of the Workers’ Party of Korea on February 25, Juche 103 (2014), is an immortal programme that indicates the path of accomplishing the revolutionary cause of Juche pioneered in Mt Paektu by dint of ideology. In the five years after the publication of the work, the WPK has brought about a great upsurge in ideological work so as to win brilliant victories and successes in all fields of socialist construction. The politico-military might of the DPRK has considerably increased and the dignity and spirit of Juche Korea to outpace the world and its inexhaustible potentiality have been fully displayed amid dynamic ideological offensive. This is a clear evidence of the validity and vitality of the idea and theory of the work calling for regarding ideology as the driving force of the revolution and bringing earlier the final victory through the revolutionary ideological offensive. It is the great intention and firm determination of the WPK to build a powerful and prosperous socialist nation on this land, holding fast to the Juche-oriented theory of ideology, a powerful weapon. The revolutionary cause of Juche and the cause of socialism are sure to triumph as there are the wise guidance of the Party leading the revolution and construction by dint of ideology and the people who remain faithful to the cause of the Party with indomitable mental power. Kim Song Nam
title: Highly Important Work That Reconfirms Significance of Ideological Work

text: The Cuban embassy to the DPRK donated books to the classroom named after Fidel Castro Ruz at Pyongyang Foreign Languages School under Pyongyang University of Foreign Studies on Tuesday. Ambassador Jesus De Los Angeles Aise Sotolongo and staff members of his embassy looked round different places of the school before donating the books. Rodong News Team
title: Books Donated to Classroom Named after Fidel Castro Ruz at Pyongyang Foreign Languages School

text: Let Us Demonstrate Social Customs of Juche Korea Based on Single-hearted Unity of Leader and People It is the first and foremost social custom of Juche Korea that the leader trusts its people and boundlessly loves them while the latter repose an absolute trust in and remain faithful to the former. The DPRK is dynamically advancing the revolution and construction even in any storm and hardship of history as the leader and all the people have shared the idea, intention and destiny. The leader always gives top priority to the people and the people devotedly uphold the leader, which guarantees the invincibility and a bright future of the DPRK. The single-minded unity, the politico-ideological might of the DPRK, is the most powerful weapon that no force on earth can break and which makes it realize whatever it wants. The ardent yearning and blood ties between the leader and the people are just the blood vessel of our single-minded unity and source of inexhaustible power that can be seen nowhere in the world. All people should give full play to the might of the harmonious whole of the DPRK in which Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un and the people are linked with blood ties and for effecting revolutionary upsurge on all fronts of socialist construction.
title: Editorial

text: A concert was given at the East Pyongyang Grand Theatre on March 2 to commemorate the 100th birth anniversary of composer Pak Han Gyu. He was a talented composer well known among the Korean people as he left a remarkable trace in the history of the development of Juche-oriented music. Staged at the concert were his famous works like "Song of the Proclamation of the People's Republic" representing the great excitement and joy of the Korean people who became the master of the genuine independent and sovereign state for the first time in history. Female solo and male pangchang "Nobody Knows", male small chorus "Song of Coast Artillerymen", male chorus "An Accordionist Has Come", etc. met with loud applause. The concert was enjoyed by creators and artistes in the army and society and teachers and students of art educational institutions and members of his bereaved family. Rodong News Team
title: Concert Commemorates 100th Birth Anniversary of Composer Pak Han Gyu

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, sent a message of greeting to Rumen Radev, president of the Republic of Bulgaria, on Sunday on the occasion of its national day. Expressing the belief that the friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries would be expanded and developed as desired by the peoples of the two countries, the message wished the Bulgarian people prosperity. Rodong News Team
title: Greetings to Bulgarian President

text: Meetings took place in Pakistan, Belarus, Romania, Austria and Slovenia between Feb. 6 and 17 to celebrate Chairman Kim Jong Il's birth anniversary (Day of the Shining Star). The reporters and speakers including the chairman of the Lahore Group for the Study of the Juche Idea of Pakistan lauded Kim Jong Il as an outstanding statesman who achieved the immortal exploits in the history of the nation by leading the Korean revolution to victory. The chief of the Belarusian branch of the Russian Group for Solidarity with the DPRK stressed that Kim Jong Il lighted the way of the progressive mankind toward independence and peace by developing in depth the Juche idea. The editor-in-chief of the Belarusian magazine Social Education stated that Kim Jong Il, who is a distinguished revolutionary, thinker and theoretician and man of action, firmly defended Korean socialism with a treasured sword of Songun. The secretary general of the Romania-Korea Friendship Association praised Kim Jong Il's ideological and theoretical feats and Songun leadership exploits, adding that the DPRK has vigorously advanced along the road of socialism under the uplifted banner of independence against imperialism. The general secretary of the Society for the Promotion of the Relations between Austria and DPRK said that Kim Jong Il, the eternal head of the Workers' Party of Korea, is a peerless patriot who dedicated his all to prosperity of the country and happiness of the people. Rodong News Team
title: Day of Shining Star Marked Abroad

text: Weightlifters of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea returned home on Sunday after taking part in the 2019 IWF World Cup. The sporting event held in China from Feb. 22 to 27 brought together ace men and women weightlifters from many countries and regions including the DPRK, China, Russia, Italy and Mexico. DPRK players bagged six gold medals, 15 silver medals and six bronze medals. Pak Jong Ju and Kim Un Ju respectively came first in the jerk and total standings of men's 67kg category and women's 87kg category. Om Yun Chol and Choe Hyo Sim placed first in the jerk of men's 61kg category and the snatch of women's 59kg category and Ri Song Gum came second in the jerk, snatch and total standings of women's 49kg category. O Kang Chol, Pak Jong Ju, Kim Un Ju and Kim Hyo Sim respectively took the second places in the snatch of men's 73kg and 67kg categories and in the snatch of women's 87kg and 64kg categories. Choe Jon Wi, Rim Jong Sim, Rim Un Sim and Choe Hyo Sim won silver medals in the jerk of men's 81kg category and in the jerk and total standings of women's 76kg, 64kg and 59kg categories. O Kang Chol and Kim Hyo Sim came third in the jerk and total standings of men's 73kg category and in the jerk and total standings of women's 64kg category and Rim Jong Sim and Rim Un Sim in the snatch of women's 76kg and 64kg categories. Rodong News Team
title: DPRK Weightlifters Return Home

text: Those engaged in the chemical industry do all they can to boost their production, infinitely yearning for Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. The Namhung Youth Chemical Complex and the Hungnam Fertilizer Complex, the arsenals of the socialist agricultural front, increase their output at full swing in the face of obstacles. This year they have so far produced more Juche-based fertilizer than last year. The February 8 Vinalon Complex overfulfills its daily plan for the production of hydrochloric acid, caustic soda, carbide and other basic chemicals. Besides, it takes good care of its machines and equipment on technological lines and incessantly conducts a technological innovation movement with success. Sim Hak Chol
title: Juche-based Fertilizer and Basic Chemicals Produced Briskly

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, sent a message of greeting to Bashar Al-Assad, president of the Syrian Arab Republic, on Saturday. The message extended warm congratulations to the president and, through him, to the Syrian people on the March 8 Revolution Day in Syria. Expressing invariable support to and solidarity with the just struggle of the Syrian army and people for defending the country's sovereignty and achieving stability, the message wished the Syrian president good health and happiness and bigger success in his responsible work. Rodong News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Sends Greetings to Syrian President

text: A Belarusian preparatory committee for celebrating the 107th birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung was formed on March 2. L. Shukolinikov, chairman of the Permanent Standing Committee of the Belarus National Association of Friends of Korean People Named after Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il, was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The committee decided to give wide publicity to the revolutionary career and exploits of Kim Il Sung through media and organize colorful political and cultural events like seminar. Rodong News Team
title: President Kim Il Sung's Birthday to Be Celebrated in Belarus

text: Talks took place between Hong So Hon, chairman of the DPRK-Russia Friendship Parliamentary Group and president of Kim Chaek University of Technology, and Oleg Melnichenko, chairman of the Federal System, Regional Policy, Local Autonomous and Northern Affairs Committee of the Federation Council of Russia who is chairman of the Russia-DPRK Friendship Parliamentary Group, at the Mansudae Assembly Hall on Monday. Present at the talks from the DPRK side were Kim Sok Nam, deputy to the Supreme People's Assembly, officials concerned and from the Russian side members of the delegation of the Federation Council of Russia and Alexandr Matsegora, Russian ambassador to the DPRK, and members of his embassy. At the talks both sides exchanged their views on further developing the relations between the parliamentary groups of the two countries and on the issues of mutual interests. Rodong Sinmun
title: Chairmen of Friendship Parliamentary Groups of DPRK and Russia Meet

text: A delegation of the Federation Council of Russia led by Oleg Melnichenko, chairman of the Federal System, Regional Policy, Local Autonomous and Northern Affairs Committee of the council who is chairman of the Russia-DPRK Friendship Parliamentary Group, left here for home on Thursday. It had visited the DPRK to mark the 70th anniversaries of President Kim Il Sung's first official visit to the Soviet Union and the conclusion of the agreement on economic and cultural cooperation between the DPRK and Russia. Rodong Sinmun
title: Delegation of Federation Council of Russia Leaves

text: The 40th meeting of the Union of Korean Students in Japan (UKSJ) was held at the hall of the Osaka Prefectural Headquarters under the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon) on Mar. 9. Present at the meeting were Jo Il Yon, vice-chairman and director of the organization department of the Chongryon Central Standing Committee, Ri Hong Yun, chairman of the UKSJ Central Standing Committee, and other deputies. Ri Hong Yun made a report. He said that the UKSJ has more thoroughly established the ideological system and leadership system of Juche within the union and pushed ahead with the five-point education with the main emphasis on the education in the greatness of the great leaders. Since its 39th meeting, the UKSJ has made big successes in its work including scientific research, talent training and expansion of the union, he said. He referred to the tasks of the UKSJ in making contributions to the overall prosperity of the movement of Koreans in Japan till 2022 when the 25th Congress of Chongryon is due to be held. Following the speeches at the meeting, the results of the "2018 movement for creating new history of the Union of Korean Students in Japan" were announced and citations were awarded to the excellent branches of the union. Ri Hong Yun was re-elected as chairman of the Central Standing Committee of the UKSJ. Rodong Sinmun
title: 40th Meeting of Union of Korean Students in Japan Held

text: A Beninese preparatory committee for marking the 107th birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung was formed on Mar. 14. Hessou Kohovi, chairman of the Benin-Korea Amicable Association "Long Live Kim Jong Il, Supreme Leader", was elected chairman of the preparatory committee. The committee decided to hold a seminar and other political and cultural events from Mar. 15 to Apr. 15. Rodong Sinmun
title: President Kim Il Sung's Birth Anniversary to Be Marked in Benin

text: Kim Yong Nam, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, on Saturday sent a message of greeting to Arif Alvi, president of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, on the occasion of the Day of Pakistan. The message expressed the belief that the bilateral friendly and cooperative ties would grow stronger in conformity with the requirement of the new era and the interests of the two peoples, wishing the president good health and greater success in his work for the prosperity of the country. Rodong Sinmun
title: Greetings to Pakistani President

text: A delegation of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) led by Ri Su Yong, member of the Political Bureau and vice-chairman of the WPK Central Committee, left here on Tuesday to visit the Lao People's Democratic Republic. Rodong Sinmun
title: WPK Delegation Leaves for Laos

text: A workshop took place at the Grand People's Study House here on Wednesday to observe World Water Day 2019. Present there were officials of relevant units including the State Commission of Science and Technology, the Ministry of Urban Management and the Ministry of Land and Environment Protection and members of missions of international bodies here including UNICEF. Speeches were made there. Speakers referred to the fact that many people in the world are suffering from big damage inflicted by polluted water and impure hygienic conditions. Saying that it is one of the important works for ensuring the existence of mankind and the socio-economic development to solve the serious water problem, they stressed the need to take positive measures for securing and making an effective use of water source and protecting the natural ecological environment. Speeches were made under the titles "World Water Crisis and Its Solutions", "Some Measures for the Supply of Clean Drinking Water" and "Introduction to the WASH Activities of UNICEF in DPRK". Rodong Sinmun
title: World Water Day Observed in DPRK

text: Russian Seminar on Juche Idea Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un received a letter from the participants in the Russian national seminar on the Juche idea "Patriotism and Self-Reliance" on March 20. The letter said that the seminar helped the participants know better about the exploits of President Kim Il Sung, who founded the Juche idea and led the Korean revolution to the victory by applying it to the revolution and construction. It noted that they deeply grasped the undying feats of Chairman Kim Jong Il who formulated the Juche idea, the revolutionary idea of the leader, as Kimilsungism and defended the people-centered socialism in the harshest period when socialism collapsed in East European countries. It lauded Kim Jong Un for formulating the Juche idea founded by Kim Il Sung and developed and enriched by Kim Jong Il as Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism and thus glorified it as the eternal guiding idea in the era of independence. It stressed that the world admires Kim Jong Un for leading the DPRK with his outstanding political stratagem to further demonstrate its might as an invincible power by dint of patriotism and self-reliance in the face of the imperialists' moves to stifle the country. It said that all the participants in the seminar have keenly felt the great vitality of Kim Jong Il's patriotism and self-reliance again and would fully support the Korean people in their struggle for defending the country's sovereignty and socialist system together with the followers of the Juche idea across the world. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Receives Letter from Participants in

text: The scientists of the Institute for the Science of Botanical Protection attain good successes in their researches into exterminating by new methods insects of various kinds which damage the crops. Working hard with ingenuity the nematologists of the institute established the new seed examination method of exterminating most nematodes in rice seeds and developed an effective seed disinfectant. This year, too, they do their level best to mass-produce seed disinfectants efficacious against nematodes in rice for many cooperative farms throughout the country. The observers and predictors of the institute make it a rule to observe the fields beforehand and give scientific information on the breeding of noxious insects. They fully apply themselves to enabling cooperative farms to take real-time precautions against harmful insects in practice. The entomologists of the institute produced breeding Trichogramma ostriniae and Trichogramma japonica to kill corn borers and Asiatic rice borers, and supplied them to many botanical prevention centers across the country, thus enabling them to be mass-produced and set free into tens of thousands of hectares of rice paddies and dry fields. Those engaged in the different sections of the institute work with might and main to develop and produce the agrochemicals good at extirpating the lush weeds of the regions stretching along the West Sea of Korea and eradicating many diseases of fruit trees. O Mun Il
title: To Stamp Out Noxious Insects Effectively

text: A preparatory committee for celebrating the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung (Day of the Sun) was formed by the Regional Social Organization of Russia "Borozino" and the Korean War Veterans' Council of Russia on March 25. Salinikov, chairman of the Regional Social Organization of Russia "Borozino", and C. M. Kramarenko, chairman of the Korean War Veterans' Council of Russia, were elected co-chairmen of the preparatory committee. The committee set a celebration period from March 25 to April 16 and decided to hold colorful political and cultural events in praise of the revolutionary career and exploits of Kim Il Sung. Rodong Sinmun
title: Day of Sun to Be Marked by Russian Organizations

text: The participants in the 6th April Spring People's Art Festival visited the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill on Saturday. They laid a floral basket and bouquets at the statues of the great leaders and made a bow to them. Rodong Sinmun
title: Floral Tribute Paid to Statues of President Kim Il Sung, Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: A preparatory committee for celebrating the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung (Day of the Sun) issued a bulletin on March 27. The bulletin carried an article titled "The man praised by the world" under the headline "On the occasion of the 107th birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung". President Kim Il Sung, the eternal leader of the Korean people, is an outstanding great man recognized by the world and it is well evidenced by the fact that streets, institutions and organizations in many countries were named after the great man, the article said. Prominent political and public figures in the world have expressed their highest reverence for Kim Il Sung, a revelation of his prestige, the article said, adding that he is always alive in the hearts of mankind. Rodong Sinmun
title: Bulletin Issued in DR Congo

text: The 30th Mangyongdae Prize International Marathon was held here to mark the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung, Day of the Sun. Marathoners from the DPRK, China, Morocco, Kenya and Ethiopia and foreign amateurs competed in marathon, half marathon, 10 km and 5 km races. Its opening ceremony took place at the Kim Il Sung Stadium on Sunday. Present there were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and chairman of the National Sports Guidance Committee, Vice-Premier Jon Kwang Ho, officials concerned, Pyongyang citizens, youth and students and foreign guests.
