Minister of Physical Culture and Sports Kim Il Guk made an opening address, to be followed by the marathon races. When the signal pistol was fired, marathoners and amateurs left the stadium and run the course, cheered by working people, youth and schoolchildren. DPRK marathoners Ri Kang Bom (man) and Ri Kwang Ok (woman) came first, Ethiopian marathoner Dabi Tadesse Yae (man) and DPRK marathoner Jo Un Ok (woman) second and DPRK marathoners Han Il Ryong (man) and Kim Ji Hyang (woman) third in the marathon and DPRK players won gold, silver and bronze medals in the half marathon. A Russian male marathoner and a Swiss female marathoner took the first place, a Portuguese male and an Austrian female the second and an Irish male and an Austrian female the third in the amateur marathon. At the end of the races, a closing ceremony took place. Cups, medals, diplomas and certificates were awarded to the successful marathoners and amateurs at the closing ceremony. Rodong Sinmun
title: 30th Mangyongdae Prize Int'l Marathon Held

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's work "The Duty of the Working Class of Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il for the Times and the Tasks Facing Trade Union Organizations" was published in booklet by the Zaraba Publishing House of Bulgaria ahead of the Day of the Sun, the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung. The work, a letter sent by the Supreme Leader to the participants in the Seventh Congress of the General Federation of Trade Unions of Korea (GFTUK) on Oct. 25, Juche 105 (2016), clarifies the tasks and ways facing the heroic working class of Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il to become an engine steering the ranks of the general advance and a model of society by holding aloft the banner of modeling the whole society on Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism and thus accelerate the building of a powerful socialist state. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's Work off Press in Bulgaria

text: Overseas Koreans visited the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill on Friday to lay bouquets and pay tributes to them. They included a congratulatory group of Koreans in Japan for celebrating the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung (Day of the Sun), congratulatory group of the General Association of Koreans in China for celebrating the Day of the Sun, delegation of the International United Confederation of Koreans, delegation of the United Confederation of Koreans in the Far Eastern Region of Russia and home-visiting group of Koreans in Japan. Rodong Sinmun
title: Overseas Koreans Visit Statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: A delegation of the Association for Economic and Cultural Exchange of Korean Nationality in Dandong City, China headed by Chairman Sim Chong Song arrived here on Sunday ahead of the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung. Rodong Sinmun
title: Delegation of Korean Nationality in China Here

text: A joint national meeting of the Korean Children's Union (KCU) organizations took place at Mangyongdae Revolutionary School on April 15, the 107th birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung. Attending the meeting were the delegates of KCU organizations from all provinces, students of Mangyongdae Revolutionary School and Kang Pan Sok Revolutionary School and schoolchildren in Pyongyang together with pupils who would join the KCU. Present there on invitation were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, Kim Nung O, chairman of the Pyongyang City Party Committee, officials of the youth league, war veterans and persons of merits. The participants placed a floral basket and bunches of flowers at the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il in Mangyongdae Revolutionary School and made a bow to them. Pak Chol Min, chairman of the Central Committee of the Kimilsungist-Kimjongilist Youth League, in his report, referred to the feats of President Kim Il Sung who wisely led the KCU to successfully fulfill its mission and duty. The parental loving care shown by the great Generalissimos to younger generations in the whole periods of their revolutionary leadership is being brought into fuller bloom thanks to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un, the reporter said. He called upon all the KCU members to prepare themselves to be true sons and daughters and young revolutionaries loyal to the socialist motherland. A ceremony for admission to the KCU was held at the meeting. Led by Choe Hwi, the pupils joining KCU made an oath. Officials, war veterans and meritorious persons tied red ties around the necks of the pupils and attached KCU badges on their chests. Congratulatory speeches were made by Kim Song Bong, rector of Mangyongdae Revolutionary School, Pae Ji Song, student of Kim Il Sung University, Jong Kum Hwa, player of the Ministry of Commerce Sports Team. Rodong Sinmun
title: Joint National Meeting of KCU Organizations Held

text: Senior party and government officials, the chairperson of a friendly party and officials of ministries and national institutions visited Mangyongdae, the birthplace of President Kim Il Sung, on April 15, his birth anniversary (the Day of the Sun). They toured the Mangyongdae Revolutionary Museum and looked round historic data and relics. At the old home of the President in Mangyongdae, they looked round the historical relics. They had photos taken before the President's old home. Rodong Sinmun
title: Senior Party and Government Officials Visit Mangyongdae

text: The Korean people significantly celebrated the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung, the Day of the Sun. A lot of people visited the Kumsusan Palace of the Sun, the sacred temple of Juche where President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il lie in state. They paid tributes to the portraits of the smiling great leaders at the plaza of the palace. Working people, youth and students and service personnel of the People's Army visited the statues of Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill and their statues and mosaics depicting their smiling images in other parts of the country to pay tribute to them. Many people visited the venue of the 21st Kimilsungia Festival and venues of Kimilsungia exhibitions going on in every provincial site. Colorful performances could be seen at theatres and outdoor places across the country. A concert was given by the Samjiyon Orchestra at its theatre to celebrate the Day of the Sun. Artistes of the National Symphony Orchestra gave a concert at the Moranbong Theatre. Outdoor performances were arranged by artistes of the Phibada Opera Troupe and the National Folk Art Troupe in front of the Pyongyang Grand Theatre and the Three-Revolution Exhibition House. A combined circus show by the acrobats of the National Acrobatic Troupe at the Pyongyang Circus Theater delighted working people, youth and students. Celebration performances were also given across the country. Many schoolchildren joined the Korean Children's Union. And sports games took place in Pyongyang, adding festive mood to the Day of the Sun. Rodong Sinmun
title: Day of Sun Celebrated Here

text: The Mangyongdae Prize National Martial Art Championship to mark the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung, Day of the Sun, closed with due ceremony at the Taekwon-Do Hall on Thursday. The Pyongyang City Taekwon-Do team finished first in total standings. Present at the ceremony were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and chairman of the National Sports Guidance Committee, Kim Yong Ho, secretary general of the Cabinet, Kim Chun Sik, secretary general of the National Sports Guidance Committee, officials concerned, sportspersons and citizens in Pyongyang. Rodong Sinmun
title: Mangyongdae Prize National Martial Art Championship Closes

text: A delegation of the Mongolian Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade headed by Secretary of State D. Davaasuren arrived here on Thursday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Delegation of Mongolian Ministry of Foreign Affairs and Trade Here

text: The National Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea of DR Congo on April 16 in a bulletin carried the parts on Korea's reunification and external relations of the policy speech "On Socialist Construction and the Internal and External Policies of the Government of the Republic at the Present Stage" made by Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un at the First Session of the 14th Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's Policy Speech Introduced in DR Congo

text: Seminars on exploits of President Kim Il Sung took place in Cambodia, Mongolia, Egypt, DR Congo and Uganda between April 1 and 7 on the occasion of his birth anniversary (the Day of the Sun). Present at the seminars were personages of various strata and masses in those countries. Speakers, including J. Lomvo, chairman of the Mongolian preparatory committee for celebrating the Day of the Sun, and the chairperson of the Mongolia-Democratic Korea Friendship Bridge Association praised exploits Kim Il Sung performed in the development of friendly relationships between Mongolia and the DPRK and his great personality. Yehia Zakaria Khairullah, vice-chairman of the Socialist Freedom Party of Egypt, referred to the fact that the President made great contributions to the country, people, era and history. Andre Lohekele Kalonda, chairman of the National Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea of DR Congo, said that the President's exploits will be cherished in minds of the Korean people and the world progressives, noting that he is the greatest man who devoted his all to the development of socialist Korea. Speakers said at the seminar held in Kampala of Uganda said that through the seminar they came to have better knowledge of the reality of the DPRK in which the Juche idea is embodied, noting that the President is a great man who performed immortal exploits for the liberation, prosperity and development of Korea and the accomplishment of the human cause of independence. A congratulatory message to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un was adopted at the seminar held in Mongolia. Rodong Sinmun
title: Seminars on President Kim Il Sung's Exploits Held in Different Countries

text: A literary art delegation of the Chinese People's Liberation Army visited the Kumsusan Palace of the Sun on April 21. The members of the delegation paid tribute to the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il. They made a bow to Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il in the halls where they lie in state. They made rounds of the halls where orders the great leaders received are on display and the halls that house cars, electric car, boat and train coaches used by them during their field guidance and foreign tour till the last moments of their lives. Rodong Sinmun
title: CPLA Literary Art Delegation Visits Kumsusan Palace of Sun

text: The scientists of the Zootechnical Institute of the Academy of Agriculture developed the feed additives “Chukyon”. They are acknowledged as green additives. They secured the raw materials for the additives by 97% at home. First of all, they added enzymes and vitamins to the feed by mingling, culturing or fermenting microbes, and applied the technology of complex compounds to it to optimize their use of microelements and rare-earth elements. The feed additives are composed of sweeteners, seasonings and depressants. They are made from home plants which are also used as raw materials for traditional Korean drugs. The researchers of the institute tested the additives at the Sariwon Pig Farm for many years as compared with their counterparts made from imported raw materials. It was consequently proved that the domestic additive for parent pigs excelled its foreign counterpart in effect and that the home additives for weaned and unweaned piglets and pigs for fattening up little differed from their alien rivals in effect. Kang Myong Chon
title: Effective Feed Additive “Chukyon”

text: A home-visiting group of Koreans in Japan visited the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill on Saturday. The visitors laid bouquets and made a bow before the statues. Rodong Sinmun
title: Home-visiting Group of Koreans in Japan Visits Statues of President Kim Il Sung, Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: A delegation of officials of the Korean Youth League in Japan led by Ri Kwang Il, vice-chairman of its Central Standing Committee, arrived here on Monday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Delegation of Korean Youth League in Japan Here

text: The 7th sports contest among public health workers closed with due ceremony at the Pyongyang Indoor Stadium on Wednesday. The Pyongyang Maternity Hospital and the Dental Hospital under the Ministry of Public Health took the first place in standings of the contest which was held, divided into two groups, in such events as basketball, volleyball, table tennis and tug of war. Present at the closing ceremony were Pak Thae Song, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, Jon Kwang Ho, vice-premier of the Cabinet, officials concerned, officials and players in the fields of public health and students of Pyongyang Medical College of Kim Il Sung University. Rodong Sinmun
title: 7th Sports Contest among Public Health Workers Closes

text: A delegation of the Korean Health Workers Association in Japan headed by Chairperson Nam Yang I and a delegation of Korean medical persons in the U.S. led by Park Kee Bum left here on Saturday after attending the 21st Pyongyang Symposium on Medical Science of Compatriots at Home and Abroad. Rodong Sinmun
title: Overseas Koreans Leave

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, guided the strike drill of defence units in the forefront area and on the eastern front which took place in the East Sea of Korea on Saturday. The purpose of the drill was to estimate and inspect the operating ability and the accuracy of striking duty performance of large-caliber long-range multiple rocket launchers and tactical guided weapons by defence units in the frontline area and on the eastern front and the combat performance of arms and equipment and to more powerfully arouse the entire army to the movement for becoming crackshots with the drill as an occasion and thus put it at combat readiness posture all the time. At the observation post Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un learned about the strike plan of the striking means of different calibers and inspected the fire readiness including the advance to and deployment of large-caliber long-range multiple rocket launchers and tactical guided weapons in fire positions. After setting the sequences and methods of strike, the Supreme Leader gave an order of firing. Praising the People's Army for its excellent operation of modern large-caliber long-range multiple rocket launchers and tactical guided weapons, he said that all the service members are master gunners and they are capable of carrying out duty to promptly tackle any situation as a result of full knowledge of modern weapon system and intensive training. He spoke highly of the successful striking drill though it was organized without an advance notice. Expressing great satisfaction with the rapid response ability of those defence units in the frontline area and on the eastern front to keep them fully ready to go into combat action immediately upon the issuance of order any moment, he gave important instructions for improving and strengthening the operation and combat drill of the People's Army. He stressed the need for all the service members to keep high alert posture and more dynamically wage the drive to increase the combat ability so as to defend the political sovereignty and economic self-sustenance of the country and the gains of revolution and the security of the people from the threats and invasion by any forces, bearing in mind the iron truth that genuine peace and security are ensured and guaranteed only by powerful strength. Watching the drill together with him were cadres of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea including Kim Phyong Hae, O Su Yong, Ri Pyong Chol and Jo Yong Won. Political News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Guides Strike Drill of Defence Units in Frontline Area and on Eastern Front

text: A seminar was held in Algeria, a Korean book, photo and craftwork exhibition in Russia and an opening ceremony of the week of DPRK film show in Syria to mark President Kim Il Sung's birth anniversary, the Day of the Sun. Present at the events were personages of various strata and masses of the relevant countries. The chairman of the Algeria-Korea Friendship Association said President Kim Il Sung was an outstanding man who illuminated the way ahead of mankind and performed noble exploits to be recorded in history and that the world progressives highly praise him while looking back upon his life with emotion on the occasion of the Day of the Sun, a holiday common to mankind. The acting minister of Culture of the Samara Region Administration of Russia said that all the people in the world pay high tribute to the President, lauding him as a great statesman and leader boundlessly revered by the whole of mankind including Russians. Another Russian personage said that the Russia-DPRK friendship has a long history and both countries have promoted active exchange and cooperation in various fields such as politics, economy and culture, wishing the Korean people bigger successes in socialist construction under the wise guidance of HE Kim Jong Un. Meanwhile, an internet photo show was held in Nepal to celebrate the Day of the Sun. Rodong Sinmun
title: Day of Sun Marked Abroad

text: A delegation of the Vietnam Women's Union visited the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill on Monday. Members of the delegation laid a floral basket before the statues and paid tribute to them. Rodong Sinmun
title: Floral Tribute to Statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's work "The Cause of the Great Party of Comrades Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il Is Ever-Victorious" was published in booklet by the Denmark-DPRK Friendship Association on April 30. The work, published on Oct. 4, Juche 104 (2015), says that the 70 year-long history of the Workers' Party of Korea is the one of victory in which the validity and invincibility of the cause of the Party of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il have been displayed and that the cause of the Party is ever-victorious. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's Work Published in Denmark

text: The Nepalese newspaper Arpan carried the full text of President Kim Il Sung's work "Answers to Questions Raised by the Chairman of the Nepal Journalist Association" on May 3. The work, published on Nov. 29, Juche 79 (1990), deals with the essence of the Juche idea, invincibility of Korean socialism, ways for realizing Korea's reunification and the stand of the DPRK government to develop the friendly and cooperative relations between the DPRK and Nepal. The newspaper carried a portrait of smiling Kim Il Sung and his photo. Rodong Sinmun
title: President Kim Il Sung's Work Introduced in Nepal

text: A joint meeting of working people's organizations took place at the People's Palace of Culture on Monday to thoroughly implement the important tasks set forth by Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un in his policy speech at the First Session of the 14th Supreme People's Assembly and at the Fourth Plenary Meeting of the Seventh Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. Present there were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the C.C., WPK, and officials of the working people's organizations in the capital and local areas. At the meeting, a reporter and speakers said that Kim Jong Un's policy speech at the First Session of the 14th SPA and his report at the plenary meeting are guidelines to be held fast to in faithfully upholding the state-building ideology and exploits of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and the inspiring banner to step up the socialist construction at the highest speed with their own efforts and in their own way. After referring to the achievements made by working people's organizations in the past, they analyzed and reviewed faults and lessons in the work of working people's organizations tailored to ideological education. They stressed that the working people's organizations should give full play to their militant might in bringing about a great upsurge in socialist construction in hearty response to the tasks put forth by Kim Jong Un. The joint meeting adopted a joint resolution of the central committees of the Kimilsungist-Kimjongilist Youth League, the General Federation of Trade Unions of Korea, the Union of Agricultural Workers of Korea and the Socialist Women's Union of Korea. Rodong Sinmun
title: Joint Meeting of Working People's Organizations Held

text: Foreign organizations issued statements on April 27 and May 8 to congratulate Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un on his successful Russia visit. The Nepal-Korea Friendship Association in a statement said that the summit and talks between HE Kim Jong Un and President Putin are of great significance in further developing the long-standing DPRK-Russia friendly relations, and they came to be an occasion to further intensify the strategic cooperation for ensuring peace and security in the Korean Peninsula and the rest of the world. The Bangladesh-Korea Friendship and Solidarity Committee, the Bangladesh Institute of the Juche Idea, the Bangladesh Group for the Study of the Songun Policy and the Bangladeshi Media Persons' Group for the Study of the Juche Idea said in a joint statement that Kim Jong Un, through his Russia visit, made a great contribution to developing the relations between the two countries and ensuring peace and security in the Korean Peninsula and the rest of the world. The joint statement hoped that the Korean people would achieve greater success in the struggle for the socialist construction and national reunification, the long-cherished desire of the nation, under his wise leadership. The joint statement of the Swiss Organizing Committee for the International Festival in Praise of the Great Persons of Mt Paektu, the Switzerland-Korea Committee and the Swiss Group for the Study of the Juche Idea also said that Kim Jong Un had talks with Putin in a friendly atmosphere, and congratulated his successful Russia visit. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Lauded by Foreign Bodies

text: Let All Sectors and Units Make Greater Strides on Basis of Scientific Development Strategy The present situation urges all sectors and units to advance and make a leap forward in reliance on scientific strategy for development. Mapping out scientific strategy for development is a primary work for every sector and unit to register steady successes in the revolution and construction. Every sector and unit can advance faster and leap higher only when they draw up the forward-looking and scientific strategy for development in keeping with their actual conditions and trend of global development and on the principle of making the maximum use of internal reserves, possibility and potentiality and stoutly carry out the strategy. State guidance and assistance are important for every unit to develop its work, but what is more important is that every unit should fulfill its duties. The Workers’ Party of Korea wants all the sectors and units to properly map out their own strategies for development and make a higher leap while looking out over the world. Let all the sectors and units draw up scientific strategy for development aiming at turning themselves into those of world standard and thus successfully open up a new road of advance for socialist construction.
title: Editorial

text: A Korean book and photo show was held in Sankt-Peterburg of Russia on May 6-8 to mark the third anniversary of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's election as chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea. Speeches were made at its opening-ceremony attended by personages of Russian political and public circles and masses. The chairperson of the All-Russian Society for the Study and Dissemination of Kimilsungism said he was pleased to see the opening of the book and photo show in celebration of the significant day when Kim Jong Un was elected as chairman of the WPK. The chairperson pointed out that Kim Jong Un sees to it that all the people perform a series of miracles in socialist construction under the uplifted banner of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism, noting that the Russian people always remember the exploits performed by President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il for boosting Russia-DPRK friendship and sincerely welcomed and warmly congratulated Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's historic visit to Russia. The chairperson hoped that the Korean people would emerge ever-victorious in the struggle against the imperialists and achieve bigger successes in the building of a powerful socialist country under the wise leadership of Kim Jong Un. Meanwhile, a lecture titled "The features of Kim Jong Un's politics" was given in Conakry, Guinea. Rodong Sinmun
title: Korean Book and Photo Show Held in Russia and Lecture Given in Guinea

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's work "Let Us March Forward Dynamically towards Final Victory, Holding Higher the Banner of Songun" was published in booklet by a publishing house in Basel City of Switzerland. The work, published on April 15, Juche 101 (2012), says that the century-long history of Kim Il Sung's nation clearly proved the immutable truth that an outstanding leader guarantees the dignity and prosperity of the country and the nation. It also indicates the tasks for glorifying the dignity of Songun Korea for all ages and successfully accomplishing the cause of building a thriving socialist country. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's Work Off Press in Switzerland

text: In April of the lunar calendar our people enjoyed fish dishes, especially broiled gizzard shad, sea bream soup, gray mullet soup, hard-boiled golden carp, etc. From olden times gizzard shad has smelled so delicious when broiled so it was said proverbially in Korea that the smell of broiling gizzard shad brought back daughter-in-law who was running away. The inhabitants of Phyongan, Hwanghae and Jolla Provinces enjoyed sea bream soup. When caught in April of the lunar calendar red sea-breams are at their best. Made with them, its soup is delicious and appetizing. It has been considered very efficacious for the infirm in particular. From of old gray mullet soup has been famous as a dish native to Phyongan Province. Above all, the soup prepared with the gray mullet of the Taedong River joined the Pyongyang iced noodle, the Pyongyang hot rice and meat soup, the Pyongyang fish porridge, etc in its specialties. From ancient times hard-boiled golden fish has been widely used by hepatic patients as an efficacious dish. Kim Chong Il
title: Summer National Dishes

text: Delegations of China, Russia and Poland left here for home on Friday and Saturday after taking part in the 22nd Pyongyang Spring International Trade Fair. Rodong Sinmun
title: Foreign Guests Leave

text: The south Korean online newspaper Jaju Sibo carried an article titled "North Korean society seen through songs loved by its citizens in 2019" on May 16. The article said that the leaders of north Korea have given importance to the might of music and art. It went on: In particular, Chairman of the National Defence Commission Kim Jong Il's philosophy of music is that the revolution advances and wins victory with songs. It means that the socialist revolution and construction are a solemn symphony of history and source of songs and that sonorous singing certainly helps the revolution emerge victorious. Chairman of the State Affairs Commission Kim Jong Un attaches importance to the might of music and art. In recent days, every art performance is started with song "Our National Flag" and the song is heard everywhere, including farms, enterprises, streets, etc. To get a proper understanding of north Korean music is one of the ways to get more knowledge of its society. Then, what are the north Korean residents' favorite songs in 2019? They are "Our National Flag", "We Will Go to Mt Paektu", "We Call You Father" and others, according to the personages who recently visited north Korea. The songs show their will to believe in and follow only the Supreme Leader and turn their country into a prosperous one. They also represent their confidence that they will certainly overcome any difficulty and trial, bearing in mind the holy land of revolution and their origin. Rodong Sinmun
title: DPRK's Citizens' Favorite Songs Introduced by S. Korean Newspaper

text: A delegation of the Central Theory Council of the Communist Party of Vietnam headed by Vice-Chairman Ta Ngoc Tan arrived here on Friday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Vietnamese Delegation Here

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, examined and guided the master plans for Kanggye and Manpho cities together with leading officials of the Party, administrative and designing bodies in Jagang Province. Present there were Jo Yong Won, first vice department director of the Central Committee of the WPK, Kang Pong Hun, chairman of the Jagang Provincial Committee of the WPK, Ri Hyong Gun, chairman of the Jagang Provincial People's Committee, and Party and administrative officials in the province and cities and officials of the relevant fields including the Jagang Provincial Designing Institute. The Supreme Leader of the Party, the State and the armed forces, looking at the blueprints for Kanggye and Manpho cities and a model board showing their panoramic views, was briefed on the plans for the layout of cities before putting forth the tasks and ways for successfully sprucing up the cities as required by the era. He pointed out that as the city construction has been carried out in such a haphazard way as to fill vacant lots without any careful consideration, most of the buildings sprawled to make the cities look like architecture history museums. He said that the layout plan should specify a district of ideological education, industrial district, cultural district, etc. and maps showing the bird's eye view of the districts should be worked out and the construction carried out under an annual plan. It is very important to preserve local characters in city layout, he said, adding that the architectural layouts should be made in a scientific way to preserve local characters and structures peculiarly built in various forms to renew the appearance of the cities by learning from the experience gained in remodeling Samjiyon County into a model of modern mountainous city. Pointing to the poor afforestation of Kanggye City, the Supreme Leader said the afforestation and greening constitute an important work for providing the people with civilized living condition and environment. He stressed the need to plant various species of trees and create more green belts to harmonize with the mountainous region. What is most important in city construction is to thoroughly embody the principle of ensuring people’s convenience, he said, calling for overhauling minor power stations run by the province and cities to increase electricity production, and for making a good combination of electricity and geothermal energy and other natural energies to solve the issue of heating buildings, and for remarkably raising the water production capacity of reservoirs to ensure the daily water supply to each citizen on a high level. Good sewage disposal is vital to preventing the environmental pollution when building cities, he said, stressing the need to build sewerage scientifically, regularly operate sewage treatment facilities and thus strictly purify and treat industrial waste water and sewage. It is important to rapidly develop finishing materials in order to push forward the construction, the Supreme Leader said, calling on every province to set up well building-materials production bases in the province including cement factory, roofing tile factory and tile factory and vitalize production so as to ensure self production and provision of finishing building materials needed for the construction. In order to effect
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Guides Master Plans for Kanggye and Manpho Cities

text: The State Stamp Bureau of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea recently issued new stamps (two sheets) dealing with the historic policy speech made by Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. Seen in the stamps centered on a red flag are letters reading "On Socialist Construction and the Internal and External Policies of the Government of the Republic at the Present Stage", the title of the policy speech, and "The First Session of the Fourteenth Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea April 12, Juche 108 (2019)". Rodong Sinmun
title: New Stamps Issued

They enjoyed the grand gymnastics and artistic performance "The Land of the People" at the May Day Stadium and had a pleasant time at the Kaeson Youth Park, the Rungna People's Pleasure Park and the Munsu Water Park. Rodong Sinmun

text: MyoZin Nyunt, representative and members of the UNICEF mission here did assistance work Thursday on the Taesong Vegetable Cooperative Farm in Sariwon City, North Hwanghae Province. They helped the farmers weeding. They handed over aid materials to the farm. Rodong Sinmun

text: A Congolese committee for remembering President Kim Il Sung was formed on June 6. Vital Balla, chairman of the Congolese Association for Friendship among Peoples, was elected chairman of the remembrance committee. The committee set the remembrance period from June 8 to July 9 and decided to give wide publicity to the career and exploits of the President through media and hold political and cultural events in the period. Rodong Sinmun
title: President Kim Il Sung to Be Remembered in Congo

Sergei Zebyatikh, chief of the association and editor-in-chief of the Belarusian magazine Social Education, was elected chairman of the remembrance committee. The remembrance committee decided to give wide publicity to the revolutionary exploits of President Kim Il Sung through media and hold political and cultural events including remembrance meeting. Rodong Sinmun
title: President Kim Il Sung to Be Remembered in Belarus

title: Delegation of DPRK Government Back Home

Members of the delegation laid bouquets and made a bow to the statues. Rodong Sinmun
title: Delegation of Koreans in Japan Pay Tribute to Statues of President Kim Il Sung, Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: Choe Ryong Hae, president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, Wednesday sent a message of greeting to Filipe Jacinto Nwussi, president of the Republic of Mozambique, on the occasion of its national day. Expressing the belief that the traditional relations of friendship and cooperation between the two countries would steadily develop, the message sincerely wished the Mozambican president happiness in good health and the Mozambican people bigger successes in their efforts for socio-economic development under his leadership. Rodong Sinmun
title: Greetings to Mozambican President

text: A delegation of the Central Committee of the Democratic Front for the Reunification of Korea (DFRK) led by Kim Wan Su, presidium member of the Central Committee of the DFRK, left here on Wednesday to visit China. Rodong Sinmun
title: Delegation of DFRK Central Committee Leaves for China

text: The sci-tech symposium on greenhouse vegetable farming-2019, which opened on June 11, closed with due ceremony at the Pyongyang Vegetable Science Institute under the Academy of Agricultural Science on Wednesday. During the symposium, scientific research successes and technical experience have been presented and sci-tech and practical lectures given with the main emphasis on breeding and introducing new functional vegetable species and putting the production of vegetable on an intensive and modern basis as required by the trend of the world development. "The Experience of the introduction of ring-shaped rotation production system in solar greenhouse" and other papers were highly appreciated at the Scientific Research Successes and Technical Experience Presentation. The lecture "On Functional Vegetable", etc. attracted attention in the participants. Present at the closing ceremony were Pak Thae Dok, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, Kim Kwang Uk, president of the Academy of Agricultural Science, officials concerned and officials, researchers and cultivators in the field of greenhouse vegetable production. Rodong Sinmun
title: Symposium on Greenhouse Vegetable Farming Closes

text: Shortly ago, Japan allowed the deployment of another RC-135S of the U.S. air force in Kaneda U.S. air force base under the groundless pretext of bolstering surveillance to cope with the DPRK’s “threat”, and thereby the U.S. air force base came to have two RC-135Ss. Japan is also trying to independently possess an early warning satellite. Such moves are the manifestation of the Japanese reactionaries’ persistent and vicious ambition for reinvasion that remains unchanged even today as they were originated in an ill-boding scheme for an active information warfare against the DPRK. Japan’s information warfare is the prelude to reinvasion and Japan’s addiction to reinforcing the information warfare hints that it works hard to bring earlier the moment of reinvasion. The successive Japanese reactionary ruling quarters have run amuck for a military giant and reinvasion, talking about “threat from north Korea”. They have revived the militarism in Japan to encroach on the whole society and turned the “Self-Defense Forces” (SDF) into the best offensive forces of the capitalist countries, repeating stereo-typed gibberish about “threat from north Korea”. They conducted a joint military exercise in the East Sea of Korea with SDF and foreign naval forces involved under the allegation of “threat” from the DPRK. Now they are trying to have an aircraft carrier and the SDF advances into the Indian Ocean. They are building up public opinion about Japan’s “dominium” over Tok Island in a bid to create a pretext for landing the SDF in the Korean peninsula. The present reality proves once again that the Japanese militarist aggressive nature still remains unchanged and will never change in the future, too. Ri Kyong Su
title: Revelation of Japan’s Unchangeable Ambition for Reinvasion

text: The delegation of the Central Committee of the Democratic Front for the Reunification of Korea headed by Presidium Member Kim Wan Su, which is on a visit to China, met with Wang Yang, chairman of the National Committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference, in Beijing on June 28. Wang Yang said that the China-DPRK friendship is a common asset of both sides which the leaders of the elder generation of the two countries provided and developed, expressing the readiness to creditably put into practice the important common understanding of the top leaders of the two countries and to promote the development of the bilateral relations. He sincerely wished the Korean people greater success in carrying out the new strategic line of the Workers' Party of Korea under the wise leadership of Chairman Kim Jong Un. Present there were Ji Jae Ryong, DPRK ambassador to China; Xia Baolong, vice-chairman and concurrently secretary general of the National Committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference, and other officials concerned. Earlier, there took place talks between Kim Wan Su, presidium member of the C.C., the Democratic Front for the Reunification of Korea, and Yang Chuantang, vice-chairman of the National Committee of the Chinese People's Political Consultative Conference. Rodong Sinmun
title: Wang Yang Expresses Readiness to Promote China-DPRK Relations

text: Ri Su Yong, member of the Political Bureau and vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, met and had a talk with Kent Rolf Magnus Harstedt, special envoy of the Swedish government, and his party who paid a courtesy call on him, on Wednesday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Ri Su Yong Meets Special Envoy of Swedish Government

text: Families of Fan Delin and Jiang Zihua, Chinese related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle, and the family of Ri Min, a China-resident Korean related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle, visited Mangyongdae, the birthplace of President Kim Il Sung. They looked round historic relics, being told that Kim Il Sung was born into the revolutionary and patriotic family and nurtured the great intention to liberate the country. They toured the revolutionary sites on Mangyong Hill. Rodong Sinmun
title: Families of Those Related to Anti-Japanese Revolutionary Struggle Visit Mangyongdae

text: The Workers' Party of Korea Publishing House produced posters on the election for the deputies to provincial (municipal), city (district) and county people's assemblies. The poster "Let Us Brighten the Socialist System of Our Country!" depicts a worker, peasant and intellectual, who are seeing in the day of the election with a high degree of political zeal and labor achievements, against the background of the fluttering DPRK flag and monumental edifices. The poster "Let Us Consolidate the People's Power Rock-solid!" depicts the will of the Korean people to fully display once again the invincible might of the DPRK, a country of the single-minded unity, by voting out of patriotism for the candidates with the pride and honor of being masters of the genuine people's power. Rodong Sinmun
title: Posters Produced

text: Families of those related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle arrived here on Friday on the occasion of the 25th anniversary of demise of President Kim Il Sung. Among them were the families of Zhang Wei-hua, a Chinese anti-Japanese revolutionary martyr, the family of Li Zade, a Korean anti-Japanese revolutionary fighter in China and families of So Sun Ok and Kim Sun Ok, China-resident Koreans related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle. Meanwhile, Families of Shang Yue, Zhou Baozhong, Chai Shiying and Wang Xiaoming, Chinese related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle, arrived here on the same day. Rodong Sinmun
title: Families of Those Related to Anti-Japanese Revolutionary Struggle Arrive

text: The DPRK embassy in Laos hosted a reception on July 3 to mark the 45th anniversary of the establishment of diplomatic relations between the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and the Lao People's Democratic Republic. Present at the reception on invitation were the Lao foreign minister, the chairman of the Committee for External Affairs of the Lao People's Revolutionary Party (LPRP) and the president of the Lao Federation of Trade Unions who doubles as chairman of the Laos-Korea Friendship Association, members of the Central Committee of the LPRP, and figures of various strata. It was attended by the DPRK ambassador to Laos and staff members of his embassy. Speeches were made there. The Lao foreign minister said that the tradition of the bilateral friendship provided by President Kaysone Phomvihane and President Kim Il Sung is carried forward by President Bounnang Vorachith and Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. Noting that for the past 45 years the two parties and two countries have steadily developed exchange and cooperation, he expressed gratitude to the Party, government and people of the DPRK for extending invariable support and solidarity to the struggle of the Lao people. Rodong Sinmun
title: DPRK Embassy Hosts Reception

text: Japanese Prime Minister Abe tried to reach out to leaders of some countries, who attended the G20 summit, to seek support for the implementation of the “sanctions resolutions” against the DPRK. Besides, he called for taking tough measures against the evasion of the sanctions, crying out for “verifiable and irreversible dismantlement.” Abe’s such nonsense is a ludicrous one of a political dwarf who has no ability to properly grasp the reality. Now the climate of reconciliation and peace has mounted unprecedentedly on the Korean peninsula and in the region, and the demand for dropping the anachronistic anti-DPRK sanctions becomes increasingly vocal in the international arena. But on the contrary, the Japanese politicians went round imploring other countries to implement the “sanctions resolution” against the DPRK, part begging and part forcing. This is another reminder of their dull political sense and their poor ability to size up the situation. Now Japan’s position in the international arena is miserable as it remains in the periphery over the regional situation. Left alone, yet it attempts to meddle in the Korean peninsula issue again, a thing unbecoming for its current plight. No matter how hard Japan may try to react to an avalanche of ridicule and accusations from the international community, it only falls on deaf ears. It is the height of foolishness for Japan to think of getting somewhere by means of such cheap conducts. The Japanese politicians had better know where they stand and behave themselves. Ri Hak Nam
title: Japanese Reactionaries Are Well Advised to Behave Themselves,Properly Knowing How Their Image Is

text: Family members of Shang Yue, Zhou Baozhong and Jiang Zihua, Chinese related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle, and family members of Li Zade, a Korean anti-Japanese revolutionary fighter in China, and of Kim Sun Ok, a China-resident Korean related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle, left here on Friday. Leaving earlier were family members of Chai Shiying, Wang Xiaoming and Fan Delin, Chinese related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle, and family members of Ri Min, a China-resident Korean related to the anti-Japanese revolutionary struggle. Rodong Sinmun
title: Families of Those Related to Anti-Japanese Revolutionary Struggle Leave

text: A delegation of the International Department of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) led by First Vice Department Director of its Central Committee Kim Song Nam came back home on Saturday after visiting China. Rodong Sinmun
title: WPK International Department Delegation Back Home

text: A delegation of the DPRK Central Court led by President Kang Yun Sok met and had a talk with Guo Shengkun, member of the Political Bureau, member of the Secretariat and secretary of the Political and Legal Affairs Committee of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC), on July 16. The delegation is on a visit to China. Secretary Guo Shengkun said that the Chinese party and government are attaching much importance to the China-DPRK friendly and cooperative relations personally provided and nurtured by the revolutionaries of the elder generations of the two countries. He recalled the successful Pyongyang visit paid recently by General Secretary Xi Jinping at the invitation of Chairman Kim Jong Un. Being pleased over the eye-opening successes achieved by the DPRK in the economic development and improvement of people's living standard under the leadership of Chairman Kim Jong Un, the secretary expressed belief that the friendly and cooperative relations between the judicial organs of the two countries would grow stronger as required by the new era this year marking the 70th anniversary of establishment of the diplomatic relations between the two countries. Present there were the DPRK ambassador to China, the president of the Supreme People's Court of China and officials concerned. That day the delegation met the Chinese minister of Justice. Rodong Sinmun
title: Delegation of DPRK Central Court Meets Secretary of Political and Legal Affairs Committee of CPC Central Committee

title: Cubans Here

Rodong Sinmun
title: Choe Ryong Hae Meets Cuban Figures

title: Officials of Korean Youth League in Japan Arrive

Rodong Sinmun
title: Choe Hwi Meets Venezuelan Delegation

text: Haitham Safey Eldin, Egyptian charge d'affaires ad interim here, gave a reception at the Taedonggang Diplomatic Club on Tuesday, the 67th anniversary of the July 23 revolution in Egypt. Present there on invitation were Ho Yong Bok, vice-minister of Foreign Affairs, Ri Myong San, vice-minister of External Economic Relations, and officials concerned. Members of the Egyptian embassy were on hand. Rodong Sinmun
title: Egyptian Charge D'Affaires Ad Interim Gives Reception

text: The head of the delegation of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea made a speech at the Ministerial Meeting of the Coordinating Bureau of the Non-Aligned Movement (NAM) held in Caracas, Venezuela on July 20 and 21. He said that despite continued efforts of the NAM countries, the imperialists are becoming more undisguised than ever before in arbitrarily trampling over the sovereignty of other countries with complete disregard of the UN Charter and international law in the international arena. He went on: In many countries, humanitarian disasters are occurring one after another accompanied by serious political crisis, military conflicts, aggravated disputes and refugee influx, and the main victims of these disasters are none other than many of the NAM countries. The prevailing reality demands that the NAM decisively enhance its position and role as a political force representing developing countries. When the member states that occupy overwhelming majority of the UN membership further intensify collective action, the leading role of the NAM can be enhanced in safeguarding peace and security of the world. In order to defend the collective interests of the member states and implement the principles of impartiality and equality at the UN, it is important for the NAM member states which are the non-permanent members of the UN Security Council to further enhance their role. If those member states actively engage themselves in representing the interests of the NAM, they can prevail over all sorts of maneuvers of the West committed against developing countries and thereby make contributions to enabling the UN to fulfill its mission of preserving world peace and security in good faith. The DPRK as a member state of the NAM has been making consistent efforts to develop and strengthen the NAM in conformity with its founding purposes and the principles of activities. Despite the continuing challenges of the hostile forces attempting to block the road ahead of us, the DPRK government remains firm and unshakable in its will to establish a lasting and durable peace mechanism on the Korean peninsula, open up a new phase of prosperity by its own efforts and realize the ideal and objectives for a powerful country. The DPRK government will actively support and encourage the NAM member states in their efforts to hold fast to the ideal of independence against imperialism and peace against war and to defend sovereignty. The DPRK government will in the future, too, make every possible effort for the strengthening and development of the NAM in accordance with its foreign policy ideals of independence, peace and friendship. Rodong Sinmun
title: DPRK Delegation Head Makes Speech at Ministerial Meeting of Coordinating Bureau of NAM

title: Secretary General of International Federation of Red Cross and Red Crescent Societies Leaves

text: A meeting of the chairpersons of branches of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon) took place in Tokyo on July 20 to mark the 7th anniversary of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's congratulatory message sent to the participants in the congress of officials of Chongryon branches. Present there were Chairman Ho Jong Man and members of the Chongryon Central Standing Committee, the director of the Research Institute on History of Korean Residents in Japan, leading officials of major organizations and affiliates under Chongryon, chairpersons of Chongryon headquarters and chairpersons of Chongryon branches in different parts of Japan. The meeting discussed the issues of concentrating all efforts on cementing Chongryon branches to be reliable patriotic ones, hastening a fresh heyday of the movement of Koreans in Japan and providing a springboard for overall prosperity, true to the high intention of Kim Jong Un. Ho Jong Man made a report. The reporter underscored the need to make decisive progress in strengthening as firm as a rock the branches, main units of compatriots' living and patriotic work, into regional bases of the movement of Koreans in Japan and terminal guiding units of Chongryon in step with the ever-victorious stratagem and strategic idea of Kim Jong Un. He called on all the officials to consolidate the Chongryon as firm as a rock to be powerful overseas compatriots' organization forming a harmonious whole with compatriots as desired by Kim Jong Un. And speeches were made there. A letter to Kim Jong Un was read out at the meeting. Rodong Sinmun
title: Chairpersons of Chongryon Branches Meet in Tokyo

text: The Art Squad of the Central Committee of the Kimilsungist-Kimjongilist Youth League, the Workers' Art Group of the Central Committee of the General Federation of Trade Unions of Korea and the Art Squad of the Central Committee of the Union of Agricultural Workers of Korea gave performances Thursday in celebration of the 66th anniversary of the victory in the great Fatherland Liberation War. Put on the stages were choruses "Long Live Generalissimo Kim Il Sung", poem and chorus "July 27, Our Victory Day" and other colorful numbers. The performers praised the war victory exploits performed by President Kim Il Sung by making military miracles to be specially recorded in the world history of wars and firmly defending the dignity and sovereignty of the country with his rare military wisdom and outstanding commanding art. They admired the patriotic devotion made by Chairman Kim Jong Il who won one victory after another in the unprecedented struggle for the defence of socialism under the uplifted banner of Songun and convinced the audiences of the iron truth that July 27 of victory will shine long under the guidance of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. Among the audience were Ri Il Hwan, department director of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, Pak Chol Min, chairman of the C.C., the Kimilsungist-Kimjongilist Youth League, Ju Yong Gil, chairman of the C.C., the General Federation of Trade Unions of Korea, Kim Chang Yop, chairman of the C.C., the Union of Agricultural Workers of Korea, and officials concerned and officials of the working organizations, youth and students and working people. Rodong Sinmun
title: Performances Given by Art Squads of Working People's Organizations

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un received a floral basket from the bereaved family of DPRK Hero An Tong Su on the occasion of the 66th anniversary of the victory in the great Fatherland Liberation War. The floral basket was handed to an official concerned by Jong Il Sim, widow of DPRK Hero An Tong Su, on Friday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Floral Basket to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from Bereaved Family of DPRK Hero

text: A national meeting was held at the April 25 House of Culture on Friday to observe the 66th anniversary of the victory in the great Fatherland Liberation War. Present there were Choe Ryong Hae, Pak Pong Ju, Kim Jae Ryong and other senior officials of the Party and the government, officials of the armed forces organs, officials of the Party Central Committee, war veterans, officials of ministries and national institutions, service personnel of the Korean People's Army and the Korean People's Internal Security Forces, teaching staff and students of revolutionary schools, officials of institutions and industrial establishments, labor innovators, youth and students in Pyongyang and overseas compatriots. Present there on invitation were foreign diplomatic envoys, representatives of the missions of international organizations and military attaches of foreign embassies here. Army General Kim Su Gil, member of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, member of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK, and director of the KPA General Political Bureau, made a report. The reporter said that the brilliant victory in the Fatherland Liberation War on July 27, Juche 42 (1953) was a historic event which fully demonstrated the invincibility of Juche Korea to the whole world and opened up a broad avenue for vigorous advance and accomplishment of the revolution. He went on: The victory in the Fatherland Liberation War was a brilliant one brought about by the Juche-oriented military idea, war methods and outstanding leadership of President Kim Il Sung and the proud one by ardent patriotism and indomitable fighting spirit of the service personnel of the People's Army and people of Korea. The President set forth the slogan "Everything for Victory in the War!", encouraged the entire Party, the whole state and all the people to turn out in the struggle for defending the country and wisely led the struggle to destroy the numerical and technical superiority of the enemies by dint of political, moral, strategic and tactical advantages. Having a deep insight into the prevailing situation, the balance of forces between the enemy and the People's Army and the weak points of the enemy with his rare military wisdom in each stage of the war, he opened the turning phase for the war victory, dealing telling blows at the invaders by employing the Korean-style strategy, tactics and war methods. The brave People's Army fighters opened up a road of charge by dedicating their lives to destroying the enemy pillboxes, and did not hesitate to sacrifice themselves for the defence of an inch of the country's land, shouting "Long live General Kim Il Sung!" in battlefields. During the war, the Chinese party, government and people sent the Chinese People's Volunteers composed of their excellent sons and daughters to support the struggle of the Korean people at the cost of their blood under the uplifted banner of resisting America and aiding Korea, safeguarding the home and defending the motherland, and thus boosted the DPRK-China friendship forged in the flames of the anti-Japanese war and strikingly demonstrated its invincibility and vitality. The war victory exploits performed by the President who rescued twice the destiny of the country and the nation by leading the Fatherland Liberation War to victory and created the ever-victorious history and traditions of Juche Korea will be immortal generation after generation. The proud tradition of the Ju
title: National Meeting Held to Observe Day of War Victory

text: Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and vice-chairman of the WPK Central Committee, inspected different units in Sunchon City. At the Sunchon phosphate fertilizer factory under construction, Pak Pong Ju encouraged technicians and workers in their efforts to put the fertilizer industry on a Juche basis. Discussed at the consultative meeting were the issues to be tackled in stepping up the construction. At the Sunchon Cement Complex, he stressed the need to hasten the remodeling of a kiln and to unconditionally implement the tasks set forth by the Party by boosting cooperation with relevant units for the supply of materials, power, etc. At the Sunchon Heat Insulating Materials Factory, he stressed the importance and significance of the production of heat insulating materials and discussed the issues of increasing the production capacity. Rodong Sinmun
title: Pak Pong Ju Inspects Units in Sunchon City

title: Delegation of Korean Committee for Solidarity with Cuba Back Home

title: Koreans in Japan Visit Statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: A photo exhibition was opened at the People's Palace of Culture on Tuesday to show the achievements gained in building socialism with the Chinese characteristics. Present at the opening ceremony were Kim Yong Jae, minister of External Economic Relations, Pak Kyong Il, vice-chairman of the Korean Committee for Cultural Relations with Foreign Countries and chairman of the DPRK-China Friendship Association, officials concerned and Li Jinjun, Chinese ambassador to the DPRK, members of his embassy, Chinese guests staying in the DPRK. Speeches were made. Speakers said that the exhibition would help further deepening the friendship and understanding between the peoples of the two countries. They expressed the belief that the exhibition, an event to mark the 70th anniversaries of the establishment of diplomatic ties between the DPRK and China and the foundation of the People's Republic of China, would serve as a significant occasion to promote the development of the long-standing friendship between the two countries. Then the participants saw round the photos. The exhibition will continue till Aug. 8. Rodong Sinmun
title: Photo Exhibition Shows China's Achievements in Socialist Construction

text: The Sportspersons' Lodging Quarters in Chongchun Street opened with due ceremony on Tuesday. The 15-storeyed building with a total floor space of 11 860 sq meters houses an e-library, entertainment room and all other conditions for rest and cultural and leisure life of sportspersons. Present at its opening ceremony were officials concerned, sportspersons, builders and employees of the lodging quarters. That day, sportspersons entered the lodging quarters, being warmly welcomed by its officials and employees. Rodong Sinmun
title: Sportspersons' Lodging Quarters in Chongchun Street Open

Rodong Sinmun

text: Talks were held at the Mansudae Assembly Hall on Monday between Ri Yong Ho, foreign minister of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, and Wang Yi, state councilor and foreign minister of the People's Republic of China.At the talks, both sides had an in-depth discussion of practical issues for further developing the friendly and cooperative DPRK-China ties in keeping with the noble intention of the top leaders of the two countries.They also had an exchange of views on the issues of mutual concern such as the situation in the Korean Peninsula.The talks proceeded in a comradely and friendly atmosphere.Attending the talks from the DPRK side were Ri Kil Song, vice-minister of Foreign Affairs, O Ryong Chol, vice-minister of External Economic Relations, and officials concerned and from the Chinese side Luo Zhaohui, vice-minister of Foreign Affairs, Wang Bingnan, vice-minister of Commerce, Deng Boqing, deputy head of the state office for international development and cooperation, and suite members and Li Jinjun, Chinese ambassador to the DPRK, and his embassy members. text: Volume 27 of "Complete Collection of Kim Jong Il's Works", a library of immortal Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism, was brought out by the Workers' Party of Korea Publishing House. The book systematically and comprehensively contains the works of Chairman Kim Jong Il in a chronological order.The book contains 65 works including talks and speeches made by Kim Jong Il from November Juche 64 (1975) to May Juche 65 (1976).The works deal with the ideology and theory of Kim Jong Il who indicated the way of struggle for more thoroughly establishing the Party's monolithic ideological system and firmly consolidating the Juche-oriented revolutionary forces and dynamically accelerating the socialist construction as required by the developing revolution.The book contains works giving perfect answers to the theoretical and practical issues arising in the revolutionary struggle including the issues of turning Komdok and Tanchon areas into major bases for producing nonferrous metals and doing work well with scientists and technicians, developing medical science in the field of public health and improving hospital management and the issue for diplomatic officials to keep holding higher the banner of independence in foreign affairs.Rodong Sinmun Volume 27 of "Complete Collection of Kim Jong Il's Works", a library of immortal Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism, was brought out by the Workers' Party of Korea Publishing House. text: The 15th Pyongyang Autumn International Trade Fair opened with due ceremony at Pyongyang Indoor Stadium on Monday.Electrical and electronic goods, building materials, machines and light industrial products are on display at the fair involving more than 350 companies from the DPRK, China, Vietnam, Mongolia, Indonesia, Italy and other countries.Attending the ceremony were Ri Ryong Nam, vice-premier of the Cabinet, Kim Yong Jae, minister of External Economic Relations, delegations from different countries and members of foreign diplomatic missions here.Pak Ung Sik, director of the Korean International Exhibition Corporation, made an opening address to be followed by a congratulatory speech by O Ryong Chol, vice-minister of External Economic Relations.At the end of the ceremony the participants toured the fair venue.The fair will last till Sept. 27. text: The Committee for Aiding Overseas Compatriots of the DPRK issued a statement on Monday denouncing the Japanese authorities for excluding the kindergartens of the Korean schools from the "program for free education and upbringing of children".The statement said that Abe regime's arrogant exclusion of the kindergartens of the Korean schools from the program fully reveals the chronic national chauvinism of the island country and shows again that the Japanese reactionaries' hostile policy towards the DPRK and the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon) and their inveterate repugnancy and ill-intended discrimination against the Korean nation never change.It went on:The Japanese reactionaries, not content with putting down Chongryon and Koreans in Japan, are trying to use education and upbringing for preschool children of the Koreans in Japan as a bargaining chip for negotiations. Their mean act fully lays bare the true colors of Abe regime which talks about the "dialogue without any condition".The Japanese authorities' discrimination against the Korean children in Japan adds to the frozen DPRK-Japan relations.They would be well advised to behave themselves, though belatedly, bearing in mind that if they commit crimes against the trend of the times, they would be left alone out of the world political current, to say nothing of visit to the DPRK.Rodong Sinmun The Committee for Aiding Overseas Compatriots of the DPRK issued a statement on Monday denouncing the Japanese authorities for excluding the kindergartens of the Korean schools from the "program for free education and upbringing of children".The statement said that Abe regime's arrogant exclusion of the kindergartens of the Korean schools from the program fully reveals the chronic national chauvinism of the island country and shows again that the Japanese reactionaries' hostile policy towards the DPRK and the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon) and their inveterate repugnancy and ill-intended discrimination against the Korean nation never change.It went on:The Japanese reactionaries, not content with putting down Chongryon and Koreans in Japan, are trying to use education and upbringing for preschool children of the Koreans in Japan as a bargaining chip for negotiations. text: There took place a ground-breaking ceremony for remodeling and mending the graves of the martyrs of the Chinese People's Volunteers (CPV) located in Hyongjesan District, Pyongyang City on Friday.Attending the ceremony were Choe Song Chol, vice-minister of Urban Management, officials concerned, working people in the district, Zhang Chenggang, charge d' affaires ad interim, and staff members of the Chinese embassy here, Chinese guests, students and residents in the DPRK.Placed before the graves were wreaths in the names of the Ministry of Urban Management, the Hyongjesan District People's Committee of Pyongyang City, the Chinese embassy, etc.The participants observed a moment's silence in memory of the martyrs of the CPV.Speeches were made there.Speakers said that the brave fighters of the CPV devoted their youth and lives to the sacred war for repelling the imperialists' armed invasion with the Korean people.They said that the project would make a contribution to handing down the militant friendship sealed in blood between the peoples of the two countries and the feats of the martyrs.The participants broke ground first to signal the start of the project.Rodong text: The 18th NAM Summit was held in Baku, Azerbaijan on October 25 and 26.Attending it was a delegation of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) led by Choe Ryong Hae, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, first vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and president of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly.Present there were 3 000 persons including heads of states and governments of 120 member states of NAM, high-level delegations and delegates and representatives of several international organizations.At the summit Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro Moros who worked as the chairman of the 17th NAM Summit made a report on the 2016-2019 NAM work.Azerbaijani President Ilham Aliyev who was elected the chairman of the 18th NAM Summit made an opening address.He in his address underscored the need to strengthen the role of NAM on the basis of the principle of respecting the sovereignty, territorial integrity and non-interference in other's internal affairs.After congratulatory speeches the issues on peace and security, disarmament, human rights and Middle East situation were discussed.Choe Ryong Hae made a speech there.And speeches were made by delegates of 97 countries and international organizations.A final document of the 18th NAM Summit, the "Baku Declaration" and others were adopted there. text: Kim Jae Ryong, member of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, member of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and premier of the Cabinet, inspected several units of the agricultural field of North and South Hwanghae Provinces, South Phyongan Province and Nampho City.At the Obong Cooperative Farm in Paechon County, Phungchon Cooperative Farm in Yonan County, Migok Cooperative Farm in Sariwon City, Jasan Cooperative Farm in Phyongsong City and Sokchi Cooperative Farm in Onchon County, he gave a pep-talk to the agricultural workers busy in the farm work and stressed the need to responsibly organize all processes including to keep thresher in full-capacity operation and to store grains so as to successfully conclude this year's farming.He also emphasized the need to make full preparations for next year's farming, increase underground water resources, push ahead with a correct field-responsibility-system within the framework of the subworkteam management system and increase the proportion of the mechanization in the farm work on the basis of the experience gained in increasing agricultural output this year.At the second-stage waterway under construction in South Hwanghae Province, he learned in detail about the supply of building materials including cement and the promotion of overall construction. the liberation of Korea, had experienced the sorrow of a stateless nation, suffering from all sorts of maltreatment and humiliation under the Japanese imperialists' colonial rule.With a single desire to repay the loving care of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il, who liberated the country and made the people enjoy worthy life with dignity, with increased grain production, she had Dec. 23.The king in the message said that he was pleased to express his heartfelt thanks to Kim Jong Un for extending good congratulations on the occasion of the national day of the Kingdom of Bahrain.Expressing his heartfelt respect for Kim Jong Un on this precious occasion, the king sincerely wished him happiness in good health and the friendly people of the DPRK steady progress and prosperity, and hoped that the relations between the two friendly countries and peoples would grow stronger.Rodong Sinmun Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic text: A meeting was held by officials and members of the women's union at the Hall of Women on Monday to mark the 8th anniversary of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un's assumption of the supreme commandership of the armed forces of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea.A reporter and speakers said that Kim Jong Un's assumption of the supreme commandership of the armed forces of the DPRK was the greatest fortune for the Korean people and the great revolutionary auspicious event to be specially recorded in the history of the country.They stressed that Kim Jong Un set it as the general task of the army building to model the entire army on Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism and performed exploits to be recorded in the history of the Juche-oriented army building with his energetic leadership by training the People's Army to be the first death-defying corps reliably defending the security of the country and happiness of the people and the pioneer of the socialist civilization.They called for greeting the 75th founding anniversary of the Worker's Party of Korea with high political enthusiasm and labor successes by continuously enhancing the militant function and role of organizations of the women's union. text: Shock Brigade Marked The 40th anniversary of the start of movement of the April 15 Technical Innovation Shock Brigade was marked in the DPRK.Chairman Kim Jong Il set forth a policy on forming the shock brigade for technical innovation consisting of technicians, workers, inventors, master-hands at contrivance and officials at the industrial establishments in all the fields and units of the national economy on January 19, Juche 69 (1980).He named the shock brigade the "April 15 Technical Innovation Shock Brigade" so that it can take the lead in realizing a grand plan of the Workers' Party of Korea for economic construction, and established an orderly command system and indicated the orientation for activities.The movement of the April 15 Technical Innovation Shock Brigade has been developed under the leadership of the peerlessly great men and given full play to its advantages and might in the development of the country's economy and improvement of the people's standard of living for the past 40 years.A meeting was held at the Central Hall of Workers on January 20.Present there were Pak Thae Song, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, officials concerned, officials of industrial establishments and cooperative farms and members of the April 15 Technical Innovation Shock Brigade.Rodong Sinmun The 40th anniversary of the start of text: The 46th National Schoolchildren's Sports Contest for Sobaeksu Prize opened with due ceremony at the Basketball Gymnasium in Chongchun Street Wednesday.The contest will bring together ace members of sports groups of schools that won in provincial preliminaries throughout the country. They will compete in over 10 events including basketball, Taekwon-Do, Ssirum and skiing.Present at the opening ceremony were Choe Hwi, vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, Kim Sung Du, chairman of the Education Commission, Kim Jong Su, first vice-minister of Physical Culture and Sports, officials of the youth league and youth and students.There was an opening address at the ceremony.After the ceremony, there was a men's basketball match between Kang Pan Sok Senior Middle School and Kim Ju Hyok Senior Middle School in Mangyongdae District. text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un sent birthday spreads to women centenarians, Yun Chae Ok, Pak Kiminyo and Kim Thae Sun on their 100th birthdays.Yun Chae Ok now resides in neighborhood unit No. 18, Osang-ri, Kyongsong County, Pak Kiminyo in neighborhood unit No. 20, Ondaejin-ri, Kyongsong County and Kim Thae Sun in neighborhood unit No. 53, Pompho-ri, Kumya County.They were born into poor peasants' families under the Japanese imperialists' rule.They regard the socialist country as the embrace of the mother, source of their worthwhile lives.Even after becoming pensioners, they did the work helpful to the country's economic life.They are keeping themselves optimistic in good health, doing simple housework and cultivating kitchen gardens.Rodong Sinmun Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un sent text: DPRK women table-tennis players - Kim Song I, Kim Nam Hae, Cha Hyo Sim and Pyon Song Gyong, who took part in 2020 ITTF World Team Qualification Tournament, were qualified for the 32nd Olympics.Ace men and women players from over 30 countries and regions, including the DPRK, India, Sweden and Hong Kong of China, are competing for the qualifications for the Olympics in the tournament, which opened in Portugal on Jan. 22.The DPRK players defeated the Malaysian team 3-0 in the first match and the south Korean team 3-1 on Jan. 23 to be qualified for the 32nd Olympics.Rodong Sinmun DPRK women table-tennis players - Kim Song I, Kim Nam Hae, Cha Hyo Sim and Pyon Song Gyong, who took part in 2020 ITTF World Team Qualification Tournament, were qualified for the 32nd Olympics.Ace men and women players from over 30 countries and regions, including the DPRK, India, Sweden and Hong Kong of China, are competing for the qualifications for the Olympics in the tournament, which opened in Portugal on Jan. 22.The DPRK players defeated the Malaysian team 3-0 in the first match and the south Korean team 3-1 on Jan. 23 to be qualified for the 32nd Olympics.Rodong Sinmun Ace men and women players from over 30 countries and regions, including the DPRK, India, Sweden and Hong Kong of China, are competing for the qualifications for the Olympics in the tournament, which opened in Portugal on Jan. 22.The DPRK players defeated the Malaysian team 3-0 in the first match and the south Korean team 3-1 on Jan. 23 to be qualified for the 32nd Olympics.Rodong Sinmun The DPRK players defeated the Malaysian team 3-0 in the first match and the south Korean team 3-1 on Jan. 23 to be qualified for the 32nd Olympics.Rodong Sinmun Rodong Sinmun
