text: Let Us Conduct Intensive Drive to Prevent Novel Coronavirus Infection It is necessary to redouble an effort to prevent the global rapid spread of the new coronavirus in order to reliably safeguard the life of the people and the security of the state.To reliably defend the life and security of the people is a top-priority issue of the Workers’ Party of Korea and the state.The DPRK is now pushing forward the work to thoroughly curb the spread of the virus. After the Party and the state took emergency measures, the hygienic and anti-epidemic system has been turned into a state emergency anti-epidemic system so as to eradicate everything fraught with a health risk caused by the virus, and the central, provincial, city and county emergency anti-epidemic headquarters were established to conduct the anti-epidemic work in a unified way.The novel coronavirus throws the world into uneasiness and horror, but the advantages and might of our state system, which prioritizes the life and security of the people, will be fully demonstrated to the whole world once again, when we ensure that the virus does not reach our country and that no one suffers from the infections.All the people should take an active part in the campaign to curb the expansion of the virus infection so as to reliably defend the security of our dignified state and the happiness of the people. text: The Pyongyang Emergency Anti-epidemic Headquarters scrupulously organizes the work to thoroughly prevent the novel coronavirus infection.It intensifies the hygienic information service and conducts a thorough medical examination of citizens. text: On June 19, 1995 Chairman Kim Jong Il published the immortal classic work “Giving Priority to Ideological Work Is Essential For Accomplishing Socialism,” in which he gave precious instructions to intensify the education of young people. He said that the future of the revolution and socialism depended on the preparation of the rising generation and that in socialist society the organizations of young people, the political reserves of the working-class Party, were assigned the honorable task of firmly preparing the coming generation as reliable successors to the cause of socialism. He continued to stress that if the organizations of young people threw the accent on such and such administrative and businesslike affairs without channeling their efforts into their own tasks the growing generation could not be educated and trained in socialist ideas. In addition, in his work he emphasized that the working-class Party should intensify its guidance in the organizations of young people and ensure that they carried on the vigorous ideological education of their young members in accordance with their own tasks and their characteristics and train all of them to be creditable successors to the revolution. The work demonstrated once again that the ideological education of young people was really the most important problem which bears on the future of the revolution. text: The local production of finishing building materials with domestic technology and raw materials gets momentum across the country.The Chollima Tile Factory produced frost-resistance tiles with locally available raw materials.Heat ray-reflection glass developed by the Kangwon Provincial Commission of Science and Technology has the effects of heat insulation, adding architectural beauty to structures.North Phyongan Province built up a base for producing light building materials with reeds, and Jungsan County of South Phyongan Province produced natural mineral color-sand of which serviceable life is longer than existing outdoor paints.The Taedonggang Building-materials Factory produces bactericidal indoor paint and anion indoor paint with natural materials abundant in the country. text: The Munsu Water Park is laid out on the picturesque Taedong River. Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un presented the people with it as a token of his love for them.To everybody’s surprise, in October 2013 officials preceded the people in enjoying themselves in the water park although it was not yet completed with due ceremony. But they did not know the reason.That day Kim Jong Un was informed that the water park was completed and visited it with his officials.He looked round its indoor and outdoor wading pools and was very much satisfied with them. He arranged for the officials to have a good time in a wading pool in the afternoon. He came to the water park again when they enjoyed themselves happily in the wading pool.He looked at the officials for a good while. He threw his eyes to the joints of a water slide and closely watched them.He said that the joints of the water slides must be treated well to thoroughly protect the people against injury and that he ensured that the officials used the water slides today before the people did so that the former could check up their joints well for the good of the latter.It was not until then that the officials came to know why Kim Jong Un saw to it that they benefitted from the wading pool.Jang Un Gyong The Munsu Water Park is laid out on the picturesque Taedong River. text: To work in a prospective way is the requirement of the revolution and the stand and attitude to be consistently adhered to by a revolutionary.As far as the prospective work is concerned, today and tomorrow are closely linked with each other. Each time of today is literally the one of advance towards tomorrow. If one ignores the reality and clings to the status quo, the prospect of the revolution will be ruined.It is more urgent and important for officials to work in a prospective way.One should not give priority only to his domain and unit although one works in a prospective way, looking forward to the distant future. text: The Ministry of Coal Industry encourages researchers and technicians of its lower units to give helping hand to the coal production with science and technology in the van of today’s offensive for making a head-on breakthrough.Those of a research institute are speeding up the manufacture of big-hole drilling machine which can heighten the tunneling speed 1.3 times.They are intensifying the research with priority given to raising the tunneling record and making the work of coal miners easy.At present, the designing of machines has been completed in the main and the preparations for their manufacture are underway.The ministry puts efforts into introducing a multi-functional inertia-type loading means of delivery.Their introduction into various coal mines shows a remarkable increase in mining rate. text: True to the Party’s stockbreeding policy, hot winds of stockbreeding are flaring up not only in professional livestock farming bases like the livestock farming base in the Sepho area but also in other cooperative farms, factories and enterprises.Families also take an active part in raising grass-eating domestic animals. As a result, their number is on steady increase.Livestock farming units should secure disinfectants and therapeutic agents and apparatuses in time in close liaison with the concerned units and at the same time manufacture veterinary agents with herbs on their own.They should strictly limit entrance of outsiders and check the outbreak of diseases and make no concession in anti-epizootic work.They should raise grass-eating domestic animals on a large scale by exchanging and sharing good experiences in the anti-epizootic work to actively contribute to improving the people’s living standard.Kim Song Chol True to the Party’s stockbreeding policy, hot winds of stockbreeding are flaring up not only in professional livestock farming bases like the livestock farming base in the Sepho area but also in other cooperative farms, factories and enterprises.Families also take an active part in raising grass-eating domestic animals. text: A Japan-DPRK friendship new spring meeting took place in Japan to celebrate the Day of the Shining Star (birth anniversary of Chairman Kim Jong Il).Present at the meeting were Japanese personages of various strata including Fumihiro Himori, chairman of the Japan Committee for Supporting the Independent and Peaceful Reunification of Korea, and Nam Sung U, vice-chairman of the Central Standing Committee of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon), So Chung On, director of its Department for International Affairs and Reunification, officials of Chongryon in Kanto area and others.Speeches were made there.Fumihiro Himori referred to the fact that the 5th Plenary Meeting of the 7th Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea set the economic front as the key front in an offensive for making a breakthrough head-on.He appealed for further boosting the Japan-DPRK friendship to support the offensive launched by the DPRK, saying that the DPRK expressed its will to stand against the hostile forces' sanctions and stifling moves head-on with the single-hearted unity of the people in order to build a wealthy country.Rodong Sinmun A Japan-DPRK friendship text: Kim Jae Ryong, member of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, member of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and premier of the Cabinet, inspected various sectors of the national economy.Learning in detail about the state of Unryul and Jaeryong mines, he underscored the need to tap all their production potentials and properly organize their operation in a creative manner.At the Ryongnam Dockyard, he took measures for letting relevant units give precedence to providing products under contract and supplying electricity and materials in time and positively introducing and generalizing advanced scientific and technical achievements.Walking round the Pyongyang Coal-mining Machine Factory and the Sunchon Engine Factory, he stressed the need to meticulously carry out their operation and management, boost up the production of new items of products and put spurs to the development of products urgently needed in different sectors of the national economy.The field consultative meetings discussed such issues as applying proper methods of business administration suitable for practical conditions, revitalizing the production, improving the quality of products and encouraging cooperation among economic sectors. text: Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the WPK, inspected the Sariwon Organic Compound Fertilizer Factory and the Nampho Medical Appliances Factory.Going round the production process of humic acid compound fertilizer newly set up at the Sariwon Organic Compound Fertilizer Factory, he stressed the need to positively introduce advanced science and technology and take measures for supplying raw materials, so as to boost the production of fertilizer conducive to the growth of crops and higher yield.At the Nampho Medical Appliances Factory, he stressed the importance of such issues as pushing ahead with the updating of the factory and increasing the production of goods on the principle of giving priority to quality over quantity. text: More than 3 000 hectares of orchard were newly created in Pukchong County of South Hamgyong Province, a famous fruit producing center of the DPRK.Every year the county has planted high-yielding fruit trees on several hundred hectares of area, set up concrete props and established an irrigation system to significantly greet the 75th anniversary of the Workers’ Party of Korea. It also increased the fertility of orchard by applying tens of thousands of tons of organic fertilizer annually.And it has produced hundreds of thousands of fruit saplings every year at the newly arranged tree nursery covering one hundred hectares as well as at tree nurseries of its fruit farms.President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il visited the county on several occasions and indicated the way for developing the fruit farming of the country.The county, with natural and geographical conditions favorable for fruit farming, firm material and technical foundations and rich experiences and tradition, is turning into a leading modern and large-scale fruit producing center of the country under the plan of the WPK.Rodong Sinmun More than 3 000 hectares of orchard were newly created in Pukchong County of South Hamgyong Province, a famous fruit producing center of the DPRK.Every year the county has planted high-yielding fruit trees on several hundred hectares of area, set up concrete props and established an irrigation system to significantly greet the 75th anniversary of the Workers’ Party of Korea. text: A project of setting up a new irrigation network to pump the water of the River Taedong into the reservoir for this year’s farming is in full swing in Unryul County.Having turned out as one in laying the foundation for agricultural production free from any crop failure, its officials and working people installed several pumping stations after removing tens of thousands of cubic meters of earth and digging a waterway of kilometers along a mountain foot in a short span of time.They also finished projects of laying an underground ditch and other structures and are speeding up the assemblage of iron pipes.Drivers focused on ensuring the full operation of excavators and trucks, thereby contributing a large share to finishing the major waterway in a month.Officials and working people of the Unryul Mine actively supported the irrigation work. They volunteered to manufacture iron pipes needed for this project in a short period.Besides, they pushed vigorously ahead with the assemblage of those pipes, with their attention focused on ensuring quality.When a new irrigation network is established with the completion of the irrigation project, many farms of the county can be sufficiently provided with irrigation water.In addition, the length of the waterway will be much shortened, loss of water through leakage be prevented and, as a result, the reservoir will be filled with much water within a short time.Jong Yong Chol A project of setting up a new irrigation network to pump the water of the River Taedong into the reservoir for this year’s farming is in full swing in Unryul County.Having turned out as one in laying the foundation for agricultural production free from any crop failure, its officials and working people installed several pumping stations after removing tens of thousands of cubic meters of earth and digging a waterway of kilometers along a mountain foot in a short span of time.They also finished projects of laying an underground ditch and other structures and are speeding up the assemblage of iron pipes.Drivers focused on ensuring the full operation of excavators and trucks, thereby contributing a large share to finishing the major waterway in a month.Officials and working people of the Unryul Mine actively supported the irrigation work. text: Situated 30-odd ri away from the township of Sijung County is the Yaksaemgol Branch of the county’s Yaksaem Higher Technical Middle School.Five students attend this branch school at present. It is said that more than 100 students have so far graduated from this branch school.Among those graduates are officers of the Korean People’s Army and university graduates as well.The branch school is equipped with plenty of conditions for education.Officials of the county provided this branch school with fixtures needed for education and always pay deep attention to the study and after-school activities of those five students though they are busy with the affairs of the county as a whole.A teacher of the branch school said as follows:“I am in charge of no more than five students. However, they, like others in the country, enjoy benefits of the socialist education system. My 10-odd-year career as a teacher has helped me more deeply realize the loving care shown by our Party for the rising generations. ”Indeed, our younger generation is growing up happily under the warm loving care of the Party that reaches everywhere of the country, urban and rural areas and the remote mountainous regions.Song Chol Situated 30-odd ri away from the township of Sijung County is the Yaksaemgol Branch of the county’s Yaksaem Higher Technical Middle School.Five students attend this branch school at present. text: More than 260 art works have been additionally preserved at the Korean Art Gallery in Pyongyang as national treasures since Juche 101 (2012).Those works were highly appraised at large-scale art shows and festivals.Among them are Korean painting showing the images of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il “For Turning the Land of Liberated Country into Greenery”, oil painting “The General and Paektu Youths” and Korean paintings “Laudable Daughters of Juche Korea” and “We Are the Happiest in the World”.Noticeable is the fact that most of them were produced by artists in thirties and forties.40-odd pieces of those new works including Korean paintings “Sacred Land of Paektu”, “Pine, the National Tree of the DPRK” and “City of History”, oil paintings “Patriotic Mind” and “Girl Mother”, and a wood sculpture “Buzzing Sound of Masik Pass” are now exhibited at the gallery.Rodong Sinmun More than 260 art works have been additionally preserved at the Korean Art Gallery in text: The number of high-yielding sub-workteams is on steady increase.According to the data available, more than 15 500 high-yielding sub-workteams were produced across the country last year. Among them are Sub-workteam No. 1 of the 9th Work-team of the Yoldusamchon Farm of Sukchon County, Sub-workteam No.4 of the 1st work-team of the Taean Co-op Farm of Taegwan County, and Sub-workteam No.1 of the 4th Work-team of Ingye Co-op Farm of Hoeryong City.This is over 2.1 times more than that of the previous year.This is the fruition of the go-ahead working manner displayed by the officials of all cities and counties who have channeled big efforts into strengthening sub-workteams, upholding the Party’s intention.Jang Un Yong The number of high-yielding sub-workteams is on steady increase.According to the data available, more than 15 500 high-yielding sub-workteams were produced across the country last year. text: According to the south Korean newspaper Nodong and Segye, the Pusan Joint Action for Scrapping "Security Law" held a press conference at the plaza of the Pusan City Office on April 1 in demand of the abrogation of the "security law".Speakers said that the "United Future Party", the "Kukmin Party" and other political party oppose the abrogation of the "Security Law".The organization said in a press release that the "security law" is the worst evil law to be scrapped as it has been used as a tool of regimes to execute and imprison a lot of people for more than 70 years.The press release said that the organization will support the political party which promises the abrogation of the "Security Law" and to this end keep on fight.Rodong Sinmun According to the south Korean newspaper text: The Soju Rabbit Breeding Stock Farm of Jongju City established a strict anti-epizootic system and prevents rabbits from diseases with self-produced veterinary medicines.Informing breeders in detail of issues propping up in the rabbit breeding, officials of the stock farm rooted out sources of various diseases in time through scientific breeding.This brought about the improvement in anti-epizootic work, markedly reduced the death rate and largely raised the number of leverets.The Jongmun Higher Middle School of Sinuiju City takes thorough anti-epizootic measures for breeding rabbits.It built a rabbit corral with an open-air rabbit pen, a breeding rabbit pen, an epizootic prevention center, etc. and focused efforts on securing breeding rabbits.Thus, they laid the foundation for producing many leverets by securing 100-odd breeding rabbits in a short span of time.It also frequently sterilized rabbit pens and, in a close combination with related units, it vaccinated the rabbits 2-3 times a year. text: Soldier-builders of the Guards Hero Brigade and the builders of the Eighth Construction Bureau are waging a vigorous struggle to realize the noble will of the Workers’ Party of Korea on building the Pyongyang General Hospital for the people on a modern basis at an early date.The building units made open caissons and drew water out of them with pumps while pushing ahead with the drilling work without letup. In addition, they massed heavy machines on the spot and removed earth in a three-dimensional and blitz war way, creating a surprising speed in it.Thus, earth of hundreds of thousands of cubic meters was excavated in a little more than 20 days.Not content with this, they are making continuous successes in the foundation concrete tamping every day.Geared like cogwheels in time are all working processes including steel and frame work and transportation of concrete mixture. Especially, foremost importance is given to ensuring quality on the principle of taking responsibility for the safety of the projects and guaranteeing their absolute quality for eternity. text: The Swiss Organizing Committee for the International Festival in Praise of the Great Persons of Mt Paektu, the Switzerland-Korea Committee and the Swiss Group for the Study of the Juche Idea issued a joint statement on April 3 on the occasion of the 27th anniversary of Leader Kim Jong Il's election as chairman of the DPRK National Defence Commission.The statement said that Kim Jong Il consolidated the country's defence capabilities in every way, frustrating the frantic moves of the hostile forces to bring the DPRK down with the treasured sword of Songun. text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, sent a message of greeting to Bashar Al-Assad, president of the Syrian Arab Republic, on April 17.The message extended warm congratulations to the president, government and people of Syria on behalf of the DPRK government and people on the occasion of the 74th anniversary of its independence, a significant national holiday of the Syrian people.The message said that the people of the DPRK are sincerely pleased to see the friendly Syrian people making great progress in accomplishing the cause of justice for defending the country's sovereignty and territorial integrity, peace and security under the correct leadership of the president, and wholeheartedly wish them bigger success in their future work for the country's reconstruction and independent development.It expressed the belief that the good friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries with long history and text: Hamhung City has recently built a new slag processing factory with a production capacity of tens of thousands of tons that will help solve the fuel problem of its residents.It closely cooperated with scientists and technicians to solve on its own the problem of binding agent and combustion additive urgently needed for recycling slags for residents’ fuel.Covering a total floor space of thousands of square meters, the factory is a labor- and land-saving one equipped with the main production building and cultural and welfare facilities. text: The national technical innovation competition among April 15 technical innovation shock brigades in the major industrial fields of the national economy has become more and more brisk since it started early in February.This competition is mainly aimed at making the metallurgical, chemical, electric-power, coal-mining, machine-building and other major industrial fields of the national economy overcome all the difficulties with a mass-based technical innovation drive and bring about practical upswings in production this year, the first year of the offensive for a frontal attack, thus more significantly greeting the 75th founding anniversary of the Workers’ Party of Korea.Party organizations and officials of many participating units are successfully reinforcing the April 15 technical innovation shock brigades, rousing the spiritual strength of the shock brigade members in various forms of agitprop and supplying raw and other materials needed for the fulfillment of technical innovation tasks by tapping and enlisting latent reserves.The achievements made by those units taking the lead in fulfilling monthly and quarterly technical innovation goals show that the greatest reserve for increased production lies in technical innovation and that success in the technical innovation bears upon how the enthusiasm and creative ingenuity of the masses are given full text: Officials and builders of the South Hwanghae Provincial General Tideland Reclamation Enterprise are hastening the reclamation of the Ryongmaedo Tideland.Since the beginning of this year, they have so far reinforced the tide embankments of thousands of meters in areas No. 3 and 4 and covered tide embankments of nearly 100,000㎡ with stones.This achievement is unthinkable apart from the pushing work attitude of the officials of the enterprise who make plans in a bold manner and carry them out with an innovative insight.One can make achievements when one plans with an innovative insight free from the existing concept and breaks through difficulties and hardships frontally.This is the experience gained by the officials of the enterprise. text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea and chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, received a verbal message from Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and president of the People's Republic of China, in reply to his verbal message to the latter over the achievements made by the party and people of China in their efforts to fight the pandemic.Xi Jinping in his message said that he received with pleasure the warm and friendly verbal message from the chairman of the WPK, stressing that it fully showed the deep feelings of Chairman Kim Jong Un, and the Party, government and people of the DPRK toward himself, and the party, government and people of China, and greatly displayed the solid foundation of the traditional China-DPRK friendship and its tremendous vitality.Xi Jinping said that he has intent to propel the steady advance and development of China-DPRK relations in the new era and to actively contribute to the regional peace, development and prosperity by thoroughly carrying out important agreements, strengthening strategic communications and intensifying exchange and cooperation between the two parties and the two countries. text: According to the south Korean internet paper Jaju Sibo, the People's Party of south Korea on May 14 held a press conference outside the building of the Supreme Court in demand of the eradication of judicial evils and abrogation of the "Security Law (SL)".Speakers said that the Supreme Court gave jail sentence and suspension of qualification to three members of the party for singing popular songs in violation of the SL.The sentence betrayed the fact that the judicial evil forces still assume the rein of the Supreme Court, they pointed out.They vowed to struggle until deep-rooted judicial evils are liquidated and the SL is abrogated.On the same day, the People's Sovereignty Solidarity made public a statement criticizing the judicial authorities for their fascist atrocities and text: The founding day of the Korean People's Revolutionary Army (KPRA) has been instituted as a national holiday in the DPRK. April 25, Juche 21 (1932) was the day when President Kim Il Sung founded the KPRA, the first revolutionary armed forces of Juche in the country. With the foundation of the KPRA, the Korean people came to have the genuine revolutionary army led by an outstanding leader for the first time in history and this marked the start of the glorious history of the Korean revolution in which the imperialist aggression forces were repelled and the sovereignty and dignity of the nation staunchly championed. In order to meaningfully celebrate the founding day of the KPRA, April 25 every year has been instituted as a national holiday. A decree of the Presidium of the Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK on it was promulgated on May 20. Rodong Sinmun
title: Founding Day of KPRA Set as National Holiday

text: To educate the younger generation in a revolutionary way is an undertaking of great importance directly linked to the victorious advance of Juche revolution. text: Taedonggang beer is one of the famous products popular among citizens of the DPRK. The beer is mass-produced at the Taedonggang Beer Factory, which brews seven flavors of beer with domestic raw materials suited to the demands of consumers. A computer integrated manufacturing was established at the factory with an annual production capacity of tens of thousands of tons. Chairman Kim Jong Il visited the factory in June Juche 91(2002), stressing the need to steadily work on researches so as to produce best Korean-style beer with unique taste. The factory has all the necessary conditions for acquiring the advanced internal and external sci-tech data, and its employees have taken an active part in inventing new technologies. Nearly 1 500 technical innovations were applied to the production in the last 10-odd years and more than 200 employees won certificates of inventions last year alone. Thanks to the sustained efforts of its employees, the factory’s products obtained the Dec. 15 Quality Medal which is awarded to the best domestic products. Foreigners from various countries including China, Russia, Germany, Switzerland and the United Kingdom expressed their admiration at Taedonggang beer. text: Many textile mill workers have finished their yearly economic plan in the DPRK. According to statistics, a hundred and dozens of workers have carried out their yearly economic plans ahead of schedule by early July. More than 30 workers of the Pyongyang Kim Jong Suk Textile Mill have finished their yearly economic plans. With increased textile machines and amid a hot wind of collective emulation, 18 workers of the September Textile Mill have implemented their yearly economic plans. And the number of such workers is on the increase. 21 workers of the Sinuiju Textile Mill, 43 of the Sariwon Textile Mill, 28 of the Kusong Textile Mill and 20 of the Hamhung Woolen Mill have carried out their yearly economic plans. Getting stronger is enthusiasm of the workers in the field of textile industry to glorify the 75th anniversary of the Workers' Party of Korea with proud successes. Rodong Sinmun
title: Many Textile Mill Workers Finish Yearly Economic Plan in DPRK

text: In the DPRK, preferential treatment has been offered to war veterans under the loving care of the peerlessly great men. It is well evidenced by the front-line rest home and sanatorium for them. During the Fatherland Liberation War, President Kim II Sung came to be told by an officer of the Korean People's Army about the outbreak of night blindness among servicepersons on the front. Worrying about their health, he saw to it that a front-line rest home was established, saying that nothing should be spared for the servicepersons. Later, he went to the front-line rest home to learn about their living conditions and took a measure to provide them with necessities on a regular basis. Such loving care served as a source of strength for the KPA servicepersons, who had displayed matchless braveness and popular heroism to win the war. Regarding the war veterans as the treasure of the country, Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un made it sure that sanatoriums for them were built at scenic spots of every province in the country. The war veterans are now enjoying a happy life under the deep care of the Workers' Party of Korea. Rodong Sinmun
title: Loving Care Shown for War Veterans

text: Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and vice-chairman of the C.C., WPK, inspected several units in Nampho City. He learnt about the anti-epidemic work at Nampho Port. He called on officials to ensure unity of thinking and action to meet the requirement of the maximum emergency system true to the idea put forth at the emergency enlarged meeting of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and more strictly abide by the anti-epidemic regulations in harbor work to thoroughly check the inroad of the malignant pandemic. Making round of several production fields of the Taean Heavy Machine Complex, he stressed the need for the officials and working class to be well aware of their mission and duty in order to ensure good timing between processes for manufacturing custom-built equipment needed for various sectors of national economy and ensure high-level accuracy in processing equipment. At the Nampho Taegyong Fishery Station and the Ryongnam Dockyard, he called for building the self-propelled dredger to meet the scientific and technological needs and producing the equipment as befitting managers, and underlined the importance for the Party organizations to enhance their role in arousing the masses to produce parts necessary for repairing ships on their own. Rodong Sinmun
title: Pak Pong Ju Inspects Several Units in Nampho City

text: Our Party recently held an emergency enlarged meeting of the Political Bureau of its Central Committee in connection with a dangerous situation in Kaesong City. In the meeting it adopted a decision on shifting from the state emergency anti-epidemic system to the maximum emergency system. It declared a state of emergency in the city before shifting from the state emergency anti-epidemic system to the maximum emergency system, and issued a top-class alert as regards an uncertain result from the medical test of a defector to the south, who recently returned home illegally, that suspects him of being infected with COVID-19. It is important for all the people to cope with the present critical situation in a single mind in order to ensure that all the measures taken by our Party and state prove effective. Although the Party and the state established a strict and flawless anti-epidemic measure, its vitality cannot be displayed if officials and other people who are obliged to carry out and observe it get slack even a moment. Success in the anti-epidemic struggle under the maximum emergency system totally depends on the people’s standpoint and readiness towards it. The worst enemy in overcoming the current crisis in the anti-epidemic work is slackness. The work for preventing the spread of the malignant virus is not the one confined to an individual but an important one directly linked with the security of society, the collective and the state and the lives of the people. The man, who keeps himself alert in his work while always considering whether there is a gap in the work for preventing the worldwide pandemic and whether he deals with this matter carelessly, will never do anything running counter to the Party’s intention. Kim Pyong Jin
title: Maximum Emergency System Requires High Vigilance and Strict Observance

text: The Rason area in northeastern part of the DPRK has diverse and rich ecosystem. In the area there are Rason Migratory Bird Reserve of national and international significance, Alsom Seabird Breeding Reserve and Uam Northern Fur Seal Reserve. The Rason Migratory Bird Reserve covering an area of more than 3 200 hectares in Tuman River estuary is comprised of various wetland types such as Manpho, Tongbonpho and Sobonpho lakes, mudflats, reedbeds, rice paddy fields, estuary, delta area, etc. It was inscribed on the list of wetlands of international importance (Ramsar site) in Juche 107 (2018). Until now, more than 40 000 water-birds in 228 species have been observed in the reserve. Among them are 12 200 Eurasian Wigeon, 6 500 Anas platyrhynchos (mallard) and 4 650 Aythya fuligula (tufted duck), almost 2 percent of East Asian population, 3 100 falcated ducks (Anas falcata), more than 3 percent of global population, over 100 mute swans, 7 percent of the estimated flyway population of this species, and more than 290 Temminck’s Cormorants. Besides, 1 990 long-tailed ducks that have been found to be vulnerable species and more than 200 far eastern curlews, a globally endangered species, were observed. The Alsom Seabird Breeding Reserve has been a breeding and feeding ground for several tens of seabird species. Sea in waters off Uam, a roost of spotted seals and northern fur seals is a national reserve for northern fur seals. In the peaceful woods, crystal-clear lakes, mudflats and the vast area of sea off Rason, one can enjoy biological diversity including wild animals like Roe Deer, Red Fox, Eurasian Red Squirrel, Manchurian Chipmunk and Leopard Cat, different species of insects, aquatic animals and plants. Rodong Sinmun
title: Rason Area with Diverse Ecosystem

text: Five years has passed since the modern Pyongyang Old People's Home was built on the picturesque bank of the Taedong River in the DPRK on August 7, Juche 104 (2015). At the home, health-seekers are spending their remaining years in comfort under the policy of the Workers' Party of Korea for the care of the elderly. The home is provided with foodstuff, medicines, clothes, etc, under the state supply system. And famous hospitals, including Ryugyong Dental Hospital, Ryugyong General Ophthalmic Hospital, Kim Man Yu Hospital and Pyongyang Maternity Hospital, are in charge of the inmates' health. There are several hundred fruit trees like apple, jujube, persimmon and vine around the home and its inmates are fond of gardening. They say that they are the happiest old people in the world as they have nothing to worry about under the loving care of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un. Rodong Sinmun
title: Health-seekers Lead Happy Life at Home for Aged

text: Aid People in Taechong-ri, Unpha County Departments of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and families of officials of its headquarters sincerely aided the residents in Taechong-ri, Unpha County, North Hwanghae Province who suffered by the flood. True to the noble intention of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un who sets it as the revolutionary traits of our Party to make selfless and devoted service for the good of the people, the officials of the Party Central Committee and families of officials of its headquarters provided lots of materials for the earlier stabilization of the living of the inhabitants in the damaged area. Trucks loaded with the essential materials arrived at the county seat in the afternoon on Monday. Ho Chol Man, Ro Kwang Sop, O Il Jong and other cadres of the Party Central Committee handed over the aid materials to the officials and residents in the county and ri. After receiving foodstuff, quilts, blankets, daily necessities, medicines and other materials, the residents expressed their true feelings that our Party is the best in the world as it warmly takes care of all sons and daughters on this land. The officials of the Party Central Committee met the officials of the county and ri and asked them to fully discharge their responsibility and role as faithful servants of the people in the work of stabilizing the living of the inhabitants as early as possible and recovering from damage. Learning about the living conditions of the people in the damaged area, the officials of the Party Central Committee encouraged them to proudly build their villages as socialist ideal land. Saying that they would give pleasure to the Party with the proud success of high yield of crops with the boundless pride of always living and working under the warm care of the Party, the inhabitants of Taechong-ri expressed their hope that the Supreme Leader would not worry about the ri anymore. Rodong Sinmun
title: Officials of WPK Central Committee and Their Families

text: The 16th meeting of the Political Bureau of the 7th Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) took place at the office building of the Central Committee of the WPK on August 13. Kim Jong Un, chairman of the WPK, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, was present at the meeting. Attending the meeting were members of the Presidium and members and alternate members of the Political Bureau of the WPK Central Committee. Present there as observers were directors, first vice directors and vice directors of departments of the WPK Central Committee, vice-premiers of the Cabinet, ministers, chairpersons of provincial Party committees, chairpersons of Party committees of ministries and national institutions, commanding officers of the armed forces organs and members of the Central Emergency Anti-epidemic Headquarters. Upon authorization of the Political Bureau of the C.C., WPK, Supreme Leader of the Party, the state and the armed forces Kim Jong Un presided over the meeting. The meeting discussed and decided on the issues of eradicating the flood damage and providing stable living conditions to the people as early as possible by concentrating all efforts, and on further strictly maintaining the state emergency anti-epidemic system in the face of the worldwide public health crisis, perfecting the regular commanding system for anti-epidemic work, on lifting a lock-down of the frontline area including Kaesong City, and on organizing a new department in the Party Central Committee, and examined the state event preparations for marking the 75th Party founding anniversary with splendor, before studying and discussing relevant measures. There was a briefing on the damage by the recent disastrous heavy rains and floods. During the rainy season 39 296 hectares of crops were damaged nationwide including Kangwon, North and South Hwanghae Provinces and Kaesong City, at least 16 680 dwelling houses and over 630 public buildings were destroyed or inundated, lots of roads, bridges and railway sections broken, a dam of a power station gave way and there were other severe damage in various sectors of the national economy. A particular mention was made of the fact that inhabitants in the areas with severe damage including Kimhwa, Cholwon, Hoeyang and Changdo counties in Kangwon Province and Unpha and Jangphung counties in North Hwanghae Province are living in the evacuated areas, undergoing great pain in their living. Briefing on a general situation of flood damage, the Supreme Leader said that the flood-stricken people must be suffering great as they are living in temporary dwelling places with their houses and family properties lost. He earnestly said that it is a crucial time that our Party must be responsible for their living and we have to go closer to them to share the pain with them and to relieve them of their sufferings. Our state faces two challenges: anti-epidemic work to thoroughly cope with the world public health crisis and unexpected sudden natural disaster, he said, pointing out that our Party and the government must set forth correct policy direction to overcome these two crises at the same time and display excellent leadership arts in the three-dimensional and offensive campaign. Stressing the need to rapidly organize and take all necessary measures no matter how long the state emergency anti-epidemic work may last and how many
title: 16th Meeting of Political Bureau of 7th Central Committee of WPK Held

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission (SAC) of the DPRK, relieved the premier of the DPRK Cabinet of his post and appointed new premier. A decree of the SAC on it was made public on August 13, Juche 109(2020). Kim Jae Ryong was relieved from the premiership of the DPRK Cabinet and Kim Tok Hun appointed as new premier, according to the decree.
title: New Premier of DPRK Cabinet Appointed

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, received a message of greeting from Raul Castro Ruz, first secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of Cuba, and Miguel Mario Diaz-Canel Bermudez, president of the Republic of Cuba, Saturday. The message sent the most heartfelt congratulations to Kim Jong Un in the names of the Communist Party, government and people of Cuba on the occasion of the 60th anniversary of the establishment of diplomatic relations between the DPRK and the Republic of Cuba. The Cuban leaders in their message said that availing themselves of the opportunity, they confirm once again that Cuba attaches top priority to the bonds of friendship and cooperation between the two countries based on the special ties between preceding leaders Comrade Fidel Castro Ruz and Comrade Kim Il Sung. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Receives Greetings from Cuban Leaders

text: Foreign Personages and Organizations Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un received messages of greeting and congratulatory letters from foreign personages and organizations on the occasion of the 75th anniversary of Korea's liberation. They included the general chairman and the secretary general of the National Guidance Council of the Pioneer Party of Indonesia, the general chairwoman and the secretary general of the Central Directive Council of the Indonesian Democratic Party of Struggle, the chairman of the Socialist Party of Romania, the chairman of the Supreme Council of the National Socialist Party of Romania, the chairman of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of the Russian Federation, the chairwoman of the Party for Peace and Unity of Russia, the chairman of the National Salvation Front of Russia, the chairman of the Central Committee of the Communist Party (Russian Communists), the chairman of the Hungarian Workers' Party, and the general secretary and the international secretary of the Central Committee of the New Yugoslav Communist Party. Among them are also the international secretary of the Serbian Communist Party, the president of the International Group of Italy, the chairman of the Afro-Asian People's Solidarity Organization, the vice-director general of the International Institute of the Juche Idea, the head of the Orchestra of the 21st Century of Russia and other high-ranking personages of political, public and economic circles and representatives of organizations for the study of the Juche idea, organizations supporting Korea's reunification and friendship organizations in China, Russia, Nepal, Cambodia, Philippine, Turkey, India, Japan, Germany, Romania, Bulgaria, Belarus, Switzerland, Sweden, Slovenia, the Czech Republic, Poland, UK, Austria, Spain, South Africa, Ethiopia, Brazil, Venezuela, Peru, Ecuador, New Zealand and Australia. Meanwhile, the general secretary and the international secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of Venezuela sent messages of greeting to the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. Rodong Sinmun
title: Greetings and Congratulatory Letters to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from

text: Situated in the Rangnim Mountains Mt Oga is a nature reserve, a national treasure of our country. It boasts a pass crossed by President Kim Il Sung when he travelled quite a distance to study in Korea and did that again a few years after to liberate it from Japanese colonial rule. The officials and employees of the Ogasan Nature Reserve Management Station newly built a faunal and floral exhibition hall with a total floor space of 300-odd square meters to take better care of their nature reserve and show the natural scenery of the mountain throughout the year. Stuffed bears, badgers, pheasants, heath cocks and other animals as well as more than 800 specimens of plants like a wild insam, an Amur cock, a barrenwort and a rhododendron are displayed at the exhibition hall. There are also a pavilion and a resting place round the exhibition hall, where visitors can relax and enjoy the natural scenery of Mt Oga. Jon Myong Il
title: Faunal and Floral Exhibition House Newly Built

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, received a message of greeting from Milo Djukanovic, president of Montenegro, on September 2. The president in the message extended sincere congratulations to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un on behalf of the people of Montenegro and on his own behalf on the occasion of September 9, the national holiday of the DPRK, wholeheartedly wishing the DPRK and its people greater progress and prosperity. The message affirmed that Montenegro would further develop the overall cooperation with the DPRK for guaranteeing prosperity of the two countries and ensuring international peace and stability. Rodong Sinmun
title: Greetings to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from President of Montenegro

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un received a floral basket from Muhammadu Buhari, president of the Federal Republic of Nigeria and commander-in-chief of the Armed Forces, on the occasion of the 72nd anniversary of the founding of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. The floral basket was conveyed to an official concerned by the Nigerian charge d'affaires here on Tuesday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Floral Basket to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from Nigerian President

text: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un received a floral basket and a congratulatory letter from the diplomatic corps here on the occasion of the 72nd anniversary of the founding of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK). Palestinian Ambassador to the DPRK Ismail Ahmed Mohamed Hasan, doyen of the diplomatic corps, handed over the floral basket and the congratulatory letter to DPRK Foreign Minister Ri Son Gwon on Tuesday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Floral Basket and Congratulatory Letter to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from Diplomatic Corps

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK, Friday sent a message of greeting to Bashar Al-Assad, president of the Syrian Arab Republic. Kim Jong Un in the message extended warm congratulations to the president of Syria on his 55th birthday. He said in the message that the Korean people are pleased to see the friendly government and people of Syria have firmly defended the sovereignty and dignity of the country under the correct leadership of their president. The message sincerely wished the Syrian president good health and greater success in his responsible work, expressing the belief that the long-standing friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries would grow stronger in the future. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Sends Greetings to Syrian President

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, received a message of greeting from Al－Sultan Abdullah Riayatuddin Al－Mustafa Billah Shah lbni Al－Marhum Sultan Haji Ahmad Shah Al－Mustain Billah, king of Malaysia, on September 9. The message said: The Raja Permaisuri Agong joins us in extending our sincere felicitations and warmest wishes to Your Excellency as well as to the Government and the citizens of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea on the auspicious occasion of the 72nd anniversary of the Founding of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. Malaysia and the Democratic People's Republic of Korea share a longstanding relation and cooperation in various fields. It is our sincere hope that the ties between our two countries will continue to be consolidated based on the principles of mutual trust, openness and rule of law. On this happy occasion, we would like to extend our best wishes for Your Excellency's good health, as well as for the continued peace, progress and prosperity of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. Rodong Sinmun
title: Greetings to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from Malaysian King

text: The DPRK ambassador presented his credentials to the queen of the Kingdom of Denmark on September 9. DPRK Ambassador Ri Won Guk courteously conveyed warm greetings sent by Kim Jong Un, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, to Queen Margrethe II. The queen expressed her gratitude for it and asked him to convey warm and sincere greetings to Kim Jong Un. The queen said that she hopes everything would go well in the DPRK. Rodong Sinmun
title: DPRK Ambassador Presents His Credentials to Danish Queen

text: The officials of Kyongsong County have bestirred themselves further to hit their grain production target for this year without fail. They have made detailed arrangements to improve the growth of their crops. They got concrete firsthand knowledge of them and held the ensuing virtual meeting in which the problem of draining the inundated fields on a priority basis, top-dressing the leaves of the crops, spraying the crops with germicide, etc, plus various related methods were discussed mainly and detailed work assignments were given to individual farms. At the meeting the special emphasis was placed on ensuring that physical conditions must be afforded to promote the growth of the crops and that satisfactory efforts must be made to the last to increase the output of the crops to the maximum. Consequently, the county hurried to secure liquid nutrients and germicide for its farms so that they could be top-dressed to the leaves of their crops. In the final analysis, the growth of the crops is improved remarkably in the farms of the county. Kim Chol Nam
title: Priority Given to Securing Necessary Materials

text: Personages from all walks of life in different countries visited DPRK missions in their countries in the period between September 7 and 9 on the occasion of the 72nd founding anniversary of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. They laid floral baskets and bunches of flowers before the portraits of smiling President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and art works depicting Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il standing together and paid tribute to them. Among the visitors were the general secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of Bangladesh (Marxist-Leninist), the president of the Bangladesh People's League, the chairman of the Bangladesh-Korea Friendship and Solidarity Committee, the chairman of the Bangladesh Group for the Study of the Songun Policy, the chairman of the Nepal Journalist Association for the Study of the Juche Idea and Songun Politics, the chairman of the Study Forum for Self-Reliance of Nepal, the chairman of the Study and Research Forum of Songun Politics of the National Press Club of Nepal, the chairman of the Nepali Literary Forum for the Study of Songun Politics, the chairman of the International Committee for the Study of Songun Politics for Peaceful Reunification of Korea in Nepal, the chairman of the Nepalese Association for Supporting the Songun Politics, the secretary general of the Nepal-Korea Friendship Association, the chairman of the Mongolia-Korea Friendship Society, the chairman of the Mongolian Mt Paektu Association for Independent Development, the chairman and the executive chairman of the Mongolian Association for the Study of the Juche Idea-Songun Idea, the president of the J. Sambuu Herders Development Fund of Mongolia, a secretary of the Central Council of the Communist Parties-the Communist Party of the Soviet Union, the chief of the Belarusian Group for Solidarity with the DPRK, the vice-director of the International Department of the Democratic Party of Equatorial Guinea, the chairman of the Ethiopian National Committee for the Study of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism and the chairman of the Ethiopian Committee for the Study of the Independent Politics. And the Committee for External Affairs of the Lao People's Revolutionary Party and the Central Committee of the Lao Federation of Trade Unions sent floral baskets to the DPRK mission in Laos. Rodong Sinmun
title: Foreigners Pay Congratulatory Visits to DPRK Missions

text: The steelworkers of the country have stoutly turned out in the production of steel manufactures for the recovery of the flood damage of its areas. The officials and employees of the Steel Works of South Hamgyong Province are no exception to it. They finished producing the steel manufactures needed to repair the flood damage of Kangwon Province. They then proceeded to do that for the flood-torn areas of their province. Their efforts meet with success. The mill workers of the steel works devotedly churn out more rolled steel plates day after day for the flood-torn areas of the country under restoration. Rodong Sinmun
title: Turning Out as One to Increase Iron and Steel Production

text: The officials and members of the Posok Cooperative Farm in Unjon County have striven tenaciously to the last to minimize the damage of their crops and boost their yield. The farmers spray their paddy rice with liquid nutrients and apply germicide to it according to the demand of technology. Meanwhile, they ceaselessly do their utmost to accelerate the growth of the paddy rice. Rodong Sinmun
title: Taking Care of Crop Nutrition to the Last

text: By dint of devoted work the officials and workers of the railway sector and the servicemen of the units of the Korean People’s Army mainly restored railways in the Komdok area and opened them to traffic. The materials for the recovery of the damage of the area were transported by rail as far as the Kumgol Youth Railway Station on September 24 for the first time. The workers and servicemen register success after success in their restoration projects by their united efforts. Rodong Sinmun
title: Railways Repaired in the Main in Komdok Area, Transportation by Train Begins

text: DPRK Ambassador Song Sun Ryong presented his credentials to Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador, president of the United Mexican States, on Sept. 29. Expressing belief that the friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries would develop, the Mexican president hoped the government and people of the DPRK would register great successes in the economic development and the improvement of people's living. Rodong Sinmun
title: DPRK Ambassador Presents Credentials to Mexican President

text: A lighting festival "Wonders of Light-2020" opened here on Tuesday. Watching the festival were delegates to celebrations for the 75th founding anniversary of the Party and viewers. The places around Pyongyang Department Store No. 1 and at the foot of Jangdae Hill were crowded with people who were about to watch the fantastic art of light. At the festival large images were presented on the building wall of the department store with the help of our own 3D multi-media and the multi-channel and multiplex projective technique, leading viewers to ecstasy. Displayed at the avenue of the festival were numbers "2020", "10.10" and "75" which are reflecting the proud history of the Party and the title of "Wonders of Light-2020". Pictures were presented in succession with the marvelous light of various colors and the contrast between light and shade, typically the three-person group sculpture of the Tower of the Juche Idea, the proud visages of the socialist country and the happy life of the Korean people. An ecstasy resulted by light, dimensional and tactile, has revved up the atmosphere of the festival. The art of light moved the viewers as it vividly displayed the pictures of places full of socialist civilization and the monumental edifices as masterpieces with the precision representation of dots and lines with the use of optical characteristic of the wall of the building. Then displayed was the image of fireworks for marking the end of the festival in which light music and the world of marvelous light have formed perfect artistry. The festival will last until October 8. Rodong Sinmun
title: Lighting Festival "Wonders of Light-2020" Begins

text: Svetlana Odintzova, member of the Kim Il Sung-Kim Jong Il Foundation, the Costa Rican Committee for Supporting Korea's Reunification and Jose Francisco Aguilar Bulgarelli, coordinator of the Costa Rica-Korea Institute of Friendship and Culture, sent floral baskets to the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill on the occasion of the 75th founding anniversary of the Workers' Party of Korea. The floral baskets were laid before the statues on Oct. 6 and 7. Rodong Sinmun
title: Floral Baskets to Statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: The people of the natural disaster-stricken areas of Kaesong City and North and South Hwanghae provinces moved to new houses. The residents in the damaged area of Kaesong City moved to new houses built as cultured socialist farm villages. After receiving with great pleasure the report on granting new houses to the residents in the natural disaster-hit area of Kaesong City on the eve of the founding anniversary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un asked officials to convey his hand-written regards to the residents moving to new houses, wishing them happiness. A ceremony for moving to newly-built houses was held on October 9. Attending it were Jang Yong Rok, chairman of the Kaesong City Committee of the WPK, and other officials in the city, the residents in the damaged area and builders. A congratulatory speech was made at the ceremony. A speaker said that Kim Jong Un, who is considerate of the people in the city near the demarcation line before others all the time, acquainted himself with the situation in the city several times and took all measures for pushing ahead with the construction of dwelling houses to be proud of in the world. The speaker noted that no one in the world is as happy as the Korean people as they have the Supreme Leader, who, so pleased with the completion of dwelling houses, sends his wishes for the happiness of those moving to new houses ahead of others, as their father. House licenses were conferred on the residents in the damaged area at the ceremony. Meanwhile, the people in the damaged areas of Unpha, Singye, Phyongsan, Jangphung, Jaeryong and other damaged counties of North and South Hwanghae provinces moved to newly-built houses on the same day. Rodong Sinmun
title: People of Kaesong City, North and South Hwanghae Provinces Move to New Houses

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), received a congratulatory message from Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China, on October 10. The message said: I extend warm congratulations and the best wishes to Comrade Chairman and through you to the Central Committee of the WPK and all members of the WPK and the Korean people on behalf of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and on my own behalf on the occasion of the 75th founding anniversary of the WPK. The WPK with glorious and time-honored revolutionary traditions rallied and led the Korean people, fought bravely and made progress with renewed efforts in its brilliant course of 75 years, thereby realizing the independence of the country and the liberation of the people and making great achievements in accomplishing the socialist cause. In recent years under the reliable leadership of the Central Committee of the WPK headed by Comrade Chairman the Party and people of Korea have put efforts on strengthening the Party building and the economic work, have coped with all sorts of hardships and challenges in single-minded unity and conducted active exchange and cooperation with foreign countries to make a series of important achievements, while making steady advance along the path of socialism. We, as comrades and friends, are greatly pleased over this. I believe that under the reliable leadership of the Central Committee of the WPK led by Comrade Chairman, the Party and people of Korea would continue the courageous and unflinching struggle so as to steadily advance the socialist cause of Korea and greet the 8th Congress of the WPK with victory. The two countries of China and Korea are friendly neighbors which are linked by the same mountain and river and we are both socialist countries led by the communist parties. The traditional China-Korea friendship personally provided and cultivated with much care by the leaders of the elder generations of the two parties and the two countries has taken deep roots and become further stronger and immensely valuable as the days go by. In recent years I had several meetings with Comrade Chairman and reached a series of important common understanding over the consolidation and improvement of the relations between the two parties and the two countries, and opened up the new historic page of the China-Korea relations. Today, there has been a great change unprecedented in 100 years worldwide and the international and regional situations have become complicated and serious amid the spread of COVID-19. We have an intent to successfully defend, consolidate and develop the China-Korea relations together with Korean comrades and propel the long-lasting and stable development of the socialist cause of the two countries and thus provide the two countries and the two peoples with greater happiness and make new and active contributions to realizing the regional peace, stability, development and prosperity. I wish Comrade Chairman good health and success in your work. I hope that the WPK would make ceaseless development and the socialist cause of Korea would prosper. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Receives Congratulatory Message from Xi Jinping

text: The Ryanggang Provincial Committee of the Workers’ Party of Korea energetically encourages the Party members and workers of the province to carry on the 80-day campaign. Now that the officials of the province conduct their political work dynamically at its major production places the way the like is done at the front, the Paektusan Spring Water Factory, a provincial medical oxygen factory and a synthetic stockbreeding center are built full steam at the last stage of their completion. The medium and small power stations of the province actively repair their generating machines and hydraulic structures. Meanwhile, its forestry stations make good arrangements for their winter timber production in real earnest. Rodong Sinmun
title: Masses Actively Inspired to 80-Day Campaign

text: The officials and workers of the domain of the chemical industry have made great strides in their work in step with the 80-day campaign. The workers of the Hungnam Fertilizer Complex and the Namhung Youth Chemical Complex set themselves a definite daily work goal and accelerate their fertilizer production. The workers and management of the February 8 Vinalon Complex have also bestirred themselves. The Myonggan Chemical Factory and the Chongjin and Sinuiju Chemical Fiber mills, too, strive mightily to hit the targets they have set themselves for the 80-day campaign. Rodong Sinmun
title: Determined to Bring About Rapid Development in Chemical Industry

text: 75th Anniversary of WPK as Auspicious All-People Event The Korean Central News Agency released a detailed report on Thursday on the successful celebration of the 75th anniversary of the founding of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) by all the people across the country. The report said that the work has dynamically been pushed forward from the outset of the year to greet the 75th anniversary of the WPK as a genuine holiday for the people and as the revolutionary holiday for cementing the single-minded unity and as a great festival peculiar to socialist Korea from every aspect under the leadership of the Party Central Committee. The 5th Plenary Meeting of the 7th Central Committee of the WPK advanced the great immortal programme for breaking through head-on unprecedented grim difficulties and for opening up the broad avenue toward the victory of the revolutionary cause of Juche, and adopted a decision on celebrating the 75th anniversary of the Party with splendor. Upon the decision of the Plenary Meeting of the WPK Central Committee, all the people and the service personnel of the People's Army turned out toward the October of glory. The all-people general advance was a continuation of courageous head-on breakthrough in which they had to overcome manifold challenges and difficulties from the beginning. The malignant contagious disease that swept the world as a great disaster from the outset of the year has seriously threatened the security of our state and the lives of our people, and a series of harsh natural disasters held us back from making advance. The whole world accepted 2020 as a year of unavoidable disasters and calamities but the Party Central Committee turned the emergency anti-epidemic work and the campaign for recovery from natural disasters into the drive for defending the people, thereby glorifying this year as a year of great struggle and a year of advance and unity for winning miraculous victories by turning adversity into favorable conditions. Since the very beginning of the worldwide contagious disease, we have built high the anti-epidemic wall with preemptive and offensive super-class measures. The might of the great army-people unity has been fully displayed in the sites for rehabilitation from damage hit hard by natural disasters including South and North Hwanghae provinces, Kangwon Province, South and North Hamgyong provinces and Kaesong City. 12 000 Party members from the capital city organized elite divisions and have performed feats in the disaster-stricken areas in South and North Hamgyong provinces, in hearty response to the call of the Party Central Committee. A perfect anti-epidemic system has been maintained and strengthened nationwide and socialist fairyland villages have appeared one after another in the areas that had been hit hard by natural disasters, further highlighting the image of our style socialism. The first gun-report of victory in the head-on breakthrough was made in the construction of the Sunchon Phosphatic Fertilizer Factory which was followed by the heated-up drive of self-reliance and self-prosperity in all fields including the construction sites for the Pyongyang General Hospital, water-way project in South Hwanghae Province and power stations and tideland reclamation sites. Under the outstanding leadership of Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un, the 75th anniversary of the WPK has been celebrated as a grand festival for all the people and a great auspicious event marked by victory and advance, th
title: KCNA Releases a Detailed Report on Grand Celebration of

text: Farms in Ryanggang Province have finished potato harvest. Agricultural officials and workers in the province made a bumper potato harvest despite unfavorable climatic conditions. Organizational and political activities were brisk in the province to make officials and agricultural workers turn out as one in the urgent farm works. The Junghung Farm and others in Samjiyon City waged a socialist emulation among its workteams and sub-workteams and reviewed it in a substantial manner so that farmers fulfilled their daily quotas for potato harvest without fail. Farms in Taehongdan and Paekam counties minimized the decrease of yield by finishing harvest on the typhoon-hit fields first through rational manpower allocation. The province has set a transport timetable to send potatoes quickly to the Samjiyon Potato Farina Production Factory and the Taehongdan County Potato-processing Factory. Rodong Sinmun
title: Farms in Ryanggang Province Finish Potato Harvest

text: Today all the people of the country are greatly interested in and inspired with infinite strength by the news from its flood-ridden areas under reconstruction. Some time ago Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un reportedly visited the flood-wrecked Komdok area and the flood-hit areas of South Hamgyong Province under reconstruction and expressed his great satisfaction at the successes registered by the servicemen of the Korean People’s Army units in their building operations. The people have addressed letters to them from all parts of the country to congratulate them on the successes and inspire them to further efforts. According to an official of the Central Committee of the Socialist Women’s Union of Korea, the day they were informed that Kim Jong Un visited the above areas for firsthand guidance the citizens of Pyongyang had already written more than 50,000 letters to the KPA soldiers who rebuild them and other flood-torn areas of the country. Rodong Sinmun
title: Letters of Support Sent to KPA Soldiers at Reconstruction Sites

text: An apple and pear show took place here on Oct. 20. Displayed in the show were apples and pears of good species produced in fruit farms in Kwail and Pukchong counties, the Kosan Combined Fruit Farm, the Taedonggang Combined Fruit Farm and others in the country. Officials and working people of the farms made a good harvest this year despite unfavorable climatic conditions by taking scientific and technological care of fruit trees. The jury consisted of ordinary people. They tasted apples and pears on display and appreciated their sweetness, sourness, wetness, aroma and solidness. Rodong Sinmun
title: Apple and Pear Show Held

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, received a reply message from Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and president of the People's Republic of China (PRC), on October 24. Xi Jinping in the message expressed his heartfelt thanks to Kim Jong Un for sending a sincere and passionate message of greeting on the occasion of the 71st founding anniversary of the PRC. The message said that the Communist Party of China has united and led the peoples of all the ethnic groups in the country and made strenuous efforts in one mind and with one will for 71 years since the foundation of new China and thus registered great successes attracting the attention of the world. The message noted that they have achieved important strategic successes in a nationwide anti-epidemic struggle, adhering to the principle of attaching importance to the people and their life in the wake of the sudden outbreak of COVID-19 this year. China and the DPRK are the friendly neighbors linked by the same mountain and rivers, and the traditional friendship between the two countries is being further consolidated with the lapse of time, the message said. It said: I and Comrade Chairman have got the relations between the two parties and between the two countries to enter a new historic period through close and deep communication in recent years. The message noted that the world is witnessing the great rapid change unprecedented in 100 years. The message said that they are willing to develop the traditional China-DPRK friendship together with the Korean comrades generation after generation, to provide the two countries and the two peoples with better welfare and to propel the regional peace, stability and development. Recently, the Korean people celebrated the 75th founding anniversary of the WPK with splendor, the message said, adding that the WPK has achieved great successes in the cause of socialist construction by rallying the people and leading them for 75 years. The message expressed the belief that the Korean people would implement a new strategic line and achieve rich successes without fail in the development and construction of the state under the firm leadership of the Central Committee of the WPK led by Kim Jong Un and thus greet the Eighth Congress of the WPK with victory. It wished Kim Jong Un good health, hoping that everything would go well. It also wished the DPRK prosperity and the Korean people happiness and welfare. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Receives Reply Message from President Xi Jinping

text: Streets, promenades along the banks of the Taedong River, the Central Botanical Gardens, parks, places of relaxation, etc are tinged with autumnal tins in Pyongyang. Rodong Sinmun
title: Scenic View of Pyongyang in Autumn

text: The officials and members of the countrywide organizations of the Socialist Women’s Union of Korea have honorably participated in the 80-day campaign and fully demonstrated their great revolutionary spirit and stamina as Korean women. The officials and members of the SWUK’s organizations in Pyongyang energetically conduct their activities in a women’s shock force. The SWUK’s organizations of all levels in North Hamgyong Province attain great results every day in the production of cement blocks and tiles in close liaison with the field headquarters for rebuilding its flood-wrecked areas. The members of the SWUK’s organizations in many cities and counties of South Hamgyong Province responsibly wallpaper the new-built dwellings in their flood-ruined areas and apply coating materials to them of their own choice, thereby doing their share in accelerating their construction. The members of the SWUK’s organizations in North and South Phyongan provinces and Nampho City also work in their production places by the sweat of their brows. The members of the SWUK’s shock force of North Hwanghae Province and the housewives of Kanggye City and Jonchon County, Jagang Province undertake difficult work assignments, demonstrating their collective unity. In addition, the members of the SWUK’s organizations in South Hwanghae Province and Kaesong and Rason cities actively help their cooperative farms in their present work. Rodong Sinmun
title: Active Shock-brigade Movement under Way

text: In many parts of the country officials and workers collected a good deal of scrap iron and sent it to metalworking plants in October. Organs, enterprises and working people’s organizations of various levels in North Phyongan Province and Jagang Province gathered scrap iron over and above their quotas. The officials and workers of Pyongyang, Nampho City and North and South Hwanghae provinces tried their hardest to secure even a kilogram more of scrap iron and lost no time in sending their relevant collection to metalworking plants by motor vehicle. Ministries and national organs without exception join together to vigorously support the steelworks of the country. Rodong Sinmun
title: Strong Support to Iron and Steel Producers

text: The livestock farming base in the Sepho area is quite a picture. This year it boosted its meat output over 4.5 times and produced thousands of tons of milk as against 2016. Moreover, it has established a scientific breeding stock production system to rear good breeds of domestic animals in greater numbers. It has also applied embryo transfer technology, artificial fertilization technology, etc. Consequently, oxen, sheep, goats and other domestic animals have multiplied into hundreds of thousands. Rodong Sinmun
title: Thriving Livestock Farming Base in the Sepho Area

text: Pak Pong Ju, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), vice-chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and vice-chairman of the Central Committee of the WPK, inspected the Kumsong Tractor Factory and the Phyongchon Prefab Factory. Their officials, workers and technicians who are dynamically conducting the 80-day campaign of loyalty for devotedly defending the historic Eighth Congress of the Party are working innovations in carrying out the tasks assigned to them by fully displaying the spirit of self-reliance and fortitude. At the Kumsong Tractor Factory, he acquainted himself with the progress made in its updating project.
