He underscored the need to increase the proportion of locally available materials in construction, ensure speed and quality in the project and push ahead with afforestation and greening at the same time. At the Phyongchon Prefab Factory, he urged its officials, workers and technicians to take technical measures for operating equipment at full capacity and ensure the quality of products, being well aware of the importance of their duty in putting the construction in an industrial and modern basis. The field consultative meetings discussed measures to step up technical updating for increasing the performance of tractors, perfect the production process and boost the production of building parts and elements. Rodong Sinmun
title: Pak Pong Ju Inspects Kumsong Tractor Factory and Phyongchon Prefab Factory

text: DPRK Premier Kim Tok Hun, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, inspected the Sunchon Thermal Power Plant, the Namhung Youth Chemical Complex and the Chongchongang-Phyongnam irrigation waterway construction site. He looked round the turbine shop and integrated power production control room in the thermal power plant, where the workers are increasing production every day in the spirit of overfulfilling the October plan of electricity production in order to brilliantly greet the 8th Congress of the Party. There he discussed the ways to increase power production and urged officials to meticulously organize the management on the socialist economic management principle and the socialist system of responsible business operation. At the gas producer and compressor shop of the Namhung Youth Chemical Complex he called for meticulously organizing the management of equipment to meet the technical rules and standard regulations, and correctly ensuring periodic equipment repairing for fully producing and providing fertilizer. At the waterway construction site he underscored the need to give precedence to supplying materials so as to step up the final-stage task of waterway tunnels and to finish at an early date the setting up of the sluice gate of dam, being well aware of the importance of the waterway construction in carrying out the Party's policy for irrigation in rural areas. The consultative meetings in field called on the officials, scientists and technicians in the fields of power and chemical industries to take scientific and technological measures for putting the production on a normal basis through the introduction and recycling of locally available equipment, raw and other materials, and discussed the issue of qualitatively completing the waterway project. Rodong Sinmun
title: Kim Tok Hun Inspects Various Units of National Economy

text: A good news arrived from the Sangwon Cement Complex, a leading cement producer of the country. From early January 2020 on end it has done all it can to produce as much cement as possible and finally fulfilled its cement production plan for this year till November 4. Without so much as resting on its laurels it still tries its hardest to turn out more cement this year than in its peak production year for cement and goes on with its construction projects to increase its cement production capacity. Rodong Sinmun
title: Sangwon Cement Complex Fulfills Yearly Production Quota

text: The advance in the new century of Juche is continuity of the revolutionary advance pioneered on Mt Paektu. It is important to develop our Party into an invincible guiding force in order to invariably carry forward the history and traditions of our ever-victorious revolution pioneered by President Kim Il Sung and led by Chairman Kim Jong Il. The crucial tasks facing the era and the revolution have been successfully performed by Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un possessed of outstanding political caliber. It is the greatest feat performed by the Supreme Leader for the country and the revolution that he has consolidated the Party organizationally and ideologically and brought about a new turn in the Party building and activities and its overall work with his unexcelled ideological and theoretical wisdom, outstanding guidance and firm faith. He has developed our Party into a body, ideologically pure and organizationally integrated, and this is his immortal Party-building feat. He has also strengthened our Party into the one which achieved the unity of action and laid its rock-solid mass foundation. Today our revolution vigorously advances in the face of the persistent challenges by the hostile forces and severe difficulties. But it is the iron-willed faith of our people that they can overcome any ordeals under the seasoned and tested leadership of the ever-victorious Workers' Party of Korea. Invincible is the cause of the Workers' Party of Korea led by Kim Jong Un. Rodong Sinmun
title: Great Exploits of Developing WPK into Invincible Revolutionary One

text: Cement factories under the control of the Ministry of Construction and Building-materials Industry focus their greater efforts on their increased cement production than ever after they hit their production target for the first month of their 80-day campaign. The officials, workers and technicians of their limekiln, mixed raw materials and other important workshops take scientific care of their machines, dovetail their processes with each other further and amplify cooperation between their shifts. In connection with the units concerned cement workshops repaired and maintained their important machines in a short time so as to boost their production further. The Chonnaeri Cement Factory does its possible for its production. The workers and management of its limestone branch mine register high results in their limestone production day after day. Those of its limestone conveyance and raw materials workshops put their limekiln in full operation to strictly meet the demand of technological rules and standard operation methods. The officials and workers of its limekiln and cement workshops, too, overfulfill their production plan taking good technological care of their machines. Rodong Sinmun
title: Cement Producers Keep Increasing Output

text: The officials and workers of North Hamgyong Province enthusiastically carry on their 80-day campaign to produce the finishing building materials they are assigned to do for the dwellings under construction in its flood-stricken areas. Dictated to, the labor and management of the Chongjin Plastic Pipe Factory speedily manufacture their plastic products of various kinds at the final stage. Those engaged in the sector of city management produced dozens of tons of coating materials for housing construction in a short time. The officials and workers of other units, too, overfulfilled their plans for the production of covering materials in over ten days. The Kyongsong Ceramic Complex had already finished turning out sanitary ware for housing construction in the flood-hit areas. Rodong Sinmun
title: Building Materials for Reconstruction Produced on Top Priority Basis

text: The officials, Party members and workers of North Hwanghae Province built a new energy- and labor-saving cement branch with a production capacity of dozens of thousands of tons on a small piece of land in the Kyongam Cement Factory with their technology for themselves. The result is that another guarantee has been afforded for the economic development of the country and the improvement of the living standard of the people. The officials, workers and technicians of the KCF are now trying hard to put the producer on a surer automatic footing while at the same time rapidly making dynamic preparations to operate it on a full scale. Rodong Sinmun
title: Rising Up with Trust in Their Own Strength

text: For recent several months the quality of more than 70 manufacturing processes and products of over ten kinds was authenticated in nearly 50 units. Besides, products of about 60 sorts of 10-odd units were inscribed as the February 2 Product. The quality control system for manufacturing processes was authenticated in the units of construction and building materials industry, light industry, the electronic industry and many other units. The foodstuff safety control system for tens of manufacturing processes was also authenticated in many foodstuff producers which have carefully controlled the quality and sanitary safety of their products. The factories and enterprises throughout the country went out to produce their goods like the excellent February 2 Product. Rodong Sinmun
title: Fruition of Dynamic Socialist Emulation

text: In Jagang Province a provincial art theatre is near completion on the shore of the picturesque Jangja River. It has a seating capacity of over 1,500, an elevator-style stage, a movable stage, a central hall, etc. It also boasts training rooms for vocalists, instrumentalists and dancers, a makeup room and so on. They will actively help toward the satisfactory creative activities of its artistes. The shock workers register initiative successes in their construction of the theatre firmly determined to honor the forthcoming 8th WPK Congress with them. Rodong Sinmun
title: Art Theater Built at Final Stage in Jagang Province

text: Officials and workers successfully build the Hungju Youth Power Station No. 5 nearly twice as fast as they did. Consequently, a solid guarantee has been afforded for completing it ahead of set time. They changed the course of the Jangja River in more than 40 days and finished a cofferdam in ten days although this was considered to take them upward of a month. Rodong Sinmun
title: Demonstrating Fighting Spirit of Never Knowing Impossibility

text: The symposium on space science and technology-2020 took place in the DPRK. The symposium was sponsored by the Central Committee of the General Federation of Science and Technology of Korea. The symposium has been held every year to give wide publicity to the scientific and technological successes in the work for carrying out the policy of the Party and the government on aerospace development for peaceful purposes and accelerate the development of space science and technology. Attending it were scientists, technicians, teachers, postgraduate students and officials of scientific and educational organs, ministries and national institutions including Kim Il Sung University, Kim Chaek University of Technology, the State Academy of Sciences and the Ministry of Agriculture. The symposium, divided into the panels of artificial satellite, space observation and basic science, space materials and elements and applied technology, was held in the way of announcing standings after examining some 170 treatises presented by relevant units. Attracting the attention of experts were the achievements helping increase the lifetime of a satellite and its parts and promote its stability and operation accuracy. Highly appreciated at the symposium were the treatises on combination of information from satellites and meteorological observatories as they are conducive to developing agriculture, land and environment protection and other sectors of the national economy. Rodong Sinmun
title: Symposium on Space Science and Technology-2020 Held

text: More than 84,000 civilians, Korean People’s Army officers and men, students and youngsters of over 1,900 organizations nationwide had toured the revolutionary battle sites in and around Mt Paektu from December 2019 till November 2020. In the course of this they fully mastered the revolutionary traditions of our Party and fortified themselves with the anti-Japanese forerunners’ thorough spirit of defending the leader at all costs, ardent patriotism, unyielding faith in victory, iron will and revolutionary optimism further. Rodong Sinmun
title: Iron Will to Creditably Carry on Revolutionary Tradition of Paektu

text: The workers and management of the Jaeryong Mine hit their target for the 80-day campaign by 120% by November 26. They proceed to fulfill their production plan more than 1.5 times every day this month. The Ranam Coal Mining Machine Complex topped its assignments for its 80-day campaign by the end of November. The Mangyongdae Aeguk Aluminum Sash Factory carried out its quotas for its 80-day campaign by 119% by November 15. Rodong Sinmun
title: Achievers of 80-Day Campaign Goal Increase in Number

text: Rason City admirably rebuilt the Huchang Higher Middle School in its Rajin District to meet the demand of the developing times. The school was a one-story building, but the relevant builders rebuilt it into a 2-story one and erected many auxiliary buildings on a high qualitative level. Above all, they built a waterway for more than 100 meters and extended the playground of the school for various sports items with thousands of square meters of the soil which was carried there. The HHMS boasts a biochemical laboratory, a physical laboratory, a foreign languages study room, an information technology study room, a nature room and others. They are fully supplied with various kinds of the experimental apparatus, information appliances and specimens of animals and plants needed to the intellect development and education of the children of the HHMS. It also has an excellent teaching forest and superb open-air study sites. Rodong Sinmun
title: Model School Construction in Rason City

text: Many people visit the Girin Cooperative Farm in Sinhung County to learn how it built its cozy power station. The GCF was seldom known to others several years ago. Two dynamos are in full operation at the power station. Before the construction of its power station the GCF ranked last in the county in setting its tractors and farm machines in motion because it did not process their spare parts satisfactorily for lack of electricity. The labor and management of the GCF decided to build a power station across the upper reaches of a river. It built a waterway for hundreds of meters and erected a building for the power station. It also cut bye-channels, discharge channels, etc. They built an intake tower and others, too, full steam on their own. But the power station failed to produce much electricity at the start. While rectifying the shortcomings of the dynamos one by one they came to firmly believe that they could turn out more electricity than ever when their turbines were remodeled and that the loss of power could be reduced in transmission when the electrical transmission system was set up rationally. They did all they could to improve their power production and transmission. As a result, the power station became able to turn out far more electricity than before and minimize the transmission loss of its electricity. Thanks to the power station, the farm machine repair shop of the GCF is operated at full capacity and the houses of its employees are brightly illuminated. Rodong Sinmun
title: Benefits Gained from Power Station of Their Own Construction

text: The officials, workers and technicians of thermal power stations nationwide overfulfilled their electricity production plans for October and November. This month, too, they turn out more electricity than ever every day in excess of their quotas by dint of hard work. The labor and management of the Pukchang Thermal Power Complex work courageously to increase their electricity production. The workers of the Pyongyang Thermal Power Complex and the Sunchon, East Pyongyang and Chongchongang Thermal Power Stations boost their electricity production by mobilizing their reserves and potentials to the maximum and actively applying valuable technological innovations. Rodong Sinmun
title: Power Generation Plan Topped Day after Day

text: The Huichon Hospital Bed Factory was built in Jagang Province. The completion of a large-capacity medical equipment producer comes to be another success in consolidating the material and technical foundations for the field of public health. Its inaugural ceremony took place on Thursday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Huichon Hospital Bed Factory Inaugurated

text: Staff members of the UN resident coordinator office and missions of UNDP, UNICEF, United Nations Population Fund, FAO, WFP and WHO here visited the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill on Tuesday on the 9th anniversary of the demise of Kim Jong Il. They laid floral baskets before the statues and paid a tribute to them. Rodong Sinmun
title: Floral Baskets Laid before Statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: to Statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il Le Ba Binh, Vietnamese ambassador to the DPRK, and his embassy members visited the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill on Thursday, the 9th anniversary of the demise of Kim Jong Il. They laid a floral basket and made a bow before the statues of the great leaders. Rodong Sinmun
title: Vietnamese Embassy Members Pay Floral Tribute

text: Foreign personages visited the DPRK missions in their countries from December 8 to 17 on the occasion of the 9th anniversary of the demise of Chairman Kim Jong Il. They laid floral baskets, bouquets and flowers before the portraits of smiling President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and art works depicting them standing together and bowed to them. They included the general secretary of the Central Committee of the Nepal Communist Party (Marxist-Leninist) who is ex-deputy prime minister of Nepal and other Nepalese personages, the chairman of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Bangladesh and Bangladeshi personages, the chairman of the Mongolia-Korea Friendship Society and Mongolian personages, the acting general secretary and members of the Democratic Rally of Africa-Democratic Party of Guinea, the vice-director of the International Department of the Democratic Party of Equatorial Guinea and his party, the chairman of the Egypt-Korea Friendship Association, and the chairman of the Permanent Standing Committee of the Belarus National Association of Friends of Korean People Named after Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il. Meanwhile, the director of the Central Secretariat of the Pakistan People's Party sent a bouquet to the DPRK mission in Pakistan on Dec. 15 on the same occasion. Rodong Sinmun
title: Foreign Personages Visit DPRK Missions

text: Fruit growers countrywide could produce more fruits this year than last year by dint of devoted work. In liaison with the units concerned the Central Committee of the Union of Agricultural Workers of Korea analyzed and synthesized the successes and defects of fruit producers in their culture and on this basis, ranked them in the 2020 fruiters’ socialist emulation in terms of their per-hectare fruit yield and its quality and taste. In the emulation large-scale fruit producers called the Kwail and Pukchang Counties and the Kosan and Taedonggang Combined Fruit Farms were classified into the first category and more than 30 fruit farms under the control of the Fruit Culture Department of the Ministry of Agriculture into the second category. The TCFF placed first, KC second and PC third in the first category. The Onchon Fruit Farm placed first, the Toksong Apple Farm second, the Sukchon Youth Fruit Farm third, the Jungsan Youth Fruit Farm fourth and the Kwaksan Fruit Farm fifth in the second category. The rest were ranked to the 32nd place according to their merit. Rodong Sinmun
title: Ranking of Socialist Emulation in Pomicultural Field Rated

text: A joint meeting of chairmen of the Headquarters of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan (Chongryon) and chairpersons of its branches took place at the Korean Hall of Culture in Tokyo on December 12. Attending the meeting were Ho Jong Man, chairman of the Central Standing Committee of Chongryon, Pak Ku Ho, its first vice-chairman, and others. Ho Jong Man made a report. He said that Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un sent a congratulatory message to the Conference of Representatives of Branches of Chongryon. He put emphasis on the important issues arising in embodying the idea of Kim Jong Un's congratulatory message in the work of Chongryon by holding fast to it as an invincible treasured sword and making the whole of Chongryon, all its officials and hard-core masses immediately turn out with resolve in implementing the tasks set forth in the congratulatory message for consolidating the branches of Chongryon. He called for setting the year 2021 as "the one for consolidating the branches of Chongryon" and making the year the first year of the struggle in which the whole association will turn out in fully implementing Kim Jong Un's idea of attaching importance to the branches. Speakers at the meeting vowed to unite as one and develop the branches of Chongryon into patriotic ones, bearing in mind the idea and intention carried in the congratulatory message sent by Kim Jong Un. Rodong Sinmun
title: Chongryon Joint Meeting Held in Japan

text: Kim Jong Un, chairman of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, started his historic report on the work of the 7th Central Committee of the Party at the first-day sitting of the 8th Congress of the WPK. The venue of the congress was full of great excitement of all the participants who would receive the immortal programme for dynamically advancing the socialist cause under the uplifted banner of great Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism and illuminating the broad avenue toward a fresh victory in the Korean revolution. In his report, the Supreme Leader of our Party, state and armed forces generally reviewed the work of the 7th Central Committee of the Party which has dynamically propelled the cause of building Korean-style socialism in the direction of great progress indicated at the 7th Congress of the WPK. He said that he is going to suggest through the report the key line of struggle and strategic and tactical policies for the epochal advance of the socialist construction and other important issues arising in accomplishing the cause of national reunification, promoting external relations and strengthening the work of the Party after strictly reviewing the work of the 7th Central Committee in the aspects of success and mistake. The Supreme Leader reviewed the shining successes achieved by our Party and people in the period under review. He also analyzed the mistakes manifested in the efforts for implementing the 5-year strategy for national economic development and their subjective and objective factors. Underlining the need to start the work for further developing the overall economy of the country under a new five-year plan, the Supreme Leader analyzed the present states of the key industrial sectors including metal, chemical, electricity, coal, machine and mining industries and set forth the tasks for future development. The report continues. Political News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Starts Report on Work of 7th Central Committee of WPK

text: The Central Committee of the Korean Social Democratic Party and the Central Committee of the Chondoist Chongu Party sent congratulatory banners to the 8th Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK). The friendly parties in their congratulatory banners extended the highest glory and warmest congratulations to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un who is leading the cause of the ever-victorious WPK along the road of victory and glory with his outstanding and seasoned leadership on the occasion of the glorious 8th Congress of the WPK. The Central Committee of the Anti-Imperialist National Democratic Front, the Central Standing Committee of the General Association of Korean Residents in Japan and the General Association of Koreans in China also sent the similar banners to the 8th Congress of the WPK. Rodong Sinmun
title: Congratulatory Banners Sent to Eighth Congress of WPK

text: Second-day Sitting of Eighth Congress of WPK Held Amid the elated spirit of the whole country at the news of the opening of the 8th Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), there took place the second-day sitting of the congress on January 6. Kim Jong Un, chairman of the WPK, chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, continued his report on the work of the 7th Central Committee of the WPK following that started at the first-day sitting. Further rising is the enthusiasm of the participants in the congress who are listening to the report on the work of the Party Central Committee which deals with the strategic and tactical policies to bring about another step forward in the course of the overall development of Korean-style socialist construction. The report given at the second-day sitting analyzed the situation of the transport, capital construction and building-materials industry, communications, commerce, land and environment protection, urban management, external economic relations and other major sectors and economic management field, and presented the goals and practical ways for making innovations and development in the relevant fields during a new five-year plan. The report also referred to the solutions to making a tangible turn in improving the people's living standard by achieving planned and continuous growth of production in the fields of agriculture, light industry and fishing industry and by developing cities and counties in an independent and many-sided way. It clarified again an important will to reliably protect the security of the country and people and the peaceful environment of the socialist construction by placing the state defence capabilities on a much higher level, and put forth goals for realizing it. The report also put forward details of important tasks for promoting the sci-tech development of the country. Carefully listening to the report, all the participants are making up their minds to strive for revolutionary work with a new confidence. The report continues. Political News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Continues Report on Work of 7th Central Committee of WPK

text: The labor and management of the Pukchang Area Youth Coal Mining Complex produced a thousand and hundreds of tons more coal over and above their plan by January 5. The Namdok, Hoean, Inpho, Songnam and Phunggok Youth Coal Mines increase the production of their coal in large quantities every day in excess of their plans from the beginning of 2021. The Sunchon Area Youth Coal Mining Complex has so far turned out a thousand and hundreds of tons more coal than it planned to. The officials and workers of the February 8 Jikdong Youth Coal Mine bring about collective innovations in their production. The miners of the Chonsong and Ryongdae Youth Coal Mines are out to raise their coal production overtaking and outstripping each other, learning from each other and exchanging experiences with each other. The Sunchon Coal Mining Machine Factory, the Unsan Plant for the Accessories of Coal-mining Equipment and other auxiliary units exert all their efforts to provide coal mines with equipment, materials and accessories in time so as to contribute to their coal production. Rodong Sinmun
title: Coal Production Increased

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), sent a reply message to Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC), on Tuesday. Kim Jong Un in the message expressed his deep gratitude to Xi Jinping for extending warm and sincere congratulations to him on his assumption of duty as the general secretary of the WPK at its 8th Congress. He said in the message that he and all the members of the WPK were deeply moved by the congratulatory message sent by the CPC Central Committee to the 8th Congress of the WPK earlier than others and the congratulations sent by the general secretary of the CPC Central Committee again to him before any others. He also noted in the message that the heartfelt best wishes offered by the general secretary and the CPC Central Committee serve as great vigor and encouragement and help him harden his determination and will to live up to trust and expectations of all the members of the WPK and other Korean people. He in the message expressed his will to set great store by the comradely friendship with the general secretary of the CPC Central Committee and to exert himself to consolidate the DPRK-China friendship directly linked with the interests of the two parties and the peoples of the two countries and ensure vigorous advance of socialism, the common cause. The message sincerely hoped that the general secretary would achieve greater successes in his responsible work for strengthening the CPC and promoting the realization of socialist modernization in this significant year marking the 100th founding anniversary of the CPC, expressing best wishes for the good health of the general secretary. Rodong Sinmun
title: General Secretary Kim Jong Un Sends Reply Message to General Secretary Xi Jinping

text: The Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) sent a congratulatory message to the 11th Congress of the Lao People's Revolutionary Party (LPRP) on Jan. 13. The WPK Central Committee in its message warmly congratulated the LPRP upon its 11th Congress and, through the congress, extended warm comradely greetings to all its members. It noted that the LPRP has made a big success in national defence and state building by wisely organizing and leading the struggle of all its members and other Lao people for implementing the decision made at its 10th Congress for the past five years. It expressed firm belief that the 11th Congress of the LPRP would serve as a turning point of marking a new milestone in the struggle for further strengthening the leadership role of the party and achieving the prosperity of the country. It sincerely wished the congress big success in its work, expressing conviction that the traditional friendly and cooperative relations between the two parties and two countries put on a higher stage under the deep care of the top leaders of the two countries would grow stronger in the common struggle for accomplishing the cause of socialism. Rodong Sinmun
title: WPK Central Committee Sends Congratulatory Message to 11th Congress of LPRP

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, had a photo session with the delegates to the 8th Congress of the WPK on Thursday. Present there were Choe Ryong Hae, Jo Yong Won, Ri Pyong Chol and Kim Tok Hun, members of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the WPK, and members and alternate members of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the WPK. The delegates were greatly excited and delighted as they had the honor of having a photo taken in presence of the respected General Secretary against the venue of glory where the 8th Congress took place. They recollected with high pride the days of the congress when they elected Kim Jong Un, the symbol of all victories and glory of the Korean people and the outstanding leader of the Juche revolution, as general secretary of the WPK, and received a practical programme for making a radical advance in the development of the Party and the socialist construction. When the General Secretary appeared at the venue of the photo session amid the welcome music, all the delegates broke into stormy cheers of "Hurrah!", extending the highest glory to the General Secretary who glorified the 8th Congress of the WPK as a congress of struggle and progress for improving the leadership and fighting efficiency of our great Party in every way and hastening a new victory of revolution with confidence. He warmly waved back to the delegates filled with fervent enthusiasm and will to remain boundlessly faithful to the Party and the revolution, the country and the people. He posed for a picture with the delegates, expressing belief that they would break through all challenges and obstacles in the advance with the revolutionary spirit of Paektu, the spirit of self-reliance and fully discharge their revolutionary duty in the struggle for implementing the decision made at the 8th Congress of the WPK as the core of the Party and the pioneers of the era, under the uplifted red flag of the Juche-type Party. All the delegates vowed to make a breakthrough in the struggle for the overall development of Korean-style socialism under the blueprint unfolded by the 8th Party Congress, closely rallied around the respected General Secretary. Political News Team
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Has Photo Session with Delegates to 8th Congress of WPK

text: The workers of power stations nationwide have so far produced tens of millions of kilowatt hours more electricity over and above their plan this year. The workers of thermal power stations turn out their electricity on a high normal level. The workers and management of the Pukchang and Pyongyang Thermal Power Complexes make endeavors to produce as much electricity as possible. The workers of the Sunchon, Chongchongang and East Pyongyang Thermal Power Stations register high results in their production, maintaining their equipment technologically with good care. The case is similar to hydroelectric power stations across the country. Thousands of tons of more coal has been produced in excess in the sector of the coal industry since the 8th Congress of the Workers’ Party of Korea began. The labor and management of the Pukchang Area Youth Coal Mining Complex lead their counterparts in the increased production of coal. Many coal mines of the Kujang Area Coal Mining Complex concentrate all their energies on faces with rich coal deposits and favorable mining conditions to augment their output. The workers of the Sunchon Area Youth Coal Mining Complex and the Kaechon Area Coal Mining Complex choose and work out new pit faces on their own initiative and thereby boost their coal production. The officials and workers of the Tokchon and Sunchon Coal Mining Machine Plants and other auxiliary factories turn out spare parts of coal-mining equipment and small tools a lot, filling up the shortage of materials on their own. Rodong Sinmun
title: For Increased Production and Creation

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, received a congratulatory message from V. V. Zhirinovsky, chairman of the Liberal Democratic Party of Russia, on January 11. The chairman in the message extended congratulations to Kim Jong Un upon his election as general secretary of the WPK on behalf of the Liberal Democratic Party of Russia and on his own behalf. The message said that his election by the delegates to its 8th Congress with unanimous approval is a reflection of the fervent aspiration of all the working people of the DPRK who are convinced of the Party leadership of the young and energetic statesman personifying the wisdom of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il, the preceding leaders of the DPRK, and the spirit of the builders of today's socialist Korea. It noted that the 8th Congress of the WPK will be recorded in the history of the DPRK as an important milestone in the course of the development of the DPRK for building socialism peculiar to it on the basis of the Juche idea and the principle of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism. It stressed that the Juche idea definitely proved its creative might in the whole historic course of the DPRK which has developed into an advanced country in the Asia-Pacific region. Wishing Kim Jong Un good health, it hoped that he would consolidate the unity of the Party ranks centered on the general line of the WPK and successfully implement the decision made at the 8th Congress of the WPK. Rodong Sinmun
title: Congratulatory Message to Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un from Chairman of Liberal Democratic Party of Russia

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and chairman of the State Affairs Commission of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK), sent a reply message to Bashar Al-Assad, president of the Syrian Arab Republic, on January 20. Kim Jong Un in his message extended deep thanks to the president for sending warm congratulations to him on his assumption of duty as the general secretary of the WPK at its 8th Congress. He said that the sincere feelings of friendship and fraternity expressed by the president encourage the Party and the people of the DPRK to make epochal progress in the socialist construction by implementing the decision made at the 8th Congress of the WPK. Expressing belief that the historic friendly and cooperative relations between the two countries would continue to grow strong in conformity with the common interests and desire of the people, the message wished the president and the Syrian people bigger success in their struggle for defending the country's sovereignty. Rodong Sinmun
title: Supreme Leader Kim Jong Un Sends Reply Message to Syrian President

text: The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un received New Year cards and greetings from heads of states, leaders of political parties and personages of different countries on the occasion of the New Year Juche 110 (2021). Kim Jong Un received New Year cards from the first secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of Cuba, the president of the Republic of the Union of Myanmar, the president of the Republic of India and the president of the Republic of Guinea and his wife. He also received a New Year card from the state counselor of the Republic of the Union of Myanmar and greetings from the director-general of FAO. Meanwhile, the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea received a congratulatory message from the chairman and the secretary general of the Central Board of the Party of the Functional Groups of Indonesia. Rodong Sinmun
title: New Year Cards and Greetings to Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un from Different Countries

text: The officials and agricultural workers of Kangwon Province strive mightily to readjust and reinforce their irrigation system. Anbyon and Cholwon Counties have set about repairing their reservoirs and damming their rivers to convert them into reservoirs. Thongchon County and other cities and counties, too, make detailed preparations for repairing their irrigation setups. The soldiers of the Korean People’s Army energetically help the people in their repairs. They make a breakthrough in repairs on reservoirs and their reinforcement rationally using various kinds of their motor vehicles and undertaking difficult work assignments. Thongchon and Phangyo Counties and other districts also do their possible to secure materials under their detailed plans to readjust and reinforce their irrigation systems and facilities. Rodong Sinmun
title: To Take Thorough Measures for Water Supply

text: There was a funeral for Ri Jae Il, ex-advisor to the Information and Publicity Department of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and recipient of Order of Kim Il Sung and Order of Kim Jong Il and the title of Labor Hero, at the Sojang Club on Saturday. The funeral was attended by officials of the Central Committee of the WPK, officials concerned and bereaved family members of the deceased. The participants and the bereaved family members offered a moment's silence for the deceased before the coffin left. A motor vehicle with the coffin left for the Patriotic Martyrs Cemetery in Sinmi-ri where the funeral service was held. Kwon Hyok Bong, vice department director of the WPK Central Committee, made a funeral speech. He said that Ri Jae Il, who was raised to be a competent Party official and a political activist under the deep trust and loving care shown by the peerlessly great men, rendered devoted services to defending the undying feats performed by Chairman Kim Jong Il for the Party ideological work and to thoroughly establishing the monolithic leadership system of the Party Central Committee in the whole Party and society at an important historic time of carrying out the revolutionary cause of Juche. He went on: Upon the news of his death, Marshal Kim Jong Un, feeling pain in the chest more than anyone, taught one issue after another in holding the funeral ceremony and made sure that his remains were buried in the Patriotic Martyrs Ceremony. Ri Jae Il who worked with total dedication to the strengthening of the Party and to the victory of the socialist cause will always be remembered. The remains of the deceased were buried. A wreath from the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un was placed before the grave. Wreaths in the names of departments of the WPK Central Committee, the Ministry of Culture and other institutions were placed. The participants observed a moment's silence for the deceased. Rodong Sinmun
title: Funeral for Late Ri Jae Il Held

text: A video conference for reviewing the work of forest restoration campaign and general mobilization for land administration was held at the People's Palace of Culture on Sunday. Present at the conference were Kim Tok Hun, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and premier of the Cabinet of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, O Su Yong, secretary of the Central Committee of the WPK, and other leading officials of the Party and government, officials of the Cabinet, commissions, ministries and national institutions, educational institutions and provincial, city and county Party and power organs and officials in the field of forest restoration and land and environment protection. Also present there were Kim Jong Gwan, minister of National Defence of the DPRK, and officials of the armed forces organs. At the conference successes and lessons gained in the forest restoration campaign and the general mobilization for land administration last year were analyzed and reviewed, and measures for innovatively mapping out plan for making practical change and substantial advance from the first year of the implementation of the new five-year plan and for bringing about a decisive turn in management of the land and protection of ecological environment were discussed. A video clip on the forest restoration campaign and general mobilization for land administration last year was shown at the conference. The conference touched upon deviations in last year's forest restoration and general mobilization for land administration. The conference called upon all the officials to take the lead in the struggle for transforming the whole country into a socialist fairyland, a beautiful land as befitting the era of the Workers' Party with conviction that we can build a powerful socialist nation with our own efforts, technology and natural resources. Rodong Sinmun
title: Conference for Reviewing Work of Forest Restoration Campaign and General Mobilization for Land Administration Held

text: The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un received a congratulatory message from the Anti-Imperialist National Democratic Front (AINDF) on Feb. 16 on the occasion of the 79th birth anniversary of Chairman Kim Jong Il. The message paid the highest tribute to Kim Jong Il, the eternal sun of Juche, and also extended the highest glory to and warm congratulations to President of the State Affairs Kim Jong Un leading the revolutionary cause of Juche, pioneered on Mt Paektu, to victory only. It said that Feb. 16, 1942, when Kim Jong Il was born as the Shining Star of Mt Paektu amid the ardent desire of the nation at the anti-Japanese war when the gunfire sounded, was the day of great fortune when the Korean people were blessed with another illustrious leader and brilliant commander and the great auspicious day that promised the eternal victory and glory for the nation. It noted that his sacred revolutionary career is shining as the holy career of the illustrious leader of the people who dedicated his all to the country and nation and as the history of illustrious commander characterized by ceaseless victories in the annals of the revolutionary cause of Juche. It said that the revolutionary cause of Juche adorned with the ever-victorious glorious course thanks to Kim Jong Il has greeted a period of new transformation and a great upsurge unprecedented in history thanks to Kim Jong Un, the peerlessly great man and illustrious leader. It said that vanguard fighters and patriotic people from all walks of life of the south keenly feeling the great national fortune and honor of being led by peerlessly great men and patriots generation after generation are full of firm pledge to work hard for national reunification and for national cause of independence, upholding the great President of the State Affairs Kim Jong Un in single mind. Reflecting the unanimous mind of reformists and other patriotic people from all walks of life in the south, the AINDF in the message sincerely wished Kim Jong Un good health. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Receives Congratulatory Message from AINDF

text: The Unjong Pig Farm of the State Academy of Sciences was successfully inaugurated. The completion of the farm has laid a material and technical foundation for putting all problems arising in meat production on an optimal and modern basis and for introducing the successes into the whole country. The farm, of which all production lines are labour-, energy- and land-saving, is equipped with home-made facilities to be a model pig farm. Choe Sang Gon, secretary of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, Kim Sung Jin, president of the State Academy of Sciences, Ri Chol Yong, chief secretary of Party committee of the State Academy of Sciences, and officials concerned looked around the newly-built pig farm on Monday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Unjong Pig Farm Completed

text: In the domain of the coal industry the officials do their best to give priority to prospecting and tunneling and thus procure coalfields in great numbers. Active endeavors are made to give impetus to prospecting by all means. The Ministry of Coal Industry focuses on ensuring that the production processes of a factory for the accessories of prospecting machines which belongs to the Kaechon Area Coal Mining Complex are speedily readjusted and reinforced to opportunely produce prospecting machines of various kinds and their spare parts. In addition, it concentrates its prospecting teams on its coal mines of importance in boosting the coal production of the country and its other large-scale prospective coalfields which can be opened up without difficulty. Rodong Sinmun
title: Efforts Focused on Prospect and Tunneling

text: The United Confederation of Koreans in Russia held an event at its building on February 12 to mark the birth anniversary of Chairman Kim Jong Il (Day of the Shining Star). Attending the event were members of the confederation, Koreans in Russia and members of the Russian Association for Friendship and Cultural Cooperation with the DPRK. Kim Chil Song, chairman of the United Confederation of Koreans in Russia, made a congratulatory speech to be followed by others. Speakers highly praised Kim Jong Il as the great teacher who enriched the Juche idea with his energetic ideological and theoretical activities and provided a powerful ideological and theoretical weapon to the progressives aspiring after a new world free from aggression and war. They said that socialist Korea is now demonstrating its might as an invincible power thanks to the leadership of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un who is carrying forward the idea and cause of Kim Jong Il. Sok Song, first vice-chairman of the confederation, cordially notified that Kim Jong Un was elected as general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), according to the unanimous will of all the members of the Party. The participants extended the highest glory and warmest congratulations to Kim Jong Un upon his election as general secretary of the WPK. Sok Song talked in detail about the 8th Congress of the WPK and the tasks set forth at the Congress. A performance was given by Korean artistes in Russia. Put on the stage were colorful numbers including the immortal revolutionary hymn "Song of General Kim Jong Il", the immortal classic "Jindallae" (Azalea) and dance "Puchaechum" (dance with fans). Rodong Sinmun
title: Day of Shining Star Marked in Russia

text: The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un sent birthday spreads to Ryu Hae Dok living in Suphung Workers' District of Sakju County in North Phyongan Province and Ko Kum Nyo living in the township of Kwaksan County on their 100th birthdays. The centenarians, born as daughters of day laborers, suffered from the grief of statelessness, being subject to all kinds of maltreatment and contempt, when the Korean nation was deprived of its sovereignty. They worked sincerely for decades in the agricultural field with a single mind to live up to the benevolence of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il, who liberated the country and provided them with a worthwhile life and dignity, with increased grain production. They voluntarily did jobs conducive to the prosperity of the country even after retirement. They are still doing housework in good health under the care of medical workers, thanks to the socialist public health system. Rodong Sinmun
title: Centenarians Receive Birthday Spreads in DPRK

text: The officials of the Ministry of Metal Industry go all out to effect a real change and headway in their work from the first year of another five-year plan conscious of their heavy responsibility to the national economic development. The MMI channels its primary efforts into refashioning the existing production processes of its major ironworks and steelworks with advanced technology, building new ironmaking furnaces economical of their energy and hitting the immediate targets for the production of its steel. Moreover, it adopts active measures to normalize the production of its iron mines and expand their production capacity. Meanwhile, it takes steps to briskly train talented technicians in its subsidiary units purposefully according to accurate methods. Rodong Sinmun
title: Resolved to Make Breakthrough with All Burdens on Their Shoulders

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, received a message of greeting from Jeronimo Osa Osa Ecoro, general secretary of the Democratic Party of Equatorial Guinea, on Feb. 11. The message said that all the members and supporters of the Democratic Party of Equatorial Guinea, as they had done on the past occasions, extended sincere and warm felicitations to Kim Jong Un, and through him, to the Workers' Party of Korea and all the Korean people, on behalf of Obiang Nguema Mbasogo, founder-chairman of the Democratic Party of Equatorial Guinea, on the occasion of the 79th birth anniversary of Chairman Kim Jong Il. It hoped that the significant day, the birth anniversary of the great leader who wisely led the Korean people, would be celebrated with splendor. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Receives Greetings from General Secretary of Democratic Party of Equatorial Guinea

text: A revolutionary party which has been strengthened and developed into the party of the leader and thoroughly carries his ideas and guidance into effect can perform its mission and role creditably in any storm and stress. This precious truth has been clearly proved by the proud course of the Workers’ Party of Korea, which fully demonstrates its dignity and might to the whole world. Our Party has powerfully been able to forward the cause of socialism, the cause of human independence, enjoying high prestige and demonstrating its invincible might. This is unthinkable without the outstanding leadership of Chairman Kim Jong Il who has developed the WPK into the one and only powerful party of the world. In the mid-20th century modern revisionism was rearing its head in some socialist countries and seriously damaging the activities of their working-class parties and their social life as a whole. Worse still, modern revisionists undisguisedly repudiated the leadership of the party, the General Staff of the revolution, openly slandering the authority and prestige of the leader and his achievements as well and ignoring his position and role in the carrying out of the revolutionary cause of the working class. Imperialists wildly applauded the modern revisionists for this hell-bent on malignant propaganda against socialism. Under this complex international situation Kim Jong Il started his work at the Central Committee of the WPK. He solemnly declared that our Party was unimaginable without the august name of President Kim Il Sung and should invariably be strengthened and developed into his glorious Party forever not only in the past and in the present but also in the future. He then proceeded to devote all his energies to strengthening and developing our Party into the revolutionary Party of Juche type firmly determined to do so. Nobody had so far built a revolutionary party into a party of the leader. No solution could be found to the numerous relevant theoretical and practical problems either in any classics or in the actualities of any country. Kim Jong Il is a peerlessly great man who perfectly solved all the problems of strengthening and developing our Party into the Party of Kim Il Sung’s. Kim Jong Il safeguarded the purity of Kim Il Sung’s revolutionary ideas and developed and enriched them with prodigious ideological and theoretical activities, thus providing a firm guarantee for imbuing our Party and revolutionary ranks with one ideology. He declared that it was the highest program of the Party to imbue the whole society with Kimilsungism and set it forth as the strategic line of party building to imbue the whole Party with Kimilsungism. This effected a turn in ensuring that our Party was that of Kim Il Sung forever. The work of establishing the monolithic ideological system of the Party and its monolithic leadership system has been conducted endlessly in depth. Consequently, the whole Party, ranging from its central committee to its basic organizations and members, has been strengthened into an pure ideological entity whose thought and action are based on the ideas and purpose of the leader alone and an integral organizational whole which is faithful to his guidance alone. It is none other than Kim Jong Il who ensured that the guiding ideology of the Party was newly prescribed in the Party rules. He met an official of the Party Central Committee one September day in 1970. He said that he had long thought of newly formulating the guiding id
title: Immortal Party Building Exploits Which Will Shine with Human Cause of Independence

text: Power producers countrywide fulfilled their plan for February working hard to execute the decisions of the 8th Congress of the Workers’ Party of Korea. The Pukchang Thermal Power Complex and the Pyongyang, Sunchon, Chongchongang and East Pyongyang Power Stations mobilized their reserves and potentials to the maximum and responsibly put their power-generating machines in full normal operation. The workers and management of hydropower stations scientifically controlled their water, operated their machines and repaired and maintained them on a normal footing so as to increase their power output. Those of the sector of the extractive industry carried out the plans for their important products for February. Those of the Sangwon and Sunchon Cement Complexes and the Chonnaeri Cement Factory fulfilled the plans for the production of their cement for February. Those of the railway sector executed their transport plan for February. The Pyongyang Kim Jong Suk Textile Mill and the Sinuiju, Sariwon, Kusong and September Textile Mills topped the plans for the production of their spun yarn and ordinary cloth intensifying cooperation between processes and conducting a vigorous socialist emulation. The Songyo, Aeguk and Hamhung Knitting Mills and other producers procured raw materials by tapping out their internal reserves and dynamically stepped up their production with the machines they managed with technological expertise. The Wonsan Shoes Factory, the Pyongyang Footwear Factory, the Pyongyang Daily Necessities Factory, the Sinuiju and Pyongyang Cosmetics Factories, the Kanggye Pencil Factory, the Hamhung Disabled Soldiers’ Essential Plastic Goods Factory and many other light industry units made good arrangements for their production and directed it well, thereby topping their plans for February. Rodong Sinmun
title: Their Quotas Fulfilled under the National Economic Plans for February

text: Many foreign friends looked up to President Kim Il Sung and spoke highly of him as a legendary hero of the anti-Japanese war from long ago. They included T. B. Mukherjee, ex-director of Asian Regional Institute of the Juche Idea. He had come to admire Kim Il Sung since around 1940. In those days he was in his twenties and attended Patna University. During lessons his history professor frequently talked about the anti-Japanese revolutionary war organized and led by Kim Il Sung. It created a great stir in his heart. Since then he had looked forward to meeting Kim Il Sung. He visited the DPRK in June 1980 and was greatly honored to meet Kim Il Sung who led the anti-Japanese war to shining victory with his outstanding art of command. He came to know that the immortal Juche Idea he adhered to staunchly was created in the sanguinary war against the Japanese imperialists. Therefore, he always used to say that when he saw Kim Il Sung for the first time he felt as if he were apparently a general in his twenties and legendary hero who won the bloody anti-Japanese war through thick and thin. Myriads of the progressive people of the world still respect Kim Il Sung boundlessly for having led the arduous anti-Japanese armed struggle to victory and contributed greatly to the cause of human emancipation. The vice-chairman of the Socialist Freedom Party of Egypt, the general secretary of the central committee of the Lebanese Communist Party and other leaders of the political parties of many countries said that the liberation of Korea was a great historic event which constituted the victory of progressive fighters against imperialist colonial rule and that the fact that Kim Il Sung set a world-historic example to the struggle for national liberation by winning the revolutionary war against Japan would be cherished in the hearts of the Korean people and humankind forever. The mass media of the world also highly praise Kim Il Sung for liberating Korea from Japanese colonial rule. Rodong Sinmun
title: Enchanted by Greatness of Legendary Hero

text: Chief secretaries of the city and county Party committees, who received the respected General Secretary Kim Jong Un's important instructions comprehensively dealing with valuable guidelines and stratagems for turning cities and counties across the country into strong fortresses of socialist construction and rich and civilized regional bases, are attending the short course, full of firm confidence and enthusiasm. The first short course for chief secretaries of the city and county Party committees continued on March 5. In the third-day sitting, lectures were given to make the chief secretaries comprehensively and systematically renew the understanding of the issues arising in consolidating the single-hearted unity of the Party and the revolutionary ranks in every way and providing efficient Party guidance for developing cities and counties in an independent and many-sided way. Lectures were given by O Su Yong, member of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and secretary in charge of economic affairs of the Party Central Committee, and Kim Jae Ryong, member of the Political Bureau of the WPK Central Committee and director of the Organizational Leadership Department of the Party Central Committee. The lectures dealt with the issues calling on the city and county Party committees to consolidate the revolutionary position, class position by renovating the Party's organizational and ideological work and proficiently mobilize officials, Party members and other working people for implementing the decisions of the Party congress. Kim Jae Ryong gave a lecture on practical issues of the Party work arising in building up the ranks of cadres and Party ranks, improving the fighting efficiency of basic Party organizations, thoroughly applying the Party's people-first politics and preparing young people for successors to the revolution and reserves of the Party. He gave a detailed explanation of the tasks facing the city and county Party committees in transforming agricultural workers on a revolutionary and working class pattern by prioritizing the Party work in rural communities, intensifying the work with primary officials and discharged soldiers in rural areas and intensifying the three revolutions-ideological, technological and cultural- and ways to do so. He called for conducting fresh political education aiming at elevating the masses' ideological and spiritual strength and creative enthusiasm as urgently required by the era and the developing revolution and for increasing the penetration of idea and efficiency of ideological work by enlisting all the agitprop forces of the Party. The lecture also dealt with methodological matters for enhancing the role of the city and county Party organizations in developing local economy and improving the people's living standard. The secretary in charge of economic affairs in his lecture stressed that in order to turn every city and county into civilized and prosperous regional bases of socialist construction and developed regions retaining their inherent characteristics as specified in the general goal of our Party's idea of giving importance to city and county and its line of strengthening them, the city and county Party committees and chief secretaries should offer correct Party guidance and policy-oriented guidance to the economic work. He explained in detail the measures for settling the problems of food supply for people and raw materials for light industry by
title: Third-day Sitting of First Short Course for Chief Secretaries of City and County Party Committees Held

text: North Phyongan Province carries on a dynamic political work to encourage the masses to carry out another five-year plan advanced at the Party Congress. The information department of the provincial Party Committee arranges for a squad for agitation for increased production in detail to be organized with ideological workers and for its members to conduct agitational activities for increased production at places of work and thus rouse them all to action spiritually. The province works according to its detailed plan to actively popularize good experiences in all its areas and improve the political ability of its ideological workers. The result is that the practical effect of their agitprop activities is heightened further. North Hamgyong Province, too, vigorously conducts frontline agitation for increased production. The artistes of its provincial art troupe and art propaganda squad go among the msses and conduct diversified agitational activities so as to spur them to perform miracles and exploits in their work. Rodong Sinmun
title: Inspiring Masses to Implementation of Decisions Made at Party Congress

text: The workers and management of the Musan Mining Complex vigorously step up the production of their concentrated iron ores. Those of its open branch mine apply rational extractive methods to their work and responsibly repair and maintain their machines, thereby augmenting the output of their iron ores. A conveyor station for the removal of overburden and a station for ore conveyance which belong to the MMC bring about collective innovations in their work assignments strictly meeting the demand of technological regulations and standard operation and procuring repair parts on their own. The labor and management of the Hungnam Electrode Factory, too, make primary efforts to solidify the foundations for their production and heighten the quality of their electrodes while actively stirring themselves up for a technological innovation drive to introduce rational methods into their production. In addition, they thoroughly meet the demand of technological regulations and standard operation, check up their machines during their recesses and repair them beforehand effectively so as to put them in regular operation. Rodong Sinmun
title: The Flames of Collective Innovations Kindled

text: The managerial staff, workers and technicians of the Manpho August 2 Cement Factory exert themselves to recycle their industrial wastes. They have already made substitute gypsum and used it for their production. Accordingly, they incessantly reclaim wastes by dint of perseverance. They have already set up a process for the recycling of coal cinders and used the products for turning out their cement. On this occasion they have made a breakthrough in being able to reclaim coal gangues. They are now going all out to perfect their processes for the reclamation of wastes further. Rodong Sinmun
title: Believing that Nothing Is a Waste

text: The following units of the major sectors of the national economy, which were visited by President Kim Il Sung, Chairman Kim Jong Il or Comrade Kim Jong Un for firsthand guidance, lead in a general offensive to thoroughly carry out the tasks for the first year of another five-year plan. The workers and management of the Hwanghae Iron and Steel Complex work with all their might day and night to put their air separator and other machines in normal operation and increase the output of their iron and steel as much as possible. The workers of the Chollima Steel Complex register high results in the manufacture of their steel day after day. The Namhung Youth Chemical Complex, the Hungnam Fertilizer Complex, the February 8 Vinalon Complex and other chemical factories lead others in bolstering the chemical industry. The stations and complex of the domain of the power industry and factories and complexes of that of the machine industry are all out for their production. Many of the labor and management of the Pyongyang Kim Jong Suk Silk Mill, the Huichon Silk Mill and many other filatures top the national economic plans for the first quarter of 2021 and the first half of 2021 one after another. Rodong Sinmun
title: Units Associated with Leadership Exploits Take Lead of General Offensive

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), sent a verbal message to Raul Castro Ruz, first secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of Cuba, to notify the accounts of the 8th Congress of the WPK. The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un noted in detail that the 8th Congress of the WPK set forth scientific and realistic struggle lines and strategic and tactical tasks for achieving a fresh innovation in the Party and state affairs, as required by the changed internal and external situations and reality, took practical measures for strengthening the leadership of the Party and consolidating the state and social system and discussed and decided on its policy stand on the bolstering of defence capabilities, the inter-Korean relations and the DPRK-U.S. relations. He clarified again the will of the WPK to develop the ties of strategic and comradely unity and cooperation with Cuba on the road of struggle for the victory of the socialist cause and launch a dynamic joint struggle against imperialism. Reaffirming the full support and solidarity of the WPK and the DPRK people with the struggle of the Communist Party of Cuba and the Cuban people to defend the socialist system, he expressed the conviction that the 8th Congress of the Communist Party of Cuba which is to be held in April would be a significant occasion to bring about a radical advance in the struggle of the Communist Party of Cuba for further strengthening the party, enhancing its leadership role and building a prosperous socialist state. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Sends Verbal Message to Raul Castro Ruz

text: The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un sent a wreath to express his deep condolences over the death of People's Artist Kim Pyong Hwa, winner of the Kim Il Sung Prize and adviser to the creative department of the State Symphony Orchestra. Kim Pyong Hwa, who grew into the chief conductor of the prestigious artistic creative staff while bringing into full bloom his artistic talents under the care of the peerlessly great men, made a contribution to developing the Juche-oriented symphony by successfully conducting a number of compositions including orchestral music "A Bumper Harvest in the Chongsan Plain", "The Girl on the Swing" and "Arirang". The wreath was placed before the bier of the deceased on Mar. 23. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Sends Wreath to Bier of Late Kim Pyong Hwa

text: The Sunchon Area Youth Coal Mining Complex perseveres in its efforts to make a breakthrough in the increased production of its coal by giving priority to its tunneling. Dozens of its units executed their tunneling plans for the first quarter of 2021 and acquired many coalfields. The Kim Yu Bok Youth Shock Force of the February 8 Jikdong Youth Coal Mine and the shock force of its trade union organizations as well topped their tunneling plans for the first quarter of 2021 ahead of schedule. The Chonsong Youth Coal Mine, too, makes dynamic efforts to tunnel its way into coal. As a result, its numerous units carried out their plans for the first quarter of 2021 at an early date. Many tunneling squads of the Ryongdae Youth Coal Mine fulfilled their plans for the first quarter of 2021 ahead of set time but still increase the speed of their tunneling by their concerted efforts without so much as resting on their laurels. Rodong Sinmun
title: Precedence Given to Tunneling

text: The officers and men of the units of the Korean People’s Army, who joined together to build dwellings for 10,000 families in Pyongyang, removed hundreds of thousands of cubic meters of soil and mainly finished excavating the ground for their foundations. The construction headquarters have organized a socialist emulation to ensure that fresh innovations are brought about in construction and that it is carried out on schedule by all means. Consequently, the ground was excavated for the foundations of dwellings and the preliminary beds for the foundations were concreted in a short time. Innovations and advances are made in building operations without cease. Rodong Sinmun
title: Further Successes Made Amid Keen Socialist Emulation

text: The officers and men of the brigade of the Pyongyang City People’s Committee work hard day and night to build a school and its substructure. This meets with one success after another. The officers formulate a detailed daily and weekly plan for building operations in view of the fact that changes are effected in them and allot and direct them adroitly. Consequently, temporary buildings are erected rapidly and innovations are brought about in digging up the ground for the foundations of the school and building access roads. The battalions of Sadong and Mangyongdae Districts build the schoolhouse mostly with machines and their members, of whom each is rationally assigned a job. Their projects are carried out on schedule in excess of their norms. Rodong Sinmun
title: Working Hard under a Detailed Plan

text: Ryanggang Province strives mightily to mass-produce lumber in its mountains for the 10,000 families’ dwellings under construction in Pyongyang, coal mines in the western region of the country and other major units. Therefore, a dynamic agitation is conducted for the increased production of lumber. The officials and publication distributers of the Publications Management Bureau of Ryanggang Province briskly conduct political work in a diverse way here and there. When fellers took a respite the publication distributers informed them of the contents of books and sang them songs to spur them to confirm their determination to do their part in the production of their lumber. Rodong Sinmun
title: Brisk Agitprop Activities in Cutting Areas

text: A terraced residential district is to be built in a peculiar way in the excellent location on the bank of the picturesque Pothong River together with the construction of the dwelling houses for 10 000 flats in the capital city of Pyongyang under the plan of the Party Central Committee to give a face-lift to the city and provide the people with developed living environment and conditions. The builders who took part in the construction of the Pothong riverside terraced residential district true to the Party's grand policy for capital city construction are full of great pluck and militant enthusiasm to strikingly demonstrate once again all over the world the development of architecture of our socialist country, inexhaustible ideological and mental power and potential of self-supporting economy. A meeting of officials and builders were held on the spot on Friday to thoroughly carry out the instructions given by the respected General Secretary to build the Pothong riverside terraced residential district into modern and excellent one. Present there were Jong Sang Hak, Ri Il Hwan and O Su Yong, secretaries of the Central Committee of the Worker's Party of Korea, and other officials of the Party Central Committee and members in charge of construction command and builders. Ri Il Hwan made a speech. He said the adoption of the decision at the 8th Congress of the Party and at the 2nd Plenary Meeting of the 8th Central Committee of the Party to build dwelling houses for 50 000 flats in Pyongyang and the initiative to build terraced residential district on the riverside of the Pothong River as a separate project reflect the noble intention of the Party Central Committee to provide our people with highly civilized living conditions at an early date. He said that the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un unfolded the plan to build modern terraced dwelling houses in the excellent place of the city and provide them to the people and named it the "Pothong Riverside Terraced Residential District". He also said that Kim Jong Un clarified detailed tasks and ways ranging from designing to construction, heating of dwelling houses and traffic and assigned the construction to able core construction units. He stressed that all the officials and builders who took part in the construction should fully display unusual devotion and unyielding practical ability in the drive for finishing the construction of the residential district by the appointed date true to the intention of the Party Central Committee for devoted service for the people's wellbeing. He said that the designing sector should work out all project designing to be perfect which thoroughly embodies the Party's Juche-oriented idea of architectural beauty. He also stressed the need for the construction units to promote the organization of emulation drives, create model experience of building city dwelling houses in terms of speed and practicality and thus finish the project in a qualitative way within the date set by the Party. He ardently appealed to all the officials and builders to build on the highest level the Pothong riverside terraced residential district which is the cradle of happiness looked forward to by our people, true to the far-reaching architectural idea of the General Secretary and thus present the report of loyalty to the Party Central Committee. There were pledge speeches. The speakers evinced their firm pledge to enshrine deep in their hearts the warm love for the people of our Party, create n
title: Meeting Held to Build Pothong Riverside Terraced Residential District into Modern and Excellent One

text: North Hwanghae Province is all out to mass-produce slow-acting fertilizer true to the Party’s policy of scientific agriculture. It detailedly arranged for its cities and counties to build their centers for the production of slow-acting fertilizer in a short time and solved the scientific and technological problems of manufacturing machines for its production and putting up workshops for their production. Consequently, Sariwon and Songrim Cities and Yonthan County built their centers with a great production capacity of slow-acting fertilizer in a short time and commissioned them. The other counties of the province, too, vie to build workshops for the production of slow-acting fertilizer with their technology for themselves. Rodong Sinmun
title: Slow Action Fertilizer Production Bases Built Extensively

text: Kim Tok Hun, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and premier of the Cabinet of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, inspected the construction site of 10 000 flats in Pyongyang and the Central Tree Nursery under the Ministry of Urban Management. Looking around the construction site bustling with the efforts for creating new Pyongyang Speed and working miracles in construction, he underlined the need for officials to enhance their responsibility and role in designing, construction and supervision, understanding that the construction project is an important work for realizing the long-cherished desire of the Party Central Committee to provide the people with more civilized living conditions. He underlined the need for the metal industry and railway transport field to put efforts into increasing iron and steel production and quickly carrying materials, true to the intention of the Party Central Committee in giving top priority to timely supplying materials and equipment needed for the construction project. He also called for giving precedence to the infrastructure construction in order to keep pace with the accelerated construction. At the Central Tree Nursery, he mentioned the need to step up the cultivation of saplings of good species for greening with a main emphasis put on upping the scientific and intensive level in sapling production. The field consultative meetings urged the units involved in the housing project to fully meet the requirements of designs, strictly observe the construction rules and apply rational methods to organizing and guiding the construction, thus successfully carrying out the construction policy of the Party and the state, meeting the demands and interests of the people and thoroughly ensuring architectural security. Also discussed at the meetings were the ways to improve afforestation and greening in Pyongyang City. Rodong Sinmun
title: DPRK Premier Inspects Construction Site of 10 000 Flats in Pyongyang and Central Tree Nursery

text: A week of film show has been opened to celebrate the Day of the Sun, birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung. Documentary films dealing with the revolutionary career and exploits of the President and revolutionary films such as "Star of Korea" and "The Sun of the Nation" are set to be shown at cinemas and halls of culture in Pyongyang and local areas. Feature films on various themes which depict the high ideological and mental traits of the Korean people and service personnel and their true outlook on life will also be shown.
