An opening-ceremony took place at the Pyongyang International Cinema House on April 9. Present there were officials concerned, officials in the film sector, creative workers and artistes and working people in Pyongyang City. At the end of the ceremony, the participants watched the documentary film "Our Leader Praised by All People." Similar events were opened in every province on the same day. Rodong Sinmun
title: Week of Film Show Opens to Celebrate Day of Sun

text: The Hungnam Fertilizer Complex considers that the normalization of its production lies mainly in the active application of science and technology and tries hard to that end. This meets with success. For example, it mass-produces as much fertilizer as possible by increasing its available gas content. A program for the separation of carbon dioxide was developed anew to that end and an idea of raising the rate of its actual hydrogen yield was hit on and carried out without delay. Consequently, the HFC has become able to produce more hydrogen than before and help toward increasing the output of its fertilizer less energy, labor and cost. The HFC contrived and applied valuable technological innovations. The result was that it could register high results in its fertilizer production with its existing machines without replacing them with the good ones which were made or secured anew. While going out to integrate its production with science and technology the HFC got to actively vitalize its production with its technology. Rodong Sinmun
title: Technical Forces Strengthened First of All

text: The Civilian Defence Revolutionary Museum opened ahead of the birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung. The museum comprehensively deals with the revolutionary history of the peerlessly great men who provided and glorified the sacred history and tradition of building the Juche-based militia forces, and with the militant course of the civilian defence forces which have performed exploits under the guidance of the Party. The revolutionary museum will serve as a powerful educational center for adding eternal glory to the undying exploits of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il, the founder and builder of the Juche-oriented civilian forces, and for educating the Party members and other working people in the greatness of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un, who is ushering in a new history of strengthening the civilian defence forces, and in the Juche-based idea and policy of the Party on civilian defence. An opening ceremony took place on April 13. Attending it were Ri Pyong Chol, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), vice-chairman of the Party Central Military Commission and secretary of the Party Central Committee, O Il Jong and Kang Sun Nam, department directors of the Party Central Committee, officials in the field of civilian defence, commanding officers and members of the Worker-Peasant Red Guards in Pyongyang City, officials of the units and shock brigade members involved in the construction, and employees of the museum. Before the ceremony, the participants made a bow before the portraits of the smiling President and Chairman at the lobby of the museum after laying a floral basket in the name of the Worker-Peasant Red Guards. Ri Pyong Chol made an opening address. At the end of the ceremony, the participants looked round the museum. Rodong Sinmun
title: Civilian Defence Revolutionary Museum Opens

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, sent a congratulatory message to Miguel Mario Diaz-Canel Bermudez, first secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of Cuba (CPC) and president of the Republic of Cuba, on Monday. The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un in the message offered the sincerest congratulations and warm comradely greetings to Miguel Mario Diaz-Canel Bermudez over the successful 8th CPC Congress and his election as first secretary of the CPC Central Committee. The message noted that it is an expression of absolute support, deep trust and great expectations placed by all the members of the CPC and other Cuban people in him that he assumed the heavy responsibility as the first secretary of the CPC Central Committee at a crucial and historic time when the revolutionary cause of Cuba pioneered and advanced by the respected comrades Fidel Castro Ruz and Raul Castro Ruz is being carried forward generation after generation. Saying that it provided a sure guarantee for the Cuban revolution to vigorously advance along the road of independence, justice and socialism, true to the idea and intention of the preceding leaders, and for the Cuban people to make a steady and dynamic advance toward the future of socialism, full of confidence and optimism, Kim Jong Un noted in his message that he is sincerely pleased at it. The message expressed firm belief that the fraternal Cuban people would firmly defend the gains of revolution and surely build an independent and prospering socialist state by waging an all-out drive for implementing the decisions of the CPC Congress, firmly united behind the CPC Central Committee headed by the respected first secretary. It stressed that the relations between the two parties and the two countries, established on the basis of deep friendly relations and comradeship between Kim Il Sung and Fidel Castro Ruz, the great leaders of the peoples of the two countries, have grown stronger and closer in the course of weathering all tempests of history and developed into special comradely and strategic relations century after century and generation after generation. Kim Jong Un in his message reaffirmed his will to further develop the traditional friendship and unity and comradely cooperative ties between the two parties and the two countries along the road of the struggle for carrying out the joint cause under the banner of socialism, as agreed with the respected first secretary during a meeting in Pyongyang in November, 2018. The message sincerely wished the respected first secretary big success in his important and responsible work for leading the CPC and the Cuban people. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Sends Congratulatory Message to First Secretary of Central Committee of CPC

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK), received a congratulatory message from G. A. Zhuganov, chairman of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of the Russian Federation (CPRF), on April 15. The message said that on April 15 the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) greeted the 109th birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung, the great leader of the nation and the founder of the DPRK and WPK. It said that Kim Il Sung, son loyal to his country and wise leader and patriot, dedicated his whole life to the struggle for the future, independence and prosperity of socialist Korea. Noting that under his leadership the Korean people have steadily advanced along the road for building a just society, achieved great successes in the fields of science, industry and culture and put the national defense capability onto a new level, the message said the building of a socialist state started under the leadership of Kim Il Sung is being successfully carried out. It said that today under the leadership of WPK the working people of the DPRK are confidently advancing along the road for implementing the behests of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and building a prosperous society. It wished the Korean people greater success in socialist construction. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Receives Congratulatory Message from Chairman of Central Committee of CPRF

text: A lighting festival "Wonders of Light-2021" has begun here since April 18 to commemorate the Day of the Sun (birth anniversary of President Kim Il Sung). The places around Pyongyang Department Store No. 1 and the foot of Jangdae Hill were crowded with people who gathered to watch the festival. The mysterious art of light began with the display of the title "Wonders of Light-2021", letters "Day of the Sun" and numbers "4.15". The festival vividly showed the feature of our socialist motherland ushering in a new era of development and era of our state-first principle under the guidance of the great Party and the worthwhile struggle and life of our people building rosy future through creation and construction. Scenes making unique reflection of the era of miracle and prosperity unprecedented in the 5000 year-old Korean history made the people look back upon the exploits of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il who accomplished the historic cause of founding the Party, the state and the army in the most successful way and provided the eternal foundation of building a socialist power independent in politics, self-supporting in economy and self-reliant in defence. The festival showed ever-changing scenes mirroring the current era, in which the laugh of our people and song of their happiness are growing with each passing day under the care of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un who gives steady continuity to the history of people-first principle, and the rosy future. The festival which has developed into another peculiar cultural event to be loved by the people was acclaimed by the spectators. Rodong Sinmun
title: Lighting Festival "Wonders of Light-2021" Commemorate Day of Sun

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK), received an autograph letter from Thongloun Sisoulith, general secretary of the Central Committee of the Lao People's Revolutionary Party (LPRP) and president of the Lao People's Democratic Republic (LPDR). Thongloun Sisoulith in his letter expressed his sincere thanks to the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un for sending a verbal message to notify the accounts of the 8th Congress of the WPK, and wholeheartedly congratulated once again the congress of the WPK on its commendable successes. He said that he was very pleased to see that the friendly relations of long tradition between Laos and the DPRK provided by the preceding leaders have steadily developed despite the intricate regional and international situation and challenges in the past, adding this is highly considered by him. He notified in detail the accounts of the 11th Congress of the LPRP which was held between January 13 and 15. He said that in the period under review the LPRP led the whole nation and army and all the people overcoming all difficulties in the revolutionary spirit despite complicated situation to accomplish many successes and firmly ensure the political stability of the country, adding that the congress took steps to develop the party into the one upright, strong and sound enough to defend the country and lead the socialist construction in the new period by carrying out the party's political line and spurring the party building. And he noted that the congress adopted the 9th Five-Year Plan for the socio-economic development of the country and set forth it as the supreme goal of the party to steadily consolidate the people's democratic system by respecting the people's rights as the master and making sure they further exercise them, and to rely on the people, guarantee their interests and provide them with happiness. He expressed a firm stand that the Lao party and government would always value the friendly and cooperative relations between the two parties, states and peoples of Laos and the DPRK, which have a long tradition and are based on comradely and fraternal fellowship, and would make all efforts to further develop them, stressing that the LPRP will continuously maintain the external line for peace, independence, friendship, development and cooperation. He invited Kim Jong Un to visit the LPDR at a convenient time, saying that he wholeheartedly hope to meet him. He sincerely wished Kim Jong Un good health, happiness and successes in his noble work of leading the endeavors of the WPK and the Korean people to implement the decisions made at the 8th Congress of the WPK. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Receives Autograph Letter from Lao President

text: In Ryanggang Province potato farms are busy with their immediate farm work. Awakened to the importance of the farming for the first year of another five-year plan, the officials and agricultural workers of the province energetically sow potatoes in their fields in full swing to reap a bumper harvest this year. The officials dynamically arrange for potatoes to be sown in fields in the right season on the spot and also direct the work of sowers. Honored with the immortal leadership of the Party, Samjiyon City plants the fields of its farms with potatoes in high spirits from the outset. The officials and farmers of Taehongdan County are also all out to sow potatoes in the fields of their farms. Paekam County, which was visited by Chairman Kim Jong Il for firsthand leadership, focuses its labor and farm machines on farms in its Tokpho area and ensures that great results are registered in sowing potatoes in their fields. The fields of the farms of the province are successfully sown with potatoes one after another day by day by the devoted efforts of its officials and agricultural workers and with the sincere help of relevant units. Rodong Sinmun
title: Potatoes Begin to Be Planted in Ryanggang Province

text: An out-of-the-way mountain village situated far away from the township of Sinphyong County boasts a forest of pine-nut trees. It is the fruition of the unselfish patriotic devotion of a veteran member of the Workers’ Party of Korea to posterity. Her name is Jang Pok Sun, a resident in Tongmun-dong 2, Taedonggang District, Pyongyang. She was born in Taeji-ri, Sinphyong County. She joined the Korean People’s Army at the age of 17 after her graduation from a middle school. After her discharge from military service she faithfully worked as a labor innovator, a skilled worker, a workteam leader and a cell secretary of the WPK. She thought of her future work a lot when she became a pensioner. Several days after she visited her hometown she left long ago. She took a bird’s eye view of it on a hill with emotion. When her eyes rested on its dear mountains her face shadowed with pity because they were almost denuded of trees. They had been thickly wooded when she left home in her girlhood. She made up her mind to reforest the mountains to remain a conscientious patriot not only to her children but also to the future generations of her hometown. Despite her old age, for many years she had since shuttled quite a distance between Pyongyang and Sinphyong County and between the county and the mountains of Taeji-ri. Whenever she went to Taeji-ri she carried young pine-nut trees to its mountains on her back and planted them there. They total up to tens of thousands. All the inhabitants of Sinphyong County know her. When she calls at the hometown with young pine-nut trees all its residents welcome her there. Even the members of the Korean Children’s Union there follow suit addressing her as an old patriot. The officials and other ordinary people of the county make great strides forward toward national prosperity emulating the devotion of Jang Bok Sun to the pine-nut trees in the county and Taeji-ri from the viewpoint of conscience. Not only our revolutionary predecessors but also we should, first of all, bequeath our boundless loyalty to the Party and the leader and the spirit of noble love for and great devotion to the country to our rising generations. Rodong Sinmun
title: What Should Be Bequeathed to Posterity

text: An internet seminar on the theme "The great leader President Kim Il Sung will always be alive in the hearts of the Korean people and world progressive people" took place on the occasion of the Day of the Sun, birth anniversary of the President, under the sponsorship of the Korean Friendship Association. Posted on the homepage which was established for the seminar was an art work portraying the President finding himself among the people. Also posted there were works of the President and other books and written speeches praising his revolutionary life and exploits. Figures of the organizations for friendship and solidarity with the Korean people in Switzerland, Britain, Spain, Finland, Brazil, Argentina and other countries in their speeches praised the President for founding the immortal Juche idea, thoroughly applying it to the revolution and construction, dedicating himself to the prosperity of the country and happiness of the people and the accomplishment of global independence throughout his life. They lauded Chairman Kim Jong Il, who faithfully carried forward the revolutionary cause of the President, for smashing the imperialists' moves to isolate and stifle the DPRK, defending the sovereignty of the country and providing solid foundations for building a powerful socialist country by enforcing the unique Songun politics. They stressed that under the sagacious and seasoned leadership of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un, the revolutionary lives and exploits of the President and the Chairman are being glorified century after century. They expressed their conviction that the Korean people's cause of building a powerful socialist country is sure to be accomplished as they are led by Kim Jong Un. Rodong Sinmun
title: Internet Seminar Held to Commemorate Day of Sun

text: The Korean people significantly marked May Day, international holiday of the working people all over the world. Deep reverence was fully reflected in the Kumsusan Palace of the Sun, the supreme temple of Juche where President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il lie in state. At the plaza of the palace, the masses made a bow before the portraits of the smiling President and Chairman. Officials and working people placed floral baskets, bouquets and flowers and made a bow before the statues of the President and the Chairman on Mansu Hill and in all other parts of the country and mosaics portraying their smiling images. Colorful art performances for celebrating May Day were given at theatres and on outdoor stages in Pyongyang and across the country. The Mansudae Art Troupe gave a music and dance performance at the East Pyongyang Grand Theatre and the National Symphony Orchestra gave a concert at the Moranbong Theatre. A performance of famous music and scenes of revolutionary operas was given at the Pyongyang Grand Theatre, the revolutionary drama "Blood at an International Conference" staged at the National Theatre and a combined acrobatic show given at the Pyongyang Circus Theater. Members of the central art squad for increased production, the workers' art group of the Central Committee of the General Federation of Trade Unions of Korea, the art squad of the Central Committee of the Union of Agricultural Workers, the art squad of the Central Committee of the women's union, the railway art squad, the art squad of the Capital City Construction Commission and art squads of the women's union in different districts including Moranbong District and Taedonggang District gave colorful performances in various places of the city. Performances were given in North and South Phyongan provinces, Jagang Province, North Hamgyong Province and other different parts of the country. There took place colorful sports and amusement games at the Chongjin Rolled Steel Factory, the Haeju Tractor Accessory Parts Factory, the Migok Cooperative Farm in Sariwon City and other places. Officials of provinces, cities, counties, institutions, industrial establishments and farms met scientists, technicians, innovators and other exemplary working people who are working miracles and innovations in all key sectors of economic construction to congratulate them on the holiday. Rodong Sinmun
title: May Day Marked across Country

text: There took place a photo exhibition at the DPRK embassy in Beijing on May 7 to mark the third anniversary of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un's visits to China. Displayed at the exhibition hall were photos showing Kim Jong Un paying visits to China three times in Juche 107 (2018). Present at the exhibition were Ri Ryong Nam, DPRK ambassador to China, and his embassy members. There were also Song Tao, head of the International Liaison Department of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China, and officials of the Chinese party and government including those of the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the Ministry of Culture and Tourism. Ri Ryong Nam in his speech said that the visits to China by General Secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea Kim Jong Un offered another crucial occasion that opened up a new chapter of the DPRK-China friendship, noting that the DPRK would develop the traditional DPRK-China friendly relations in conformity with the noble intention of the leaders of the two parties and the desire, wish and fundamental interests of the peoples of the two countries. He voiced expectations that the Communist Party and people of China would make achievements in the historic journey for building a comprehensively well-off modern socialist country under the leadership of Xi Jinping and significantly greet the 100th anniversary of the founding of the Communist Party of China. Song Tao in his speech stressed that they would propel the China-DPRK relations to make them continue to reach a new stage, noting that the Central Committee of the CPC with Xi Jinping at the core sets great store by the traditional China-DPRK friendship. He wished the Korean people bigger achievements in the path to implement the decisions made at the Eighth Party Congress and develop the socialist cause under the guidance of the WPK led by General Secretary Kim Jong Un. Then the participants looked round the exhibition hall. Similar photo exhibitions were also held at the DPRK Consulate General in Shenyang of China and its branch in Dandong on the same day. Rodong Sinmun
title: Photo Exhibition Marks Third Anniversary of Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un's Visits to China

text: The Wonhwa Cooperative Farm of Phyongwon County started to transplant rice seedlings. On May 10, 1952 when the Fatherland Liberation War was at its height President Kim Il Sung visited Wonhwa-ri and joined its peasants to sow rice in a paddy. The WCF began bedding out its rice seedlings in the paddy of all its paddies on May 10 this year. Its paddy fields are transplanted with rice seedlings one after another with the help of rice seedling transplanters day by day. Rodong Sinmun
title: Rice Transplantation Started in Wonhwa Cooperative Farm

text: A national exhibition of budding artists' works opened with due ceremony at the Okryu Exhibition Hall on May 11 to commemorate the 7th anniversary of the publication of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un's work "Let's Usher in New Heyday of Juche-oriented Literature and Art as Required by Era and Developing Revolution". The exhibition was opened to further develop national art and stimulate the struggle of the Party members and other working people all out in the first year advance for implementing the new five-year plan by letting promising young artists create more excellent art pieces. Displayed there are more than 230 Korean paintings, oil paintings, acryl paintings and sculptures created by budding artists across the country. Also displayed are diverse art pieces reflecting the revolutionary spirit of soldiers and civilians who perform feats in the gigantic construction sites including the one for 10 000 flats in Pyongyang City. They also portray the happy life of working people and deal with the glorious history and folklore of the Korean nation. During the exhibition there will be a technical workshop for the budding artists and a presentation of their experience. Rodong Sinmun
title: National Exhibition of Budding Artists' Works Opens

text: Kim Tok Hun, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea and premier of the Cabinet of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, inspected several places of Samjiyon City. He went round construction sites including Phothae-dong and Rimyongsu-dong bustling with the third-stage project for remodeling Samjiyon City and the self-supporting bases of the 216 Division. He gave pep talks to the builders all out in the campaign of loyalty for more magnificently sprucing up the holy place of the Juche revolution, true to the idea and the spirit of the 8th Congress of the Party and the 2nd Plenary Meeting of the 8th Central Committee of the Party. He also stressed the need to push forward with the construction as planned by ensuring timely supply of materials and actively use locally available finishing building materials. He went round the Samjiyon City People's Hospital, the Samjiyon Blueberry Drink Factory and the Samjiyon Potato Farina Production Factory, where he underscored the need for those units associated with the leadership exploits of the Party to promote their development with an innovative management strategy and set an example in implementing the Party policies in order to powerfully propel the improvement of the people's living standard and the development of local industry. The field consultative meetings discussed the practical issues arising in qualitatively completing the third-stage project for remodeling Samjiyon City as early as possible and turning all cities and counties into developed areas with their own specific features on the basis of a new standard created in the construction of the holy place of the revolution. Meanwhile, at the Hyesan Youth Mine, the premier chaired a consultative meeting for boosting the capacity of the mine. Rodong Sinmun
title: DPRK Premier Inspects Samjiyon City

text: Aronia Melanocarpa, tree proven excellent for health, have been planted in over 550 hectares of land across the country in the spring tree planting period. Researchers of the Economic Forest Institute of the Academy of Forest Science, following their success in the study of markedly shortening the production cycle and boosting the rooting rate, tackled the problems arising in the application of the achievements. South Hamgyong Province has created lots of Aronia Melanocarpa field this year while Jagang Province keeps complying with scientific and technological demands in planting saplings to increase the rooting rate. In North Hwanghae Province, experience gained by Yonthan County in growing trees with economic efficiency has been generalized and the fields are properly manured and taken care of. Rodong Sinmun
title: Area of Cultivating Aronia Melanocarpa Expands across Country

text: The 8th Congress of the General Federation of Trade Unions of Korea (GFTUK) was held in Pyongyang on May 25 and 26. The congress comprehensively analyzed and reviewed the trade union work during the period under review and discussed the tasks and practical ways for fully demonstrating the cohesion of the heroic working class and militant might of the trade unions in carrying out the decisions made at the 8th Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and the 2nd Plenary Meeting of the 8th Central Committee of the WPK by bringing about a fundamental turn in the trade union work. Present at the congress were the delegates elected by the trade union organizations at all levels. Present there as observers were officials of the Party, administration and armed forces organs. Taking the platform were Ri Il Hwan, member of the Political Bureau and secretary of the Central Committee of the WPK, members of the executive committee of the Central Committee of the GFTUK, chairpersons of the provincial trade union committees, officials doing the trade union work in the armed forces organs and exemplary officials and functionaries of primary organizations of the trade unions and officials concerned. The congress elected its presidium and secretariat. The congress approved the following agenda items: 1. Review of the work of the Central Committee of the GFTUK 2. Review of the work of the Central Inspection Commission of the GFTUK 3. On revising the rules of the GFTUK 4. Election of the central leadership organ of the GFTUK At the congress Ri Il Hwan, secretary of the Central Committee of the WPK, read out "Let the Trade Unions Become Advance Units That Open Up a New Era of Upsurge in Socialist Construction in the Vanguard", the important letter sent by Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, to the participants in the Congress. The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un in the letter said: Convinced that this congress will constitute a turning point in bringing about innovation and development in the union's work in response to the unanimous desire of the working class and other trade union members to advance faster towards a great, new victory of socialism and a new life, I, in the name of the Party Central Committee, extend warm congratulations to the congress. During the arduous struggle over the last five years, all the working class and other trade union members, cherishing in their hearts the trust of the Party Central Committee that gave them the valuable title of the heroic working class of Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il, rendered an outstanding contribution to opening up the our-state-first era by displaying their unexcelled patriotic devotion. The Eighth Congress of the WPK set the goals of a new stage aimed at putting the country's economy on a track of normal development by readjusting and reinforcing it. The era of a great turn, the era of a fresh great upsurge, demands that the working class and other trade union members, the masters of creation and construction, mindful of the important mission and duties they have assumed before the times and revolution, rise up and demonstrate their fighting efficiency to the maximum. Our working class should carry forward in today's revolutionary advance the spirit and mettle of their predecessors in the postwar reconstruction period and the Chollima days who worked legendary miracles in the history of our ec
title: 8th Congress of General Federation of Trade Unions of Korea Held

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the DPRK, convened a consultative meeting of senior officials of the Party Central Committee and provincial Party committees at the office building of the Party Central Committee on June 7. Present at the meeting were members of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Party Central Committee, including Jo Yong Won and Kim Tok Hun, and secretaries and department directors of the Party Central Committee and chief secretaries of the provincial Party committees. The consultative meeting, on the threshold of the plenary meeting of the Party Central Committee, had an intensive check on the detailed situation of every field in regard to the implementation of main policies for the latter half of this year, and discussed the practical issues to cope with the situation. The respected General Secretary learnt about and examined the pending issues arising in guaranteeing the state economic work and people's living and assigned important tasks for it. Pointing out the direction of the work and study to be carried out by every department of the Party Central Committee, government organs and every provincial Party committee under the present situation, he unfolded a plan to bring about a tangible change in stabilizing the state economic work and people's living with the plenary meeting of the Party Central Committee as an occasion. Repeatedly underscoring the need for senior officials of the Party Central Committee, government and every provincial Party committee to make devoted efforts to fulfill their honorable duties of taking responsibility for the destiny of the country and the people, fully aware of their mission and duty, he gave important instructions on some measures to be taken for developing the economy of the country and improving the standards of people's material and cultural life. Political News Team
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Convenes Consultative Meeting of Senior Officials of WPK Central Committee and Provincial Party Committees

text: The emergency epidemic prevention units at all levels in the DPRK concentrate on making their work flawless. The central emergency epidemic prevention unit, carefully watching the situation of the world health crisis, meticulously conducts the work for intensifying the emergency epidemic prevention campaign in all fields, regions and units. Its officials regard it as an important task in the protracted epidemic prevention campaign to keep high alertness and tighten the discipline. The inspection and quarantine units are intensifying the ideological education for officials and working people so that they thoroughly observe the anti-epidemic regulations in their worksites. Medical treatment and preventive institutions and hygienic and anti-epidemic organs are carrying out health check-ups responsibly on the employees and residents under their charge, while disseminating anti-epidemic and hygienic information among them. They also work hard to thoroughly prevent the outbreak and spread of contagious diseases. The educational sector makes sure that school buildings and classrooms are disinfected and ventilated regularly and strictly, while urging students to abide by anti-epidemic regulations not only in schools but also on the streets and at their neighborhoods and homes. Emergency epidemic prevention units at all levels urge all working people and residents to properly understand and observe the anti-epidemic regulations. Machines and tools are thoroughly disinfected at construction sites and farms with adequate disinfectants and sterilizers. Rodong Sinmun
title: Emergency Epidemic Prevention Work Intensified in DPRK

text: All the people throughout the DPRK looked back upon the memory of President Kim Il Sung in the greatest reverence on the occasion of the 27th anniversary of his demise, the greatest national memorial day. On the occasion, people, service personnel, youth and schoolchildren visited the Kumsusan Palace of the Sun, the sacred temple of Juche, where President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il lie in state, and paid noble tribute to them. Working people, officers and men of the Korean People's Army, youth and schoolchildren placed floral baskets, bouquets and flowers of best wishes before the statues of the President and the Chairman on Mansu Hill and their statues and the mosaics of their smiling images in different parts of the country. All the officials, Party members, working people, service personnel, young people and students watched documentaries on the noble personality of the President as a great man and his lofty traits at their worksites, posts and houses. Seeing documentaries "Finding Himself among the People All His Life" and "Our Leader Praised by All People", the people deeply grasped the greatness of the President, the eternal sun of Juche. That day the people in all the industrial establishments, farm villages and great construction sites pledged to hold the President in high esteem forever and build the people's paradise on this land without fail by translating his desire to build a thriving country into reality. All the people hardened their will to add eternal lustre to the idea and cause of the President and hasten a new victory in the revolution by implementing the decisions of the 8th Party Congress without fail under the leadership of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un. Rodong Sinmun
title: Homage Paid to President Kim Il Sung across DPRK

text: True to the ideas and spirit of the 3rd Plenary Meeting of the 8th Central Committee of the Workers’ Party of Korea those engaged in the sphere of the metallurgical and chemical industries are all out to make a decisive breakthrough in putting them on a Juche-oriented footing. The workers and management of the Kim Chaek Iron and Steel Complex make primary efforts to increase the capacity for the production of their oxygen and solidify the material and technological foundations for their other production processes. The officials of the Hwanghae Iron and Steel Complex (HISC) encourage its workers to work hard with great revolutionary enthusiasm in their workshops and detailedly ensure that they unravel their knotty problems by recourse to science and technology. The workers and technicians of the HISC actively explore and tap out their internal reserves, vigorously conduct a mass technological innovation drive, build an energy-saving oxygen blast furnace and consolidate the foundations for their production one by one. The labor and management of the Chollima Steel Complex ceaselessly do their utmost to orient its production processes toward Juche. The workers and management of the Musan Mining Complex, the Jaeryong, Unryul and Hungsan Mines, the Hungnam Electrode Factory and many other units surmount their challenges and difficulties courageously and do their level best to strengthen the foundations for their long-term production and boost their current production. In the field of the chemical industry workers go all out to bring about actual changes in their production and develop the industry. The officials and workers of the Hungnam Fertilizer Complex step up their present production and make energetic efforts to finish their capacity expansion projects speedily. Those of the Namhung Youth Chemical Complex effectively accelerate their internal pipe projects to increase their production capacity. Meanwhile, they continuously make great efforts to produce catalysts on their own and build up their technological personnel. The workers and management of the February 8 Vinalon Complex vigorously refashion and repair their salt solution tanks and effectively solidify the foundations for their production. The Sinuiju Chemical Fiber Factory concentrates its efforts on reinforcing its major production processes and producing for itself the reagents needed to turn out paper. In addition, the labor and management of many units actively establish, readjust and reinforce new production processes to contribute to developing the chemical industry of the country and bettering the living standard of the people. Rodong Sinmun
title: All Out to to Make a Decisive Breakthrough in Putting the Metallurgical and Chemical Industries on a Juche-oriented Footing

text: All provinces give top priority to taking good nutritional care of children, true to the decision of the Third Plenary Meeting of the Eighth Party Central Committee on improving the Party's childcare policy. After acquiring the statistical information about the population of the children of the nurseries and kindergartens and the amount of milk production in the province, North Phyongan Province launched a socialist emulation campaign to increase the number of dairy goats, thus supplying goat milk to the children. South Hwanghae Province makes sure that several stock farms in the province boost the production of milk to be supplied to Haeju Baby Home and Orphanage and nurseries and kindergartens in Haeju City. The province mobilized vehicles in its cities and counties to ensure nonstop supply of milk to their children. Jagang Province provided its milk producers with necessary milk processing tools and took measures to produce convenient utensils for children. Many farms in other provinces also produced a large amount of cow and goat milk and goat milk powder in reliance on their strong stock raising foundations, thus supplying tasty and nutritious dairy products to the children. Different factories, enterprises, collieries and mines including the Chollima Steel Complex and the Pyongyang Electric Cable Factory 326 laid material and technological foundations for increasing the milk production to regularly supply dairy products to the children in their nurseries and kindergartens. Rodong Sinmun
title: Practical Measures Taken to Implement Party's Childcare Policy

text: A long line of trucks carrying early peaches from Kwail County arrived in Pyongyang Tuesday. The Pyongyang City People's Committee and commercial service units in the city carefully organized the transport and services to ensure the prompt delivery of the early peaches to relevant units and all the families. Destinations included baby home, orphanage, primary and middle schools for orphans, old people's home and commercial service units. The commercial service units supplied the fruit to citizens amid prompt measures being taken to stabilize and improve the people's living, in response to the decisions made at the 3rd Plenary Meeting of the 8th Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea. Rodong Sinmun
title: Early Peaches from Kwail County Supplied to Pyongyang Citizens

text: In hearty response to the decisions of the 3rd Plenary Meeting of the 8th Central Committee of the Workers’ Party of Korea (WPK) the officials of South Hamgyong Province focus their energies on boosting the production of the consumer goods badly needed to improve the living standard of the people. The officials of Hamhung City acquired detailed knowledge of the actual conditions of the local industrial factories in its districts. On this basis they make sure that realistic plans are mapped out to modernize them and carried out persistently. In Tanchon City local industrial factories make efforts to step up their production with domestic raw and other materials, reclaim their industrial wastes and modernize their equipment and strive purposefully to increase the output of their consumer goods. The officials of the city see to it that its foodstuff factory is all out to set up a production process which relies on an unpowered boiler and that its other local industrial factories made great efforts to establish the production processes fed with their own raw materials. Hochon County tenaciously executes a plan to build an up-to-date bean paste shop at its foodstuff factory to supply its inhabitants with delicious bean paste and simultaneously reinforces its equipment to improve the quality of its sunflower oil further. In addition, the county works with might and main to set up a shop for the production of toilet paper at its paper factory. Jangjin County ensures that its technicians settle one by one the technological problems of bolstering the workshops of its local industry factories to satisfactorily provide its dwellers with the goods needed to stabilize their livelihood. Moreover, the county has seen to it that new products are devised dynamically and that even liquid soaps and detergents are enabled to be turned out with raw materials richly available in its land. True to the WPK’s idea of unselfish devotion to the people the officials of many cities and counties, too, try hard to boost the production of their consumer goods. Rodong Sinmun
title: Deeply Conscious of Sense of Heavy Responsibility

text: Personages of various countries and regional organizations visited the DPRK missions in their countries on the occasion of the 27th anniversary of the demise of President Kim Il Sung. They laid floral baskets and bouquets before the portraits of smiling President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il and the art works depicting the great leaders standing together, and paid tribute to them. They included the general secretary of the Central Committee of the Nepal Communist Party (Marxist-Leninist) who is ex-deputy prime minister of Nepal, the chairman of the Nepal Journalist Association, the chairman of the Study Forum for Self-Reliance of Nepal, the chairman and the secretary general of the Nepalese Association for Supporting the Songun Politics, the editor-in-chief of the Pakistani newspaper Election Times, the national secretary of the People's Progressive Party of Nigeria, the chairman of the Nigerian National Committee for the Study of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism, the general secretary of the Workers' Party of Democratic Congo, the national chairman of the Federation of Students and Pupils of DR Congo, members of the Democratic Party of Equatorial Guinea, the special political adviser to the Senegalese president, members of the Political Bureau of the Workers' Party for the Independence of Senegal and the secretary general of the African Regional Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea. Rodong Sinmun
title: Foreign Figures Visit DPRK Missions

text: The Haeju Farm Machine Plant succeeded in making an efficient handy rice harvester at less cost on its own. Actively rousing the creative enthusiasm of its employees the plant made with its technology for itself the jigs and equipment needed to turn out the rice harvesters and produced them at full steam. The plant did not at all rest on its laurels but aimed high at making a rice combine harvester. It has already finished designing it and made the related jigs and machines. It is now producing it on trial. Fully awakened to the importance of their duty they must do in increasing the proportion of the farm work done by machines the officials, technicians and workers of the plant go on with their work for agriculture. Rodong Sinmun
title: Efficient Rice Harvesters Produced

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, visited the Fatherland Liberation War Martyrs Cemetery at 00:00 on July 27, the 68th anniversary of the victory in the great Fatherland Liberation War. The respected General Secretary was greeted at the spot by commanding officers of the Korean People's Army (KPA), including Pak Jong Chon, Kwon Yong Jin and Ri Yong Gil, and commanders of the large combined units and combined units of the KPA. He laid a flower before the cemetery. He paid a noble tribute to the heroes of the great years who honorably defended the sovereignty and dignity of the country and made the history of brilliantly carrying forward the Korean revolution, burning with boundless loyalty to the leader, confidence in victory and ardent patriotism. He made a round of the cemetery together with the participants. He said that no matter how much time may flow and how many times a generation is replaced by another, the noble revolutionary spirit and heroic exploits of the generation who won the victory in the war would dynamically propel the victorious advance of our people towards a fresh victory of the revolution, steadily stimulating and sublimating patriotism and enthusiasm of the rising generations for struggle. Political News Team
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Visits Fatherland Liberation War Martyrs Cemetery

text: The prize for best inventors was instituted in the DPRK. The prize will be awarded to the best inventors every year on the occasion of the birth anniversary of Chairman Kim Jong Il. The February 16 Science and Technology Prize and sci-tech invention prize have been bestowed upon scientists and technicians who made prominent sci-tech achievements conducive to the development of science, technology and economy of the country and the improvement of the people's standard of living, but the prize for best inventors will go to anyone, including official, worker, clerk and student, who make the best inventions. 3-5 persons will be selected as best inventors every year. Rodong Sinmun
title: Prize for Best Inventors Instituted

text: The participants in the Seventh National Conference of War Veterans enjoyed themselves at the Yangdok Hot Spring Resort before and after the conference under the special benevolence of the Workers' Party of Korea which bestows all favors on war veterans, elders of the revolution, wishing them good health. Under the warm loving care of the mother Party, the veterans visited the fantastic hot spring resort this year, too, as they did last year. They were given full VIP treatment in the whole period of recreation. They, walking along the winding corridor, feasted their eyes on the beautiful landscape, had shower bath and hot hydropathy in the outdoor spa set up in the green pine forest of Onjong Peak, and in the indoor spa that consists of scores of personal bathtubs like Kumdanghwa, pine-needle and medicinal wormwood bathtubs. The resort was enlivened everywhere with veterans who were spending a pleasant time while receiving kind services wherever they go at the resort, including the general service centre full of various kinds of fitness apparatuses and cultural recreation facilities and the egg-boiling site. They sang wartime songs and danced to the tune of folk songs with artistes of the art troupes from Pyongyang that gave colorful performance, and had photos taken. The war veterans from Pyongyang, Sinuiju, Kanggye, Hamhung and Nampho cities and Unjon and Phungso counties received birthday spreads during their recreation period, being warmly congratulated by service workers. Keenly feeling the Party's benevolence getting bigger as the days go by, all the veterans hardly repressed their excitement, saying it seemed they regained their youth. Marshal Kim Jong Un, celebrating the V-day together with the veterans, made a congratulatory speech full of enthusiasm in which he said good health of the war veterans is a great inspiration to our Party and people and a great encouragement to our revolution. Not content with such great trust and loving care shown to them, he had a photo session to be handed down generation after generation and made sure they had a pleasant rest, the war veterans said, bursting out their excitement that such a great man as Kim Jong Un could not be found in any other parts of the world. The war veterans who spent happy days at the Yangdok Hot Spring Resort extended gratitude again and again to the respected Marshal who lavishes warm affection and loving care on the war veterans so that they can remain full of energy despite their advanced ages while leading a life of all happiness and comfort in the prosperous era of the Workers' Party. The participants in the Seventh National Conference of War Veterans were full of enthusiasm to always cherish the great benevolence of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un and fully fulfill their duty as the second generation of the revolution in making the rising generation steadily carry forward the heroic spirit of the 1950s and tradition of victory. Rodong Sinmun
title: War Veterans Enjoy Themselves at Yangdok Hot Spring Resort

text: A national sci-technological presentation of the IT field was held through video conferencing on Aug. 17-19 under the joint sponsorship of the Central Committee of the General Federation of Science and Technology of Korea and the Education Commission. The presentation was aimed at sharing and generalizing educational IT successes conducive to ensuring nonstop education of students under such emergency situation as protracted global health crisis and natural disaster. More than 100 pamphlets on such successes were submitted to the presentation attended by teachers, researchers, postgraduates and undergraduates from Kim Il Sung University, Kim Chaek University of Technology, Kim Hyong Jik University of Education, etc. During the presentation there was a lecture on the issues arising in applying artificial intelligence to education. Rodong Sinmun
title: National Sci-tech Presentation of IT Field Held in DPRK

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea, sent a letter of congratulations to the trustworthy young people who volunteered to work in the difficult and challenging sectors of socialist construction on Saturday. The full text of the letter of congratulations is as follows: In the stirring period, when a dynamic struggle is being waged for the rejuvenation of our great state, our excellent young men and women volunteered to work in the difficult and challenging sectors of socialist construction, instilling a firmer confidence and greater fighting spirit in all other people and demonstrating far and wide the revolutionary character and fighting mettle of the Korean youth, who go through fire and water in response to the call of the Workers' Party of Korea. With an ardent affection for and unshakable conviction in socialism, you have turned out to work bravely for the revolution, defying trials and sacrifice; I highly appreciate your laudable patriotic deeds, and extend warm congratulations and militant greetings to our young people. My warm thanks go to the excellent parents and teachers, who supported the laudable determinations of their beloved children and students and encouraged them without hesitation, and to the organizations and officials of the youth league, who helped these young people's valuable decisions turn into patriotic minds and inspired them. I also would like to extend warm congratulations to all other young people across the country, who have greeted Youth Day while demonstrating the stout mettle of the Korean youth with hot blood and soaring passion in every corner of the country. Though your native homes and the dreams you nurtured in your minds are different, you, with the same dream and ideal of supporting the Party's intention, have settled in the workplaces, to which others do not dare to go, and in other places strange to you; you are a great pride of socialist Korea and source of its great strength, as well as young patriots of our era, beloved of your country and fellow people. Your deeds are an expression of your thoroughgoing faith to share your destiny for ever with socialism, your ardent love for your state and your outlook on beautiful life of finding the honour and worth of life on the road of working for the Party and revolution. Amid the remarkably soaring enthusiasm for volunteering by young people in response to the call of the times and their motherland in practice, not in words, the ranks of young people who volunteered to the difficult and challenging sectors have increased rapidly after the Eighth Congress of the Party; this fact showcases the wonderful ideological and spiritual state of our current young men and women. Young people around the world are flowing into their capital and other cities in pursuance of their avarice and personal pleasure. Only the Korean young people who have grown up under the embrace of the socialist motherland unhesitatingly volunteer to exchange their cards of capital citizenship with notes of dispatch to coal mines, cooperative farms, grand construction sites and islands far from cities. Our Party identifies, in your beautiful and laudable spiritual world, the patriotic soul and revolutionary spirit which remain unchanged and yet alive no matter how many generations have been replaced. You volunteered for the posts at which, you knew, you would have to suffer extraordinary hardships away from your dear homes, brightly illumined cities and belove
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Sends Letter of Congratulations to Trustworthy Young People

text: The construction of the Chonsong-Songsanchon gravity-fed drain pit has been completed. Members of the South Phyongan Provincial youth shock brigade engaged in the project have successfully finished the construction which involved the excavation of a waterway tunnel extending thousands of meters. The completion of the construction has laid a material and technical foundation for markedly increasing the coal production in the coalfield areas in the western part of the country by draining underground water from large-scale coal mines. Rodong Sinmun
title: Construction of Chonsong-Songsanchon Gravity-Fed Drain Pit Completed

text: An increasing number of workers in several units in the light industrial sector have fulfilled their two-yearly or yearly plans. The campaign in which one overtakes and learns from others and swaps experiences with each other has gained further momentum among the machine operators of the Pyongyang Kim Jong Suk Silk Mill and as a result, over 10 workers have fulfilled their two-yearly plans and over 140 workers their yearly plans. A silk reeling worker, who had come on the top in fulfilling her yearly plan fulfilled two-yearly plans on August 12 by curtailing the shuttling time. Following her, a large number of workers have fulfilled their two-yearly and yearly plans. The number of labor innovators is on the steady increase at the Kangso, Hamhung and Songchon silk mills and several textile mills. Rodong Sinmun
title: More Light Industrial Workers Fulfill Two-yearly or Yearly Plans

text: The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un received a floral basket from Thongloun Sisoulith, general secretary of the Central Committee of the Lao People's Revolutionary Party and president of the Lao People's Democratic Republic, on the occasion of the 73rd founding anniversary of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea. The floral basket was conveyed to an official concerned by the Lao ambassador to the DPRK on Tuesday. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Receives Floral Basket from Lao President

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK), met and warmly congratulated the labour innovators and merited persons who participated in the celebrations of the 73rd founding anniversary of the DPRK at the office building of the Party Central Committee on September 8. The respected General Secretary bestowed great favors of inviting to the significant September celebrations and hosting a grand reception for the labour innovators and merited persons who have made contributions to the prosperity of the country with all their patriotic enthusiasm and honest efforts in every nook and corner of the country with a single-minded unity of loyalty to the Party and the country. Feelings of great excitement and joy of the participants pervaded the courtyard of the Party Central Committee as they were invited to the most honored and the happiest place in their life under the loving care of the benevolent father to be handed down generation after generation. When the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un appeared, all the participants broke into cheers of "hurrah!" repeatedly, bursting into tears of passion to see the General Secretary who praised their life and struggle before the country and its people though they did what they should do for the motherland. Gladly shaking hands with each of the labour innovators and merited persons, he congratulated them on celebrating the founding day of the DPRK with the pride of having made contributions to the prosperity of our state. The sacred history of patriotism of the DPRK is attributable to the feats of the labor innovators and persons of merit who made great contributions to enriching the country's wealth by devotedly working at their worksites and posts and to opening up the efflorescence of socialist civilization by exalting the honor of the country in the van of scientific and cultural fronts, he said. The dignity and valorous spirit of the DPRK are a noble outcome of the heroic struggle of our people filled with burning patriotism, he said, pointing out that it is the national prestige and customs peculiar to Juche Korea without an equal in the world that the people indomitably struggle to support their beloved country never yielding to tough challenges despite decades of harsh ordeals. Saying that it is a great strength and inspiration for the Party and the state that they have lots of patriots who are devotedly working to lighten the heavy burden of the country even a bit while thinking about the state affairs before their family affairs and doing any jobs, easy or difficult, without hesitation, he had a meaningful photo session with them. Deep feelings of loyalty went up in the courtyard of the Party Central Committee along with thunderous cheers of "hurrah!", where there presented a picture of kinship between the leader and his soldiers sharing the same intention and emotion on the sacred road of service for the country. The photo session was followed by a splendid reception given in the garden of the office building of the Party Central Committee in the presence of Kim Jong Un. Joining labor innovators and persons of merits were Choe Ryong Hae, Jo Yong Won, Kim Tok Hun, Pak Jong Chon and other Party, government and military cadres. A congratulatory speech was made at the reception. The venue for the reception was full of the excitement and joy of the participants who were having a dreamlike happy ti
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Meets and Congratulates Labour Innovators and Merited Persons Who Participated in Celebrations of 73rd Anniversary of DPRK

text: Kim Jong Un, president of the State Affairs of the DPRK, received a message of greeting from U. Khurelsukh, president of Mongolia, on Sept. 9. The Mongolian president in the message extended sincere felicitations to the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un and, through him, to the diligent Korean people on behalf of the Mongolian people and on his own behalf on the occasion of the 73rd founding anniversary of the DPRK. The message noted that he recalls with pleasure the fact that the preceding leaders of the two countries made excellent contributions to developing the traditional relations of friendship and cooperation with the DPRK. It said that he would continue to cooperate with Kim Jong Un in order to steadily develop such relations in the future, too. He wished Kim Jong Un good health and success in his work and the friendly Korean people development and prosperity. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Receives Greetings from Mongolian President

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea, president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea and supreme commander of the armed forces of the DPRK, received a message of greeting from Hage Geingob, president of the Republic of Namibia, on August 17. The message said: Your Excellency It is my distinct honour, on behalf of the Government and the people of the Republic of Namibia, to extend to Your Excellency, the Government and the people of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, our sincere congratulations on the 73rd anniversary of your National Day, on September 9, 2021. The Republic of Namibia and the Democratic People's Republic of Korea share a longstanding friendship built on mutual respect and solidarity. On this joyous occasion, Namibia reaffirms its commitment towards the continued enhancement of our bilateral relations. I also wish to use this opportunity to wish Your Excellency continued good health, strength and wisdom. Please accept, Your Excellency, the assurances of my highest consideration. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Receives Message of Greeting from Namibian President

text: A mountain-climbing route from Mangmi Pavilion, one of the historic relics in Kanggye City, to the Jangjagang People's Pleasure Park was newly paved in Jagang Province of the DPRK. The pavilion has been called Mangmi Pavilion as visitors can feast their eyes on the beautiful scenery of the Kanggye area there. Balconies and a pleasure park were built there so that working people, youth and schoolchildren can have a bird's-eye view of Kanggye City during their rest time. Visitors can see new diverse sculptures, decorations in relief and flowerpot stands there. Lots of trees were planted along the route decorated by colorful electric lights. Rodong Sinmun
title: Mountain-climbing Route Newly Paved in Area of Mangmi Pavilion

text: An enlarged meeting of the South Hamgyong Provincial Military Commission of the Workers' Party of Korea on Sept. 12 reviewed the reconstruction campaign conducted in August. The campaign is now in full swing in the flood-afflicted areas in the province through joint army-people operation. Present at the meeting were members of the provincial Party military commission, chief secretaries of the city and county Party committees, senior Party and administrative officials of province-level institutions and major factories and enterprises and military and political cadres of the People's Army units stationed in the province. Officials of cities and counties and relevant units deployed in the flood-hit areas took part in the meeting through video conferencing. At the meeting the instruction of the Central Military Commission of the WPK and the decision adopted at the August 5 enlarged meeting of the provincial Party military commission were read out again first by Chief Secretary of the South Hamgyong Provincial Committee of the WPK Ri Jong Nam. The respected General Secretary Kim Jong Un took benevolent measures of urgently supplying major materials necessary for rehabilitation from the state reserves and seeing to it that powerful national material and financial support was rendered to the province for its recovery campaign, he said, and went on: The recovery campaign has been waged on a full scale true to the noble intention of the General Secretary who made sure the recovery campaign was launched by dint of the great army-people unity and building forces were dispatched, and who showed repeated paternal affection to stabilize the living of the flood victims as soon as possible. There was a detailed report on the rehabilitation campaign and analysis and review of the project conducted in August. Measures were taken for the Party organizations and officials to intensify the organizational and political work to thoroughly carry out the instruction of the Party Central Military Commission and to ensure the speed and quality of the construction at a high level. The meeting stressed the need for all the construction units to fully meet the requirements of design and construction method and push forward the overall project including construction of dwellings, rebuilding of bridges and river embankments and arrangement of roads and sections in a three-dimensional way. It also discussed the issues including the one of further scrupulously organizing the work for taking utmost care of the living of the flood victims, successfully finishing this year's farming, improving the land management and tightening emergency epidemic prevention work. The enlarged meeting emphasized that all the builders and servicepersons of the People's Army should exert themselves and successfully finish the rehabilitation campaign by the Party founding anniversary and present a report of loyalty and glory to the Party Central Committee. Rodong Sinmun
title: Enlarged Meeting of South Hamgyong Provincial Military Commission of WPK Convened

text: The number of locomotive crew members who have over-fulfilled yearly transport plans is on the increase in the field of railway transport. More than 200 crew members under the Ministry of Railways have fulfilled their yearly transport plans and several of them have honored their yearly plans at 200 percent. At least 70 locomotive crew including engineers of the Wonsan Service Brigade of Engine, the Tanchon Youth Service Brigade of Engine and the Kowon Service Brigade of Engine under the Hamhung Railway Bureau have finished yearly transport plans through an increased transport drive. Many crew members of the West Pyongyang Service Brigade of Engine under the Pyongyang Railway Bureau, the Sinsongchon Service Brigade of Engine and the Sariwon Service Brigade of Engine have recorded high results. At the Chongryong Rolling-Stock Service Brigade one locomotive engineer has finished yearly transport plan at over 220 percent and more than 10 have transported lots of materials to the different sectors of the national economy. Rodong Sinmun
title: Increasing Number of Locomotive Drivers Over-Fulfill Yearly Plans in Railway Transport

text: Pak Jong Chon, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau and secretary of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea, guided a test firing drill of a railway-borne missile regiment. Among the spectators were officials of the Department of Political Leadership over Military Affairs and the Department of Munitions Industry of the C.C., WPK, leading officials of the General Staff of the Korean People's Army and the sector of research on national defence science. The 8th Congress of the Party, as part of the establishment of a new national defence strategy, organized a railway-borne missile regiment to increase the capability of dealing an intensive multi-concurrent blow at the forces posing threats to us at a time of conducting necessary military operations and to markedly improve the capability for more positively coping with various sorts of threats. The test firing drill took place for the purpose of confirming the practicality of the railway-borne missile system deployed for action for the first time, of judging the combat readiness and capability of performing firepower duty of the newly-organized regiment all of a sudden and of attaining proficiency in the action procedures in case of fighting an actual war. The railway-borne missile regiment took part in the drill with a mission to strike the target area 800 kilometers away from its location after moving to the central mountainous area at dawn on September 15. The regiment finished rapid movement and deployment according to the norm of the operation and action procedures of the railway-borne missile system, and accurately struck the target in the East Sea of Korea according to the firepower mission. Pak Jong Chon appreciated that the test firing drill of the regiment was successfully conducted in line with the strategic and tactical design and intention of our Party. Saying that the railway-borne missile system serves as an efficient counter-strike means capable of dealing a harsh multi-concurrent blow to the threat-posing forces through separate performances of firepower duty in different parts of the country, he called upon the army and relevant field to steadily round off tactical plans for properly applying this system to suit to the geographical conditions and actual situation of our country. He discussed in detail the matter of making the railway-borne missile regiment acquire the operational experience for actual war and expanding and reorganizing it as a railway-borne missile brigade at an early date in the future. He said that the deployment of the railway-borne missile system for action in accordance with the line and policies on modernizing the army set forth at the 8th Congress of our Party holds very great significance in increasing the war deterrence of the country. Rodong Sinmun
title: Pak Jong Chon Guides Test Firing Drill of Railway-borne Missile Regiment

text: The Forest and Plant Engineering Institute under the Academy of Forest Science has established a technology of cultivating a new species of blueberry. The researchers of the institute buckled down to developing the technology from over 10 years ago to widely spread the new species, which is tasty and nutritious. Their strenuous research led to the cultivation of a new species which has high per-hectare yield and has been acclimatized to the climate not only in the central region of our country including Pyongyang but also in the areas south of it. Rodong Sinmun
title: Technology of Cultivating New Species of Blueberry Established

text: Remains of martyrs who left indelible traces on the sacred road for the Party, revolution, country and people were buried in the Patriotic Martyrs Cemetery in Sinmi-ri with due ceremonies on September 16. Jon Ku Gang was the first female general officer who lived a worthwhile military service life as an officer in medical field for decades and then as a lecturer of the Victorious Fatherland Liberation War Museum. Choe Pong Man contributed to the development of our Party while working at the Central Committee of the Party. Kang Song San devotedly worked for the country and people while working at important posts of the Party and the government for a long time. Pak In Yong, former general officer of the Korean People's Army, made a positive contribution to bolstering up the defence capabilities of the country, and Kim Pyong Hwa, former adviser of the creation section of the National Symphony Orchestra, contributed to the development of the Juche-oriented symphony orchestra. Speeches were made at the ceremonies and remains of the martyrs were buried. Participants laid wreaths, bouquets and flowers before the graves of martyrs and observed a moment's silence in memory of them. Rodong Sinmun
title: Remains of Martyrs Buried in Patriotic Martyrs Cemetery in Sinmi-ri

text: Several fields of the national economy are waging collective innovation drive by positively organizing the campaigns in which one overtakes and learns from others and swaps experience with one another. The Ministry of Electric Power Industry is scrupulously organizing the work for generalizing the good experiences gained in overhauling generating equipment and operating them after setting the Pyongyang Thermal Power Plant and the Jangjingang Power Station as exemplary units. Thermal power plants and hydro-power stations across the country are pushing ahead with the work for applying the successes made in recycling waste oil and establishing real-time efficiency-measuring system. They are creating fresh experience and technology while sharing experience. The Ministry of Coal Industry is organizing video conferencing to help all the coal mines quickly draw on experience and sci-tech achievements made in the campaign for increasing the coal production. It is conducting effective work for generalizing them by various modes and methods including visit, exhibition and show. It makes sure collective innovation drive is effected by turning the high-speed tunneling game into the course of exchanging and sharing successes and excellent experience with those units going ahead of them, not simple competition for deciding standings. In the course of doing it, hundreds of reserve cutting faces were secured and more than 3 000 valuable sci-tech achievements made and applied this year alone. Traits of teaching and learning from each other and enriching experience are prevailing in several sectors including light industry and railway transport. Rodong Sinmun
title: Collective Innovation Drive Brisk in Several Sectors of National Economy

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, made a historic policy speech "On the Orientation of Present Struggle for a Fresh Development of Socialist Construction" at the second-day sitting of the 5th Session of the 14th Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK on Wednesday. In the speech the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un congratulated the deputies who took part in the session of the supreme power organ of the dignified Republic amid expectation of tens of millions of people waging indefatigable labor struggle for the new great victory with firm confidence in socialism and with iron-strong will. He then set forth the administrative policy of the government of the Republic for powerfully propelling the new development of socialist construction under the ever-changing subjective and objective situations. Saying that the construction of our own-style socialism that has victoriously advanced with the great Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism as the guidelines has entered the phase of epochal development of comprehensively embodying our state-first principle with the 8th Congress of the WPK as an occasion, he reviewed and analyzed positive changes that are witnessed in all fields including politics, economy, culture, national defence and external relations. Despite unfavorable environment and difficulties, the might of single-minded unity between the Party and the popular masses, the driving force of socialist construction, has been further augmented thanks to the consistent, in-depth and dynamic struggle of our Party and the state to increase the driving force and internal power. In the course of thoroughly embodying the people-first principle of our Party as the basic political mode under socialism, popular nature has been evidently displayed in the state affairs and the work method and style of officials have been remarkably improved and this has resulted in deepening confidence of people in the Party and the state and in enhancing their patriotic enthusiasm and activeness, he said, and continued: Especially, the admirable tradition of the army-people unity has been steadily carried forward and it has been consolidated to be invincible as the People's Army defends the people by unsparingly shedding sweats of patriotism and remains faithful to its revolutionary obligation of rendering disinterested help to the people under the leadership of the Party. Our youth, successors to the revolution, have grown stronger in their spirit and there is a hot wind of volunteering to difficult and labor-consuming fields among them. This is a very important achievement that added great vitality to socialist construction. Such political achievements promising the sustained victory and bright future of socialist construction become tremendous encouragement and great pride for our Party and the state. In the field of economic construction big operations have been powerfully promoted to drastically prop up metal industry and chemical industry, key pillars of the self-supporting economy, large-scale major construction projects have been dynamically pushed forward and efforts have been deepened to bring about innovative improvement in various fields like agriculture, land construction, city management, science, education and public health. As a result, achievements that constitute a step forward in supporting the prosperity and development of the country have been made.
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Makes Historic Policy Speech "On the Orientation of Present Struggle for a Fresh Development of Socialist Construction"

text: The emergency epidemic prevention units at all levels are steadily intensifying the preventive campaign in the DPRK. The central emergency epidemic prevention unit is giving precedence to establishing the strong discipline and order to ensure that everyone thoroughly observes the preventive rules instituted by the state, while reexamining the epidemic prevention system and consolidating the preventive walls. Agit-prop activities are brisk to make sure that all the people turn out in intensifying the ideological and volitional unity and ensuring their unity of action and rev up the public atmosphere of epidemic prevention. Officials of inspection and quarantine units conduct disinfection of imports in a responsible way while thoroughly observing the relevant order and epidemic prevention rules. They also toughen the medical examination of relevant persons and took strict measures to get rid of laxity. Relevant sectors and units push ahead with the study and introduction of new disinfection systems and methods and disinfectants in order to reliably ensure the stability of the country and well-being of the people and the fulfillment of this year's economic tasks through the establishment of a scientific preventive barrier. Officials in the field of agriculture take measures to check the inroads of the virus through meticulous disinfection after fully preparing disinfectants and sterilizers as lots of manpower and equipment are involved in harvesting.
