Emergency epidemic prevention units in all provinces, cities and counties push forward with their preventive work in close combination with the work for the autumn clean-up months. They also carry out in a planned way the work for keeping streets, villages and worksites more tidy and clean and finding and eradicating all sources of diseases. Rodong Sinmun
title: Epidemic Prevention Work Further Intensified in DPRK

text: A vice-president and members of the State Affairs Commission (SAC), a vice-chairman of the SPA Standing Committee and the president of the Central Court who were by-elected at the 5th Session of the 14th Supreme People's Assembly (SPA) of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) are as follows:
title: At 5th Session of 14th Supreme People's Assembly of DPRK

text: Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK) and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK), sent a message of greeting to Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC) and president of the People's Republic of China (PRC), on Oct. 1. The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un in the message extended warm congratulations on behalf of the WPK, the government of the DPRK and the Korean people and on his own behalf to General Secretary Xi Jinping and to the CPC, the government of the PRC and the fraternal Chinese people on the occasion of the 72nd founding anniversary of the PRC. The message said that for 72 years after the foundation of the PRC, the Chinese people have made great successes in the struggle to carve out the destiny of the nation and achieve its prosperity under the leadership of the CPC, braving all sorts of challenges and difficulties of history. Noting that the Chinese people entered a historic course for attaining a fresh goal of building a modern socialist country after comprehensively building up a well-off society, the message said that as comrades and friends, we are pleased with the successes made in socialist China as our own. The message expressed belief that the Chinese nation's dream of rejuvenation will surely come true as there are the socialist idea with the Chinese characteristics for the new times and devoted efforts of the Chinese people close rallied around the CPC with General Secretary Xi Jinping as its core. The message said that the WPK, the DPRK government and people will firmly support the Chinese party, government and people in their just struggle to defeat the hostile forces' frantic anti-China confrontational moves and defend the sovereignty, right to development and territorial integrity of the country. Saying that now the two parties and two countries demonstrate the comradely unity while strengthening the strategic and tactical cooperation in the common struggle for advancing the cause of socialism and defending the regional peace and stability, the message expressed belief that the traditional friendly and cooperative relations between the DPRK and China will steadily develop in conformity with the common desire of the two parties and the peoples of the two countries in the future, too. The message sincerely wished General Secretary Xi Jinping good health and greater success in his work. It also wished the PRC prosperity and the Chinese people happiness and well-being. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Sends Greetings to President Xi Jinping

text: The Workers' Party of Korea Publishing House has produced posters encouraging all the people to the implementation of the important tasks set forth in the historic policy speech made by the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un. The posters ardently call for working hard for glorifying the most dignified era of our state-first principle in which the ideal of the people is brought into full bloom, upholding the administrative policy as immortal great programme and inspiring banner for dynamically promoting the fresh development for socialist construction. Other posters deal with the idea of consolidating the political and ideological position of socialism as firm as a rock by unfolding the work of consolidating the people-first principle as the political climate and social customs of our state in a more substantial and purposeful manner. The other posters show the transparent revolutionary spirit and high fighting spirit of all the people ready to surely bring about practical successes and substantial changes through fresh innovation, bold creation and steady progress. Rodong Sinmun
title: New Posters Produced in DPRK

text: Residential Area of Jungphyong Vegetable Greenhouse Farm Yangdok Hot Spring Resort Masikryong Ski Resort Ryomyong Street Samjiyon City Rodong Sinmun
title: Models of Era Which Fully Embody Our Party’s Ideals

text: A national fine art exhibition opened with due ceremony at the Okryu Exhibition Hall on October 7 to mark the 30th anniversary of the publication of Chairman Kim Jong Il's famous work "On Fine Art". On display in the centre of the exhibition hall are fine art pieces depicting President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il which help visitors recall their exploits for the development of the Juche-oriented fine art. Also on display there are hundreds of excellent art pieces including Korean painting, oil painting, sculpture and handcraft presented by art studios in Pyongyang and provinces. Those art pieces represent the Party's Juche-based idea and theory on literature and art. There are also art works dealing with the proud reality of the country that braves the worst-ever challenges and difficulties, guided by the outstanding idea and leadership of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un, and representing the happy life of the Korean people enjoying a worthwhile life under the care of the mother Party. Present at the opening ceremony were officials, artists and students in the relevant sector, art studios and educational organs, and working people in the city. Sung Jong Gyu, minister of Culture, made a speech at the ceremony. He expressed the belief that the exhibition would serve as an occasion for firmly defending the valuable exploits of the peerlessly great persons and adding eternal luster to them, and for encouraging the dynamic struggle of the Korean people for achieving a fresh development in socialist construction under the leadership of the great Party. The exhibition will continue till October 31. Rodong Sinmun
title: National Fine Art Exhibition Opens

text: The Workers' Art Group of the Central Committee of the General Federation of Trade Unions of Korea (GFTUK) gave a performance "Song Dedicated to Mother Party" at the Central Hall of Workers on October 7 to celebrate the 76th founding anniversary of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK). Among the audience were Ri Tu Song, department director of the Central Committee of the WPK, Pak In Chol, chairman of the Central Committee of the GFTUK, trade union officials, workers and trade union members in Pyongyang City. Put on the stage of the performance, which began with narration "Glory to Our Great Party," were such numbers as male solo "We Have the Great Party" and female solo "I Will Live like a Star Following Party." The performers praised the leadership exploits performed by President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il in party-building. Also put on the stage were numbers recalling that the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un is the people's benevolent father who dedicates himself to their wellbeing through his ceaseless journey. Other numbers reflected the gratitude toward and trust in the great Party, which projects the workers as the eldest sons of the country and wisely leads them, and represented the faith of the working class to accelerate the grand march of self-reliance with the fighting spirit and traits displayed by the heroes of the preceding generations. Rodong Sinmun
title: Performance Given by Workers' Art Group of GFTUK Central Committee

text: The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un made a commemorative speech at the Defence Development Exhibition on October 11. The following is the full text of the speech: Comrades, Today we will have an opportunity to see with our own eyes how the defence capability of our glorious motherland, the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, has developed. I extend warm congratulations to you, who are participating in the Defence Development Exhibition, an epitome of the advanced, modern and courageous character of our Korea. The Defence Development Exhibition Self-Defence 2021 opened today is adding lustre to the celebration of this year's anniversary of the founding of the Workers' Party of Korea. As its name denotes, this exhibition is a grand festival that will demonstrate intensively and visually the far-reaching ambition, leadership ability and practical executive capability of our Party that is bringing about a fresh turn in consolidating the defence potential of our state by invariably holding fast to the invincible line of self-defence, as well as the level of remarkable development of our state's defence science and munitions industry and their bright future. Today's grand-scale exhibition, a crystallization of our Party's revolutionary defence policy and its robust viability, is an epoch-making demonstration of our national strength no less significant than a large-scale military parade. Comrades, I still remember vividly the road of do-or-die revolution in the defence industry, an untrodden road, which our Party had to follow over the past five years, shouldering the heavy historic mission of fostering a more powerful and absolute strength with which to reliably defend the security of the country and the eternal dignity, happiness and safety of posterity in line with the demands of the changed objective and subjective conditions and environment of our revolution and the rapidly-changing military balance worldwide. Every step we have taken on the road of developing our defence capability over the past five years, in which are etched severe trials as well as moments of emotive delight, was a step for quite a glorious and worthwhile revolution and patriotism, a step for a great victory; we can be proud of this in front of our Party, country, people and posterity. We should not be inadvertent in seeing the military hardware displayed in fine array here, which we have managed to develop over the past five years. The more we stroke them and the more we see them, the greater dignity and pride we feel and the more valuable we feel they are; they are ours. All our people have rendered an unconditional and absolute support to our Party's policy of strengthening the defence capability despite the fact that they had to experience more severe hardships and difficulties caused by the persistent anti-DPRK schemes by the hostile forces, who are desperate not to see us growing stronger. But for their trust and ardent patriotism, we would never ever have developed them. Every piece of those military hardware tells many unforgettable tales about our defence scientists and technicians and workers in the munitions industry who, following the Party, have braved all manner of difficulties on the road of defence upbuilding; it is also permeated with the blood and sweat of these scientists, technicians and workers, who have worked self-sacrificingly by devoting their enthusiasm and wisdom. They have always supported unconditionally and absolutely and accepted death
title: Kim Jong Un Makes Commemorative Speech at Defence Development Exhibition

text: The Third Enlarged Plenary Meeting of the Seventh Central Committee of the Socialist Women's Union of Korea (SWUK) was held through video conferencing on October 20. Present there were members and alternate members of the Central Committee of the union. Officials of the Central Committee and the provincial, city and county committees of the union were present as observers. The meeting discussed the ways of thoroughly implementing the tasks set forth by the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un in his historic policy speech "On the Orientation of Present Struggle for a Fresh Development of Socialist Construction" at the 5th Session of the 14th Supreme People's Assembly of the DPRK. Kim Jong Sun, chairwoman of the C.C., SWUK, said in her report that officials and members of the union across the country were full of extraordinary revolutionary enthusiasm to vigorously advance toward a bright future under the leadership of the respected General Secretary, upon receiving an immortal great programme hardening firm faith in socialism and steadfast will. She said that the women's union is now faced with an honorable duty to propel the ongoing all-people general march for the prosperity of our state by arousing all the union members to implementing the tasks set forth in the administrative policy of the DPRK government. She referred to the tasks to carry it out. She called for thoroughly implementing the important tasks set forth in the historic policy speech made by the respected General Secretary, and thus vigorously propelling the new development of socialist construction of our own style with the Korean women's strong mental power and patriotic devotion. Speeches were made at the meeting. The meeting adopted a relevant resolution after studying a draft resolution. Rodong Sinmun
title: Third Enlarged Plenary Meeting of Seventh Central Committee of SWUK Held

text: A national seminar on the party-building exploits performed by President Kim Il Sung, Chairman Kim Jong Il and the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un took place in Kinshasa of the DR Congo on the occasion of the 24th anniversary of Kim Jong Il's election as general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and the 76th founding anniversary of the WPK. Present there were Andre Lohekele Kalonda, secretary general of the African Regional Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea, Otete Gaston Mboyo, deputy general secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of the DR Congo and chairman of the DR Congo-Korea Friendship and Solidarity Association, the general secretary and the deputy general secretary of the National Committee for the Study of the Juche Idea of the DR Congo and other personages from various circles and followers of the Juche idea. A reporter and speakers said that the Juche idea, the guiding idea of the ever-victorious WPK, was founded and developed by the President and the Chairman and that the idea is widely studied and disseminated throughout the world. Saying that the WPK, a party strong in the sense of independence, has formed a harmonious whole with the popular masses and holds the people absolute with priority given to their interests, they praised the party-building exploits of the leaders. They stressed that the Korean-style socialism is the one centered on the people without an equal in the world, the people's dreams and ideals are translated into a reality in the DPRK and that the study and dissemination of the Juche idea will have to be intensified so as to contribute to building a new society in the DR Congo. A letter to Kim Jong Un was adopted at the seminar. Rodong Sinmun
title: National Seminar Held in DR Congo

text: Day after day, we witness touching events eloquent of the respected General Secretary’s ardent love for the young generation. It is none other than him who personally worked out on his handbook the amount of fishes to be fed to orphans at baby homes, orphanages and primary and secondary schools for orphans in our country, saying that it is the determination and will of the Party to let them grow up healthily to be successors to and pivots of the revolution free from sorrow and with nothing to envy. His attentive care for the coming generation pervades children’s palaces and camps in different parts of the country full of their laughter and songs and their new school uniforms, notebooks, schoolbags and schools. The Party’s new childcare policy also reflects the painstaking efforts he makes to bring up children to be sound and strong. The General Secretary stressed that there is no more important revolutionary work than the work of bringing up children, the future of the country, to be strong and sound and that it is the most important policy and supreme cherished desire of our Party and state to provide more improved conditions of bringing them up even at the cost of huge sum of money. He also noted that it has to be the way of advance and development of our revolution to exert more sincerity to children even though the condition becomes worse and to take dynamic steps forward towards the future of communism with the might of that love. Every single word of his teachings bears his love for posterity. They convince us of the fact that thanks to him, our benevolent father, the song “We Are the Happiest in the World” will resound louder in our country and that a bright and rosy future is in store for us. Rodong Sinmun
title: Endlessly Bright and Rosy Future of Our Country

text: The gold painting "The Eagle" is a typical one of Ri Jing, a leading gold painter in the 17th century. Ri had developed the Korean painting in the traditional gold-paint style. He depicted flowers and animals well with gold paint without formality and consequently contributed to enriching the pictorial mood of the Korean artists. He liked to draw birds so much from his childhood that he even drew a bird with his tears when he was getting whipped on the calf by his father when he was a child. For that reason there are many bird paintings among his gold paintings. All of his paintings are beautiful and moreover they vividly describe the feature of the birds and the birds in the pictures look like as if they were alive. The gold painting "The Eagle" belongs to his album of eight gold paintings. The painting depicted an eagle standing on a trunk clutching it with its strong foot. It preserved the feature of an eagle including a fierce eye, a curved beak, cuspidate wings, sharp-edged talons, etc. In addition it displays a splendid harmony with gold-dust painting on a deep blue ground and fluently presents the shade of color and the strong and the weak of lines. Rodong Sinmun
title: The Gold Painting "The Eagle"

text: The scientists and technicians of keen intelligence in charge of sci-tech development can bear good fruit for the country and people only under the care of the fatherly leader who trust in and treat them preferentially. The respected General Secretary Kim Jong Un instructed that the scientific and technological front is the forefront in defending the Party and revolution and quickening our cause and scientists and technicians are the main force, and that bearing deep in their minds the trust and expectation of the Party and people, all the scientists and technicians must turn out to research and creation to fulfill their duty as pioneers and pacemakers of the socialist construction. He, seizing every opportunity, took benevolent measures for them and brought about the dream-like reality. Some years ago the respected General Secretary guided a scientific research unit on the spot. At that time he said that the scientists there are patriots as they developed the cutting-edge agrochemical with readiness to devote their all to the scientific research in order to implement the behests of Chairman Kim Jong Il. And he added that he would like to carry on his back the scientists there, who made a proud success with single mind to be genuine scientists serving the country and people, and to give everything to them. The scientists and technicians of our country live in such benevolent father’s bosom. They add luster to their lives as the most dignified ones in the world thanks to his love and trust. Under the great leadership of the respected General Secretary who value the scientists devoting themselves to the research and encourages them, they achieved the world-startling successes one after another by giving full play to their mental strength. Today our scientists and technicians are full of ardent enthusiasm to display the inexhaustible creativity to the full on the onward march towards a fresh victory of the socialist construction regarding the noble spirit and rich knowledge acquired under care of the respected General Secretary as the absolute weapons. Rodong Sinmun
title: Source of Inexhaustible Creativity

text: It was one day at the beginning of Juche 101(2012) when our people greeted New Year grieving over the death of Chairman Kim Jong Il. The respected General Secretary sat together with officials and gave them the important instruction to turn the intention and desire of the Chairman into reality. He said that whenever he missed the Chairman who devoted his all to happiness of the people, the image of the Chairman was pictured from that of our people and we must spare nothing for people and uphold the people as we would do the Chairman. The respected General Secretary regards it as the most important work to respect the people, defend their destiny and prioritize their interests and convenience. He set forth the revolutionary slogans like “Everything for the people and everything by relying on them!” and “Let the entire Party make selfless, devoted efforts for the good of the great people!” and personally made devoted service for people day by day. Thanks to his devotion, a lot of creations for people have been built on this land, including the Rungna People’s Pleasure Park, Changjon Street, the Ryugyong Health Complex, the Okryu Children’s Hospital, the Munsu Water Park, the Masikryong Ski Resort, the Yonphung Scientists Holiday Camp, the hostel of the Pyongyang Kim Jong Suk Textile Mill, the Songdowon International Children’s Camp, Mirae Scientists Street, the Sci-Tech Complex and Ryomyong Street. The heart of the respected General Secretary is filled with great enthusiasm for devoting himself to happiness of the people. For our great people! This is the slogan which endlessly resounds in the mind of the respected General Secretary who continues his walk of devotion to the people. It is the true feature of our socialist country of Juche led by the respected General Secretary where the leader devotes his all to the people and the people enjoy all blessings. Rodong Sinmun
title: Solely for People

text: The number of units which won the title of model technical innovation unit is increasing in DPRK. A lot of units of the national economy took up the movement for winning the title of model technical innovation unit 8 years ago. The title is awarded to units which firmly consolidate their sci-tech foundations and boost production by actively introducing valuable technical innovations into production and management through active mass technological innovation movement. In January Juche 104 (2015) over 90 units won the title of model technical innovation unit. Now the number has reached over 1 480. In 2015 alone, 132 units won the title. For 5 years since the 7th Party Congress nearly 130 units have won the title of thrice model technical innovation unit, more than 340 units the title of twice model technical innovation unit and some 540 units the title of model technical innovation unit and thus the ranks have been further expanded. With the struggle for guaranteeing the accomplishment of the national economic plan with the might of science and technology getting active in every unit this year, over 340 units have won the title of thrice and twice model technical innovation unit and the title of model technical innovation unit so far. Rodong Sinmun
title: Many Units Win Title of Model Technical Innovation Unit

text: After the 8th Congress of the Workers’ Party of Korea a lot of young people volunteered for difficult and challenging sectors of the national economy including the sectors of metal, coal and mining industry and socialist farms across the country. The respected General Secretary sent a letter of congratulations to trustworthy young people and had a photo taken with them. After hearing the news enthusiasm for volunteering runs high among the youth league officials and young people. In South Hwanghae Province over 200 young people, full of determination to live and struggle as heroic youth to be remembered by the country, volunteered to work at socialist farms. In the Ministry of Railways over 100 young people volunteered for difficult and challenging sectors with ardent love for and unshakable confidence in socialism. The advance of our country towards a fresh victory of the socialist construction will be further accelerated by the young people who volunteer for difficult and challenging sectors of the national economy fully demonstrating the stout mettle of the Korean youth with warm blood and soaring passion. Rodong Sinmun
title: More of Young People Volunteer for Major Sectors of Socialist Construction

text: The 5th Conference of the Frontrunners in the Three Revolutions opened in Pyongyang, the capital of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK), on November 18. The conference is to share the successes and experience, and analyze and review the mistakes and lessons drawn in the course of the mass movement for implementing the three revolutions after the 4th Conference of the Frontrunners of the Three-Revolution Red Flag Movement and the national meeting of active three-revolution team members, and to discuss the practical problems arising in bringing about a new innovation in the three-revolution red flag movement and the work of the three-revolution teams. The conference was participated in by three-revolution standard-bearers and the three-revolution team members who are taking the lead in implementing the revolutions-ideological, technological and cultural-, leading officials of the provincial, city and county Party committees, chief Party officials of ministries and national institutions, political officers of the armed forces organs, officials of relevant departments of the Party Central Committee and officials concerned. The platform was taken by Choe Ryong Hae, Kim Tok Hun and Pak Jong Chon who are the members of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the Workers' Party of Korea (WPK). Among those on the platform were the leading officials of the Party and government, chief secretaries of the provincial committees of the WPK, leading officials of the working people's organizations, ministries and national institutions and officials who set practical examples in carrying out the revolutions-ideological, technological and cultural-, three-revolution standard-bearers and three-revolution team members. Leading officials of the armed forces organs also took the platform. The letter "Let's Achieve a Comprehensive Development of Socialism by Kindling the Fierce Flames of the Three Revolutions" sent by Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the WPK and president of the State Affairs of the DPRK, to the participants in the 5th Conference of the Frontrunners in the Three Revolutions was conveyed by Choe Ryong Hae, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the WPK, first vice-president of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and chairman of the Standing Committee of the Supreme People's Assembly. The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un in his letter referred to the intention of the Central Committee of the Party in convening the 5th Conference of the Frontrunners in the Three Revolutions at a time when the era of great turn has come, and extended deep thanks and militant greetings in the name of the Central Committee of the Party and the government of the Republic to the participants in the conference, three-revolution standard-bearers and members of the three-revolution teams across the country who have made a great contribution to the three revolutions-ideological, technological and cultural- as the frontrunners in human remodeling and heroes of collective innovation true to the general line of our Party. Kim Jong Un mentioned the main spirit that permeates our Party's line of the three revolutions and great significance and immortal vitality of the three revolutions and gave a classic formulation that the accomplishment of the three revolutions in every field, unit and region precisely means the comprehensive development of socialism and the emergence of a powerful socialist coun
title: 5th Conference of Frontrunners in Three Revolutions Opens

text: In Hwasong-dong, Ryongsong District, there lives one girl, called Jang Un A, who got back her hope by warmhearted people. Jang, who had cultivated her talents with a dream of becoming a dancer in the future, caught an illdefined disease a few years ago. So she could not stand at all. Her condition became worse as days went by. One day, a woman residing in Hwasong-dong visited her house to ask in detail about Jang’s condition and the course of treatment before. Then she encouraged Jang telling her not to give up and that she would dance again. After that, she called at Jang’s house almost every day with materials for tonics and nutritive foodstuffs necessary for treatment. Also women in the neighborhood devoted their sincerity to Jang. A female doctor in the hospital under the Ministry of Railways, who was in charge of Jang Un A, said that different persons used to come to the hospital carrying her on their backs. She added that she felt again virtue and affection pervading the society, witnessing the fact that neighbors and many members of Womens’ Union put their whole mind to a girl’s health recovery. Thus an ordinary worker’s daughter could regain her hope thanks to the sincerity of persons in our grateful socialist system, who regard other’s pain as their own. Our socialist society is the flower garden of human love, where all the people share their joy and sorrow with each other as members of a great socialist family. Rodong Sinmun
title: Heroes in Beautiful Life

text: Only our socialist motherland advances by dint of great idea of single-minded unity and shines with peculiar features which no other country can imitate. Chairman Kim Jong Il said that he regarded the single-minded unity as the weapon of our revolution since he set out on the struggle to carry forward and accomplish the glorious revolutionary cause of Juche. He warmly instructed that the single-minded unity is his revolutionary philosophy. Looking back upon human history, every statesman stressed the importance of unity and strived to achieve the unity. But, any other party in the world and statesman did not even present the idea of ten millions’ firm unity based on one ideology and one center. It is none other than Chairman Kim Jong Il who could form the great single-minded unity centred on the leader based on the revolutionary comradeship and obligation with the same idea and will. Our single-minded unity has been further strengthened as the absolute weapon of Juche Korea and the irresistible force by seasoned and wise leadership of the respected General Secretary Kim Jong Un to fully display its might. Rodong Sinmun
title: Single-minded Unity, Precious Revolutionary Legacy

text: In November, Juche 108(2019), the respected General Secretary Kim Jong Un again visited Yangdok Hot Spring Resort under construction near completion. On arriving he had a bird’s eye view of the resort boasting itself of modern architectural beauty and expressed a great satisfaction saying that the more he looked at it, the more he liked it. After a while, he made round various places of the resort. At a block, saying that service buildings must have guideboards so that people could easily find their destination, he instructed to the officials to put up guideboards at entrance halls. Looking round a dining room he saw to it that the number of its seats was increased in line with the sleeping accommodations of blocks. In a room he pointed out that the cabinet for keeping guests’ clothes and luggage seemed small and that the rooms should have a table for putting luggage such as trunks on. When he looked around a bed-room he said that one more bedstead should be put up to the empty space of the room. Officials, who considered that it would be good enough, took off their hats to the exact demands of the respected General Secretary. Then he, pointing at the wall cabinet of the bed-room, suggested putting a small refrigerator in it. Indeed, Yangdok Hot Spring Resort conveys great devotion of the respected General Secretary for people who spares nothing for the sake of their happiness and regards it as the greatest pleasure to toil for them. Rodong Sinmun
title: Just before Completion of Yangdok Hot Spring Resort

text: There took place memorial meetings in Nepal and Kyrgyzstan, a lecture in Tanzania and a photo exhibition in Cambodia on the occasion of the 10th anniversary of demise of Chairman Kim Jong Il. The general secretary of the Central Committee of the Nepal Communist Party (Marxist-Leninist) who is ex-deputy prime minister of Nepal said that the whole life of Kim Jong Il was the noble one dedicated to the prosperity of the DPRK and happiness of its people and to the realization of independence of the world oppressed working masses. The chairman of the Central Council of the People Unity-"Kyrgyz El" Republican Political Party of Kyrgyzstan highly praised Kim Jong Il as the outstanding thinker-theoretician, great master of the art of leadership, prominent leader and genuine father of the people. The secretary general of the Tanzanian National Coordinating Committee of the Juche Idea Study Groups stressed that the image of Kim Jong Il would be kept deep in the hearts of the Korean people and the progressive mankind. The former president of the Khmer Democratic Party of Cambodia said with firm belief that the Korean people would achieve great success in the building of a powerful socialist country as they are upholding His Excellency Kim Jong Un carrying forward the cause of His Excellency Kim Jong Il at the top post of the Party and the state. A message to the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un was adopted at the memorial meeting in Nepal. Meanwhile, a seminar on Kim Jong Un's work "Let Us Brilliantly Accomplish the Revolutionary Cause of Juche, Holding the Great Comrade Kim Jong Il in High Esteem as the Eternal General Secretary of Our Party" took place in Algeria to commemorate the anniversary of Kim Jong Il's demise. Rodong Sinmun
title: Chairman Kim Jong Il Remembered in Different Countries

text: The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un sent a wreath to the bier of Kim Yong Ju, former honorary vice-chairman of the Standing Committee of the Supreme People's Assembly who is the winner of Order of Kim Il Sung and Order of Kim Jong Il and Hero of the Republic, expressing deep condolences over his death. Kim Yong Ju devotedly struggled to implement the Party's lines and policies and made a contribution to accelerating socialist construction and developing the Korean-style state social system, while working at important posts of the Party and the state for many years. The wreath from Kim Jong Un was placed before the bier of the deceased on Dec. 14. Rodong Sinmun
title: Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Sends Wreath to Bier of Late Kim Yong Ju

text: True to the intention of the Workers’ Party of Korea, the recycling is gaining momentum in North Phyongan Province. The province makes the cities, counties, factories and enterprises succeed in recycling by exchanging and sharing good experiences gained with the zeal for emulation between them. On the basis of holding fast to recycling as a main factor in normalizing the production, the Sinuiju Bag Factory wages a vigorous struggle to develop and produce various kinds of new goods. The factory produces itself the plastic lead line necessary for the bag production by making use of waste materials and makes useful tens of kinds of goods with scraps of bag, while equipping with the production process of compressed sponge in recent years. The Sinuiju Textile Mill pays big efforts to recycling. The factory, which manufactures and installs necessary facilities with the help of its technicians and skilled workers, boosts the production by recycling waste materials like cotton waste and rag. Meanwhile, amid the daily growing zeal for emulation between cities and counties for recycling, the Changsong Jute Bag Factory has increased its production based on well-arranged recycling process by its own efforts and technology. Similar successes have been made in many units including local industrial establishments in Kwaksan, Thaechon, Tongrim and Unsan counties. Rodong Sinmun
title: Brisk Recycling

text: Deep yearning and reverence of all the people across the country for Chairman Kim Jong Il, the eternal leader of our Party and people and great sage of the revolution, pervade the Kumsusan Palace of the Sun, the sacred temple of Juche, on the greatest national memorial day. The whole life of Kim Jong Il who paved an untrodden thorny path with the iron will and superhuman energy, holding aloft the red flag of Juche from the first days of his great revolutionary leadership to the last moment of his life, shines as the noble revolutionary life of the outstanding leader and peerless patriot who dedicated his all to the eternal prosperity of socialist Korea, happiness of the people and accomplishment of the revolutionary cause of Juche. Over the last ten years in which the holy history of the cause of perpetuating the memory of the leader has been given a steady continuity, our people have confidently advanced the socialist cause of Juche while creating epoch-making changes to be specially recorded in the 5 000-year-old national history under the guidance of the respected Comrade Kim Jong Un, cherishing the august name of the sun of Kim Jong Il as the banner of invincibility and regarding his behests as the lifeline. A national memorial service for Chairman Kim Jong Il took place at the plaza of the Kumsusan Palace of the Sun in a solemn atmosphere on December 17, the 10th anniversary of his demise. Attending the service were officials of the Party and power organs, working people's organizations, ministries, national institutions and armed forces organs, service personnel of the Korean People's Army and the Public Security Forces, officials and working people in Pyongyang City. The venue of the service where the portrait of smiling Kim Jong Il was displayed was wrapped in the most solemn atmosphere. Kim Jong Un, general secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea and president of the State Affairs of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea, took the platform of honor. Accompanying him were Choe Ryong Hae, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the WPK, first vice-president of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and chairman of the Standing Committee of the Supreme People's Assembly, Jo Yong Won, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau and secretary for Organizational Affairs of the WPK Central Committee, Kim Tok Hun, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau of the Central Committee of the WPK, vice-president of the State Affairs Commission of the DPRK and premier of the Cabinet, and Pak Jong Chon, member of the Presidium of the Political Bureau and secretary of the Central Committee of the WPK. Seen on the platform were Ri Il Hwan, Jong Sang Hak, O Su Yong, Thae Hyong Chol, Kim Jae Ryong, O Il Jong, Kim Yong Chol, Jong Kyong Thaek, Kim Yo Jong, Kim Song Nam, Ho Chol Man, Pak Thae Tok, Kim Hyong Sik, Yu Jin, Pak Myong Sun, Ri Chol Man, Jon Hyon Chol, Pak Jong Gun, Yang Sung Ho, Ju Chol Gyu, Ri Son Gwon, U Sang Chol and Kim Yong Hwan who are senior officials of the Party and the government, Pak Yong Il, chairman of the Central Committee of the Korean Social Democratic Party, and officials and persons of distinguished services who set examples in carrying out the behests of Chairman Kim Jong Il and the tasks for the first year of the five-year plan set forth at the 8th Party Congress. Taking the platform were also officials of the armed forces organs including Kwon Yong Jin and Ri Yong Gi
title: National Memorial Service for Chairman Kim Jong Il Held

text: Intellectuals were awarded the state academic degrees and titles in the DPRK. They made research achievements conducive to successfully carrying out the first-year tasks of the new five-year plan set forth at the 8th Congress of the Workers' Party of Korea, through a brisk campaign of intelligence and brains, and greatly contributed to the education of the rising generations. The title of Academician went to Kim Il Gwang, a researcher of Kim Il Sung University, Pak Yong Thaek, director of an institute of Kim Chaek University of Technology, Chae Hyok Gi, an academic adviser to Pyongyang University of Computer Science, and Ri Ki Song, a researcher of the Academy of Social Sciences, and the title of Candidate Academician to Pak Song Ho and Pak Ho Nam, researchers of Kim Il Sung University, Hyon Song Chol and Ri Mu Chol, section chiefs of Kim Chaek University of Technology, Kim Il Hwan, a researcher of Kim Hyong Jik University of Education, Kim Kol, a researcher of the University of Sciences, Section Chief Kim Chang Gyong and researchers Kim Hyok Mo and Choe Sun Ok of the Academy of Social Sciences, Ri Thae Nam, a researcher of the Academy of Agricultural Science, and Cha Ki Chol, president of the Pedagogical Institute. Professorship was conferred on 29 persons including Vice-President Jong Man Ho and Department Heads Kim Man Ho, Kang Jin U, Ri Hyok and Ho Chol Man and Director of an institute Pak Hui Chol of Kim Il Sung University, Deputy Dean of a faculty Kim Sun and teacher Paek Sok of Kim Hyong Jik University of Education. Doctorate went to 127 persons including Department Head Kim Un Chol and Director of an institute Ri Kum Chol of Kim Il Sung University, Dean of a faculty Kim Kyong Ho and Director of an institute So Yong Guk of Kim Chaek University of Technology. 268 persons received associate professorship and 1 307 master's degree. Rodong Sinmun
title: State Academic Degrees and Titles Conferred on Intellectuals

text: Officials, working people and service personnel visited the statues of President Kim Il Sung and Chairman Kim Jong Il on Mansu Hill in the capital city of Pyongyang on the occasion of December 24, a significant day of the DPRK. The visitors laid floral baskets and bouquets and made a bow before the statues of the great leaders. Floral baskets and bouquets were also laid before the statues of the great leaders and mosaics depicting their smiling images in other parts of Pyongyang, including Kim Il Sung University, the Ministry of Public Security and the Mansudae Art Studio. Meanwhile, officials, working people and service personnel across the country paid high tribute to the statues of Kim Il Sung and Kim Jong Il and mosaics depicting their smiling images in their residential areas. Rodong Sinmun
title: Floral Tribute Paid to Statues of Great Leaders

text: A touching story about Persimmon-Tree Company! In mid-October 10 years ago Chairman Kim Jong Il appreciated a performance given by the soldiers of the Persimmon-Tree Company. He was informed that the soldiers there couldn’t calm themselves down by the thought of arrival of the Chairman when they heard the sound of a car. He recollected with deep emotion that he had become familiar with them during the Arduous March. When the Chairman was told that all the soldiers of the People’s Army including Persimmon–Tree Company were looking forward the day of his visit, he made a promise to visit them saying he also missed them. Still, the soldiers of Persimmon–Tree Company bearing deep in their minds the promise made that day are yearning for him all the time at the thought of his sudden visit to their post. Therefore they reveal their heartfelt words looking up the sky over Pyongyang as follows. "Great General, persimmons are ripe." Rodong Sinmun
title: Servicepersons Full of Ardent Yearning for Chairman Kim Jong Il

text: Declaration of Iron Faith and Will Toward evening on December 31, Juche 83(1994), Chairman Kim Jong Il visited a firing range to shoot. With a sound of running fire of automatic rifle, breaking the silence like the calm before a storm, the target was destroyed out of recognition. In the wake of emptying a magazine, he fired again a machine gun at another target. A few hours later since his shooting, the Chairman visited the Kumsusan Palace of Sun to pay homage to President Kim Il Sung who lies in state and started on a tour of inspection to the Dwarf Pine Post. The gun report that rang out carrying the painful meaning at that time when the moves of hostile forces to isolate and stifle our style socialist country, legacy of the President, had reached an extreme and thus our revolution faced harsh trials and obstacles reflected his iron faith and will to defend the red flag of Juche bearing the whole life of the President forever, firmly holding arms of the revolution in our hands. Matchless Courage and Boldness It was one April day 10-odd years ago when the challenges and desperate behaviors of hostile forces against the DPRK reached an extreme. That day, Chairman Kim Jong Il met senior officials of the state and military and instructed them that he did not make empty promises and did everything without condition when he was determined. Many eye-opening victories were achieved on this land thanks to the wise leadership of the Chairman who had matchless courage and boldness. Therefore, President Kim Il Sung highly praised the Chairman’s courage and boldness and used to say that the Chairman was unperturbed even though tens of millions of powerful enemies came in crowds, he was so surprised at the Chairman’s courage and boldness and he was greatly encouraged by the Chairman’s courage and boldness on several occasions. Our people convey the great personality of the Chairman, who led our revolution to victory with matchless courage and boldness, year after year. Slogan "Let Us Help the People!" One February day Juche 97(2008), Chairman Kim Jong Il inspected a unit of the Korean People’s Army. Carefully looking the letters "Army-civilian Unity", written on signboard of the unit’s education room, he said that the army-civilian unity means that the army helps the people and the people assist the army. And he stressed that lower units like company should uphold the slogan "Let Us Help the People!" Chewing over its meaning, there was the noble intention of the Chairman that the servicepersons should become the reliable creators of the people’s happiness who devote their sincerity to the people’s happiness despite hardships, create "something" out of "nothing" and turn a misfortune into a blessing. The slogan "Let Us Help the People!" reflects the true character of our revolutionary armed forces further strengthened as the genuine people’s army under the leadership of the Chairman. Rodong Sinmun
title: Venerable Great Personality Kept in Mind of People
